The earth elemental in front of her did not give Queen Medusa a chance to catch her breath and threw a punch. Queen Medusa turned her body sideways and dodged, and quickly slashed the enemy’s arm. However, it was unfortunate that the crystal machete that had already been through a lot that it could not hold up anymore. It was shattered as well.

Queen Medusa was left empty-handed. She suddenly fell into a huge crisis. At that very moment, the sound of roaring suddenly came. She saw a round cyan stone flying rapidly through the air, hitting the body of the elite earth elemental who was attacking Queen Medusa from behind. His entire body was knocked back more than ten meters and fell to the ground.

The light cyan stone opened up and became an earth elemental that was the same as the elite earth elemental people, but a red cloth was tied to its arm. To Queen Medusa’s surprise, this elite earth elemental that had a red cloth tied to it did not attack her, instead it scuffled with his companion.

At the same time, a familiar howl sounded. Queen Medusa regained her vigour. The taurens! The reinforcements have finally arrived!

What made Queen Medusa even more surprised was that among the taurens, there was a large group of earth elementals that had red scarves on their arms. These earth elementals did not attack the medusas, but their own kind and the demonic flies!

The keen-eyed Queen Medusa saw the “demon” Chen Rui whom she almost petrified rushed to the surrounded Tim and Lysa and rescued her daughter. Then, Lysa’s hissing voice sounded across the battlefield. She must have used some magic tool to amplify her voice. “Medusas, don’t attack the earth elementals with red scarves on their arms. They are our allies!”

Are the earth elemental people with the red scarves the allies that the suspicious figure named Chen Rui mentioned? If these earth elementals were spies, they only needed to stop the taurens’ reinforcements to destroy the Medusa Tribe. Why would they provide aid at this critical moment?

While distracted, the Chief Tauren’s howl suddenly sounded in her ears. Its strong body appeared beside her. He wanted to sneakily attack the elite earth elemental with his axe. Suddenly, sparks flew everywhere. A long, noticeable groove appeared on the elite earth elemental’s body that had been enhanced with <Steel Armor> and <Stone Skin>. The elite earth elemental was staggered back.

Queen Medusa noticed that the weapon in the Chief Tauren’s hands was not the usual stone hammer, but the taurens’ favorite metal battleaxe!

Not just the Chief Tauren but almost all the taurens were holding metal weapons in their hands. The Chief Tauren’s body was also covered with shiny armor!

The medusas also knew some smelting techniques, but it was far from comparable to the taurens. The queen knew the current mineral situation in the underworld. Due to the problem with crystal impurities, even the taurens could not extract metals pure enough to make weapons and armor. Therefore, all the medusas’ bows and arrows all changed to stone.

She never expected that the taurens finally found a method to extract metals. They are indeed the taurens who are proficient in smelting and forging!

“Mother! Come quick!” Lysa’s cry caught Queen Medusa’s attention. Queen Medusa’s snake body bounced and leaped up. Although she had no weapons, she had extraordinary strength. She threw punches as she walked and the demonic flies along the way fell like rain.

When Queen Medusa reached Lysa’s side, she saw a lot of metal weapons and arrows piled on the ground. They were obviously prepared for the Medusas. She couldn’t help but be overjoyed. She heard Chen Rui’s voice in her ear, “Queen Royal Highness!”

Queen Medusa turned her head and saw two silvery things being thrown over. It was a machete and a round shield of the best quality. They were enchanted dark star iron weapons. Her golden snake pupil flashed, and she slashed in Chen Rui’s direction.

Athena was taken aback. Queen Medusa moved very fast, it was too late to help him. Then she saw that the three decomposing demonic flies behind him, that were attempting to sneak attack, stopped for a moment and turned to pieces. She then understood Queen Medusa’s intentions.

Chen Rui bowed to Queen Medusa. “Queen Royal Highness, please catch an elite earth elemental together with the Chief Tauren!”

Queen Medusa stared at Chen Rui for a while, then turned toward the battle with the elite earth elemental.

Chen Rui secretly breathed a sigh of relief. When Queen Medusa attacked in his direction just now, he was really startled. Tim saw it from the side and gave Chen Rui a thumbs up.

Athena danced with her big sword, but she did not transform. She cooperated with Chen Rui to protect Tim and the pregnant Lysa while giving out weapons to the Medusa. The big sword had a pale red sharp light. Demonic flies that approached were torn apart one by one. The big sword in her hand was no longer a knockoff that would shatter easily, but an enchanted weapon made from dark star iron. This big sword carried a special significance, because it was cast by Chen Rui himself.

Athena initially thought that Chen Rui learned forging on a whim. She silently accompanied him the past few days. Of course, Chen Rui’s “talent” for forging shocked the taurens as well as Athena. However, when the great sword gradually formed under his hands, Athena suddenly understood.

He said this before, in front of the cottage in the forest.

“You need a better sword. I will definitely give you a better sword in the future.”

What could be better than the sword he cast himself? Or more valuable and meaningful?

Although he had incredible talent, he also experienced great hardships and efforts. Just to forge a perfect sword body, he consulted the tauren leader no less than ten times, and finally succeeded in making it.

He couldn’t do the enchantment part himself. He asked the tauren priest, Torre to help him with the bloodthirst skill. Due to the material characteristic of the dark star iron, the rare occurrence of double enchantment actually happened. Athena firmly believed that it must be Chen Rui’s luck.

This sword, named “Guardian’s Sword” by Athena, was meant to protect someone. Chen Rui thought it sounded a little awkward. He was a manly man; he should protect his own woman. Why was it the other way around? He wanted Athena to change its name, but Athena only listened to him when it came to everything else and even let him to take advantage of her sometimes, but she just refused to give in when it came to this matter.

Chen Rui had no choice but to let her be. He just treated it as them protecting each other. Speaking of which, he even played a console game of the same name in a different world…

However, this was indeed a good sword. One of the characteristics of the Guardian’s Sword was its extremely sharp blade. Its enchantment attribute was 20% defense reduction and 40% increase in attack.

Although it had slightly lower defense, it was indeed very suitable for Athena who loved playing offense. In terms of defense, she could make it up with armor. Athena also changed her leather armor.

This leather was not an ordinary leather, but a hydra leather. It was the best material for making armor. However, the taurens’ leather armor making skills were far worse than forging. The craftsmanship was still lacking in proficiency, but she could make do with it. Besides, there were only two hydra leathers in the warehouse. If it was really unusable, he could make a good one later. When it came to his own woman, naturally there was nothing he would not give. Except when they were being intimate, she should be well-armed for usual time.

With the arrival of reinforcements and the new powerful weapons, the medusas’ morale was boosted. The demonic flies and mutated earth elementals’ fierce offensive power was gradually suppressed. The most strained were the two mutated elite earth elemental people Taug and Sog. The powers of those two were slightly below Queen Medusa and the Chief Tauren. Now together with Tag who had comparable powers, the three versus two situation put them at a definite disadvantage. If not for their super strong defenses and unpredictable earth-type magic, they would have been destroyed.

The demonic flies and mutated earth elemental crowded around the fountain of life. Even if they were affected by the power of several Demon King-level powerhouses, they did not fall back. They seemed to be casting something. This scene was similar to the Tauren’s Den lair previously.

Chen Rui watched from a distance, and came up with a hypothesis in his mind: Is the enemy’s motive the fountain of life? Even if they could not eliminate the Medusas, they would continue to try to strengthen the “seeds” of the evil eyes, drawing power from the fountain of life until it dried up.

Sure enough, the demonic flies saw that they could not win. They surrounded the fountain of life for a while, and then began to evacuate with the mutated earth elemental.

At that moment, the Chief Tauren howled. Queen Medusa remembered what Chen Rui said just now. Both of them attacked at the same time, focusing on the elite earth elementals who were trying to evacuate. The elite earth elementals flew backward and fell to the ground. After coming in contact with the ground, they seemed to regain some strength and continued to wave their hands. Several rows of thick earth walls emerged from the ground, blocking the approach of two powerful enemies.

While the Chief Tauren and Queen Medusa were breaking through the earth wall, the elite earth elemental was about to flee. Suddenly, the surrounding land changed. Fierce stone pillars emerged, bending to form a cage and entrapping it. It was the earth-type magic <Stone Prison>. Earth-type magic had no effect on the earth elemental that was formed by the earth element. The elite earth elemental touched the stone pillar of the <Stone Prison> with its hands, and the originally hard stone pillar turned into powder and crumbled on the ground.

At that moment, the cracks on the earth wall suddenly expanded. It shattered in an instant, and the figures of the Chief Tauren and Queen Medusa appeared. The elite earth elemental could not use magic for some time, so they just curled into a round rock and tried to roll away.

A cyan figure emerged from the ground, and its hands tightly hugged the round stone that had not completely closed yet. Both parties’ earth elemental powers canceled each other out, and it couldn’t escape for a while.

At this time, another elite earth elemental people had already fled alone. The remaining enemies also retreated like the tide. Chen Rui heard Delong’s howl, “Chen Rui, come here!”

He knew that the Chief Tauren had succeeded, so he hurried forward. He saw that the body of the elite earth elemental was being tightly hugged by Tag, and its four limbs were being controlled by Queen Medusa and the tauren leader.

“Sog’s earth elemental power is under my control for the time being. It can’t release any magic, but it won’t last, so you must be as fast as possible!” Tag’s voice seemed a bit strained.

Chen Rui was well prepared. When he heard Delong’s voice, he put on “Dark Will” on his left hand and drank the corresponding spirit potion. He immediately extended his hand and activated <Aura Conversion>.

After confirming the conversion prompt, it was as expected. Those terrible eyes reappeared in Chen Rui’s consciousness. Suddenly, the cold and evil eyes almost made Chen Rui’s will crumble. Fortunately, he was already mentally prepared. Relying on the conversion of the Super System and the spiritual resistance of the Dark Will, he persevered. The power of the evil eyes on this elite earth elemental called Sog was strong, but it was not endless like the fountain of life. Moreover, he was prepared for the second battle this time. Chen Rui’s resistance had strengthened a lot, or maybe it was the intelligent absorption of the Super System that became stronger. About 20 minutes later, Sog’s struggling gradually weakened. The pale yellow light in his eyes began to fade.

About ten minutes after Chen Rui activated <Aura Conversion> for the second time, Sog’s eyes finally returned to white.

“That’s enough, Tag. Hugging me like this is very uncomfortable for me.” Sog’s deep voice sounded.

What was the situation of the Earth Elemental King? Could Sog give them the answer?

chapters.title: Chapter 159: Terror! The Impending Revival Of The Demon Overlord
chapters.body:
Chapter 159: Terror! The Impending Revival Of The Demon Overlord

“Sog, you’re really awake!” Tag was overjoyed and stood up. Chen Rui wiped his sweat and signaled to Queen Medusa and Delong that they could release their restraint.

Sog got up slowly and shook his head, saying, “In fact, I was always awake, but my consciousness was being controlled. My body executed commands involuntarily. The other earth elementals must be the same.”

“Sog, tell me, what happened to the great king?”

Sog sighed, “To be precise, that is no longer our king!”

Tag was shocked. He thought of the “Glorfin” that Chen Rui mentioned said in shock, “Has the king’s consciousness been taken over?”

Sog shook his head. “Even if it has not been completely taken over, I’m afraid it’s almost there. That person will soon really control the king! At that time, all creatures in the underworld will be destroyed!”

Whether it was Chen Rui or Delong and Queen Medusa who were listening to the translation at the side, they were astonished when they heard the news.

Chen Rui took a deep breath and asked, “Sog, can you tell everything you know?”

Saugu glanced at this strange “demon”. He crossed his arms and bowed. “Although you are weak, you have all kinds of magical abilities. Thank you for saving my fallen will.”

“You’re welcome. I’m a friend of the earth elemental.” Chen Rui followed suit and returned a bow. He asked, “If I may ask, I’ve learned a lot from Tag about the Earth Elemental King, and also inferred the true origins of ‘that person’. Since you have always been awake, you must know more about it. Please elaborate in detail. We have now united the forces of the awake earth elementals, the taurens and the medusas. We must try to stop that person and wake the Earth Elemental King as soon as possible.”

“The best way is to remove the mask from the king’s face.” Sorg continued shaking his head. “At the time, I pretended to accept the mutation and tried a sneak attack, but I couldn’t compete with the mental power of the Demon Overlord. As a result, I got controlled before I could do anything. I ended up truly accepting the ‘mutation’ until now.”

Tag suddenly realized the truth. “So you wanted to take off the king’s mask, that’s why you were controlled?”

“I initially intended to peek into the secret of mutation, but was later found out by the king. At least pretending to accept the mutation allowed me to attempt to remove the mask, but it ultimately failed.” There was a hint of fear in Sog’s voice. “The power of that mask is too terrifying. At the time, all I did was get close to the king, and it felt like my element soul was about to be swallowed by that mask…”

Chen Rui groaned, “From the current situation, the Earth Elemental King can’t rely on his own strength to remove the mask, and the access passage to above ground has already been destroyed. We must do something, otherwise we can only stay here and wait for death.”

“We elemental people are condensed in our natural elements. After the death, the element dissipates, but it is just changing our way of survival.” Tag was very “enlighted”; he didn’t care about life and death. “But I can’t let the king become a controlled puppet. That is why I led the earth elementals to leave the Earth Realm at first. Now, It is time for us to go back. I hope our death can give the king a chance to regain consciousness.”

Sog nodded strongly. “Let’s go back together!”

When Chen Rui heard that two elite earth elementals wanted to use their deaths to awaken the king, he quickly stopped them, “Don’t make any unnecessary sacrifices. “That person” is called Glorfin Beelzebub, a Demon Overlord-level powerhouse. The mask is one of the seven demon artifacts, the ‘God-Eating Mask’. The artifact is very powerful. Now that the Earth Elemental King has basically been completely controlled, even if you all die in front of the king, you will not be able to shake the will of the artifact. Sog, think back carefully. Is there any other way? Oh right, what is the relationship between the fountain of life and the Earth Elemental King’s current status?”

This reminded Sog of something. He thought deeply for a moment and said, “If you can destroy the fountain of life, you might be able to delay or even prevent that person’s control.”

“No!” When Queen Medusa and the tauren leader heard the translation, they spoke at almost at the same time. No matter the reason, if the fountain of life was destroyed, it was equivalent to directly severing the vitality and continuity of the two tribes. It was no different from death .

Chen Rui had an idea. He said, “Delong, my friend, do you remember where the taurens’ fountain of life went?”

Delong reacted immediately. Surprise colored its bull eyes. “Do you mean…”

“Let me first ask this earth elemental what the relationship between the fountain of life and the revival of that Demon Overlord is.”

Sog answered Chen Rui’s question quickly. “The Earth Realm and the trolls’ original fountains of life did not dry up, but were being controlled by Glorfin’s strange powers. His purpose was to draw the power of the fountain and keep strengthening his own fill, further suppressing the Earth Elemental King’s will.”

Chen Rui finally understood. It turned out that after learning that the taurens and the medusas had formed an alliance, Glorfin understood that just relying on the demonic flies and the mutant earth elemental people’s powers could not eliminate the two strongest creature tribes the way he did with the trolls, so he changed his strategy. He focused on the fountain of life. Heand constantly used his strange powers to draw power from the fountain of life and seal it away at the same time. As long as he could fully control the Earth Elemental King’s will, wouldn’t destroying the taurens and the medusas be very easy?

At present, the most important thing was to buy time. They must transplant the medusas’ fountain of life to Galaxy Garden as soon as possible, and first they needed to obtain Queen Medusa’s consent.

“Queen Royal Highness, I have an important matter to discuss with you. This matter is directly related to the medusas and taurens’ survival…”

Queen Medusa listened to him talk continuously, her golden snake pupil flickering irregularly. A moment later, she said, “The taurens being able to cast metal weapons turned out to be your work! You also used your special ability to keep the taurens’ fountain of life? It truly is a very fascinating power. No wonder you could escape from my hand that day. Furthermore, I had obviously used petrification on you, yet you are safe and sound. But once you collect all the fountains of life and do not return them, it is tantamount to seizing the lifeblood of the taurens and Medusas. Even if the Earth Elemental King regains consciousness, this situation will still exist.”

Delong on the side asked Chen Rui about Queen Medusa’s doubts. He growled with discontent, “These snake women are so suspicious. They will never make true friends!”

Facing Queen Medusa’s sword-like scrutiny, Chen Rui looked her in the eye without fear. “I am only doing this for the sake of my survival and everyone else’s, including the medusa tribe. You have no choice. Because you are not just a Medusa, but also the queen of the Medusa tribe.”

This was exactly what Queen Medusa reprimanded Lysa for. Her eyes narrowed slightly, but she still nodded happily. “Okay, come with me.”

This surprised Chen Rui a bit. Persuading her went so smoothly?

“Thank you for your trust, Queen Royal Highness.”

Queen Medusa suddenly showed a weird sneer and stuck out her snake tongue. “Although you are weak, you are very daring, cunning and at the same time very revengeful. Maybe you are more suited to be a medusas’ man than Tim. You should know the effect of the fountain of life on medusas. If you do not return it in time, then you should stay in the Medusa tribe. I believe that not only us but even those cow heads would be very happy to keep you as a friend.”

Chen Rui didn’t expect Queen Medusa to use this incident to coerce him. He shivered several times.

Stay in the Medusa tribe? Become a gigolo who is forced to mate numerous times in a night? And with those girls of “unique taste”?

He remembered seeing someone mention on the Internet that the mating time of snakes could reach a maximum of twelve hours. He did not know whether it was true or false, and he didn’t know the difference between these snake women and the snakes in that world. Otherwise, even if he had a dragon’s physique, he would also be squeezed dry. No matter what, Xu Xian [1] should only be worshipped and not imitated!

In the Demon Realm’s version of Legend of the White Snake only needed one male protagonist, Tim!

Chen Rui followed Queen Medusa next to the medusas’ fountain of life. The medusas’ fountain of life was twice as big as the taurens’, but it was also covered with those golden specks of light. Drying up was only a matter of time.

A large amount of mist appeared in Chen Rui’s hands, enveloping the fountain of life. After a while, the fountain of life disappeared. The fountains of life did not seem to stack. The Medusas’ fountain of life did not merge with the taurens’; the two divided into two pools in Galaxy Garden. Strangely, the medusas’ fountain of life looked larger than the Taurens’, but its total was still 200/200.

The medusas were stunned. Queen Medusa at the side immediately announced that to prevent the fountain of life from being invaded by the enemy, Chen Rui already used his special power to collect the fountain water. If any Medusa went into heat, they could ask him for the fountain of life or directly mate with him.

As soon as she said that, the surrounding snake pupils focused on Chen Rui’s body. Some of them also had strange looks in their eyes, causing Chen Rui to feel severe chills. He involuntarily clenched Athena’s hand. Queen Medusa’s words were too toxic!

The most surprised was Tim. This Chen Rui person had the same level of power as him, but he had endless fascinating “bloodline talents”, some of them were almost unheard of. He was probably not part of the Great Demon race, but a descendant of a royal family. No wonder he could get Athena, the daughter of the empire’s first general.

After the situation at Medusa’s Lair was over, the taurens began to recount the weapons. The metal weapons given to the Medusas were a huge gift, but due to time, the number of machetes and shields was insufficient, especially the arrows that were used the most. These weapons were mostly ordinary metal. Because dark star iron weapons were scarce and difficult, they were mainly allocated to Demon King-level user or above.

Chen Rui and the Chief Tauren, Queen Medusa and the two elite earth elementals discussed carefully and decided to split up the work. The two elite earth elementals would take Chen Rui to the troll’s ruin to collect the fountain of life. The taurens would seize the time to use the large number of minerals that had been purified by Chen Rui to forge weapons and armor. The medusas also had a certain level of forging ability, especially arrows. They could work with the taurens to speed up the progress.

There was no longer any concern about the fountain of life. The three main forces could join together to deal with the fight that could occur at any time.

[1] Xu Xian was the man who married to a white snake spirit. <a href=”https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Legend_of_the_White_Snake”>https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Legend_of_the_White_Snake</a>

Let’s just hope that Chen Rui didn’t end up like Tim.

chapters.title: Chapter 160: Undying Demon King-Level Demonic Flies
chapters.body:
Chapter 160: Undying Demon King-Level Demonic Flies

For safety reasons, Chen Rui left Athena in the Tauren’s Den. Athena wanted to go with him, but knew that her strength was insufficient, lest she distracted him, so she had to stay behind obediently. With her insistence, Chen Rui brought Dodo along. After all, Dodo had an immortal body and the skill of transformation. He might be able to help Chen Rui escape at any critical moment.

The trolls’ caves were far away from taurens. They were already quite close to the Earth Realm. The two elite earth elementals did not bring any extra people, leaving all of the earth elementals with the tauren tribe.

“Elementals don’t need to eat?” During the break in their journey, Chen Rui asked curiously as he ate.

“Elemental people are formed by condensing the earth element in nature. As long as I convert the earth element into my own power, I don’t need to eat. However, there is an upper limit to this conversion. The more powerful, the more conversion is required.”

Compared to Tag, the newly awake elite elementals Sog obviously loved to talk more. Unfortunately, most of its original companions were quiet. Now, for the first time, he encountered Chen Rui, an outsider foreigner who could communicate with it, he felt particularly novel. Although one was Great Demon King level and the other was Higher Demon level, it was still rare to have the same interest.

However, the journey was so rushed that they didn’t have much time to talk. Finally, the group arrived at the trolls’ cave. The trolls used to be the most populous race in the underworld. Caves could be seen everywhere. They were deep and narrow. They were completely different from the style of the taurens’ caves.

There was a large number of trolls, and they were not particularly strong. Their lair was adjacent to the Earth Realm. They prospered and lived peacefully by taking advantage of the earth elementals, but never expected that their rise and fall would be due to the same reason. Finally, they were eliminated by the controlled earth elementals.

They encountered many demonic flies along the way. The elite earth elementals had great Demon King-level powers and earth-type magic that could be cast at will. They did not need to use much energy.

The trolls’ fountain of life was located in an open field, surrounding by caves. When viewed from a distance, only a recessed pit could be seen. The fountain seemed to have dried up. The pit had golden flecks of light that flickered vaguely. Their color and thickness greater than those at the Tauren’s Den.

Tag and Sog’s footsteps suddenly stopped and Chen Rui looked vigilant. Buzzing began to sound in the surrounding caves. In an instant, an unknown number of demonic flies flew out of the caves. All he could see was densely packed flies, like dust in the air. Even light of the surrounding minerals was covered up.

“Tag, you protect Chen Rui to the fountain of life in the middle! I’ll deal with these things!” The earth elementals were mostly of calm temperaments, but Sog was controlled for hundreds of years. He unleashed the anger that he kept in his stomach for a long time. Several large flower-shaped stones were shot at the demonic flies. They exploded intensely. The demonic flies within the explosion range were all turned into powder.

Tag had already cast <Stone Skin> magic on Chen Rui. This magic could enhance defense, but at the cost of speed. The stronger the caster’s magic power, the more the defense enhancement, and the slower the speed.

Tag was an elite earth elemental, so he naturally had extraordinary earth-type magic powers. Chen Rui only felt that the skin on his body grew an extra layer of tough film. Although it has a slight impact on his movements, his defense was enhanced significantly.

Tag covered Chen Rui as they rushed toward the dried-up fountain of life in the middle. A large number of stone walls were erected along the way to keep the demonic flies that rushed up away. However, cracks appeared on the stone walls after a while. It was some kind of golden color demonic fly that broke the stone walls. The demonic fly was about the same size as the bloodthirsty demonic fly, but much more powerful. Chen Rui had only seen this kind of demon fly a few times from a distance before. They could compete with Demon King-level taurens. He dared not approach them. Now, he was in close contact with them and they were within the range of <Analytical Eyes>. Their information was immediately displayed. Sharp wind demonic fly, Comprehensive Strength: C.

Sharp wind demonic flies were Demon King-level demonic flies. Their number was relatively small, but they were extremely fast. Speed was the earth elemental people’s weakness. With the elite earth elemental’s Great Demon King-level speed, they actually couldn’t catch up.

White light flourished from Tag’s eyes. With the body as the center, a faint wave spread out. Chen Rui felt his body sink, like his weight suddenly increased. This feeling was too familiar. He had experienced it several times in the training ground. It was earth-type magic, <Gravity>.

As soon as <Gravity> was unleashed, the demonic flies suddenly slowed down. Tag’s punched continuously with both fists, and several of them were instantly destroyed. Together with Chen Rui, they gradually approached the pit. At this moment, Chen Rui’s <Analytical Eyes> prompt changed.

He saw the dried up fountain of life suddenly change. The crystal light around it suddenly rose to become a fierce pale yellow crystal column. The crystal column automatically scattered into countless blocks, and then quickly began to recombine.

Chen Rui was stunned. Transformers? The Allspark Cube?

It did not recombine into a block, but a translucent demonic fly, which was larger than the decomposing demonic fly.

<Analytical Eyes> showed. Race: Spirit-devouring demonic fly (Clone). Comprehensive Strength Assessment: unable to determine!

In the previous battle, the Glorfin side had always used earth elemental people as the main battle force. The most he saw was the Great Demon King-level golden sharp wind demonic fly. Now it was his first time seeing a demonic fly whose strength was “unable to determine”!

What confused Chen Rui was what did “clone” in the brackets mean?

“Sog!” Tag quickly yelled. He felt that the power of this demonic fly was not below him. Now the most important thing was to protect Chen Rui to complete the task.

After escaping being controlled, Sog’s strength had reduced. He was weaker than Tag, the leader of the three great elites. He was using <Stone Flowers of Death> to eliminate many demonic flies. When he heard Tag call him, he immediately came to take over the task of protecting Chen Rui. Tag headed straight toward the spirit-devouring demonic fly.

Sure enough, the power of the spirit-devouring demonic fly greatly surpassed the sharp wind demonic fly. Tag’s punch only pushed it back a few meters. It flew up again, hitting Tag’s body. The impact of this collision was not trivial. Tag stumbled back five or six steps. A lot of debris fell from his body. Obviously, the strength of the opponent was still beyond imagination.

Tag hurriedly buffed himself with the strongest defensive magic <Steel Armor> and began to battle the spirit-devouring demonic fly.

Chen Rui could not get involved in this battle at all. If not for Sog’s protection, even if he was not killed by the demonic flies surrounding him, he would have been destroyed by the aftershocks from the battle between the spirit-devouring demonic fly and Tag.

Earth elementals were proficient at earth-type magic The power of Sog’s <Gravity> was average, but <Stone Flowers of Death> was extremely powerful. He was considered one of the earth elementals who was relatively good at offense. Under the explosive power of the <Stone Flowers of Death>, the nearby demonic flies crumbled. Some of them were even sharp wind demonic flies. Unfortunately, this powerful magic consumed a lot of power. Even elite earth elementals couldn’t use it continuously, otherwise they could keep casting it to eliminate all the enemies.

If it was only Sog himself, he could naturally eliminate enemies without hesitation. With Chen Rui as a “burden” there, he couldn’t fight to his heart’s content. Chen Rui noticed another problem. The spirit-devouring demonic fly should be a Demon King-level demonic fly, but why didn’t I see such a demonic fly in the battle against the taurens and medusas?

If this kind of demonic fly participated in the battle, plus the two elite earth elementals, even if Queen Medusa and the Chief Tauren joined forces, they would be no match for them. The two tribes would have most likely been destroyed. Why would Glorfin put the demonic flies that could turn the tide in such a place?

There is only one possibility, that is the spirit-devouring fly can not participate in the battle or leave this place… because, this place has the fountain of life!

The spirit-devouring demonic fly must be unable to leave the fountain of life. This was probably the reason why the fountain of life dried up. Chen Rui suddenly thought of <Analytical Eyes> prompt. The word “clone” popped in his mind.

Thinking of this, Chen Rui immediately said to Sog, “Sog, try to kill all the golden demonic flies, then go help Tag. I can deal with this myself. You must destroy the demonic fly fighting him, it could be the key to wake up the Earth Elemental King!”

When Sog heard the last sentence, he regained his vigour. He disregarded the consumption of the earth elemental power, aimed at the areas where the sharp wind demonic flies were and continuously launched <Stone Flowers of Death>. Between sounds of explosions, demonic flies fell like rain. Chen Rui looked around. It seemed that there were no more sharp wind demonic flies. He quickly urged Sog to help Tag.

Sog didn’t hesitate and directly joined the battle. As soon as Sog left, the nearby demonic flies felt a sudden decrease in pressure. All of them surrounded Chen Rui. Faint light emitted from Chen Rui’s palm. He yelled, “<Destructive Aura Blow>!”

The aoe skill was extraordinarily powerful. All the demons within five meters were cut by countless sharp blades at high speed. The weakest which were the bloodthirsty demonic flies turned into powder. Only some decomposing demonic flies and borer demonic flies let out injured cries. Chen Rui used <Aura Blade> to kill the ones he missed just now. Originally, using <Aura Conversion> could take care of the borer demonic flies, but it was too time consuming. It was not suitable in this situation.

“Dodo, get to work! If you perform well, you will be rewarded with ten hallucination fruits!”

As soon as the words were spoken, the loop of rope on his shoulders instantly became a transparent net. The demonic flies that rushed forward again were caught in the net. When the giant net closed, the demonic flies were swallowed up by the slime. Sure enough, hallucination fruits were very tempting.

Chen Rui just tested it. Dodo was within the range of <Destructive Aura Blow>, but did not get affected. It seemed that <Destructive Aura Blow> could distinguish “hostile creatures” quite clearly.

On the other side, the spirit-devouring demonic fly finally couldn’t hold up against the siege of the two elite earth elementals. After getting hit by a magical fist cast by Sog, they immediately shattered.

However, the fragmented pieces soon assembled from the ground and returned to the shape of a spirit-devouring demon fly. It happened several times; they were impossible to kill. In this way, Sog and Tag’s powers would gradually weaken. They would fail in the end.

Chen Rui did not expect that spirit-devouring demonic fly had immortality like Dodo. At this moment, when a piece of fragment fell beside him, <Analytical Eyes> showed that the strength of the fragment was only E, then it became D, and then C again. Although it was already out of the range of <Analytical Eyes> when it finished recombining into a demonic fly, he could infer that they returned to “unable to determine”.

Another time it shattered, the fragments only had F strength, and then gradually increased with the completion of the combination.

If he used <Aura Conversion>, he would probably encounter the power of those eyes. Not to mention that if he could succeed, he was now surrounded by highly offensive demonic flies. There was no time for continuous conversion at all.

Chen Rui thought of the scene that Dodo swallowing up the spirit-devouring demonic fly and got an idea. He called the slime over and shouted to the two elite elementals, “Hurry, use all your might to shatter it. I have a way to deal with it!”

Was Chen Rui seriously thinking of letting Dodo swallowing the demonic fly? Could Dodo handle it without having a stomachache?

chapters.title: Chapter 161: Urgent! The Moving Earth Palace
chapters.body:
Chapter 161: Urgent! The Moving Earth Palace

Facing immortal enemies, Sog and Tag had exhausted more than half of its strength. After hearing Chen Rui’s words, they launched their fiercest attack without hesitation. Under that joint fierce attack, they destroyed the spirit-devouring demonic flies once again.

At the moment when the demon flies broke into crystals, Dodo’s mouth suddenly became large. Under Chen Rui’s command, he quickly swallowed many fragments with F and E strength. Before the fragments were combined again, Dodo stopped swallowing.

The spirit-devouring demonic flies were assembled into their original shape again, but their bodies were already one size smaller and their strengths were obviously weakened. It seemed that this method was quite effective, so Sog and Tag were somehow ecstatic.

Under this continuous attrition tactic, the strength of the spirit-devouring demonic fly was getting weaker and weaker. As imagined, it couldn’t escape from the area of the fountain of life. It could only watch its body being eaten away. Its strength also downgraded from Great Demon King. Eventually, it was swallowed entirely by Dodo when it reached Higher Demon.

An unwilling scream ended in Dodo’s closed mouth. Seeing slime’s bitter face and the slight explosion seemingly coming from the onion-head, Chen Rui asked with concern, “Do you feel abnormal?”

Slime burped and his answer made Chen Rui kind of speechless, “It tastes too bad.”

After the spirit-devouring demonic fly was destroyed, water began to come out from the center of the pit and it stopped after spreading to a range of nearly two meters. It seemed to be affected by the rapidly blinking crystal light on the surrounding ground. Those crystal lights began to condense into crystals and gradually expanding, whereas the area of the fountain of life gradually shrank. Once the fountain of life was completely covered, the troublesome spirit-devouring demonic fly was likely to be born again.

However, Chen Rui didn’t give the crystals any time. Before the fountain of life “dried up” again, the strange mist released by his hand covered the puddle and kept it in the galaxy garden. The ever-growing crystals seemed to have lost its energy and they stopped glittering suddenly. The rapid flickering light became dim slowly.

The third fountain of life is acquired!

The moment when the fountain of life was kept into the galaxy garden, a growl full of anger and murderous intentions could be heard from the centre of the Earth Palace, spreading far away. The loose stalagmite at the ceiling of the underground world was shook by the voice and fell down one after another.

Like the strong tremor that constantly appeared on the ground, the controlled earth elementals nearby had no response toward this roar and continued moving forward like walking deads. The entire Earth Palace was actually moving!

Although the troll’s fountain of life was only a small piece, it spread to the same size as the other two fountains after it was kept into the galaxy garden. It seemed like the galaxy garden had a magical effect of restoring the fountain of life at its maximum capacity.

“Chen Rui, you truly is a magical guy. You did such a great job!”

After leaving the Troll’s Lair, Sog praised Chen Rui’s ability while Tag kept nodding. If it weren’t for Chen Rui’s successful strategy, they definitely couldn’t defeat that immortal, giant demon fly with all their strengths. Now, they even successfully retrieved the fountain of life.

“You two are the one that are truly amazing. I couldn’t have done it alone.” Chen Rui had been thinking about the meaning of “clone” shown in <Analytical Eyes>. He was being humble, and his footsteps suddenly stopped.

“My friends, I suddenly have a crazy idea. I wonder if you are willing to take risks with me?”

As soon as Sog and Tag turned around, they saw that Chen Rui’s body began to change in some way and actually became the look of an earth elemental. The two elite earth elementals were surprised.

“ Oh right, there’s one detail that needs to be changed.” The white light in the eyes of the earth elemental turned pale yellow, becoming a “mutated species”.

Neither Sog nor Tag were stupid. They saw determination in each other’s eyes.

In the Tauren’s Den, Athena gently touched the dagger in her hand. This dagger was very small and it was wrapped with a hydra’s leather scabbard. Although it wasn’t really delicate, in Athena’s heart, this was the best dagger in the entire Demon Realm. It wasn’t because it was made by dark star iron but because it was hand-crafted by Chen Rui and was given to her just like a guardian’s sword. The difference was that this dagger had an extraordinary significance to Athena.

She did not tell Chen Rui this significance, but Athena was kind of regretful now. She wasn’t sure whether it was because of Chen Rui leaving, there was always a sense of uneasiness in her heart, as if she never had the opportunity to propose to him again.

Athena shook her head vigorously and removed this uneasy feeling from her head. Then, she took a bowl of water from Lysa, smiled and nodded at her.

Lysa nodded her head to show courtesy. She already knew the close relationship between Athena and Chen Rui, who saved the medusa tribe. The initial hostility was long gone, and she seemed very friendly.

Seeing Lysa’s bulging abdomen, Athena suddenly thought of a guy saying “future family member expansion plan” the other day and her face blushed inexplicably.

Chen Rui was looking at the situation in shock at the moment, as well as two elite earth elementals.

Initially, Chen Rui proposed a very risky plan which was sneaking directly into the Earth Realm to retrieve the last fountain of life!

However, when the three arrived at the Earth Realm after rushing for days and nights, they were stunned by the scene in front of them. There were huge destruction trail along the way. The passages that were initially small were expanded destructively as if it was caused by a huge object passing through.

In the face of this completely different home, Tag and Sog quickly took Chen Rui all the way to the source of destruction. Strangely, the number of earth elementals and demon flies along the way were far less than expected. When they found the starting point of the shocking trail, both elite earth elementals were stunned.

In the center of Earth Realm, a deep pit with a diameter of more than 100 meters appeared. This should be the place where the Earth Elemental King was located, the Earth Palace!

The Earth Palace suddenly disappeared!

Judging from the deep pit, this palace seemed to have been dug out from nowhere. Associating to the exaggerated trail along the way, three of them suddenly realized that the Earth Palace was moving!

These mutated earth elementals actually dug out the Earth Palace and…

Chen Rui thought of the scariest thing, which was the destination of the Earth Palace’s movement! If it was the Troll’s Lair, then they would’ve definitely ran into them halfway. Therefore, it seemed that the place that Glorfin was heading could only be…

At that point, the demon flies finally detected something was wrong. They surrounded them with a few mutated earth elementals.

Although these enemies’ strength wasn’t that strong for the elite earth elementals party and it was also less dangerous than their previous estimation, Chen Rui was unprecedentedly anxious at that moment.

Tag subdued a mutated earth elemental and Chen Rui quickly cast <Aura Conversion>. After this earth elementals was conscious, he assured the most worried assumption. The destination of the Earth Palace was the tauren’s and medusa’s tribes! Besides, they’ve already been moving for almost 4 days!

Tauren, medusa and earth elementals are all there! Also, Athena!

“Fuck! Let’s go to the fountain of life first! Then, we’ll hurry back!”

Chen Rui shouted loudly. Originally, Sog and Tag wanted Chen Rui to restore more earth elementals. However, they also knew that the current situation was urgent. Thus, they quickly opened up a path toward the fountain of life with all their strength.

With the experience at the Troll’s Lair, it was relatively easier to deal with spirit-devouring demonic flies this time. It was just the surrounding earth elementals made Sog and Tag felt difficult as they didn’t want to accidentally injured the earth elementals. After some hard work, the 4th fountain of life was finally kept into the galaxy garden successfully.

It was just that Dodo, who once again swallowed the spirit-devouring demonic fly, seemed a bit abnormal. He involuntarily twisted and an explosive sound could be heard from his transparent brain from time to time. This “symptom” was present since they left the Troll’s Lair. It was just that this time it was more serious. It was probably a side effect of digesting those crystals.

Since Dodo was a living thing, he couldn’t be stored in the storage. Thus, Chen Rui could only take out a backpack from the storage and place Dodo in there to rest. Then, he called Sog and Tag to rushed along the movement trace of the Earth Palace.

Within the Earth Palace, a furious yell sounded again. This time it was a roar containing a shrill voice like an injured beast. Powerful forces erupted one after another as if it was venting anger. The Earth Palace that was being carried suddenly paused and pressed down. In such a huge shake, the earth elementals below the palace were all crushed into the soil. Even if the earth elementals were powered by earth element, they couldn’t withstand such horrible pressure; their bodies were crushed.

On the sturdy ground of the Earth Palace, numerous huge cracks appeared around a masked figure at the center. When the palace trembled, the roof collapsed and fell, leaving only the broken pillars. The collapsed huge stones fell on the ground around it, causing a lot of damage to the earth elementals.

The Earth Elemental King was indifferent to this. He continued to roar frantically like a tyrant who treated the earth elementals ruthlessly.

After the roar disappeared, more earth elementals continued to lift the Earth Palace indifferently and walked forward while stepping on the shattered body of their companions.

Chen Rui spared no stamina and followed the 2 elite earth elementals to run along the trail. In his heart, he constantly hoped that he could catch up to the moving rate of the Earth Palace carried by the earth elementals.

According to Sog when he was conscious, Glorfin was close to fully controlling the Earth Elemental King. He was able to exert Demon Overlord-level power. This huge move forward must be to completely eliminate the taurens and medusa while occupying the fountain of life at the same time.

Glorfin must be not able to move freely, otherwise, it was unnecessary to move together with the palace so publicly. It was believed that the disappearance of spirit-devouring demonic flies’ clones had a considerable impact on Glorfin. At present, the most important thing was to catch up and tell the tauren and medusa to run away in advance. Since the fountains of life were all kept into the galaxy garden, Chen Rui himself was equivalent to a portable fountain of life. Besides, the enemy had difficulty moving, so it was possible to lead them to engage in guerilla.

The most important thing was Athena!

His beloved woman!

She must not face any danger!

Yeah! A real man must never let his woman face any danger!

chapters.title: Chapter 162: Demon Overlord! Unbeatable Griffin
chapters.body:
Chapter 162: Demon Overlord! Unbeatable Griffin

After hurried forward along the way, Chen Rui and the others finally approached the tauren’s tribe. A startling scene came into his vision.

There were taurens, earth elementals and medusas everywhere along the way, but these creatures had all became stiff statues. It wasn’t the petrify talent of the medusas but actual crystal statues. From the outside, they were only covered by a thin layer of pale yellow crystal yet it was exactly this film-like crystal shell that isolated all life force.

There were also many incomplete statues. Based on the fracture, not only the surface layer but the entire flesh had become crystal! It seemed that they were still one step late as Glorfin’s invasion had extended to the tauren’s tribe. Then, what about Athena?

Chen Rui’s heart was beating fast when he saw that. An ominous feeling came to his heart, and he quickly accelerated his pace.

Finally, in front of the Tauren’s Lair, he saw an incomplete palace which was the Earth Palace that was moved here. The palace was surrounded by almost impenetrable layer of demonic flies. The ground around the area was covered by flickering crystals. When they walked on it, they felt like the consumption of energy almost doubled for no reason.

Looking from a distance, there was no more resistance around as almost all taurens, medusa and the normal earth elementals had been turned into crystals. There was only the faint battle noises that came from the Earth Palace, which was Chief Tauren Delong’s voice.

Chen Rui was spirited and rushed toward the Earth Palace with the 2 elite earth elementals. The demonic flies and earth elementals along the way wanted to besiege, but they seemed to have received a certain order where they actually made way and let the three hurried into the palace.

In the Earth Palace, Queen Medusa and Chief Tauren were fighting fiercely against the demonic flies that were made out of crystals that surrounded them. It was the spirit-devouring demonic fly that Chen Rui saw at the fountain of life. Not far behind them were Athena, Tim, Torre, Lysa and the others that totaled to about a dozen. Although they were still alive, they seemed to have lost their ability to move.

At the center of the palace was a standing figure. It was a tall earth elemental, wearing a strange armor which seemed to have integrated with his muscles. Yet, his face was wearing a weird mask.

The mask looked ordinary and there seemed to be a missing part in the middle of the forehead. That should be the Earth Elemental King that was possessed by Glorfin. When the three entered the palace, they were facing the Earth Elemental King. The eyes of the mask lit up suddenly. They flashed a cold and strange light.

Chen Rui looked into that pair of eyes and his heart twitched for no reason. His whole body seemed to be controlled by invisible restriction. He immediately lost his ability to move.

It is this pair of eyes! It’s full of weirdness that makes one shiver. Chen Rui once felt the horror of these eyes on the crystal around the fountain of life and the controlled earth elementals. Yet, when he truly faced it now, it was 10 times more terrifying! Just by a single glance, his entire body’s blood was frozen under the cold and evil gaze. He couldn’t exert any strength.

Tag and Sog were both Great Demon King, so they didn’t seem to be affected much. They rushed towards the spirit-devouring demonic flies without hesitation. At that point, the pressure on the Chief Tauren and Queen Medusa was greatly reduced. However, these spirit-devouring demonic flies were also immortal. Even if they were crushed into fragments, they could quickly recover while their strength wasn’t weakened but increased instead. On the contrary, the attack power of Queen Medusa and the others was much weaker than usual in the palace and their strength consumption was doubled. Now, even with the help of two elite earth elementals, they were still in absolute disadvantage.

At that time, Dodo, after suppressing the abnormality of swallowing the demon flies, had fallen into a peculiar slumber. He could no longer play a role. Moreover, it could be judged from the strange crystals everywhere that this should be a unique environment. In this environment, the revival of the spirit-devouring demonic fly should be endless. It wouldn’t be affected by something like the fountain of life anymore.

Perhaps, it could be acknowledged as a “territory” power; a Demon Overlord’s “territory”!

Strangely, according to Glorfin’s level of strength, it should be a piece of cake to kill Chief Tauren and the others. Why does he only rely on the spirit-devouring demonic flies to attack? Could it be that he couldn’t use his strength? Then, what’s up with this territory?

The “Dark Will” ring appeared in Chen Rui’s hands that created waves of force. With the help of these waves, his Star Power who was initially stagnant began to circulate again. He felt that the force restraining his body was loosened. He restored his ability to move again. Yet, he could clearly feel that the “Dark Will’s” ability to resist mental disturbance was greatly suppressed, so its power wasn’t as great as before.

Chen Rui didn’t dare to look at those eyes anymore. He went directly to Athena’s side.

“Chen Rui! Run away now!” When Athena saw him, her first reaction wasn’t happy but anxious. In the face of such a terrifying enemy, she thought it was great that Chen Rui wasn’t around. Yet, he actually rushed back at such timing!

Chen Rui shook his head firmly. Although he didn’t speak, Athena understood the meaning in his eyes: If we leave, we’ll leave together! If we die, we’ll die together!

The strength that let Chen Rui get rid of the spiritual bind made the Earth Elemental King’s eyes shone bright in yellow. His body was exuding a terrible breath. The clenching teeth voice behind the mask sounded. The voice seemed to be to a mix of two tones, one was the language of the earth elemental and another turned out to be the lingua franca in the Demon Realm, “Dark Will! Lucifer Royal Family!”

Glorfin was severely damaged by the Lord of Midnight Sun back then, so he was no stranger to the “Dark Will”. The defeat at Dark Moon ruined the years of planning for the rise of the Beelzebub Royal Family. After the death of countless comrades, Glorfin himself was almost dead as well. Therefore, he hated the Lucifer Royal Family to the extreme.

In the roar, the spirit-devouring demonic flies shattered into crystals and a huge, scary force spread immediately. Even the few Great Demon King powerhouses like the Chief Tauren couldn’t stand still within that force. They staggered backward and eventually fell to the ground. Chen Rui was just on time to hug Athena tight and they were blown up by that force until he hit a pillar in the palace before they stopped. They felt like they were in a hurricane which they had no strength to resist. He was shocked. Is this a Demon Overlord’s strength? He only released his breath, and it is already…

Although the spirit-devouring demonic flies were shattered, it didn’t mean that the crisis was lifted. At the moment that the breath subsided, everyone in the palace felt that their feet were congealed simultaneously. They had been firmly bound by countless tiny crystals. Instantly, the “growing” crystals spread upward from their feet and it contained a powerful devouring force that made their strength reduced quickly. Let alone escaping, they were unable to move or resist at all.

Chen Rui hugged Athena, clenched his teeth and launched the “Dark Will” <Teleportation>. He didn’t expect that their figures were only blurred for a while and they were still at the same place when it became clear. They were surrounded by the crystals again.

Chen Rui was shocked as he didn’t expect this “territory” strength could actually limit the Dark Will’s <Teleportation>! Even his last escape plan failed. Previously, there was a failing examples under the interference of The Eye of Incubus. It seemed that the power of artifact was limited after all.

“Trying to escape?” Glorfin sneered, “Even a Demon Overlord can’t use any magic items in this field freely unless it’s an artifact…”

At that moment, the suction suddenly weakened. They heard the exploding sound coming from the Earth Elemental King’s body. There were actually a lot of cracks appearing on the sturdy armored skin.

“Damn Earth Elemental King!” A mournful scream came from the mask, “Fountain of life! Give it to me!”

Chen Rui who was hugging Athena tightly and were resisting the power of the crystal together thought of something. It must be like this! Glorfin hasn’t fully control the Earth Elemental King yet. That’s why he dares not use too much power, while the fountain of life can enhance Glorfin’s control!

Glorfin’s mood was extremely angry at that moment. He had been using his spirit-devouring demonic flies clone to absorb the power from the fountain of life in the Earth Realm and the Troll’s Lair to strengthen himself while suppressing the Earth Elemental King bit by bit. The fountain of life in the Tauren’s Lair and Medusa’s Lair were also absorbed by Glorfin’s clone seed, which was equivalent to 4 sources constantly providing strength.

Seeing that he almost completely suppressed the will of the Earth Elemental King, the “energy” from the Tauren’s Lair suddenly disappeared, following by the Medusa’s Lair. Although the “seed” contained his power, it wasn’t part of the true “territory”. Thus, he didn’t know what happened. He could only feel the source of energy was interrupted.

After failing to attack the Medusa’s Lair, Glorfin had only one elite elemental in his combat power, which could no longer threaten the two alliance tribes. Glorfin, who had fallen short, decided to do it himself after consideration. What surprised him was after he left the Earth Realm, the fountain of life at the Troll’s Lair that was completely controlled, disappeared for some reason. Ultimately, the last fountain of life at his old nest, the Earth Realm was also gone.

Glorfin, who suddenly lost all the power of the fountain of life, had reached the Tauren’s Lair. He decided to eliminate these opposition creatures along the way before trying to find out why the fountain of life disappeared.

Due to the disappearance of the power from the fountain of life, the resistance from the Earth Elemental King suddenly increased tremendously. It almost broke free from his control. Fortunately, it was suppressed by the accumulated territory’s strength. It was exactly because of that that these weak enemies could battle against him up until now.

Strangely, the fountain of life in the Tauren’s Lair seemed to disappear out of thin air. Even with his “territory’s” strength, he couldn’t find it. At that time, two elite soil elementals appeared and one of them even gotten rid of the control.

The most hateful is the demon wearing the Dark Will! He must be my nemesis, the Lucifer Royal Family!

The explosive sounds from the Earth Elemental King gradually subsided and the traces of cracks returned to normal. Chen Rui and the others felt that the devouring power of the crystals on their body suddenly increased and the crystals that were originally at the knees had spread to the waist. Not only strength but even their life force were fading quickly under that terrifying devour.

“Tell me where the fountain of life is! Otherwise, all of you must die!”

“Wait!” Chen Rui knew that it was the brink of life and death, so he shouted as he tried to resist the repression of the crystal.

As soon as the speed of the crystal stopped, the sight from the “God-Eating Mask” fell on Chen Rui’s body and a low-pitched voice sounded, “Tell me now! Where is the fountain of life?!”

“You can’t tell him!” Tag also guessed the importance of the fountain of life, so he shouted, “Otherwise, he can completely control the king!”

An angry expression flashed past within the mask and the crystals on Tag’s body suddenly wrapped the entire body of the earth elemental quickly. Tag struggled with all his strength, but his resistance was futile. He gradually solidified into a rigid statue.

Immediately after, “ Poom! ” and the statue exploded and shattered every piece of the body. Tag who possessed Great Demon King strength was actually crushed without being able to resist! Everyone showed grief and anger, especially Sog yet he still couldn’t get rid of the body’s restriction.

A Demon Overlord, even if he was a Demon Overlord that couldn’t manifest his actual strength, no one present could rival even if it were the strongest Great Demon King.

“Without the whereabouts of fountain of life, everyone here will be crushed!”

“Stop! Glorfin!” Chen Rui clenched his teeth, “I can tell you if you let them go!”

“You actually know me!” Glorfin’s voice contained a little surprise. Thinking of the Dark Will that he was wearing, he then said angrily, “Damn Lucifer, he actually hunt me up to this place! Does Midnight Sun already know where I am?”

Glorfin was defeated by Midnight Sun 400 years ago, then fled to the underground. He didn’t know that Lord of Midnight Sun had died in the war against the human realm 300 years ago.

“The God-Eating Empire was perished by the Lucifers. Since that’s the case, I won’t let you go!” Glorfin’s voice revealed an extreme hatred, “Tell me where the fountains of life are and I can give you a quick death!”

Chen Rui knew that Glorfin had misunderstood, so he quickly explained, “I’m not part of the Lucifer Royal Family. I’m a human! Besides, Lord of Midnight Sun has been dead since 300 years!”

“Midnight Sun is dead?” Glorfin laughed madly, and his voice echoed across the tauren’s tribe.

Chen Rui felt that the power of the crystals began to increase again, so he quickly said, “Glorfin! I can give you the fountain of life! However, you must let my friends go!”

“ Hmph! ” As Glorfin was about to speak, then he felt that his body started to tremble uncontrollably again, so he quickly answered, “Yes!”

Actually, these people already know my origin and secrets, so no one should live. As soon as I get the information about the fountain of life’s whereabouts, I’ll immediately kill everyone!

Chen Rui clearly wouldn’t believe in Glorfin so easily. When he was about to put forward the condition of letting people go, he saw the Earth Elemental King’s body trembled, following by a clear noise as if something fragile had shattered.

The eyes in the “God-Eating Mask” suddenly turned white. The white light expanded throughout the Earth Elemental King’s body. Under the effect of this light, the crystals on the ground started breaking one after another. The crystals on Chen Rui and others began to withdraw and the devoured strength slowly returned to their body.

However, the power of that white light didn’t last long. The eyes of the mask began to tremble. It gradually changed to the pale yellow color of Glorfin. Glorfin’s voice contained great fear, “Stupid guy, he actually crushed his own elemental heart!”

The Earth Elemental King still had his consciousness intact? Will Glorfin die together with him?

chapters.title: Chapter 163: Burn! The Regretless Red
chapters.body:
Chapter 163: Burn! The Regretless Red

The elemental heart was the Earth Elemental King’s core which was equivalent to a human heart. Once the element’s heart was broken, even the powerful elemental kings would be completely annihilated within 7 days.

Originally, the Earth Elemental King had lost almost all his power, so he couldn’t do that. Since Chen Rui retrieved the 4 fountain of life, Glorfin’s power that suppressed the Earth Elemental King was greatly reduced.

Glorfin’s crushing Tag stimulated the will of the Earth Elemental King. To prevent Glorfin from gaining the fountain of life and regain control of himself and all the earth elementals, he forcefully restored a part of his consciousness. Then, the Earth Elemental King desperately erupted his remaining strength. Eventually, he destroyed his elemental heart.

As a result, Glorfin’s power not only plummeted, even if he was able to obtain the fountain of life now, he would only have 7 days of life left.

“Damn earth elemental!” This change wasn’t anticipated by Glorfin at all as he roared loudly. Seeing Chen Rui and the others trying to get rid of the crystal to escape, he snorted and the power of the territory suddenly increased by dozens of times. The crystal that was spreading rapidly solidified everyone and it kept spreading all the way to the neck, leaving only their heads.

After casting, the yellow light in Glorfin’s eyes were suddenly dimmed. It seemed that he erupted his territory’s power before his strength was lowered to the minimum to control the people.

“I have almost exhausted my strength now, but unfortunately, none of you can break free from this territory.” Glorfin sneered, “This Soul-Eating Territory is also called the Limit Territory. Unless you can surpass your current realm, otherwise you can’t break free.”

“I’ll make you witness your companions die one by one now!”

Glorfin lifted his finger with difficulty. The will of the Earth Elemental King who broke his elemental heart had reduced to the minimum, so Glorfin could forcefully move the body. This was the first time in 400 years, but in any case, he only had 7 days of life left.

Glorfin glanced around, raised a finger and pointed at the earth elemental, Doug. Doug’s eyes showed a startled expression. Then, an explosion sounded and the crushed Doug followed in the footsteps of Tag.

In a blink of an eye, Glorfin had killed five people. He pointed his hand again at Lusa who wasn’t far behind from Chen Rui.

“No!” Tim saw Glorfin’s hand of death was about to point at his wife, and he couldn’t help but yelled. However, he was only at the middle-stage of Higher Demon at the moment, so it was impossible to break through the current realm.

Glorfin laughed cruelly. Lusa had no time to give Tim a yearning look before her entire body exploded. The crushed crystal splashed everywhere, making Tim’s eyes filled with hatred.

The one that Glorfin pointed next was Lysa who was beside Lusa.

“Please! Don’t hurt her! She still has a baby in her belly.” Tim’s voice trembled. Lysa was his last wife, and she was still pregnant.

“ Hiss “, an angry hiss sounded and it was from Queen Medusa. Queen Medusa’s eyes constantly flickered with bright light. The “God-Eating Mask” looked into Queen Medusa’s eyes and sneered, “Your petrifying ability might be useful against same-level Great Demon King. Yet, it has no effect on Demon Overlord. Besides, my body is an earth elemental! Since you are so anxious, I’ll let you die first.”

Glorfin’s finger pointed at Queen Medusa and her body trembled for a while. She withstood for a moment, and finally, she was unable to resist it. Her body burst apart.

Although Chen Rui never liked the suspicious Queen Medusa, to be fair, everything she did was for the tribe. Perhaps she wasn’t great as a friend, but she was definitely a competent leader.

After Glorfin killed Queen Medusa, his finger pointed at Lysa.

“Glorfin! You’re such a despicable thrash! Stop it!” Chen Rui was extremely angry. He struggled to gather the Star Power in his body to break through the Mizar state and get rid of the Limit Territory. Even if he died, he had to kill Glorfin.

However, a huge realm couldn’t be broke through whenever they wanted, especially from the low to the middle level, even if he had reached the peak of the Mizar state. 6 stardust in the three-dimensional human body was moving fast and the light has burned to the limit, but the surface was enveloped in a layer of pale black, which held the light tightly. He was still one step away from breaking through.

Strangely, this “black” didn’t seem to be originating from Glorfin’s power.

“You’re just bringing about your own destruction. I wanted to keep you until the end before I kill you.” Glorfin heard Chen Rui’s furious voice and shifted his finger from Lysa to Chen Rui, “Just now you said you’re a human? I never thought that there’s actually such weak a human in the Demon Realm.”

Chen Rui heard Glorfin’s weird tone and asked, “There are other powerful humans in the Demon Realm?”

“Of course!” Glorfin sneered, “After you die, I will tell your corpse. As a human guest who came to the Demon Realm, I, Glorfin Beelzebub specially grant you the privilege of living for one more minute. Seize this minute to say goodbye to your woman.”

Chen Rui knew that it was the brink of life and death. He yelled aloud and exploded all his strength as if he was risking his life. The light from the “stardust” in his body suddenly increased. The crazy rising light continued to hit the limit. There was even stardust that burst open as it couldn’t withstand the pressure. Yet, the light that shone to the limit was still unable to penetrate the black “imprisonment” layer on his body.

Not only did the breakthrough fail, but he also suffered severe internal damage due to the huge rebound. The starlight in the 3-D body suddenly dimmed. Even its movement stopped. Chen Rui felt severe pain from his internal organs and the huge rebound force made him lost the strength to even move or talk. If it were the crystals that congealed on his body, he would’ve fallen to the ground already.

Forcibly breaking through had completely failed.

Glorfin noticed Chen Rui’s situation and shook his head, “Truly disappointing, petty human. It seems that you are going to be the next person to be crushed.”

Glorfin said so, but he was still a little hesitant as he seemed to want to do something with Chen Rui.

At that time, Chen Rui suddenly felt that his body was burning. It wasn’t his strength, but it was Athena in his arms! Athena’s red eyes were burning with red flames and a long curved horn extended on her head. Unlike the past, the curved horn was longer and curlier. Under the crystal, her wheat-colored skin became red and a faint pattern that she didn’t have usually could be seen. Her purple hair also began to turn red.

Athena slowly raised her head. At that moment, in her eyes, there wasn’t Glorfin but only Chen Rui.

“Chen Rui, do you like me?”

Chen Rui couldn’t speak at the moment. He mustered all his strength trying to nod, but he couldn’t.

“I know you like mem but the woman that you truly love is Princess Shea. She even gave you the ‘Dark Will.’” Athena looked at him deeply. Although a scary flame was burning in her eyes, what Chen Rui saw was a fiery affection.

“Isn’t my transformation really guly now? You’re a human. In your heart, you should be scared or hate me. I know I can’t compare myself to Princess Royal…” There was a teardrop flowing down from Athena’s flame-like eyes, but she suddenly laughed. “Yet, I still love you. Not just liking but love.” Chen Rui’s eyes became hot instantly. It turned out that the woman Athena had misunderstood at first was Shea. He desperately wanted to say something, but the strong rebound from failing the breakthrough previously made him unable to say a word at this critical moment.

The crystal on Athena’s body began to break inch by inch. Her fiery lips touched his lips voluntarily for the first time.

“Perhaps, it will be like the story you told. We will meet again in the afterlife. No matter what, don’t forget me.”

It’s not what you think!

Opinionated silly woman!

Don’t go! Athena!

Chen Rui was screaming desperately in his heart, but no words could come out of his mouth.

The fiery red lips left Chen Rui. Athena looked at him deeply as if she wanted to engrave his final trace on her soul. Then, she never looked back. Her body was blazing in flame. She appeared instantly in front of the Earth Elemental King controlled by Glorfin and chopped the Guardian’s Sword with a whistling sound.

“God-Eating Mask” showed a faint light. Athena’s sword was blocked by a layer of crystal wall that suddenly appeared. Her entire body was shocked by the impact and flew backward. Her palm had cracked and bled, and she could barely hold the greatsword. However, she still clenched her teeth and continued to attack even after being repelled again and again.

“Unexpected…” Glorfin shook his head. “I never thought this woman will actually be the one breaking through. Even if my strength is greatly reduced, it’s not something that a Demon King like you can rival. Die!”

A powerful destructive force rushed toward Athena. The flame on Athena’s body suddenly turned into a strange color. The power exerted by Glorfin couldn’t shake the flame. Then, there was a dagger in her hand out of nowhere. Her blood were flowing from both her wrists, but it didn’t evaporate or dissipate in the flame, instead it merged into the flame and burned.

The flame’s light became unprecedentedly bright. The entire hall was filled with fiery heat, even Glorfin’s “God-Eating Mask’s” eyes turned red.

That was a flame that fully ignited her life. It was like a meteor in the universe. Although it was only a moment, the instant glory was enough for eternity.

“Although the brillianceglory of life is beautiful, unfortunately, it is too weak to dispel the eternal darkness.” Glorfin looked at Chen Rui who was desperately trying to move, “Incompetent guy, you can only watch your woman burn her remaining life for you.”

The Guardian’s Sword in Athena’s hand was also stained with her blood and wrapped in the flame of life. Glorfin slowly raised his hand, and Athena’s body shook. She felt that the pressure was doubled. Even her flame of life was about to be extinguished as if it was blown by strong winds.

Athena shouted and the flames in her eyes were blazing again. The Guardian’s Sword left her hand and spun toward Glorfin. That blow had exhausted all the power of her life, so her body couldn’t withstand the pressure suddenly. She flew backward, hitting a huge pillar and fell to the ground. The flame on her body faded quickly.

Glorfin had difficulty in moving; he couldn’t avoid the greatsword flying toward him. He moved his mind and a crystal wall appeared out of thin air, blocking in front of the greatsword. However, the greatsword suddenly shook and actually crossed the crystal wall as if the crystal wall was just air.

“Power that can travel through space? No!”

“ Klang! ” The Guardian’s Sword hit the mask on the Earth Elemental King’s face.

The “God-Eating Mask” fell off and finally dropped to the ground.

Will Glorfin be defeated just like that? Or was he hiding in the mask?

chapters.title: Chapter 164: Anger! Nirvana'S Flame
chapters.body:
Chapter 164: Anger! Nirvana'S Flame

After the “God-Eating Mask” fell to the ground, Athena fell to the ground and the flame of life on her body had completely extinguished. Her demonic body had also returned to human form while her gaze began to gradually freeze.

Chen Rui couldn’t believe the scene in front of him, as if the most precious thing in his heart was suddenly broken. Even his whole heart was broken. The jerking mouth desperately wanted to call Athena’s name, but he couldn’t make a sound.

The Earth Elemental King’s face was finally revealed. His facial features were relatively delicate. Yet, due to the broken elemental heart, the white light in his eyes had weakened to the point that it was fading away. The entire body slowly fell to the ground as he seemed to have lost all of his strength.

However, the “God-Eating Mask” that was detached from the Earth Elemental King actually slowly floated up again. The power of the entire Soul-Eating territory was only partially weakened. Everyone still couldn’t get rid of the bind on their bodies.

The sword containing the flame of life was only able to remove the “God-Eating Mask”, but couldn’t kill Glorfin!

Certainly, forcefully detaching the God-Eating Mask from the host with external force indeed caused a significant damage to Glorfin’s soul, but it wasn’t enough to destroy him.

The “God-Eating Mask” exuded a powerful breath. Although the host was lost, the Demon Overlord’s consciousness and the power of artifact were still extremely terrifying.

“Annoying woman! Can’t believe she has such ability!” Glorfin’s voice of clenching teeth came from the “God-Eating Mask”. “Just like the troublesome earth elementals, the tauren’s and medusa’s physiques aren’t suitable to be host, even if I live in them, their strength can’t be further enhanced! Besides, those who are below Demon King level can’t bear the power of the artifact! Initially, that human was the best host since he was close to breaking through. Unfortunately, it is this stupid woman who broke through. Her talent of traveling through space is not bad, but she is still a woman. Also, she’s a Great Demon, so it’s even harder to break through…” It turned out that Glorfin occupying the Earth Elemental King’s body was also the last resort. Even if the consciousness of Earth Elemental King was completely defeated, his consciousness couldn’t truly manifest the strength in the body of earth elementals; the tauren and medusa were the same as well. Besides, their upper limit was Great Demon King. Unless he found a new host, his power would stop at the Great Demon King for a lifetime. Thus, it was even more unworthy than the Demon Overlord-level Earth Elemental King.

After the Earth Elemental King self-destructed his elemental heart, Glorfin knew that he had to change his host as soon as possible. Otherwise, he would only have days of life left. The most suitable person at that moment was the human. Therefore, Glorfin made a temporary decision to cast his Limit Territory to stimulate Chen Rui, who was at the edge to break through the limit and reach Demon King-level. Subsequently, Glorfin would possess him and make him a host.

This plan was initially not bad, but unfortunately, his calculations were wrong. Chen Rui failed to force a breakthrough. Instead, Athena took the lead to break through the limits of Higher Demon and reached Demon King-level strength.

The voice of “God-Eating Mask” seemed to be hesitating, “This woman is dying, and in this pure soul form, I don’t have much time left either. Should I really choose a woman as my host? This is so frustrating!”

The anger in Chen Rui’s heart had burned to the extreme. Not only he hated Glorfin, but he also hated himself!

He hated his own weakness. He hated his incompetence for actually watching her beloved woman burn her life for him yet he couldn’t say a single word. Now, he had to watch her being possessed by the “God-Eating Mask” and becoming a puppet.

This anger overwhelmed the grievance, pain and everything. At that moment where his anger completely burned his consciousness, he seemed to have lost all sensations and the severe pain caused by failing the breakthrough couldn’t be reflected to the brain. It was to the point that he couldn’t hear or see anything around.

There was only Athena’s voice echoing in his soul.

Yet, I still love you.

Not just liking but love.
