The dim stardust in the 3-D human body once again emitted a dazzling light and started to run frantically. The brightness was unprecedented. It was just like the Athena’s flame just now. The stardust that was overwhelming after reaching the limit. They began to explode gradually. However, Chen Rui didn’t hesitate as if it wasn’t his own life and strength that were being destroyed.

I cannot let Athena dies! If I truly can’t save her, then I’ll eliminate myself completely as well.

Whether it’s destruction or burn! I only need a flash of light. Even if I can no longer fight anymore! Even if this is my last moment in your life!

Under destructive explosions of countless stardust, a black force that blocked the breakthrough finally began to tremble like some kind of flame.

As Glorfin was preparing to possess Athena, he felt that Chen Rui’s power was different. He saw that Chen Rui’s eyes including the sclera had all turned into a deep black. Within the back were faint red irises which looked really strange. His breath also became abnormally manic, causing the entire palace to start trembling slightly.

Glorfin stopped immediately. He was overjoyed: Finally, my effort wasn’t in vain. The most suitable host finally appears!

In Chen Rui’s consciousness, not only did all the stardusts exploded, but there were also strange changes happening at the space outside of the Galaxy Divinity Temple.

In space, the fiery red clouds seemed to be constantly squeezed by some irresistible force. Floating dust particles began to rotate rapidly around the red clouds. The temperature was getting higher and higher. A faint spherical shape appeared within the fiery clouds.

When the pressure reached its limit, the center began to explode and collapse. A huge air pillar ejected from the center and penetrated the entire space. The clusters floating around were moving crazier in this tremendous force and collided with each other.

At the moment the air pillar ejected, Chen Rui’s brain had a “ Poom! ” sound. The destructive outburst of stardust finally broke through the surface after risking it all. After the black force was broken through, it didn’t dissipate. Instead, it merged with the destructive explosion and began to truly burn.

In Glorfin’s eyes, the manic breathe had turned into another feeling. It was like something was reborn. Then, he saw Chen Rui’s body was burning with a flame. The color of the flame was black. It radiated a strange energy that made the surrounding crystals that were formed from the territory’s power to melt.

The breath of the black flames shook Glorfin’s soul. He instinctively felt the danger and blurted out, “Nirvana’s Flame! Is this guy belong to the Asmodeus Royal Family?”

“No, he doesn’t have Nirvana nor the body of the Lust Royal Family. Besides, I’ve never heard that the Nirvana’s Flame can be used in this way!” Glorfin then denied this speculation, “Yet, this flame is clearly Nirvana’s power. This is so weird!”

Chen Rui’s eyes had returned to the normal color. When the last touch of fiery red was withdrawn into his black eyes, all the crystals on his body had shattered, but the black flame was still burning.

It is indeed Demon King of the middle level! According to the human realm’s division, it is called the Master level.

The eyes of the “God-Eating Mask” emitted a surprise light. This human’s strength is too special. The momentum of his breakthrough can even affect the Soul-Eating Territory! The most important thing is that human has no upper limit of potential like the ordinary demons. As long as I can occupy this body and completely devour his soul, then with the power accumulated by the artifact coupled with my Demon Overlord-level consciousness, I’ll definitely improve my strength quickly in the fastest time and return to the top ranks of the powerhouses!

This human wasn’t the Earth Elemental King, so Glorfin didn’t think that Chen Rui would have the ability to resist his Demon Overlord consciousness. It would only require a little strength to completely swallow Chen Rui’s consciousness.

“God-Eating Mask” laughed loudly and dashed toward Chen Rui.

Chen Rui disappeared instantly and appeared beside Athena. He squatted down and hugged her tightly.

“Remember, you are my most beloved woman. I will never allow you to die, even if it takes my life.”

It wasn’t sure whether it was the power of that sentence or the strange effect from the black flame, Athena’s lingering eyes suddenly condensed.

“Human can also teleport? Interesting… However, your breakthrough is one step late. I didn’t choose this woman as my host just now, so she can’t be saved now.” Glorfin had the intention to crush Chen Rui’s final psychological barrier, so he wasn’t in a hurry to attack.

Chen Rui ignored Glorfin and two bottles of black potions appeared in his hand. They were carefully fed into Athena’s mouth in turn. The potion was extraordinary as it was automatically absorbed when it entered the mouth.

“Trust your man and sleep peacefully. Everything will be fine when you wake up.”

Chen Rui leaned down and kissed Athena’s forehead. Athena’s red eyes showed tranquility and her eyes were closed slowly. The pale and cold face gradually recovered a touch of redness. It felt like her life that was annihilated due to exhaustion was recovering slowly. There was no danger to her life anymore. The biggest stone in Chen Rui’s heart was finally removed.

Athena broke the limit for him and Chen Rui also surpassed himself for her. The exchange center of Alioth state didn’t let him down as resurrection potion and longevity potion had appeared. Each bottle cost 1M auras, and he gave both for Athena to drink.

As for other things, Chen Rui had no time to look at it. For Athena and everyone else, he had to destroy Glorfin even if he dies together.

“Impossible! Her life was obviously burned out!” Glorfin’s mocking laughter abruptly ended. Thinking of the color of the two potions just now, he then exclaimed, “Could it be the black potions that signify grand master highest achievement, resurrection potion and longevity potion? It must be!”

“Nirvana’s Power, <Teleportation>, resurrection potion, longevity potion… That’s great! It seems that the great Demon God has once again cared for the Beelzebub Royal Family!” An ecstatic laughter came from the God-Eating Mask that was flying toward Chen Rui at high speed.

Chen Rui’s eyes glowed with anger. His figure teleported inconceivably again, appearing behind the mask. His palm glowed a faint light, and he fiercely struck toward the “God-Eating Mask”.

Clanking sound rang and Glorfin groaned in pain yet the mask was still stable, whereas Chen Rui flew backward due to a strong impact. He felt severe pain in his wrist. His bones had fractured. It was the first time that <Aura Blade’s> reflected impact broke his own wrist after hitting the opponent.

“This attack can actually damage my soul!” Glorfin wasn’t angry but happy after the painful groan, “Perfect power! Perfect skill! I am definitely taking your body!”

At the moment that Chen Rui landed, the “God-Eating Mask” had already came to the front of his eyes and erupted a strong mental suppression. Although Chen Rui had broken through to Alioth state and he possessed the Dark Will, such direct mental suppression from a Demon Overlord wasn’t something he could resist with his current strength, so he couldn’t move at once.

Glorfin was approaching. Suddenly, the “God-Eating Mask” seemed to have stopped, as if it was blocked by some force. It turned out that Chen Rui’s body was surrounded by a strange blue light that looked like a round, transparent crystal shield that protected his body.

The yellow light in the eyes of “God-Eating Mask” shone brightly. The blue crystal cover lasted for about two seconds before it broke and disappeared.

“ Whoosh! ”, the black flame on Chen Rui’s body was blazing again. The entire Soul-Eating Territory began to tremble slightly. Even the imprisoned people felt a slight recovery in strength.

The power of this black flame was very special. The speed of the “God-Eating Mask” was suddenly slowed down, but it was still advancing. Glorfin’s voice sounded, “It really is the Nirvana’s Flame of the Asmodeus Royal Family! Even my soul can feel that annoying burning force! If your strength reaches Demon Overlord, this flame alone can destroy my soul. Even if you’re just Demon Emperor, I can’t even occupy your body! Unfortunately, you’re just a Demon King! Weak guy, although I don’t understand why you have the power of the Lust Royal Family, but soon all your strange abilities will be mine!”

Glorfin approached step by step, but Chen Rui seemed to have anticipated it. He wasn’t anxious nor did he tried to escape. He just stood still and stared coldly at the “God-Eating Mask”, one of the seven demons’ artifacts in the legend.

Finally, the “God-Eating Mask” covered Chen Rui’s face.

“I made it!” In the mask, Glorfin’s laughter echoed across the tauren’s tribe.

The surrounding Chief Tauren and Tim who were still conscious were shocked. At that moment, the laughter stopped suddenly.

Chen Rui’s body was motionless. He didn’t say any word and just stood still there as if something was wrong.

It was indeed out of situation. Glorfin was trying to occupy Chen Rui’s consciousness. Yet suddenly, he felt that the surrounding scene was distorted and he was immediately moved to this place.

In the distance, there was a huge red ball burning. The light was extremely blinding. It was slowly rotating, and the flame carried the fiery heat that could destroy the world!

There were also balls of various sizes and colors in the space that were rotating. They were not only rotating by themselves, but they were also rotating around the fiery ball in a special sequence, forming a quiet yet beautiful scene.

What exactly is this place?

Glorfin felt that his body, which had been destroyed by the Earth Elemental King was restored to its original state and floating in the air. Yet, it shouldn’t his actual body, but it was just his consciousness.

Then, he saw Chen Rui’s body appearing in front, also floating in the air.

Chen Rui knew his place. He knew it was impossible to destroy the Glorfin’s Demon Overlord consciousness with his early Alioth state’s strength. He once had the experience of confronting the Eye of Incubus. At that time, the Super System could counteract the Demon Emperor-level Broc’s most powerful talent. Now that he had achieved a new evolution of Star Level, the power should be greater.

Therefore, the Super System in his consciousness was the biggest trump card to eliminated Glorfin; it was also his last trump card.

The Super System could even subdue the Demon Overlord consciousness? What was its actual strength?

chapters.title: Chapter 165: Star Devouring
chapters.body:
Chapter 165: Star Devouring

“This is why. Is this your consciousness? It actually gave me a feeling of “territory”. This is interesting.” Glorfin took a look at his long-lost body. “It’s just that no matter how strong your will is, you’re just a Demon King. The Demon Overlord strength is by no means what you can imagine right now… It’s better that I can use my body here. Let me put an end to your last persistence.”

Glorfin opened his hand and a pale yellow light rushed toward Chen Rui with a whistling sound. It penetrated easily, but Glorfin’s smirk instantly solidified on his face. Such mental attack that was enough to destroy a Demon Emperor actually became useless on this little “Demon King”.

Glorfin launched a series of attacks with disbelief, but none worked.

Glorfin’s attack was ineffective, which reassured Chen Rui’s guess in his mind. The “booting screen” of the Super System wasn’t just a display but an actual territory of consciousness. Unless someone was strong enough to destroy the entire territory, otherwise, nothing could hurt him as the master here!

The initial red cloud had become a fiery giant sphere. Perhaps it could be described as a planet. More precisely, the fiery red planet that was shining bright light was a star; while those that rotated by themselves and revoluted around the star were the planets.

The entire Super System’s territory is a galaxy!

Chen Rui seemed to have a realization. Star Collector, Star Leader, 1 Star Evolution, 2 Star Evolution… These increasing evolutionary level is like the birth process of a galaxy!

The status bar in the Galaxy Divinity Temple showed:

Title: Star Tamer

Evolution Level: 3 Stars

Experience Value: 0

Aura Value: 1.231 million

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C-

Does C- represent the early stage? It seems that even the details have been adjusted. By the way, since it was “star collecting” and “star leading”, now that the galaxy has formed, can I actually start “star taming”?

Chen Rui’s thought changed and expanded his consciousness. At this place, his willpower seemed to have amplified several times. It could cover the entire galaxy. He could clearly feel the details of each planet, including the biggest and hottest “sun”. Even the change of every dust in the space could be sensed from his mental feedback.

There was a mysterious law hidden in the rotation and trajectory of the planet. However, Chen Rui just came into contact with this aspect, so he wasn’t able to comprehend it at that moment. The most important thing now was to destroy Glorfin.

It was just that he had just evolved into Star Tamer, so he couldn’t change the orbit or position of the planet like he was controlling an actual territory. Otherwise, if he could move Glorfin near the star, he must be able to use that terrifying power to burn Glorfin into ashes.

Although Glorfin couldn’t hurt him now, he couldn’t eliminate this intruder with Demon Overlord- level willpower at once.

He didn’t know why the previous notification for <Aura Conversion> never appear again. At that time, the system notification rang: Unknown spiritual life is found and cannot be converted into aura. Do you want to activate Star Devouring mode?

That’s it!

Chen Rui immediately confirmed, “Activate”

“The Star Devouring mode has been activated. This mode requires the conscious control of Star Tamer or higher Star Evolution.”

Glorfin’s series of fierce attacks were ineffective. Suddenly, he felt that the surrounding space began to change. The stars and planets disappeared instantly; the central space was distorted, gradually forming a strange black hole.

This black hole was bottomless. It seemed to have an immensely strong attractive power. Even the light of the power that Glorfin just exerted was sucked into it.

Chen Rui was surprised as he didn’t expect the Star Devouring mode would be a black hole. A black hole is an astronomical body with extremely strong gravitational pull, a bottomless hole in the universe. Once any matter falls into it, it can no longer escape even light is no exception. Originally, black hole can’t be directly observed, but in this territory, black hole have a sense of materialization, but what hadn’t changed was that powerful devouring ability.

As prompted by the system, Chen Rui could integrate his consciousness into the black hole to control the black hole to devour Glorfin’s strength.

Although Glorfin’s body was still suspended in the air, he felt that his strength and soul were flowing quickly sucked toward the black hole involuntarily. In this way, it wouldn’t be long before his consciousness being completely devoured and destroyed.

“Using a devouring skill in front of the Gluttony Royal Family? Hmph ! You are overestimating yourself!” Glorfin opened his mouth and a white gas shrouded around the black hole. That was one of the bloodline talents of the Beelzebub Royal Family, <Devour>.

However, when the white gas was close to the black hole, it was only in a deadlock for a moment before it was completely devoured by the black hole. The devoured white gas was a concentration of Glorfin’s mind, so he suffered a big loss. His heart was even more frightened: Fuck, what kind of territory’s power is this? I’ve never encountered such a weird territory that can devour the white gas instead!

Glorfin shouted and an armor-like light appeared on his body as he cast the strongest earth single-target defense magic, <Steel Armor>. Yet, it was still unable to block the force of devour. He extended both his hands and there seemed to be some kind of violent tremor around his body within 100 meters. It was the most advanced AoE magic of the earth element, <Destructive Shockwave>. However, regardless of what talent or magic he cast, it couldn’t destroy the blackhole nor stop his body’s strength from disappearing.

Glorfin felt that his spirit had been devoured by nearly one-third. In shock, he exerted his full willpower and a mask suddenly appeared on his face. He was immediately overjoyed, “I can actually summon the “God-Eating Mask” here! Let me show you the true power of one of the seven artifacts.”

The mask emitted a faint yellow light. Although the black hole was still devouring the light, the speed suddenly slowed down and the entire space even began to distort slightly. There seemed to be a sign of collapsing. Chen Rui frowned, strengthened his spirit output and the devouring rate was indeed accelerated.

Glorfin exerted the “God-Eating Mask” yet he could only hold up to that scary devouring force. He was shocked as his Demon Overlord’s consciousness combined with the power of artifact were actually still at a disadvantage!

Right now, I can only continue to exert the power of the artifact to destroy this territory!

The yellow light of the “God-Eating Mask” shone brightly and the space began to tremble and distort. Occasionally, there were collapses, but the black hole’s devour still continued.

The artifact’s power was truly extraordinary. Chen Rui felt a strong mental suppression overwhelming him like a huge wave. With a slight distraction, his will might collapse at any time. Fortunately, they were in the Super System’s territory. If this were reality, Demon Overlord with artifact could crush him with one single blow.

The Star Devouring mode was an active mode that required conscious control. In other words, Chen Rui must remain conscious. Otherwise, the black hole’s devour would stop and Glorfin might even occupy his entire consciousness. Therefore, although Chen Rui was facing strong pressure from the artifact, he persisted unwaveringly with his body burning in black flame.

Glorfin, whose life and power were constantly being devoured had no way out now. He no longer wanted any host. He only hoped to leave this damn “territory” as soon as possible. If he had known this, he would rather choose the female Great Demon or even the tauren!

He wasn’t sure how long had passed. Glorfin’s body who was at the opposite had become quite thin and the yellow light of the “God-Eating Mask” had also dimmed. Chen Rui felt that his consciousness began to blur, but he endured it and maintained the operation of Star Devouring mode.

I have to persist!

Until Glorfin is completely eliminated!

In the Earth Palace, the crystals on the ground had become quite thin and the color had also changed from pale yellow to transparent. Delong, Sog and others had freed themselves from the Soul-Eating Territory that lost its power. A few powerhouses surrounded Chen Rui and kept a certain distance while staring at the “God-Eating Mask” with vigilance.

The Chief Tauren Delong wanted to remove the mask from Chen Rui’s face, but before he could get close, he was repelled by a strange power. Suddenly, Chen Rui’s standing body collapsed and everyone was taken aback.

The elite earth elemental, Sog slowly approached. After hesitating for a moment, he clenched his teeth and raised his fist. Delong’s action was quick, so he quickly stopped Sog and asked, “What are you doing?”

As soon as that was said, several Demon King-level taurens immediately stood in front of Chen Rui and looked at the few earth elementals around them cautiously. As they couldn’t understand each others’ language, they seemed hostile at once.

Sog’s hand was shaking. Actually, his heart was also very contradictory. It was Chen Rui who dispelled the control on him and they once fought alongside each other. However, this friend had now been covered with the “God-Eating Mask”. Once he was awake, he would most likely be that horrifying Glorfin.

Although Chen Rui only had Demon King-level strength, with that scary mask there and the Demon Overlord-level consciousness, along with the large amount of demonic flies and controlled earth elementals outside, no one was certain what danger would they encounter.

‘Stop! Sog.” That voice made Sog immediately let go of his struggle. It was the Earth Elemental King who spoke. This king who had been controlled for 400 years finally recovered his own consciousness and stood up slowly after the mask was detached.

“My king.” It was Sog’s first time in these few centuries to hear the Earth Elemental King’s voice in normal condition, so he was very excited. He walked over and crossed his arms to bow. When he thought that the king’s elemental heart had been crushed, he couldn’t help but feel grief and indignation.

“Sog, we, the earth elementals are very revengeful. All the enemies who dare to offend us will be destroyed, but we’re also a race that remembers kindness. We never direct hostility toward our friends. Did you forget about that?”

Sog lowered his head in ashamed, “I didn’t forget. Actually, I couldn’t do it either. Chen Rui isn’t only my friend and benefactor but also the benefactor of all earth elementals. However, I’m afraid that he will become that fearful Glorfin when he wakes up. After killing him, I will self-destruct to express my apology.”

“Killing him and destroying yourself only represent your own will. You can’t force your will on your friends, let alone…” The Earth Elemental King shook his head, “Haven’t you realized? Sog, the nearby demonic flies have already been wiped out automatically and our people who have been confused for years are slowly regaining consciousness.”

Sog was overjoyed and immediately responded, “My king, what you meant was…” The Earth Elemental King nodded and praised, “It seems that although our friend isn’t strong enough now, he has amazing abilities.”

It wasn’t just the mutated earth elementals that were regaining their self-awareness, but even those crystallized statues along the way were slowly recovering and rejuvenating.

Is this finally over now?

chapters.title: Chapter 166: Mask And Slumber
chapters.body:
Chapter 166: Mask And Slumber

Chen Rui slowly opened his eyes, only to feel a little drowsy in his head, like he had overslept. A cluster of glowing stones at the top of the cave came into his eyes. They emitted a soft light like magic lamps. It seemed that there were still many people nearby.

Glorfin, God-Eating Mask, the Star Devouring… It seems like I have a dream. Oh right! Athena!

He woke up suddenly and propped himself up. Several people around him were surprised. Tim, Sog, and a few taurens surrounded him.

Chen Rui saw everyone looked alert. He blurted out, “Where’s Athena?”

Tim was immediately relieved and nodded to the crowd, signaling them not to worry. He said, “It truly is a miracle! You really aren’t being controlled by the mask! Otherwise, your first sentence would not be asking about Miss Athena.”

“Tell me, how’s she doing?” Chen Rui stood up anxiously.

“Miss Athena’s condition is not life-threatening. She is just in deep sleep, but she hasn’t woken up yet.” Tim reassured Chen Rui a little bit. He learned from Tim that not only Athena but Dodo had also fallen into a deep sleep. It was probably a result of digesting the spirit-devouring demonic fly. In the battle with Glorfin, Queen Medusa had died. Lysa replaced her mother to continue leading the Medusa Tribe. Lysa initially had Demon King-level powers, but due to her pregnancy, her strength had regressed. At present, the Medusa Tribe was still considered stable.

“This time you saved the entire underground world. Without you, we would all be dead, but it’s a pity that the queen and Lusa…” When he mentioned Lusa, Tim sobbed. Chen Rui patted his shoulder. “Everything is in the past now, Tim. You still have Lysa as well as the unborn child. You must be strong.” Tim nodded. Chen Rui now felt that there was something strange on his face. It was a mask, but for some reason he couldn’t remove it. He exclaimed, “Tim, the mask on my face…”

“That’s right, it’s the ‘God-Eating Mask’. We tried a lot of methods, but couldn’t take it off. Everyone was worried that you were being controlled by Glorfin. Luckily Earth Elemental King told us, you must have used your magical powers to defeat Glorfin. The earth elementals that were being controlled previously have all regained consciousness, and the demonic flies were automatically self-destructed.”

Chen Rui nodded. He faintly remembered that before he lost consciousness, Glorfin’s will had been completely swallowed by the black hole. However, he didn’t know how to remove this “God-Eating Mask”.

The elite earth elemental, Sog came over. He suddenly crossed his hands and knelt on one knee. “Chen Rui, I wanted to kill you when you put on the mask. Please forgive my recklessness and ignorance.”

After asking about the situation, Chen Rui helped Sog stand up. “Your actions at the time were normal. Now, we are all safe. This is the most important thing. Everyone is a friend; there is no need to worry about the past.”

Sog nodded in excitement. At that moment, Chief Tauren Delong, Torre and the others came as they heard the news. They walked in front of Chen Rui. When they saw the mask on his face, they were slightly stunned. They then beat their chest forcefully, “Friend! You’re finally awake!”

“Delong, my friend!” Chen Rui also beat his chest forcefully, and then saluted to Torre and the others.

“Is Athena still not awake yet? I want to see her.”

Delong nodded and said, “She is in the Earth Palace. The Earth Elemental King is casting some power to protect her now. Let’s go together.”

“Protection power?” Chen Rui was taken aback. He clearly remembered that after Athena’s life was burnt up, he fed her the newly exchanged resurrection potion and longevity potion just in time. The resurrection potion was the potion grandmaster’s greatest achievement. As long as one’s life didn’t end and the body was intact, one can be revived within 24 hours; and the longevity potion could also make up for the lifespan problem that burning up life might cause. However, why hadn’t Athena woken up yet?

Chen Rui was anxious. He walked out of the cave. In the Tauren’s Den, the Earth Palace was still in its original place. Chen Rui quickly walked into the palace and saw Athena’s body lying on a stone platform. Her body was faintly glowing. There were several earth elementals sitting next to the stone platform. One of them had a whole body of natural armor; he was the Earth Elemental King.

As soon as Chen Rui walked into the King’s Chamber, the Earth Elemental King felt it. He crossed his hands and bowed to him. “Sir Chen Rui, I would like to express my sincere gratitude to you on behalf of all earth elementals. The earth elementals will always remember your kindness.”

The Earth Elemental King had a special heritage. He could easily speak the common language of the Demon Realm. Chen Rui did not dare take the Demon Overlord-level powerhouse’s courtesy lightly and hurriedly returned the bow. The Earth Elemental King looked at him for a while and nodded: “That man’s energy has really disappeared completely. I want to ask, how did you destroy him?”

Chen Rui explained gently that Glorfin was engulfed by a unique talent in his body by a strange combination of circumstances.

The Earth Elemental King groaned. “You have incredible abilities, but the Demon Overlord-level will is not so simple. You might experience some special influence. You need to train continuously to surpass yourself until you reach the peak of the powerhouses.”

Chen Rui’s heart was all on Athena, so he didn’t care too much. He said, “Your Highness, thank you for your reminder. May I ask what’s wrong with my companion? Why hasn’t she woken up yet?”

On the stone platform, Athena was lying quietly. Her chest rose and fell evenly. Her beautiful face looked extraordinarily serene, like a sleeping baby.

The Earth Elemental King replied, “She has just advanced to the Demon King level. While still not yet adapted to her new powers, she had consumed all her life battles. Fortunately, she was brought back to life with the help of the special potion. It was only due to exceeding the limit that it triggered a mutation. She will probably be in this deep sleep for a long time. After she wakes up, her strength will reach new heights. However, this mutation is quite dangerous. There is a chance that she might lose all her power or even endanger her life.”

Mutation? Is it the medicinal power of the devil fruit? Or is it the inheritance of the mutated bloodline? Chen Rui frowned tightly. This should be a great opportunity, but how can I help Athena going through the dangers associat with it? Although I can redeem the resurrection potion after completing the three-star evolution, the resurrection potion canould only be used once on the same person. I have to think of a way!

The Earth Elemental King then said, “Unfortunately, my elemental heart is broken. I only have four days of life left. Otherwise, under the protection of my Earth Power, I can guarantee that she won’t be in danger.”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up. He asked, “His Royal Highness, I have the best resurrection potion. Can it restore your elemental heart?”

Earth Elemental King did not know how many years he lived underground. Although he inherited knowledge of his element, he still knew nothing about the outside world, However, Tim was different. He previously heard about the resurrection potion from Glorfin. At that time, the situation was urgent, so he didn’t care. Now, after receiving Chen Rui’s confirmation, his heart was shocked. Tim naturally knew what the black potion represented, and what the resurrection potion represented. The appearance of this potion would have a great impact on the Demon Realm. He looked at Chen Rui with obvious awe in his gaze.

The Earth Elemental King shook his head, “Elementals are formed by elements in nature. Unlike ordinary Demon Realm creatures, we cannot use the power of the potion. Although the resurrection potion represents the highest level of potion achievement, it still cannot repair a broken elemental heart.”

“How exactly can I repair the elemental heart?”

The Earth Elemental King replied, “One of the conditions is the fountain of life that you collected. If the fountain of fife can continue to exert its original vitality, plus the Earth Source and the requiem fruit, then the broken elemental heart will slowly restore.”

“The fountain of life is no problem; it can definitely exert its original effect. What is the Earth Source and the requiem fruit?”

The Earth Elemental King said, “The Earth Source is the condensed essence of the Earth Power, which can help the creatures of the earth grow and recover quickly. It can repair the cracks in the elemental heart. The formation of the Earth Source takes a long time. I have some here, but it is not enough. Requiem fruit is a special kind of rare fruit that has a strange soul power. It gathers scattered souls. Its juice is the key to finally polymerize the elemental heart.”

The Earth Source can help the creatures of the earth grow and recover quickly? Chen Rui had an idea and asked, “Can the His Royal Highness show me the Earth Source?”

The Earth Elemental King nodded. Some strange crystal fragments appeared in his hands. Chen Rui took one piece to have a look. A faint mist appeared in his hands, and it actually prompted that it could be transplanted. After obtaining the Earth Elemental King’s consent, he used 10,000 auras to transplant this crystal into the Star Garden.

Star Garden prompt: Unknown species. Each unit matures in nine days. It can mature repeatedly. It consumes magic dust every day. Current status: 2/10.

In other words, there were currently 2 units, and 2 units grew every ten days. They could be harvested repeatedly as well. It was just that the Earth Elemental King only had four days left to live. There was not enough time.

“I don’t know if this magic dust can replace the role of the Earth Source?” Chen Rui took out a handful of powder and asked the Earth Elemental King.

Earth Elemental King carefully looked at the dust in his hands. There was a faint wonder in his voice, “This powder doesn’t seem to have any power, but as an earth elemental, I can feel the specialness inside it. This wonderous energy is similar to the Earth Source. It should be able to be used as a substitute. However, their purity is too low. Their power is not enough to meet the requirements of repairing the elemental heart.”

Hearing the last sentence, Chen Rui’s heart suddenly sank. The purity is too low… He suddenly remembered some prompts in Star Garden. These dust were just “level one magic dust”. He remembered there was a condition of upgrading the pivotal fairy, “level two refined dust”. Could this be…

“In terms of purity, I might have a way!” As Chen Rui said, he took out a crimson fruit with the size of a goose egg. “Is this the requiem fruit?”

“Very strange energy…” Earth Elemental King took the fruit. His eyes were flashing with surprise. “Can I try it?”

“Of course!”

He cracked open the aura fruit. The juice filled with aura gradually seeped into the Earth Elemental King’s hands. After a short while, the Earth Elemental King’s closed eyes opened. “Clearly, this is not a requiem fruit.”

Chen Rui felt a pang of regret in his heart. Of course, he couldn’t be that lucky to carry everything required. The Earth Elemental King’s next words gave him some hope. “To fully repair the elemental heart, I need the requiem fruit. However, this fruit of yours has a different kind of magical power. If you can provide enough high-purity magic dust and this fruit, plus the fountain of life, although it cannot repair the elemental heart, my life should last until the your companion wakes up.”

Chen Rui tried his best to control the excitement and nodded. “I will restore the fountain of life in the Tauren’s Den first, and then I will try to improve the purity of the magic dust. As for the fruit… how many are required?”

“The preciousness of this fruit is no less than the requiem fruit. Just give me ten is enough. As an earth elemental who is very familiar with the earth and plants, I can feel that the fruit is extremely fresh, as if it has just been picked.” The Earth Elemental King revealed a wishful light. “Everyone has their own secrets; I won’t ask further. Maybe you can really make miracle happen again. Regardless of whether the elemental heart can be repaired, you are forever a friend of the earth elementals.”

Chen Rui took out ten aura fruits, bowed to the Earth Elemental King and then left. In addition to restoring the fountain of life, he also has an important test he had to conduct on the magic dust immediately. This was related to whether Athena would be able to survive the mutation period.

Next, Chen Rui spent 100,000 auras to transplant the fountain of life from the Star Garden and placed it in the original “puddle” in the Tauren’s Den. Currently, the puddle no longer had that light yellow crystal light, and the size of the fountain of life was five or six times larger than before it was kept in Star Garden.

Seeing the taurens cheering and jumping, Chen Rui smiled slightly at Delong. Without staying, he returned directly to the resting cave and entered the Super System.

The first thing that he saw was the “Sun as the center of the galaxy” boot screen, which was beautiful and peaceful. After fighting Glorfin, Chen Rui had understood that this space was not just good-looking. It was just as Glorfin said, it must be a spiritual realm, or more accurately, a small universe in his consciousness.

In this space, there was one thing hovering quietly, it did not seem to be affected by the gravity of the planet.

This is a mask, “God-Eating Mask”!

But it was just the “God-Eating Mask”. Glorfin’s consciousness had completely dissipated, only leaving behind one of the seven Demon Realm artifacts that was as famous as the Sword of Fallen Angel and Dark Shadow Cape.

Chen Rui tried, but he couldn’t store it into the storage space. He couldn’t use “Star Devouring”. Perhaps this was why the “God-Eating Mask” couldn’t be removed from his face.

Glorfin’s Demon Overlord willpower was so powerful. Although it was devoured by Star Devouring, it couldn’t be “digested” for a while. It could only be stored in this space to be slowly absorbed for his own use after today .

Chen Rui did not try to deal with the “God-Eating Mask” again. Now he had more important things to do. As he was struck with inspiration, he already appeared on the throne of the Galaxy Divinity Temple.

He obtained a legendary artifact? Can he control it or he would be controlled by it?

chapters.title: Chapter 167: Star Tamer! Brand New Skills
chapters.body:
Chapter 167: Star Tamer! Brand New Skills

On the throne, looking at the galaxies that were slowly moving in space, Chen Rui had an inexplicable feeling of looking down from the sky. This galaxy had stars and planets; the only regretful thing was that there was no life. Perhaps with the improvement of Evolution Level, everything would slowly appear. Therefore, was he, who was at the Galaxy Divinity Temple, the… God who was above all life?

These thoughts just passed through his mind. In the three screens in front of the throne, there was a new light ball in the three-dimensional human body in the status bar. This light ball flashed a blue flame. The word “Alioth” could be faintly seen.

White “Alkaid”, yellow “Mizar”, plus this blue “Alioth”, there was a total of three colored light balls. They were lined up in a straight line and looked dazzling. Its effect was not to look good, but to represent the differentiation in strength. According to Demon Realm’s classification, Chen Rui’s Alioth state had now reached the middle stage of the Demon King Level.

There was a huge gap between the Demon King and Higher Demon, not only the power, but the whole spirit, energy, vigor felt like there was a qualitative change. If he now faced Arux who was at the top among Higher Demons, Chen Rui was confident that he could easily defeat him with one hand without using his true power. It was no wonder that Roman did not have to use any effort dealing with the fully charged skills he cast. Although he did use some skills, the reason was mostly to show off.

“Alkaid” state <Refined Body>, “Mizar” state <Refined Energy>. Today’s “Alioth” state, he was <Refined Mind>. The “Alioth” state was followed by the “Megrez” state. Considering the “Megrez” state right now would be aiming too high. At present, he should first solidify and train the power of the “Alioth” state.

Title: Star Tamer. Evolution Level: Three stars. Experience Value: 1%.

Aura value: 1.237 million. Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C-.

After achieving three star evolution, the aura value was displayed in units of 10,000, and the Experience Value reached PS. It was unknown whether it was related to the Glorfin’s consciousness that he consumed. Strangely, consuming Demon Overlord level power only got him to the original level of three star evolution, but Star Evolution was not only the accumulation of power, but also the understanding of a certain realm. It seemed that there was still a long way to <Refined Mind>.

The second light screen showed the new skill in the “Alioth” state. The shining level of the skill tree had been increased to the fourth level.

<Teleportation> (active skill). Compresses space for rapid movement. Limited to twice an hour. The maximum distance is proportional to the user’s own strength.

<Shield> (active skill). A protective skill that can absorb any attack. It will disappear automatically when the absorption reaches the upper limit. It can be strengthened by the increase of power. It can only be used once an hour, and consumes an additional aura value of 100 with every use.

<Scorching Dragon Kill> (active skill). A powerful long-range attack skill will cause a fatigue period of 24 hours after use. Consumes an additional aura value of 1000 with every use.

<Regeneration> (passive). Damaged limbs and internal organs can be automatically regenerated, except for the brain. Affected by the extra skill <Fire of Nirvana>, the regeneration speed and effect are doubled. Each unit regeneration consumes an additional aura value of 100.

Of the four new skills, he had already used <Teleportation> and <Shield> in the battle with Glorfin.

There was no “cooldown” period required for two consecutive teleports which was very convenient. If used properly, it could play a decisive role in actual combat.

Although <Shield> could not withstand a Demon Overlord powerhouse such as Glorfin, its practicality was undoubt. It was definitely a life-saving trump card at critical moment.

<Scorching Dragon Kill> consumed an aura value of 1000, and there was a 24-hour fatigue period. It looked very harsh, but it was definitely an unprecedented powerful move. He did not get the chance to try it in the battle with Glorfin, but he could test its power in special training or combat in the future.

If he did not have that last passive characteristic, <Scorching Dragon Kill> should be the strongest new skill. However, the last one, <Regeneration> was more powerful. Limbs and internal organs could be automatically regenerated, that is, as long as his head was not completely destroyed, every part of his body could be regenerated. It was almost the same as being immortal. Of course, this regeneration definitely took a long time to recover, otherwise there wouldn’t be the prompt stating that “Affected by the extra skill <Fire of Nirvana>, the regeneration speed and effect are doubled”.

That’s right, what does “extra skill” mean? What is the <Fire of Nirvana>? From Glorfin’s words, the power of <Fire of Nirvana> is related to the Asmodeus Royal Family. Could it be the <Fire of Nirvana> that originated from Christina’s Nirvana Blood?

Initially, due to the level of the star evolution, only four layers of the skill tree was lit. The top part that had yet activated was gray. However, at the tip of the tree, two fruit-like spheres appeared, as if it had produced fruit.

Chen Rui’s consciousness focused on the two fruits. They suddenly glowed a faint light.

<Fire of Nirvana> (extra skill). It can purify hostile souls and spirits. It can only be used once per hour. It can be combined with <Scorching Dragon Kill> to form <Scorching Dragon Possession> to greatly improve one’s combat ability.

<Puppet Control> (extra skill). Fully controls the enemy’s will, making them a puppet that cannot rebel. Can control a maximum of two people.

The function of <Fire of Nirvana> surprised Chen Rui. Not only could it target the soul, but it could also be combined to form a super powerful possession skill! It seemed that the extra skill was a special power obtained outside of the Super System, but the latter <Puppet Control> surprised him a bit. What kind of extra skill is this?

Turning the enemy into a puppet? Why does it seem a little familiar? Chen Rui reacted suddenly. His eyes looked at the “God-Eating Mask” outside. Could it be…

He never expected the “God-Eating Mask” to have such a function! Although it could only control two people, as one of the seven artifacts of Demon Realm, the power of the “God-Eating Mask” was not that underwhelming. Christina once said that besides the Asmodeus Royal Family, others could not use the Dark Shadow Cape. For the same reason, Chen Rui, as a human, was able to use a small part of the power of the “God-Eating Mask” through the Super System. He was already satisfied.

He only browsed the skill states for just a moment. Chen Rui focused on the third light screen: architecture.

In addition to the exchange center, training ground, and storage warehouse, a new buildable model had appeared.

Refining Room.

Activation condition: 5000 aura value.

Function: The higher the grade of refining and purifying various substances, the more aura is consumed.

Chen Rui immediately chose to build a refining room. The appearance of the refining room was simple and straightforward, and there was no need to go in. The corresponding operation could be completed on the screen outside.

The refining room and the storage warehouse were connected. He could directly select the items in the storage warehouse and transfer them to the refining room for purification. Of course, this was limited to the items that could be purified.

Purification in the refining room was equivalent to separating impurities. Chen Rui tried it on a dark star iron mineral from the storage warehouse. After purification, he got pure dark star iron. Chen Rui acquired considerable forging knowledge with the help of <Deep Analysis>. He could tell that the dark star iron purified by the refining room had no impurities. This saved him many troublesome processes, and the finished product was flawless.

As for refining, it was a process of improving the grade, which was divided into five grades. When Chen Rui placed his consciousness on the purified dark star iron, it prompted “times of refining grade: two.”

The effect of the first refinement that was equivalent to that of the Tauren’s master forger (such as Delong) only cost 100 aura. In the second refinement, the entire dark star iron shrank a size. Not only did the density change, the quality had also changed strangely. It emitted a faint light that was not there before, and it cost 1000 aura.

Chen Rui was very satisfied with the results of the test and began to refine the magic dust. Magic dust consumed much less aura. 100 units only consumed 10 aura. After the first refinement, 1000 units of magic dust became 100 units of level two refined magic dust. The dust that initially glowed slightly started to shine with glittering light.

After the second refinement, 100 units of level two refined magic dust became ten units of level three refined magic dust. The light of the dust appeared faintly blue.

When Chen Rui wanted to perform the third refinement, he was prompted that his Star Evolution Level was not enough. It seemed that he could only refine up to twice at present. He also did not know whether this quality could meet the requirements of the Earth Elemental King. He quickly quit the Super System and came to the Earth Palace again.

“It is done so fast?” Earth Elemental King was taken aback.

Chen Rui took out some level three refined magic dust. “Your Highness, can this dust of this purity achieve the effect of the Earth Source? If so, the quantity is not a problem.”

As soon as he took out the level three refined magic dust, the surrounding earth elementals sensed it at the same time. Their gaze focused on him in unison.

The shock in the Earth Elemental King’s eyes grew stronger. “I can’t believe it. The power of this dust seems to exceed the Earth Source! It must be able to perfectly repair the elemental heart. Now I have the fountain of life, the strange fruit and this dust, it is enough to extend my life. Thank you very much! My friend, I can guarantee that Athena’s peaceful waking is only a matter of time.”

Chen Rui was overjoyed. “His Royal Highness, I will definitely find the requiem fruit to help you completely repair the elemental heart. This is the solemn promise of a friend, please trust me.”

Earth Elemental King nodded solemnly. “I trust you, my friend. However, the mutation that occurred this time is very powerful. Although there is no threat to life, there is also the possibility of losing power. If you can find a rare crystal called Obsidian Heart, you can ensure that the mutation is 100% successful, and it can speed up her waking.”

Obsidian Heart? This time, the protagonist’s halo didn’t work. Chen Rui had never heard of this crystal, but for Athena, he must obtain the Obsidian Heart.

“King Royal Highness, I need to find the requiem fruit and the Obsidian Heart outside the underground world, but there is something wrong with that passage…”

Chen Rui talked about the destruction of the enchantment. The Earth Elemental King shook his head and said, “Although my power is greatly damaged by the breaking of the elemental heart, if it is just a Demon Emperor-level seal, I can still break it.”

Chen Rui’s eyes brightened. This way, the biggest problem had been solved. At present, he should continue to make more refined magic dust until there was enough for Earth Elemental King to repair the power of the elemental heart. He should also handle the problem of the remaining fountains of life, and then leave the underground world as soon as possible to search for the Obsidian Heart and requiem fruit.

Although he favored the opposite sex over the friend, in Chen Rui’s mind, the Obsidian Heart was indeed in the first place. It was irreplaceable.

No one could replace the woman who laughed and cried for him, who burned everything for him, not even the red piccolo.

Athena, wait for me. I have to see your bright smile again!

The Super System was so convenient that it actually almost provided all the materials to resurrect Athena!

chapters.title: Chapter 168: Surrender
chapters.body:
Chapter 168: Surrender

Chen Rui returned to the cave and unexpectedly saw two people waiting for him: Tim and Lysa.

When Tim and Lysa saw Chen Rui, they bowed at the same time. Tim said, “Sir Chen Rui, forgive me for asking, but are you leaving the underground world?”

Chen Rui was slightly surprised and replied, “Yes, because Athena needs one more thing to successfully wake up. I’m going to look for it.”

“I see,” Tim nodded. “However, even if Miss Athena is fine, Sir Chen Rui doesn’t plan to stay here for long right.”

“Tim, let’s not beat around the bush. Do you want to leave here and return to Dark Moon?”

“I haven’t gone back to my family for two years,” Tim sighed. “However I’m not here today because of this. Here’s the thing, is Sir Chen Rui willing to accept the allegiance of the Medusa Tribe and myself?”

This proposal really surprised Chen Rui. Is this the legendary demeanor of the king? Once I release my vibe, everyone comes to surrender?

Tim then explained that at present, there were only three forces left in the underground world, which were the earth elementals, taurens and medusas. The earth elementals had their own rules. Taurens and medusas were originally enemies. Due to the common enemy Glorfin, they temporarily formed an alliance.

Now that the common enemy was eliminated, it was difficult to predict whether they would turn against each other and become enemies in the future. Queen Medusa, the only one who could match the Chief Tauren had already died in the battle with Glorfin. Moreover, the taurens could create excellent weapons and equipment now. Due to this, the difference in power between the Medusa Tribe and taurens was even more disparate.

Lysa was now the leader of the Medusa Tribe; it was impossible for her to leave. She was also still pregnant with Tim’s child. Tim was not planning to leave for the time being. The best way now was to surrender to Chen Rui. Although Chen Rui’s own strength had not yet reached the Demon King level, his magical powers were emerging endlessly. The most important thing was that Chen Rui was a benefactor of the Tauren Tribe and earth elementals. Even if the taurens wanted to turn against them, the earth elementals would not sit idly and watch Chen Rui’s “tribe” get destroyed. This suggestion to surrender had been unanimously approved by the Medusa Tribe.

“Sir Chen Rui, you have incredible power. You even exceeded expectations and destroyed Demon Overlord-level Glorfin. You also have resurrection potions. This secret is enough to shake the entire Demon Realm. If you don’t want to kill me to silence me, please accept my genuine surrender.” Tim knelt on one knee, and a master-servant contract materialized in his hands.

Tim was really a clever man. He chose to surrender not only for the interests of the Medusa Tribe, but also for personal reasons. Chen Rui initially considered this issue. Now Tim had taken the initiative to surrender along with a strong Medusa Tribe. Of course, he wouldn’t let go of this kind of steady profit business.

Chen Rui tried it. He was able to accept the master-slave contract as expected. After signing the contract immediately, the light entered both their bodies and the master-slave relationship was established. Lysa did not sign a contract, but solemnly took the Medusa vow of faith on behalf of the entire tribe. To intelligent demonic beasts, the binding force of this vow of faith was no less than a master-servant contract.

Tim was definitely a talent. He had extraordinary abilities in leadership, military and diplomacy. Among the Medusa Tribe, there were Demon King medusas and many Higher Demon medusas. Besides the young demonic beasts, the weakest was also Intermediate Demon level. Medusas’ petrification ability and long-range shooting were powerful combat abilities. If Cloak Gang was just an accidental temporary organization, then the Medusa Tribe was considered Chen Rui’s true crew. As long as he could obtain the Eye of Sauron in the future, the taurens’ forces would also join the crew.

Chen Rui was not that ambitious, but in the Demon Realm where the strong would eat the weak, power was the most important rule of survival. Almost no one would sympathize with the weak. Chen Rui didn’t want to be the weak either. Happiness was not secretly curling up in the corner to blow bubbles. This kind of temporary illusion couldn’t withstand any touch or destruction. He needed to ensure that his future happiness was truly in his hands, just like the determination to grasp his own fate.

Mountain Xilang, residential area.

“It’s bad, Sir Snowden!”

Snowden, who was resting on the bed, bounced nervously, cursing: “Are those wyverns here again?”

As the head of the Red Devils (Scarlet Guards), Snowden had been in Mountain Xilang for several days already. It was really pitiful for him; he was enjoying the leisurely and comfortable days of Red Spirit Estate without having to return to this bitter cold place of Town Leia or even Mountain Xilang. However, before staying for long, a major event happened in Town Leia.

Joseph’s subordinate Barnacle organized the Scarlet Guards to launch a riot, causing the death of Town Leia’s mayor, Old Kander. The Scarlet Guards were completely destroyed. Barnacle’s corpse was also found at the north road of Town Leia. He was probably killed. This incident shocked the higher-ups of Red Spirit Estate. Although there were some peculiarities, the result could not be changed anymore.

The new mayor of Town Leia decided that the Res Spirit Estate’s forces that abandoned the town would not be tolerated, and Red Spirit could no longer control the west passage of Dark Moon using Town Leia as base.

Although the reason Snowden returned to Red Spirit this time was to report to his boss, Kanita, instead of sneaking back from his “vacation”, but as the head of the Scarlet Guards, he could not escape the responsibility of this disastrous defeat. Fortunately, Barnacle, the person directly responsible for the failure, was Joseph’s subordinate. Kanita promptly decided to place all responsibilities on Joseph’s head. He put special emphasis on Barnacle’s killing of Culia and other “internal fights” in attempt to use this to beat Joseph.

Joseph was not a weakling. He pointed out various suspicions and determined that the biggest beneficiary of this incident was Princess Royal Shea of Dark Moon, but Shea obviously did not have this ability, otherwise the passage to the west of Dark Moon would have been taken already. Obviously, the sacrificial pawn of this incident was Barnacle, who was Joseph’s forces. Therefore, the actual beneficiary could only be Kanita. In order to weaken and frame his brother, he did not hesitate to destroy Red Spirit’s plan to control the west passage of Dark Moon!

The two sides held their own words, and the argument went on endlessly. Red Spirit Lord Josh was unable to make a decision for the time being. He put the blame on both parties equally. After some suppression and compromise, Joseph continued to return to Dark Moon. Kanita was responsible for cleaning up the failure at Mountain Xilang. He must continue to control the west passage of Dark Moon.

This way, before Snowden could spend a long amount of time at Red Spirit, he was forced to rush back. Furthermore, he could no longer stay comfortably in Town Leia; he could only come to this awful place, Mountain Xilang.

When Snowden came to Mountain Xilang in depression, he was surprised to find that the miners had returned to the Mountain Xilang residence, while the Red Devils bandits were uncharacteristically huddled in Mountain Walan.

It was known from the mouths of the bandits that the horrible demonic beast, the spirit dragon from the main pit killed Sully and Yagus. Culia went to Mountain Lugang to kill the new human mining officer, but he was suddenly defeated by the traitor Lennon. As he was returning, he was almost killed by the spirit dragon. Due to the destruction of the communication tower, Culia urgently went to Town Leia to report it and ordered the bandits to hide in Mountain Walan temporarily.

Snowden nodded secretly. The other party had Higher Demon or even Demon King-level powerhouses. Culia’s order could not be disobeyed, and the Red Devils’ power in Town Leia had been wiped out. The manpower Culia ordered to stay in Mountain Walan managed to maintain a little bit of power. Unfortunately, Culia died in Town Leia, and even Sully and Yagus died. If he didn’t bring Higher Demon named Ivan over this time, no one would be available.

Soon, they received news from the bandits that were sent to Mountain Xilang to get news. “Lennon” had already left Mountain Xilang, and the daughter of the Empire’s First General, Athena and human mining officer, Chen Rui had disappeared in the lower layer of the main pit. They had been no news from them for the past few days. They probably met the same fate as the former mining officer, Tim, who died in the mouth of demonic beasts, probably that scary spirit dragon.

Although Athena’s death was somewhat troublesome, Snowden had no scruples and ordered the bandits to attack the entire Mountain Xilang. The miners and guards had no resistance at all. They were immediately controlled by Snowden’s force. They were collectively held in the Mountain Walan where the bandits initially lived. If it weren’t for Kanita’s orders, Snowden really wanted to kill all these troublesome miners. At this time, Snow found a good “thing” left behind by Athena, the wyvern cub.

If he could make this cub submit, moving around in this desolate awful place would be more convenient. Even if he had to turn in the Red Spirit Estate, it would still be a merit, especially when he needed to make amends for his previous faults.

The wyvern cub only had the power of an Intermediate Demon. With his Demon King-level power, it would naturally be effortless, but this decision soon made Snowden regret immensely.

When the cub was caught alive, it let out some chilling noises. It somehow attracted an adult wyvern. It was initially a good thing to have one more wyvern, but this wyvern turned out to be Demon King-level! Not only that, three more came later. All of which were Demon King level!

Snowden was in the early stage of the Demon King level at present. The weakest of these wyverns was also in the early stage. At the same level, demonic beasts were more powerful than ordinary demons. This kind of battle was impossible.

When did Mountain Xilang have Demon King-level wyverns! Is there an undiscovered wyvern lair nearby?

Now, it was like he had poked the demonic hornet’s nest. The wyvern cub was rescued, and the bandits experienced serious casualties. Fortunately, Snowden was proficient in magic circles. He initially cast defensive magic circles to defend against the spirit dragon, so he could barely fend off the wyverns.

Even worse, these wyverns were very vengeful. They attacked every few days, making Snowden afraid to live in the mine again. He could only return to the residential area with the magic circle. Yesterday’s attack almost completely destroyed the defensive magic circle. If the wyverns returned this time, no matter how much the Red Spirit Estate would blame him, he could only escape to Mountain Xilang.

“No!” The dark elf bandit who was giving the report said out of breath.

Snowden was extremely angry. A slap caused the dark elf to fall to the ground. “It’s not the wyverns, then what are you panicking about!”

The dark elf bandit covered his face. He felt wronged and said, “Sir, the brother who is guarding the mountain just came to report that a strange vibration occurred in the main pit. It may be the spirit dragon.”

“Spirit dragon!” Snow’s face changed. Although he had never seen this terrible demonic beast, from the bandits’ description and Athena’s disappearance, its power was absolutely not a trivial matter. If it was truly some kind of mutated dragon, it could be Demon Emperor or Demon Overlord level!

Snowden hastily walked out of the residential area. The outside was full of scared bandits. If it were not for Ivan’s scolding, they would have fled in all directions.

Everyone was on guard for a long time, but they didn’t see any spirit dragon. Snowden scolded the bandits. Just then, the familiar wyvern’s hiss sounded in the sky, the bandits who were already frightened could not stand still anymore. They fled in four directions without bothering much.

A spirit dragon and a wyvern, why am I so unlucky!

“Damn!” Snowden said helplessly. He never wanted to face these terrible aerial demonic beasts again. He called Ivan over to “retreat strategically” in the direction of Mountain Walan.

Before they could retreat far, Snowden suddenly showed alertness. One person already appeared in front of him without warning, blocking the way.

A man wearing a cape and a mask. The mask seemed to be a bit broken at the top.

Snowden would never expect to be a test subject by the masked man!

chapters.title: Chapter 169: Sad! Snowden'S Midsjudgement
chapters.body:
Chapter 169: Sad! Snowden'S Midsjudgement

Ivan could tell that the man in the cape was a bit strange, but the powerful vibe his body radiating was of Higher Demon level. There was still a certain distance from his later stage Higher Demon level. Moreover, Snowden was still behind him. He asked immediately, “Who are you!”

“Snowden?” The cloaked man was Chen Rui who just came out of the main pit. The shock felt by the bandits was caused by the Earth Elemental King destroying the enchantment.

After the earth elementals and taurens learned that the Medusa Tribe surrendered to Chen Rui, they congratulated each other. Chen Rui restored the medusas and earth elementals’ fountains of life to their original state. After the Earth Elemental King destroyed the enchantment, he left the underground world.

Coming out of the main pit, he soon discovered that the mining area was occupied by bandits again. It was unknown where the miners went. The leading male showed in <Analytical Eyes>: Race: Great Demon (mutated). Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C-.

After becoming a Star Tamer, <Analytical Eyes> changed again, the race showed an extra prompt “mutated”, and the comprehensive strength was divided in more detail: C-, C, C+ which represented Demon King early stage, middle stage and later stage respectively. It was able to distinguish the enemy’s specific strength.

Not only that, the passive skill <Breath Holding> had become <True Breath Holding>. He could freely control the vibe he released to confuse the enemy, but the vibe he released could not exceed his own boundary. For example, he was now releasing middle stage Higher Demon vibes.

It seemed that some existing skills could still evolve. At present, this was the only one. In the future, as the star evolution increases, it was likely that other skills would evolve too.

Chen Rui ignored Ivan, and set his sights on Snowden, who had the vibe of the Demon King. According to the double agent Connor’s statement, the Demon King-level opponent should be the head of the bandits, Snowden who was returning from Red Spirit Estate to Mountain Xilang.

If it were before he advanced, he would have avoided Snowden. Now that he had completed three star evolution, and he also had powerful new skills, he felt eager to test his powers instead.

“How brave! How dare you say Sir Snowden’s name! Show me what you really are!” Ivan was a close friend of Snowden from Red Spirit Estate. When he saw the incompetent cloaked man’s rudeness, his silhouette flickered and teleported in front of Chen Rui, reaching out to grab the mask.

Chen Rui did not move at all. When Ivan’s hand was about to touch the mask, he suddenly felt a pain in his abdomen. His whole body flew away upside down. All he could think was how the peak power of Higher Demon easily defeated by this punch. His vision turned black and fainted on the ground.

This is by no means a Higher Demon’s power! Snowden’s red pupil shrank, staring at the mask. He carefully responded, “I’m Snowden, who are you?”

“I know you’re Snowden. You don’t need to know who I am.” The masked man took a small step and rushed to Snowden’s face in a blink of an eye. He threw out a punch. Snowden had already guarded against it. He stretched out one hand. A semi-circular, translucent energy cover appeared around the palm of the hand. All he could hear were the continuous tremors. He couldn’t help but be forced backward. He didn’t know how many punches he received.

After the beating, Snowden’s energy shield became much thinner and disappeared after a while.

Sure enough, that is the power of Demon King! Snowden felt the strong impact received by the <Air Shield> he cast. His face changed. Snowden was proficient in wind-type magic; there was a skill that was very advantageous in close combat, which was flying. However, not far away in the air were Demon King-level wyverns that viewed him as an enemy. He could not expose himself easily.

The problem was this mysterious guy with the Demon King-level powers. Snowden didn’t know where he came from. There was no time to deal with him. He should try to escape first, or it would be troublesome when the wyverns discover him.

Snowden’s lips moved slightly. Both his hands moved continuously and several bursts of air rushed towards Chen Rui. Although it was only beginner wind-type attack magic <Wind Blade>, it was still extremely powerful because it was cast by a Demon King-level powerhouse. An ordinary mage could only cast one or two bursts, but Snowden could release dozens of bursts in one shot. He was really a practitioner specialized in magic.

Inspiration struck Chen Rui. He appeared in front of Snowden instantly. Dozens of <Wind Blades> suddenly missed. Snowden knew then that the other party was also a “Great Demon”. Without being panicked, he teleported a distance away. As he turned around and was about to escape, Chen Rui’s figure suddenly appeared in front of him again. Snowden was taken aback. Even a powerful Great Demon must wait for a period of time after using <Teleportation> before he can use it again. The opponent teleported again within less than five seconds, could it be a special talent?

A magic practitioner was never good at close combat. Snowden suddenly lost the opportunity to condense <Air Shield>. His eyes flashed and his image suddenly changed. He changed from a human appearance to a horned, red-skinned Great Demon. His body engulfed in flames. At the same time, Chen Rui felt his body tightened, as if being tied by some invisible rope. His fists stopped suddenly. This was Snowden’s mutated talent, <Psychokinesis>.

This talent was a very pure mental power. Unlike ordinary magic, it could be cast instantly. It could be used for offense and defense which was was very powerful.

Snowden pulled back and distanced himself while controlling <Psychokinesis>. Chen Rui only felt that the binding on his body grew tighter, and his muscles were being distorted by a powerful force. His body flared with a black flame. When <Psychokinesis> encountered the black flame, it dispersed like snow. The dissipated energy melded into the black flames, making the flame fiercer.

Snowden was shocked. His mutated talent was his best trick to deal with melee enemies. He never expected to encounter his nemesis today. He immediately gnashed his teeth and quietly chanted the spell. Sizzling

sounds came from his hands. Several lightning energy spheres appeared in front of him. Chen Rui could feel the powerful destruction power these spheres contained even at this distance. It was the powerful wind-type attack magic, <Thunderball>. <Thunderball> consumed a lot of magic power. These four <Thunderballs> already consumed most of Snowden’s powers.

Snowdenen pointed at Chen Rui, and four sizzling <Thunderballs> shot out together. It seemed like Chen Rui could not react in time. At the very moment Snowden was secretly overjoyed, he saw a translucent, blue dome suddenly appear around the opponent’s body.

Magic shield? A practitioner proficient in both physical strength and magic! Snowden was taken aback. This kind of opponent was the most troublesome, and their combat ability generally exceeded opponents of the same level.

The magic shield was of a higher level defense than <Air Shield>. However, in the face of four <Thunderballs>, even a powerful magic shield could not handle it.

In the blink of an eye, four <Thunderballs> struck the dome. It immediately burst apart. The entire protective shield was shrouded by powerful lightning, making sizzling

sounds. It was like a huge thunder ball. The surrounding ground was scorched, and a large number of crystals melted by high temperature.

What shocked Snowden was that after the lightning disappeared, the dome still did not disappear; only some cracks appeared on it.

This is not a magic shield! But it’s much stronger than the magic shield’s defense! What kind of magic is this? As Snowden was stunned, the noises already attracted the attention of the wyverns in the air and they began to fly over.

Snowden was shocked as he found out the wyverns’ movement. He had an idea and said, “Sir, I don’t remember when we became enemies. Now, these wyverns in the air are very fierce. If we fight alone, neither of us can be their opponents. So, let’s deal with these demonic beasts together, and then settle our personal grievances, how about it?”

“ Oh? ” The cloaked man’s voice sounded a bit excited. “Sounds like a good idea.”

Snowden thought his plan succeeded and secretly rejoiced. He was going to try to divert the wyverns’ attacks to this mysterious cloaked man later and then slip away himself.

The wyverns soon approached and began to release angry hiss. What made Snowden feel slightly relieved was that the cloaked man did not attack him again; he only “cautiously” watched the demonic beasts in the air.

Four powerful wyverns dived down quickly. Strangely, the angry hisses seemed to have changed, but their target hadn’t changed. They rushed directly toward Snowden. As they agreed previously, the cloaked man attacked the wyverns and seemed to gradually attract the attention of these scary demonic beasts. Snowden watched carefully while fighting. When he saw an opportunity, he released a tornado to force the wyverns near the cloaked man. When the opponent’s vision was blurred, he tried to escape. Suddenly, the four wyverns covered the cloaked man and sprayed poison at Snowden in unison.

This change caught Snowden off guard. He hurriedly cast <Air Shield>. The poison hit <Air Shield> and quickly turned into a highly corrosive foam. Fortunately, <Air Shield> was composed of magic elements. If it was an ordinary shield, it would have already been corroded.

While defending against the poison, Snowden suddenly sensed danger. Before he could react, he felt pain in his back. He was already hit by a powerful force. The power of this blow was very terrible. Not only did his bones break into several pieces, but even his internal organs seemed to be turned upside down. For a moment, he was unable to gather magic power.

Snowden screamed in pain. He ran a few steps forward and spurted blood. He was in so much pain that he could not stand straight. He turned his head and saw the cloaked man, who sneaked attack behind him, slowly retracted his fist. Snowden was shocked and angry, “What are you doing! If you kill me, you won’t be able to fight them alone…”

This sentence was stopped abruptly because Snowden was surprised to see that the four fierce wyverns gently approached the cloaked man and occasionally rubbed their heads against the cloaked man’s hand.

“I said your idea sounds good.” Chen Rui smiled behind his mask. “Unfortunately, I can’t use it.”

The four Demon King-level wyverns all turns out to belong to this person …

Snowden gritted his teeth. As he was about to exhaust his remaining magic power to make the final blow, Chen Rui stepped forward and struck the back of his neck like lightning. Snowden suddenly lost consciousness and returned to human form.

A wyvern was about to go ahead and finish off this terrible enemy who was trying to harm the wyvern cub, but it was stopped by Chen Rui. “My friend, don’t kill him for the time being. I want to use him to test a new skill.”

More precisely, this was an additional skill.

<Puppet Control>!

Another convenient skill for the human who was originally cunning. His mind game would escalate to another level.

chapters.title: Chapter 170: Control And Changes
chapters.body:
Chapter 170: Control And Changes

Some time passed.

Snowden who had fallen on the ground slowly opened his eyes. His red eyes suddenly turned pale yellow, and then the pale yellow light gradually returned to red.

After the last ray of yellow light entered his eyes, Snowden slowly stood up and bowed to Chen Rui, “Master.”

Chen Rui nodded with satisfaction. He could clearly feel Snowden’s absolute obedience. This was different from a master-slave contract. Within effective distance, Chen Rui could even control Snowden’s words and actions in his consciousness, or even completely destroy his consciousness to the point of death. A regular mind control skill could not control someone with the same level of power. Even if it succeeded, the time was limited. However, the control of the “God-Eating Mask” was always effective. Without the master’s deliberate control, Snowden could use his own memory and consciousness like ordinary people. Of course, this consciousness had been completely “brainwashed”. He was unconditionally obedient to the master.

The only flaw was that this control was irreversible. Unless he killed Snow or even Chen Rui himself, there was no way for the puppet to regain consciousness.

“Where are those miners now?”

“Master, they are all in Mountain Walan. They were under the control of my men. Soon, it will be mine submission time to Dark Moon. I initially planned to order the miners to deal with this routine submission and then I will dispose of them.”

Chen Rui nodded. “Just do as you plan, and maintain the status quo for the time being. Don’t alarm anyone. As for the Red Spirit Estate, you should know how to handle it.”

“I understand. Please rest assured, master.”

After turning Snowden into a puppet, not only the mines, but the entire west passage of Dark Moon was now in his control. When necessary, you could start to change the situation at any time. For now, he didn’t want to alert the enemy.

Chen Rui’s mind was set. He thought of something and asked, “Snowden, do you know where the Obsidian Heart and requiem fruit are?”

Snowden recalled for a while and said, “The Obsidian Heart is a rare crystallization of the Fire Power. I remember for Lord Josh’s birthday a decade ago, Joseph gave him an Obsidian Heart as a gift, and he received Josh’s praise for that. As for the requiem fruit, I only know it is a rare fruit in legends. There is no other relevant information.”

Joseph? It truly is where you least expect it to be! Chen Rui’s eyes brightened. He asked, “Is Joseph still at the Red Spirit Estate?”

Snowden shook his head. “Before I was ordered to come to Mountain Xilang, he had already returned to Dark Moon.”

Chen Rui suddenly thought of something else. He had agreed with Shea at the beginning to contact her after half a month when the relevant matters were settled, then Dark Moon would send troops to eliminate the bandits. The situation had changed now. The bandits had been completely controlled, and the plan needed to be changed at the last minute. It had been more than half a month now, but fortunately, he left some leeway at the time and said that she should wait for his liaison before sending troops.

It seemed that he had to go back to Dark Moon this time. In addition to fulfilling the agreement to meet Joseph using “Aguile’s” identity, he still needed to contact Shea again. The most important thing was to obtain the Obsidian Heart!

Snowden left with the fainted Ivan. The four wyverns and Chen Rui reunited after a long time; they seemed very intimate. Chen Rui found out from the wyverns that while a wyvern was hunting, it heard Kegu’s cry. When it rushed over, it discovered that Snowden was using magic to entrap a wyvern cub. It was infuriated as it immediately launched an attack to rescue Kegu, and it retaliated against the enemy Snowden until it met Chen Rui whom it didn’t see for a long time.

Speaking of Kegu, Chen Rui thought about Mengda who was still hiding nearby Town Leia. He immediately dispatched one of the most powerful later stage Demon King level wyvern to follow him to Dark Moon City while the rest went to Town Leia to find Mengda, then they temporarily resided in the original Mountain Xilang range and wait for him to return from Dark Moon before reuniting.

Although a living environment without hypertoxicity was not very suitable for wyverns, a toxic environment was more useful for nurturing the next generation. In other environments, short-term survival should not be a problem.

Chen Rui rode the wyvern day and night and arrived near Dark Moon in the afternoon. Having a mask that couldn’t be removed on his face was really troublesome, but fortunately, the function of the storage warehouse was very wondrous. It could deliver food directly to his mouth, otherwise he would be powerless even if he didn’t starve to death.

After leaving the wyverns in the outskirts, Chen Rui didn’t alarm the gate guard. He followed a familiar road and rushed to the arena as quickly as possible.

In the arena’s lobby room, Arux was resting with his eyes closed. He suddenly sensed something and opened his eyes. He saw another person appeared in front of him.

Arux was taken aback. After taking the devil fruit and surviving that toxicity, his powers had further increased. He was closer to becoming a Demon King.

If he returned to the battle with Chen Rui that day, he was confident he could win. However, he did not expect this person to appear silently in front of him without any warning in advance!
