These words were actually the Chief Tauren’s original words. There was a sentence that followed, “If you can truly understand this feeling, then you are the top tauren blacksmith.” When Skye heard it, he expressed approval. “It seems your teacher is a true top master. I am ashamed of my inferiority. If I have the opportunity, I hope you can recommend me on my behalf.”

After this conversation, he looked at the weapons Chen Rui forged again. The relationship between the two became much closer. Chen Rui said, “In fact, everything I’m doing now is to pass my teacher’s test. It was not just my forging skill, but my own strength too. If Sir Skye trusts me, I am willing to help you get rid of the secret disease in your body. If it is successful, I hope that you can help me make three legendary grade equipment, and… I hope to be by your side during the whole process to watch and learn.”

Skye silenced for a moment and said, “Even if a mechanic master has legendary grade materials, there is no 100% certainty that he can forge legendary grade equipment. Your teacher should have said that there are three mechanic master specialties, which are metal forging, leather goods making and jewelry making. My specialty is not metal but leather goods. I can’t forge these three pieces of legendary dark Star iron. I can’t help you with your studies.”

Chen Rui’s teacher was of course fictitious, but his brain turned quickly. He said, “My teacher once said that once you learn one thing, you learn all. I still hope to observe and learn the process of your craftsmanship. As for the materials… how about this?”

“Learn one thing, learn all? It makes a lot of sense… Hold on, this is… hydra skin!” Skye was so moved when he saw what Chen Rui took out. He threw the dark star iron back to Chen Rui and stepped forward in one quick stride. He stroked the hydra skin with his eyes shining. “Very perfect material. Although it is not of the mutated Demon Emperor level, it is still the Great Demon King level. It’s also very fresh with no tanning. With special methods, its enchantment effect will be quite impressive…”

If the previous dark star iron was not within Skye’s mastery, then the current hydra skin was truly his “type”.

After a while, Skye realized that he had forgotten himself. He stood up with a bitter smile. “Hydra skin alone is not enough; I still need other materials. However, I believe that with your ability, it should not be a problem. Now I am a bit convinced that you really can help me.”

Using the same excuse twice, that was really convenient. However, Chen Rui really knew how to use his practical knowledge in forging.

chapters.title: Chapter 190: Tim! The Sudden Appearance Of The Former Mining Officer
chapters.body:
Chapter 190: Tim! The Sudden Appearance Of The Former Mining Officer

“There are not only injuries on my body but curses! Eve and Alian have poison and curse in their bodies, which definitely cannot be cured by normal potions. Don’t ask me why or how, just know the three ways to lift the curse.” Skye sighed. “These three things are very rare, namely the fountain of life, fountain of vitality and the flower of mist. “

When Chen Rui heard the fountain of life, his heart moved, but he never heard of the other two. He immediately asked cautiously, “Do these three antidotes have to be used together or can they work separately?”

The fountain of life can lift Eve and Alian’s poison curse, and the fountain of vitality and the flower of the mist shadow are the keys to dispel the curse on my body. However, my vitality has been consumed by some secret technique. As long as you can find the fountain of life and free my two daughters from pain, I can help you make two pieces of equipment first.”

Chen Rui thought about it and decided to confirm it. He said, “I heard the teacher talk about the fountain of life. I think it loses effectiveness within half an hour after leaving its source. I don’t know if this is it…”

Skye was shocked and seemed very emotional. He said quickly, “This is the kind of fountain of life I require! I have a magic bottle here, which can contain the fountain of life for three months.”

“Give me the magic bottle.” Chen Rui knew what it was, but he could not expose the power of the galaxy garden in front of Skye. He said, “I will immediately seek out my teacher to ask about the whereabouts of the fountain of life. I’m sure I won’t be kicked out for just asking only.”

Skye said nothing and threw the bottle to Chen Rui. Chen Rui took out a piece of hydra skin. “There are two pieces of hydra skin in total, which can be considered my mortgage. And these few bottles of medicine, consider it as a gift to Eve and Alian. Sir, please don’t reject it. After all, Alian’s poison curse was just triggered again. Please don’t blame her for her words; she’s just a child.”

Skye expressed gratitude and nodded without pretentiousness.

Chen Rui left the Cloak Gang and rushed toward the arena.

Skye’s mechanica master identity was an unexpected gain. The reason why the father and daughters were cursed was certainly not simple, but for now, it was not the time to investigate. He could give Skye the fountain of life at any time, but the key to this deal was watching the creation process. At present, the most important role of <Deep Analysis> was to crack the “God-Eating Mask”. He had to wait until at least after the mask was completely cracked to release extra mental power to “imprint” the leather armor making skill.

Back in the arena, he saw Athena and the others waiting for him. It turned out that Royce had rushed back overnight.

This time Royce went to the Red Spirit Estate secretly. After many setbacks, he finally found the place where the treasure was buried. With his bloodline power as the key, he obtained the secret treasure as expected.

Royce took out a box and handed it over respectfully. Chen Rui opened it to see. It was a silver necklace with a blue gem in the center. The necklace was also dotted with blue light. It looked simple and elegant, but it was the secret treasure of the Sloth Royal Family, “Evil Blue Tear”.

“Evil Blue Tear” looked better than “Dark Will”, but it was just a more quaint necklace. It did not have the power fluctuations. It was seriously inconsistent with the title of “The Sloth Royal Family’s greatest treasure below the artifact”.

Chen Rui initially wanted to try its effect, but no matter how he looked at it, the necklace was for females. He couldn’t lower his dignity to put it on in front of Athena and a few maids, so he had to find an excuse to slip into underground to try it. Athena’s laughter came behind him.

After reaching the room on the basement floor, Chen Rui put on the necklace without hesitation. The moment he put on the necklace, he had a wonderful feeling. It felt like some kind of heat flow was spreading out in all directions, circulating around the body, and finally retracted into the blue gem in the center.

Chen Rui had an idea. He felt his mental power began to focus quickly, and the focusing speed and quality were better than usual. He tried to combine it with the power of the elemental heart and activated <Deep Analysis>. Sure enough, he felt more proficient than usual. In the automatic analysis prompt, it was recommended that the number of times per day had changed from “two” to “three”. After completing <Deep Analysis> three times, there was no sign of mental exhaustion. However, after about an hour he felt particularly fatigued. It seemed that the enhancement of the Evil Blue Tear had a certain limit, which was not as good as the elemental heart’s wonder. However, for Chen Rui who urgently needed mental energy to increase the number of times of analysis, it was completely acceptable.

After three consecutive analyses, the analysis progress of the mask increased by 2%. The effect was not bad. Following this progress, the “God-Eating Mask” could be completely cracked in less than one month.

As for the fountain of vitality and the flower of mist, he left it to Royce to use Joseph’s intelligence network to investigate. There was no rush anyway.

A few days passed. After the appearance of the Beelzebub Royal Family, another piece of shocking news came from Dark Moon.

Princess Royal Shea suddenly dispatched imperial guards which was led personally by Commander Kaguron. Using the routine schedule to collect minerals as a cover, they launched a surprise attack on the bandits in Mountain Xilang.

Although the bandits were caught by surprise, under the leadership of the bandit leader, they still did not panic and began to fight back with tenacity. At this time, another key figure that surprised everyone in Mountain Xilang. It was the former mining officer Tim Saiful who had been missing for two years.

Tim rescued the miners imprisoned by the bandits at Mountain Walan, and cooperated with Kaguron to successfully poison the bandit leader. They eventually defeatedp the bandits, and the bandit leader left in defeat.

Currently, Tim had returned to Dark Moon City along with the current mining officer, Chen Rui. Compared to the wit and bravery of the previous mining officer, the human mining officer could only be described by the word lucky.

The story went like this. Chen Rui, who was initially sent to Mountain Xilang, barely escaped from death. After arriving, he avoided getting hunted by the bandits. If it were not for Miss Athena’s protection, the first female swordsman of the Dark Moon, he would have died. However, the human were extremely lucky. As he was on the verge of getting caught, he happened to meet Tim who had been in the underground world below the mine for two years and successfully escaped.

Tim entrusted the human to rush back to the Dark Moon to report it. Hence, Princess Royal Shea made an immediate decision and sent troops to Mountain Xilang. Sure enough, they succeeded in one go.

The good news of Mountain Xilang’s victory greatly excited the Dark Moon military and civilians. The initial fear of the Beelzebub Royal Family had been greatly reduced. For the Saiful Family, it was a big surprise. When they learned that their only child who had been missing for two years and was confirmed to be dead, was suddenly “resurrected”, the family elder, Old Ford cried. When the father and son met, it was a touching scene.

After this battle, Tim became renowned. The whole city was preaching his heroic deeds. Even the “legendary stories” of conquering various demonic beasts in the underground world were spoken vividly, as if they witnessed it with their own eyes.

On the other hand, using Royce’s magic messenger, Chen Rui contacted Joseph “urgently”.

Joseph was initially in “closed cultivation”, using the power of devil fruit to force through the bottleneck. Because this matter was not trivial, he had to interrupt his cultivation.

“My friend, do you feel like the changes cannot keep up with our plans? Dark Moon is about to hold an emergency meeting. I believe that Princess Royal has sent someone to inform you,” Chen Rui said calmly.

“Yes, I’ve received the meeting notification from Royce.” Joseph’s face was a little grim. “I never expected that Tim to be alive. I might be in trouble this time.”

“I know some of your troubles, but the one with the biggest headache in the Red Spirit Estate is still Kanita. Has his subordinate Snowden escaped back to Red Spirit Estate?”

Joseph shook his head. “Not yet, but I have heard rumors that Snowden is in Town Leia. Tim’s sudden appearance is really unexpected. Due to Town Leia’s hostility to Red Spirit estate and this time’s failure, it will be difficult to regain control of the Dark Moon’s west side.”

“With Dark Moon’s current situation, even if the trades with the Shadow Empire is restored, the fundamental problem still cannot be solved. The commercial road cannot be opened in a day or two. Furthermore, what fool would come to such a place?” Chen Rui let out indifferent laughter. “As for how to control, just let your father worry about it. This time, the responsibility happened to be pushed to Kanita. Who asked Snowden to be his subordinate?”

Joseph smiled. “You’re right, my friend, but there is one more thing right now. Hearing Royce’s report, the Saiful Family wants to take this opportunity to suppress me and put Tim in the finance officer position. However, this is obviously impossible to do. Their true target is the sheriff position.”

“I have also heard the news, and I would like to remind you that even under the same forces, the conflicts and fights between the new and old forces are still unavoidable, just like… you and Kanita. I heard that you have an interesting wager with the current mining officer?”

Joseph was tacful. He understood the “intention” of this reminder. His eyes flashed, and he asked, “You mean…”

“It seems that you have already understood it, for example… the Cloak Gang, the imperial guard reserve forces, is also one of the emerging forces. And there is still a small purposely-fostered friendship between me and that human.”

“My friend, you’re really too cunning.” Joseph paused for a moment and revealed a knowing smile. “With your support, I believe the internal conflicts on the Princess Royal’s side will become even more chaotic.”

Chen Rui laughed together. His tone suddenly changed. “ Oh right, there is one more thing I want to tell you first. The Gorefiend Gang of the Mellon Family seems to be quite dissatisfied with the Cloak Gang. I plan to completely eliminate them and take control of Dark Moon’s potential forces at one go.”

Joseph hesitated a little and said, “The Mellon Family is just an unreliable fence-sitter. It may lean to the stronger side at any time. The main target is currently my father. If this is a part of your plan, then I don’t have any opinion.”

“Very well. This is indeed a part of the plan. Soon, you will see the true effect of control.” Chen Rui nodded. “Okay, communication time is almost up. You will be returning to Dark Moon soon anyway. If there is a chance, we will meet up to talk. Although it is a pity that you interrupted your training, I believe that it is only a matter of time before you break through the bottleneck.”

Joseph smiled slightly. The image of magical messaging faded gradually.

Chen Rui came to the lobby and issued an order.

“Vasasha, immediately notify Jesse to gather some forces in the Cloak Gang to go all out tonight and eliminate the Gorefiend Gang! Arux, I leave the leader of Gorefiend Gang, Wick to you.”

Arux was gently wiping the dark star iron scythe in his hand with a silk cloth. After hearing that, a bloodthirsty gaze appeared in his red eyes.

Tonight was destined to be a night of massacre.

Joseph really thought their plan was going well, but he didn’t know the forces in the Dark Moon were slowly controlled by Chen Rui.

chapters.title: Chapter 191: Inner Demon
chapters.body:
Chapter 191: Inner Demon

Early in the morning, the Dark Moon city was discussing a major event again. The Cloak Gang attacked Gorefiend Gang’s nest at night. Arux, who was defeated by Aguile at the arena and had become Aguile’s subordinate, personally killed Gorefiend Gang’s leader, Wick. The Gorefiend Gang was almost annihilated. Only a few negligible thugs escaped. Since then, the Cloak Gang became the largest force in the Dark Moon City.

Certainly, the Cloak Gang also had the title of imperial guard’s reserve forces. This title represented Princess Royal, the highest ruler of Dark Moon. Therefore, although the Melon Family, also a supporter of Gorefiend Gang, hated the Cloak Gang, they dared not to avenge on the surface.

At the same time, another news spread, diluting the bloody event from the previous night. That was, the temporary meeting 3 later would decide the new finance officer and sheriff. Recently, Tim had the greatest support. The momentum was clearly created intentionally.

Compared with these news, the human mining officer who returned pitifully to the Dark Moon became a joke for the people after meals. Other than the major decision-makers like Shea nad Gauss, few people were happy with Chen Rui’s “return”.

Aldas had been immersed in researching the black potions and refused to see anyone. After learning that Chen Rui had returned, he interrupted his research to meet up with Chen Rui. Chen Rui gave him another set of True series black potions, saying it was a reward for the grand master’s trial, but he must be sure to keep it confidential.

Judging from Aldas’s gloomy eyes, he obviously didn’t hear any other words. His eyes was almost like a pervert, who hadn’t touched a woman for 100 years, seeing a stunning naked girl seducing him. Before Chen Rui could finish speaking, Aldas had already “robbed” away the precious potions with superman-like speed and rushed into his underground secret laboratory. He never came out again and this “dive” would probably take a very long time.

Chen Rui’s current identity wasn’t suitable to go to the arena, so he had been living in the lab. Athena also moved into the laboratory in the name of protection. The imp, Slee was very happy to reunite with his master after so long. Some time ago, Slee was controlled by Princess Royal, so the only thing he could do to pass the time was to read books. The books on the basic knowledge of pharmacy that Chen Rui gave him were all finished reading by the imp. He had great interest over pharmacy. He turned out to be a far more “competent” apprentice than Chen Rui.

Chen Rui didn’t actually go to Mountain Xilang. The reason Tim was able to leave the mine was not because he took a longevity potion, but because of the effect of the magic bottle that Chen Rui got from Skye.

Skye’s magic bottle could maintain the water of the fountain of life for 3 months. After returning to the Dark Moon City, Chen Rui had enough water of the fountain of life to provide, so Tim didn’t have to worry about his life.

Now, Tim was gathering a large number of aura materials through the power of his family. One reason was for the longevity potion and another was to provide for Chen Rui’s training ground consumption.

With the secret support from the Saiful Family’s and Joseph’s resources, Chen Rui’s aura problem was basically solved.

He had been refining his mind from the start of Star Conversion to the present. Considering the time spent in the training ground, Chen Rui had been training in various environments for several years. Logically speaking, his mind should have been refined to relatively strong. However, he didn’t know why his status these days wasn’t that good. He kept himself in the room, and he even told Athena not to approach.

Chen Rui sat quietly within glaciers. Most parts of his body were already frozen. For a well-trained man, although his body function had been reduced to a very weak level by the bone-chilling coldness, his will became increasingly strong.

At that time, there was a heat in his heart. This annoying feeling appeared many times in recent days. It was as if a flame was burning in his chest. Even the coldness outside couldn’t restrain the heat of the flame.

Calm! Calm! Calm! Calm! Calm!

Chen Rui’s calm mind formula worked. In his consciousness, the self-suggestive word, “calm” filled the entire space. His heart had a current of coolness that slowly extinguished the flame. At that moment, things changed again. “ Whoosh! ”, the words “calm” across the sky were all burning in flames. Suddenly, he was surrounded by illusions.

Within the burning flames, there were screams coming through from time to time. Pieces of body part were everywhere and the smell of blood was gushing towards his face. A figure in the flame was frantically slaughtering. The road was piled with human heads along the way. The figure was extremely familiar. It was actually Chen Rui himself…

The scene changed again, “Your body is mine! I will use your body to kill your closest ones!” Glorfin with the God-Eating Mask laughed loudly and controlled his body to kick Paglio’s corpse in front of him. Then, he walked toward Aldas, who had already lost his ability to resist…

These are all illusions! Chen Rui woke up in his consciousness and tried his best to use his calm mind formula to eliminate the distractions brought about by these illusions. The word “calm” in the flames became clear again, but the illusions didn’t stop.

In the Earth Realm, Chen Rui sneered while holding the repaired earth elemental heart in his hand. Subsequently, “ Poom! ”, he punched and shattered the Earth Elemental King’s body in the fountain of life into pieces …

Chen Rui broke away from the nightmare-like illusion once again. He was panting heavily. The “calm” in his will also made a corresponding sound which then exploded. It was as if it was contagious, the words “calm” exploded in a chain. If he could see the status bar, he would find out that the initially clear and delicate star chart had become dim. It was even trembling.

The illusion continued.

It was “Chen Rui” making a beast cry again as he pressed on a female body in a humiliating posture and madly violating her. His hand was pulling the woman’s long blonde hair. The woman’s pale body was covered with scratches. The woman lifted her face in pain, and it turned out to be Shea. On the side, there were many naked women covered with bruises, all with their eyes were closed, and he had no idea whether they were dead or alive. They were Athena, Christina, and even Kia, Alice, Delia, Lysa…

The words “calm” in the fire exploded. His consciousness was filled with violence and manic flames. Chen Rui could no longer maintain the state of calmness, so he covered his head in pain. Then, flame actually appeared on his entire body. Not only the low temperature of “glaciers” couldn’t extinguish the flame, but there were also signs of him melting as a whole.

At that moment, the flame burning on Chen Rui’s body suddenly turned black and the sense of coolness came into his consciousness. He controlled the crazy fiery power. Eventually, he returned to normal.

Relying on the power of the black flame, Chen Rui finally regained his self-control. He completely eliminated all the evil thoughts generated by the illusion and finally restored his calm state of mind.

Chen Rui had a kind of enlightenment in his mind. In the illusions just now, there were various magnified desires, such as fierceness, fear, greed and lust, that were hidden distracting thoughts in his heart. As described by the Earth Elemental King and Paglio, his mind cultivation had truly entered the level of “introductory”. After reaching this level and entered the state of calmness, the distracting thoughts in his heart would appear in the form of illusions. He must persist to break through the illusion.

Chen Rui thought of the description of this type of illusion in his original world and had an idea. Inner demon! Yes. This is inner demon.

<Refined Mind> was to defeat the inner demon. Originally, this required a large amount of spirit accumulation and training. After one’s mind and strength reached a certain level, only then the inner demon would appear. However, for Chen Rui, who devoured the Demon Overlord’s consciousness, he had more than enough “strength”. Thus, the key was to see how his “mind” could keep up.

Today, he relied on the Fire of Nirvana to pass by fluke. With the increase of mind and strength, the inner demon’s strength would also be greatly enhanced. To this extent, unless it was a specific period, the training in the training ground alone wasn’t very useful anymore. The true training to refine his mind was in his life.

Only when he experienced life and truly understood the power of “mind”, he could truly transform. However, if he got rid of the training ground, the time would become more tense.

Chen Rui left the training ground and came to the Galaxy Divinity Temple. On that tracker, the progress of Star Conversion had reached 20% and the color of the scale had changed, seemingly reaching a small checkpoint. His strength really felt a lot stronger, but his inner demon would become stronger and stronger in the future. So, the challenge in <Refined Mind> had just begun.

After falling asleep, Chen Rui felt refreshed. Certainly, the discomfort these days was all swept away. Je immediately walked out of the room.

“How’s it going?” Athena was the only person in Dark Moon who knew Chen Rui’s actual condition. Initially, she was worried as he hadn’t come out of his room these few days. Seeing him coming out now, she immediately went to him.

Chen Rui hadn’t seen Athena for hundreds of days during training. Seeing her caring look, his heart was warmed. He held her hand, “I’ll be fine for the time being. Thank you for your protection.”

Athena wanted to say it was fine, but she was happy to hear that, so she just said “ Um… ” softly.

“Come. Let me help you put it on.” Chen Rui took out the “Evil Blue Tear” and pretended to wear it for her, but kissed her earlobe mischievously. That part was one of Athena’s most sensitive parts. There was a sudden numbness in her brain, and she fell softly into his arms.

At that time, footsteps came. It seemed like the imp servant. Athena woke up suddenly, escaping from his wolf claws quickly. She even hit the dishonest hand along the way.

Surely, Slee came in with a pot of food. It seemed to be for Athena. When he found that his master who hadn’t been out was also there, he wanted to kiss ass, but he saw his master unfriendly eyes looked past him. The imp shivered and quickly took a glance at Athena. He keenly discovered the blush on that beautiful face that had yet to fade, and looked like he had a sudden realization. While admiring his master’s private affair, he scolded himself for choosing a bad time to deliver food. He actually ruined master’s business.

The master is still fine, but Ms. Athena is a Higher Demon. (The imp’s strength was too low. So, even without the necklace, he couldn’t detect Athena’s true strength). If she becomes mad from the embarrassment and has killing intent…

“ Ah! My eyes suddenly hurt! Is the Blinding Potion just now acting up again?” The clever imp quickly put down the food plate. Then, he covered his eyes and exaggeratedly screamed before he turned and walked away. Unexpectedly, he accidentally bumped into the wall. He couldn’t bother about that blinding effect and ran away.

The amusement brought by this episode made Athena’s shyness a bit lighter. Chen Rui stopped teasing her and said, “You’ve been so bored here these days. Let’s eat together and go out for a walk. You also haven’t seen Alice in a long time right?”

Athena’s eyes lit up and she nodded quickly.

Now it was only 20%, and Chen Rui already had an illusion. Would Chen Rui harm others if the progress increases?

chapters.title: Chapter 192: Picnic In The Red Leaves Forest
chapters.body:
Chapter 192: Picnic In The Red Leaves Forest

A little loli from the Princess Retail Store was in a very bad mood these days. Her usual bright smile could no longer be seen.

Alice was the happiest for Chen Rui returning safely to the Dark Moon. She rushed to the lab the second she heard the news. However, at that time, Chen Rui had explained to Shea that he had to train behind closed doors for the grand master’s test. Therefore, other than Athena’s personal protection, Shea also sent imperial guards to guard the lab entrance.

The little loli was shut outside. She wanted to use her identity as the little princess to forcibly pass. When Shea heard the news, she hurried there to take little loli back to the palace directly. The little loli threw a rare tantrum. She hadn’t talked to her sister for a few days due to anger.

There was an untactful guy just now who wanted to harass Kia, but he was caught by Alice. Alice immediately asked Kaguli to give that guy a kick. The unlucky guy rolled down from the second floor to the first floor and flew out of the gate accurately.

Now, all the guests knew that the little princess was in a bad mood. Many guys who had ulterior motives toward Kia immediately left to avoid being involved. The guests on the second floor also left tacitly.

Someone else went up to the second floor. Alice was holding her cheeks and sulking, so she didn’t bother. Yet, she didn’t see Kaguli and Kia looked surprised together. At that moment, a strange voice sounded. It seemed to be the voice spoken while holding the nose, “I want to buy this set of magic chess.”

Alice was too lazy to turn her heard, but she heard that Kia’s voice also became a little weird, “Sir, are you sure you want to buy this set?”

“Yes, can you ask the little princess to sign it for me?”

Kia looked at Alice; she seemed to be holding back from laughing, “The little princess is in a bad mood. Why don’t you two bring her out for a walk? Perhaps she will help you sign it then.”

As Alice was about to get angry, her nose suddenly sniffed sensitively and her beautiful big eyes immediately glowed with a strange brilliance. She immediately turned around, and she saw two more people on the second floor. Her gloomy face instantly changed to extreme excitement.

“Athena! Chen Rui!”

Alice yelled. She jumped high in the air and pounced at Chen Rui. Chen Rui wanted to scare little loli, but he was surprised by little loli’s exaggerated move instead. He quickly pulled Athena beside him.

The little loli hung on Athena like a koala and shouted excitedly. To prevent others from seeing the impertinence of the princess, Kaguli took the initiative to guard the stairs to the second floor. Under the influence of Alice’s emotions, “the security minister” who was usually serious had a rare smile on her face.

Athena was also very excited. She held Alice in her arms while jumping around, losing all her usual majestic. Alice glanced at Chen Rui who was snickering and whispered to Athena. Athena jumped to Chen Rui in cooperation. Alice twisted and pounced toward Chen Rui with Athena’s strength. She hung on his back and strangled Chen Rui’s neck tightly with both her arms.

“Well, Chen Rui, you dare to evade my <Spinning Piledriver> [1]. I’ll destroy you on behalf of the moon!” These messy nouns were all taught by Chen Rui to Alice. Now, he was like hoist by his own petard.

He didn’t dare to resist with too much strength, so he acted like he was suffocated while hoping that Athena or Kia at the side would help him to pull little loli away. Unexpectedly, Athena was just standing there with a smile, seemingly to “revenge” him for harassing her at the lab before this. Let alone Kia, her seductive eyes were flashing with gloat.

Woman really is an unreliable creature at critical moments…

By the time Alice came down from Chen Rui’s back, the poor human was unable to express his opinion in normal language as he was almost suffocated.

“Athena, we haven’t had a picnic for a long time!”

“Okay, little princess. Where should we go?”

“Blue Lake?”

Chen Rui shook his head quickly. He had trauma in that place. The little loli with a dizzy stick; the poison dragon that held his throat and said “brother”… Anyway, he would never take Alice to the Blue Lake for a picnic.

Athena saw Chen Rui look and smiled slightly, “How about going to the Red Leaves Forest in the south? Remember the treehouse that we built previously?”

“I remember! Let’s go to the Red Leaves Forest then!” Alice immediately agreed, so the itinerary was decided.

Alice was quite a good master. She even wanted to take Kia with her, but there seemed to be something odd between Kia and Chen Rui. So, Kia offered to stay to look after the shop. Eventually, the number of people joining the picnic event was set at 3.

After a little preparation, the little loli had put on a large coat, covering her body. There was also a beautiful little beret on her head, which made her look very cute. Athena was still dressed in the short robe while wearing the “Evil Blue Tear” around her neck, giving others a refreshing look. Only Chen Rui was still in his apprentice robe. He couldn’t even be qualified as the green leaf for the red flower.

The trio mounted on the tri-horned rhinos, left the South Gate and ran all the way.

Chen Rui hadn’t ridden on such a “bus” for a long time. He recalled the first time he rode the tri-horned rhino. That was when he first knew Athena. He felt a touch of warmth in his heart and looked at Athena. It happened that Athena also looked at him at the same time. Two of them smiled at the same time. Everything happened without saying a word.

That scene didn’t escape from Alice who had extremely good senses. She frowned, but didn’t stop talking. They were still chit-chatting.

The distance to Red Leaves Forest was nearly half the distance to Blue Lake. Soon, the trio reached their destination.

The three came to a big tree with a humble house on top. There was also a rope ladder to crawl up and down. Athena and Alice built that together. Alice said that she hadn’t eaten the barbecue made by Chen Rui for a long time. Athena immediately took the task of hunting whereas Chen Rui and Alice were responsible to clean the treehouse.

As Athena had just left, before Chen Rui climbed into the treehouse to clean up, Alice already walked before him. She lifted her cloak-like robe in a spirited manner, “Chen Rui!”

That sudden movement made Chen Rui startled, “What’s wrong?”

The little loli stood with her chest upright and revealed her overbearing demeanor, “Do you think there are any special changes to me?”

Changes? Chen Rui looked at little loli for a while and nodded.

When the little loli looked joyful, Chen Rui added, “That action just now is pretty flashy.”

“Anything else?”

“This hat is quite pretty.”

“Nothing else?”

“Your robe and hat matches well.”

“Look closely. Is there anything else?”

“Nothing else…”, “…”

The little loli, who had been trying hard to keep her chest upright, suddenly lowered her head in despair. It was completely different from her energetic look just now.

“What’s wrong, little princess?” Chen Rui squatted down curiously. Did this little loli take the wrong medicine?

Alice stood up abruptly and her head hit directly on Chen Rui’s head. Chen Rui was caught off guard. He could only feel dizzy. He covered his forehead and said, “Why did you heabutt me?”

“You have to call me Alice!”The little loli stood up angrily with murderous intent in her eyes.

Did this annoying man not notice my “changes”? Even if it’s only a little bigger, it’s still bigger! Hmph!

Chen Rui didn’t understand. He had a feeling that little loli wouldn’t get angry for no reason. Then, he saw Alice took out a familiar wooden stick from her bracelet. He vaguely remembered that it was the little loli’s signature dizzy stick that had a dizzy effect. It was because this dizzy stick that his first kiss was taken by Alice. Is she trying to repeat the trick today?

Don’t forget that Athena is coming back soon!

“Alice, what are you doing?”

“ Hmph! Call me little princess!”

Chen Rui knew that little loli was clearly making trouble. As a victim of this weapon, he would never repeat the mistake, so he immediately ran away. Alice took the stick and started chasing. With Chen Rui’s current strength, Alice wouldn’t be able to catch up even without using his true strength. In desperation, Alice stumbled on a stone and she fell to the ground. The stick fell off her hands, and she couldn’t stand up for a long time.

Chen Rui was startled and hurried back. Alice’s ankle was swollen. She was obviously sprained. Also, her palm was scraped.

“Don’t move, Alice!” Chen Rui took off her shoes, took out a healing potion and applied the gauze to the wound. The grand master-level potion he exchanged had obvious effects as the swelling quickly subsided. He also wiped the wound on her palm with a clean gauze.

Alice didn’t cry when she fell. Now, after being carefully taken care of by him, her eyes were a little red. Her heart felt strangely warm. It seemed like she hadn’t felt like this for a long time.

“Sorry, little princess.”

“Call me Alice, I said it the last time…”

Chen Rui rolled his eyes secretly. This loli’s heart is like a needle in a haystack; she is too difficult to understand.

Alice stood up and limped. She protruded her lips, “My leg still hurts. There are stones everywhere. I can’t move…”

Chen Rui sighed and crouched down, “Come up!”

Alice smiled as she got away with it. She leaped onto his backwith one leg, then she held onto his neck. Chen Rui stood up and walked forward. It was completely different from the chokehold at the store. The little loli was holding onto him gently. The light fragrance that he once felt up close drifted into his nose again. As little loli intentionally got close, her underdeveloped chest stuck closely to his back. Even Chen Rui couldn’t help but feel strange. Yet, the feeling quickly dispelled.

In front, Athena had brought the prey back. When he saw Chen Rui carrying Alice, she was surprised and hurried over.

“Alice, what’s wrong?”

“I fell down by accident.”

“Are you okay? Let me take a look quickly!” Athena was obviously worried about Alice’s injury.

Facing her best friend’s worries, Alice suddenly felt a little guilty, “Chen Rui already helped me to apply medication. There shouldn’t be any big problem.”

Athena knew the wondrous effect of Chen Rui’s potions, so she was relieved. Chen Rui started to barbecue. The long-lost fragrance made Alice drooled, and her eyes glowed brightly.

After feasting, the human man who lost his “value” was thrown under the tree to clean up the mess while Alice took Athena to the treehouse to chat, calling it “a conversation between women.”

Chen Rui shook his head and started to clean up. The little loli must be interested in the things at Mountain Xilang. However, Chen Rui and Athena had already matched their “confessions”. They would never reveal anything about the underground world.

Chen Rui was quite assured with Athena as it could be seen from the incident of Paglio’s “poisoning”. With his current hearing, even if he didn’t extend his senses, he could still hear Alice’s screams and shouts.

“Is it fun to ride the wyvern?”

“This necklace is so beautiful. Did Chen Rui give it to you?”

“You also built a wooden cabin in Mountain Xilang? Did you save a room for me?”

“…”

Chen Rui leaned against the big tree and looked at the ray of light passing through the wood. Faint whispers from the treehouse came to his ears, mixing with the birds’ chirps in the forest. He felt an unusual calmness in his mind.

It is different from the “calmness” in training. Perhaps, this is the ideal life in the future.

[1] <a href=”https://streetfighter.fandom.com/wiki/Spinning_Piledriver”>https://streetfighter.fandom.com/wiki/Spinning_Piledriver</a> Spinning Piledriver is a move used by a character in street fighter.

How long could Chen Rui enjoy this calmness?

chapters.title: Chapter 193: Dispute! The Sheriff'S Placement
chapters.body:
Chapter 193: Dispute! The Sheriff'S Placement

3 days later, the Dark Moon City convened a temporary meeting that everyone was paying attention to.

In the council hall, Princess Royal Shea sat in the middle seat with Old Gauss standing at her back. On the sides of the round table were Joseph, Alan, Chen Rui, Tim, Old Ford from the Saiful Family and the patriarch of the Mellon Family, Lombardo…

At the meeting, Shea first routinely summarized the situation of the Dark Moon in the recent period, including the emergence of the Beelzebub Royal Family and the great victory at Mountain Xilang. Subsequently, the Old Ford was the first to stand up and cause trouble. He questioned Joseph for bribing Tim’s relatives 2 years ago and luring Tim to the lower level of the main pit to kill him.

Joseph had been prepared for this, so he denied immediately. He asked for strong evidence from Old Ford. Otherwise, such inference alone wasn’t convincing. If Old Ford couldn’t give any evidence, then he requested Princess Royal to make a fair judge by punishing Old Ford for defaming the financial officer.

After a round of heated dispute, the matter was left to rest with Shea’s mediation. Then, the topic shifted to the question of the candidate for the financial officer.

According to the practice of a three-year term, the financial officer and sheriff should be re-elected at the beginning of the year. However, as Joseph and Alan were both colluding each other at the time. Their position was so unshakable, so Shea deliberately delayed the election and extended their terms. On the surface, it was a compliment toward both of them. Yet, in reality, it was to wait for a more suitable opportunity. Until today, this foreshadowing finally became useful.

Joseph didn’t say anything. The one who spoke was the patriarch of the Mellon Family, Lombardo. Lombardo exemplified and elaborated the Dark Moon Estate’s economy from all aspects that showed a good trend of “steady growth.” All these were, of course, the contribution of the current financial officer, Joseph. Lombardo deliberately pointed out that it was Joseph’s vigorous efforts that the Red Spirit Estate continued to provide a large amount of food aid to the Dark Moon. Based on that alone, re-electing Joseph as the financial officer should be indisputable. As soon as that was said, the small families that supported Joseph agreed.

Joseph was still smiling. These words that were spoken by Lombardo had much better as compared to boasting himself. Especially because food was Dark Moon’s weak spot, as long as he controlled that, his placement as the financial officer would be as secure as it could be.

Old Ford still refused to back down. He claimed that the west route had now been opened, so it wasn’t necessary to rely on the support of Red Spirit. If the families in the Dark Moon worked together, it would definitely alleviate the Dark Moon’s food crisis.

At that moment, Joseph defeated Old Ford’s last resistance with a sentence. As long as he could be re-elected, Red Spirit’s food aid for the Dark Moon would be increased by 30% from next month.

The food problem had plagued Dark Moon for thousands of years. Although the words of Old Ford seemed reasonable, everyone understood that a trade route couldn’t be established in a day or two. Moreover, the current situation in the west wasn’t stable. No one can guarantee whether it could become an effective solution for food. At present, they must rely on the support from the Red Spirit Estate. If the aid could be increased by 30%, it would greatly alleviate the biggest problem of increasing food tension in the Dark Moon. Yet, in this way, the Dark Moon would even more inseparable from Red Spirit’s “aid”.

Shea finally concluded and agreed to Joseph’s re-election as the financial officer.

In fact, under the miraculous effect of Chen Rui’s energy dust, the secret food base was successfully established and a large amount of food was stored. Dark Moon was already self-sufficient. However, they still had to keep it a secret. It was inappropriate to reveal their trump card. Since Joseph thought he was smart to give 30% more food, why not accept it happily?

Joseph didn’t wait for Old Ford to speak and directly shifted the topic of the opponent’s true intention, the sheriff’s placement. He praised Alan’s contribution to the Dark Moon over the years and proposed for Alan’s re-election.

However, the words of Old Ford immediately changed the happy face of Alan. Old Ford pointed out Alan’s mediocrity and incompetence. His personal strength was low yet he was mean and cowardice. Not to mention he lost to the powerless human during the Sky Match, everyone also knew that he cheated during the battle between Aguile and Reka. Thus, he couldn’t even convince the masses. Not only that, as a sheriff, Alan lacked the most basic leadership. The Dark Moon’s guards lost its morale and neglected their training, thus they had low combat power which could be seen in their repeated losses to eliminate the bandits in the west.

In contrast, Tim from the Saiful Family was completely different. He struggled for two years within the danger of underground demonic beasts, and he even escaped from death. His personal strength had reached Higher Demon. After escaping from the ground, he saved the current mining officer, Chen Rui and provided an excellent plan. He successfully plotted the imperial guards to surprise attack the bandits. He also took the lead by successfully poisoning the bandits’s leader and eventually became a key figure that eliminated the bandits and cleared the west of Dark Moon. His reputation in the Dark Moon was far better than Alan, so he must be the best candidate as the sheriff.

When they were talking about saving the mining officer, Chen Rui, Tim glanced at Chen Rui and he saw his master looked at him appreciatively in cooperation. Tim was immediately speechless.

These words didn’t consider the reputations of Alan nor the Karon Family. It made Alan extremely furious, but he couldn’t refute. Seeing that the situation wasn’t right, Joseph then nominated the patriarch of the Mellon Family, Lombardo which made Alan’s face even gloomier.

Old Ford and Lombardo were rivals for a long time. The grudges between them were countless. They wouldn’t hold back when attacking each other. If it weren’t for Princess Royal’s mediation, they might have already fought.

After tearing off their noble clothes, the so-called upper class nobles were no different from the hawkers in a wet market when they turned their faces.

Joseph’s gaze fell on Shea’s face. Shea was just staring at Tim without any expression. She looked slightly moved. Based on the analysis of the current situation, Alan was definitely unable to be re-elected. Eliminating the bandits at the west was such a good opportunity, so Shea wouldn’t give up this hard won chance. She would definitely regain control over the sheriff’s placement. Tim was a perfect candidate. Lombardo and Old Ford could be considered as forces that mutually offsetting each other. Moreover, Lombardo wasn’t truly a force under Joseph. Instead of letting Tim, a hidden trouble to have control over the Dark Moon’s military power, Jospeh might as well go along with “Aguile’s” scheme…

The temporarily stable ally must have a further conspiracy. Puppet? Control? Other reasons? In any case, it was beneficial for Joseph.

“Everyone, please listen to me.” Joseph’s words used a slight force to suppress the voices of Old Ford and Lombardo.

When everyone focused their attention on Joseph, he sighed and said, “I recall the most important thing that I almost forgot.”

As he spoke, Joseph’s eyes fell on Chen Rui, who had been silent, “Does everyone remember that during the quarterly meeting, when I recommended Chen Rui as the new mining officer, I once said that if the issue at Mountain Xilang is resolved, then I will further recommend him as the sheriff.”

As soon as that was said, everyone immediately recalled that there was such a thing and all of them looked weird: Such a powerless human actually qualifies to hold military power?

“I remember that I also signed a document with our mining officer while Princess Royal also acted as arbitrator. That document was triplicated, and I still kept mine.” As Joseph spoke, he took out a document from his space ring. Under the control of his strength, it floated to each person’s face one by one. Surely, other than the signatures of Chen Rui and Joseph, there was also the magic signature of Shea.

When Chen Rui heard it, his eyes suddenly lit up. It was Tim’s turn to show a vicious look in cooperation. As soon as Joseph saw that, he sneered even more. He stood up and bowed at Shea before he said, “The issue at Mountain Xilang has been resolved, and it is time for me to fulfill my promise. Princess Shea, I officially recommend the current mining officer, Chen Rui as sheriff.”

Saiful Family’s Old Ford didn’t expect such a change. He immediately oppose it, saying that Chen Rui was weak and incompetent. Also, he had nothing to do with solving the Mountain Xilang’s problem, how could he steal Tim’s fruits of victory?

Tim was embarrassed when he heard that. In reality, whether it was Mountain Xilang or the crisis in the underworld, Chen Rui was the one who resolved them. After considering that, he, the hero was the actual plagiarist.

Everything was under his master’s control, including Joseph’s “support”. Although Tim was proud of his ingenuity and ability, he was completely won over by his master.

Unsurprisingly, under the direction of Joseph, the Mellon Family quickly fell to the side of Chen Rui. The situation became weird. The sheriff election became an internal fight under Shea’s government.

Shea’s eyes looked complicated as she looked at the paperwork she personally signed.

Joseph secretly sneered: Shea always keeps her words, so she has an extremely high reputation. If she breaks her promise, her reputation will definitely drop. As for Chen Rui, it’s just coincidental. He had to rely on me and the Mellon Family to qualify as a contender against the Saiful Family in this meeting. Even if this guy with no strength nor support is delegated as the sheriff, he’ll only do worse than Alan.

In addition, Aguile would vigorously “support” the new force representative, Chen Rui. With the Beelzebub Royal Family’s schemes, he would definitely make Shea’s party, that was united initially, to have unavoidable disputes.

Shea seemed to sigh. She stood up and the quarrel immediately stopped. Every pair of eyes looked at the Dark Moon Lord.

Shea said calmly, “Since there is such a document, then the Dark Moon City’s sheriff will be assigned to the mining officer, Chen Rui. After 2 years of disappearance, Tim made great contributions, so he shall temporarily return to Mountain Xilang as the mining officer. Also, he shall concurrently serve as the captain of West Route Defense Forces, whose responsible for the development of the mine and the defense at the west of Dark Moon. The maximum number of defense forces is limited to one-third of the imperial guards. The other rewards will be given later.”

Old Ford still wanted to say something, but ultimately, he didn’t say it. The most furious was Alan. As soon as Shea announced the end of the meeting, he got up and left immediately. Before leaving, he looked at Joseph, Chen Rui and others with his eyes full of resentment.

The biggest loser this time was undoubtedly the ex-sheriff.

Old Ford brought along Tim and congratulated Chen Rui. His words were full of sarcasm toward the human which contained the meaning of ‘requiting kindness with enmity’.

Everyone knew that being a sheriff wasn’t that easy. Moreover, Chen Rui was only a powerless human. What’s more, he offended an old force like the Saiful Family.

Joseph walked over with a smile, “Congratulations, Mr. Chen Rui. There will be many collaboration for us in the future.”

“Thank you for sir’s recommendation.” The human who was delegated as the sheriff dramatically seemed a little lost. His excitement was beyond his words. Suddenly, he felt a cold breath behind him. He turned back to meet Shea’s cold gazee and he immediately shivered. Then, he didn’t dare talk to Joseph anymore.

Shea’s cold gaze fell on Joseph’s face. Joseph smiled as usual. He bowed slightly, turned around and left.

Everything just went according Chen Rui’s plan as a double spy. Would Joseph ever expect him to be a spy?

chapters.title: Chapter 194: Shea'S Reward
chapters.body:
Chapter 194: Shea'S Reward

After the crowd left, only Shea and Chen Rui remained in the council hall.

“Congratulations, the newly elected sheriff.” The anger that Shea deliberately showed when she was facing Joseph had long disappeared. She said with emotion, “Your plan is truly admirable. Joseph really pushes you toward the sheriff’s position.”

Actually, without the “agreement” between “Aguile” and Joseph in advance, Joseph wouldn’t make up his mind to push Chen Rui to the top. However, Chen Rui definitely wouldn’t say that, so he just laughed, “Without the cooperation between Princess Royal and the Saiful Family, we definitely wouldn’t achieve such an effect. Next, Princess Royal can send someone to take control and rectify the garrison. I just have to be a display.”

“Kaguron will be responsible for the imperial guards.” Shea said with a touch of brilliance in her eyes, “Since you’re serving as the sheriff, then I’ll leave the garrison to you?”

“I can’t do that!” Chen Rui shook his head quickly. Giving behind the scenes is still fine, but I really can’t lead troops. Besides, my identity as “Chen Rui” is a powerless human, so I can’t reveal my strength because of this.

“Don’t underestimate your ability. Also, you can ask Athena to help you.” Shea glanced at him, and she suddenly added, “Here is another piece of advice. The bloodline talent of the Wales Family is very special. If you truly want the best for Athena, don’t cross the last line until she’s 20.”

Chen Rui looked surprised as the affair between him and Athena weren’t disclosed, even the little loli could only guess a little. Yet, Shea probably also guessed it. When Athena took the initiative to accompany Chen Rui to Mountain Xilang, Shea should have already noticed some clues.

Chen Rui could notice the faint loneliness in Shea’s voice. Shea didn’t give him the time to explain or consider and continued casually, “Since this is the case, I think the promise before you went to the mine should be fulfilled, which is Kia.”

It was basically bringing up the old topic again. Chen Rui frowned, “Can I refuse this reward?”

A few months ago, after Kia learned of this incident, her initial rapport with Chen Rui suddenly became strange. In the past, Kia liked to follow Alice to picnic. Yet, a few days ago, when Alice asked Kia to come along, Kia actually refused. She was obviously avoiding Chen Rui.

To be honest, when he first came to the Demon Realm, Chen Rui did have some lustful thoughts for this seductive succubus. However, now, he didn’t have that feeling at all, let alone forcing her to do something she didn’t want to.

“This isn’t a reward actually but a task.” Shea shook her head and said, “I rescued Kia by chance, then she became my maid, but… the ‘incident’ is likely to be intentional. Don’t underestimate this succubus, her intelligence and strength are far beyond your imagination.”

After Kia became Shea’s maid, she had always been doing her job and won the trust of Shea. However, by chance, Old Gauss found that she had a powerful amount of spirit. If she was a magician, her strength would still be above Old Gauss himself, so he immediately reported to Shea.

No matter how they interrogate, Kia said that it was because she awakened her mutated talent recently. Also, she voluntarily put on an anti-magic ring to show her innocence which was a powerful item that could confine magic power.

Although there was nothing to pick on her reason and attitude, Shea was already suspicious, so she didn’t let Kia stay with her. Instead, she gave it to Alice. Actually, Old Gauss also secretly tried to perform the master-servant contract, but it was invalid for Kia. It was likely that she already had her a master or servant, so her origin was by no means simple.

“Your task is to find out her origin. If possible, completely subdue her, so that the enemy’s pawn that is placed beside us can be used by us. In addition to having excellent magic talents, Kia also has the mutated talent of devour physique to allows her to devour the essence of the subject and turn it into hers. This mutated talent is very rare and extremely powerful. Even a Demon Overlord cannot completely exempt from it. The magic ring can only limit her magic power, but cannot restrain this talent. However, there is a secret treasure that can suppress this devouring force – which is the ‘Dark Will’ I gave you!” Shea’s eyes fell onto Chen Rui’s finger, but the ring wasn’t there, then her brows frowned slightly.

Chen Rui noticed Shea’s dissatisfaction. With a thought, the storage played its role. When he opened his fist, the Lucifer Royal Family’s secret treasure was on his palm, “I think you need this secret treasure more than I do. Since I’m back from Mountain Xilang, I want to return it to you.”

“This is a gift I gave you. I didn’t plan to take it back.” Shea glanced at the ring and shook her head lightly, “This secret treasure ring was made by Sakya. Lucifer’s concubine, Shanny. Belphegor using her strongest <Eye of Evil>’s power together with Lucifer Royal Family’s blood. Other than <Teleportation> and spirit resistance, it had a special function when it comes to the affair between men and women, which was enough to suppress Kia’s devour physique.”

Chen Rui didn’t expect that the “Dark Will” would have such a miraculous effect. Suddenly, he thought of the “Infatuation Ring” from Roman in his storage. Its correct name should be Purple Flame Heart. It seemed to be involved with some ancient treasures. Unfortunately, this mystery hadn’t been solved yet.

He heard Shea’s tone turned cold, “You just have to wear the ring and you can occupy Kia without being affected by her devouring power. The succubus is naturally attractive to men, but their desire for men is also higher than that of ordinary women. In a situation where conditions are mature, it might be a good way to take possession of her body and mind completely. Our current plan has been carried out to a more critical stage, so no mistakes are allowed. If it is determined that she cannot be subdued, then she has to be completely eliminated to avoid troubles in the future!”

The coldness that can easily manipulate other’s life and death seemed to be reminding Chen Rui that it was an indifferent female lord in front of him.

Chen Rui frowned and said, “Do I have to complete this task? Can’t you leave it to someone else?”

“The Dark Will was secretly escorted to me by Athena 3 years ago. Almost no one knows that it’s in my hands. Besides, other than you, I don’t plan to give it to another person… This task can only be done by you.” Shea paused and looked appreciative, “Speaking of which, since Kia is just a task, I don’t know what reward I should give to you.”

“Reward? There is no need for that right? I don’t have much contribution anyway.” Chen Rui rubbed his nose. “Besides, I’m already a sheriff. In the future, if I was found to be abusing my powers and taking bribes, I hope Princess Royal can turn a blind eye.”

“Based solely on contribution, no one is comparable to you in the Dark Moon…” Shea shook her head, “Now, the secret food base has been successfully established. Under the influence of the dust, the effect on soil improvement is huge and the crop yield is pleasing. I have managed to solve the Dark Moon’s food crisis for thousands of years, and you definitely deserve a huge credit. The revenue from the Princess Retail Store that you planned exceeded my imagination. It had become one of the most important sources of money. Besides, your follow-up plans will also bring more revenues. Not only that, the minerals you bring back this time, along with those brought back by Aguile last time, are enough to craft equipment to arm several troops. You not only rescued Tim, making the Saiful Family even more loyal, but you also killed the bandits’ leader with a scheme. You planned the entire Mountain Xilang raid and finally cleared the hidden dangers at the west that lasted for several years. This time, your plan also helps us regained the power of the sheriff… “

“Really?” Chen Rui rubbed his nose even harder. It does sound like a lot of contributions, but most of them are for my own objectives, and many of them were just taking advantage of the situation…

After Shea said so much in one breath, she sighed, “These credits are too great that I can’t think of how to reward you…”

Can’t think of any reward? However, Shea was right. The sheriff was already the highest position below the lord. Besides, half of the wealth from the Princess Retail Store in the palace’s storage belonged to Chen Rui anyway, so there was really nothing to reward him.

Chen Rui muttered secretly and laughed, “We humans have a phrase that ‘if the one’s contributions are too great, it will intimidate the master’. Generally, when it comes to this point, even if one truly gives up his or her power, one still hardly ends well.”

There were countless examples in history, Han Xin [1], Yue Fei [2], Li Mu [3], Nian Gengyao [4]… Although their failures contained multiple comprehensive factors, the key point was undoubtedly their huge contributions that intimidated their own masters.

Shea looked dignified and stood up, “I, Shea Lucifer swears by my royal bloodline…”

“Wait!” Chen Rui smiled bitterly, “It’s just a joke. Princess Royal doesn’t have to be so serious.”

“If that was just a test, I believe you already know my answer.” Shea frowned, “The people from the capital will probably arrive in the next few days. We must be careful when dealing with them then. In any case, the Beelzebub Royal Family must be killed when it’s still budding. Especially the guy wearing the “God-Eating Mask” that night, he must be crushed!”

Shea’s undisguised strong killing intentions in her tone made Chen Rui secretly chill. The secret in the hidden room should be the biggest source of the murderous intention. It seems that the identity of the “Beelzebub Royal Family” should continue to be concealed.

Based on the “law” of offsetting hatred with affinity, I’ll accumulate more contributions now. Therefore, when I tell her the truth, her grievance should be reduced.

Shea looked at his flickering eyes, then her voice suddenly became a little muffled, “You truly think that one day I will hurt you because of…?”

“Value determines the meaning of existence.” Chen Rui scratched his head, “This is what Princess Royal said. It is like the time I went to Mountain Xilang previously.”

When Shea heard Mountain Xilang, it seemed to have touched something and the ice in her eyes gradually melted. “No, your value isn’t…”

She didn’t go on with that sentence, but Chen Rui clearly felt the rare softness radiating from her purple eyes. Thinking of the call in front of the Wind Chime of Memory in the hidden room, his heart was softened. He showed a determined smile, “Princess Royal, since that is the case. Well, I think I’ve gotten the best reward.”

Shea’s eyes trembled slightly. She stared at his smiling face, then she suddenly said calmly, “I have to say that you are really good at impressing women, Mr. Sheriff. Unfortunately, I’m not Athena, so put away your little tricks.”

What and what? It is so rare to have this feeling of an understanding friend… such an untactful woman…

Chen Rui’s expression was stagnant. He secretly criticized Princess Royal’s bizarre reasoning ability. Any explanation would only make things worse, so he left with sorrow, but he didn’t notice the rare sadness in Shea’s purple eyes.

[1]<a href=”https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Han_Xin”>https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Han_Xin</a>

[2]<a href=”https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yue_Fei”>https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yue_Fei</a>

[3]<a href=”https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Li_Mu”>https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Li_Mu</a>

[4]<a href=”https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nian_Gengyao”>https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nian_Gengyao</a>

Would Shea be able to reveal her true intention one day?

chapters.title: Chapter 195: Athena And Paglio
chapters.body:
Chapter 195: Athena And Paglio

The results of the emergency meeting made all the residents of Dark Moon astounded. Tim, who was the most promising of becoming the sheriff, was defeated by the human mining officer, Chen Rui who was “saved” by him!

According to well-informed sources, the key to Chen Rui’s success this time was the support of Joseph as the financial officer. The reason was that during the last quarterly meeting, Joseph and Chen Rui signed a gamble agreement. If Chen Rui could come back from Mountain Xilang alive, Joseph would recommend Chen Rui to become the sheriff. At that time, Princess Royal, Shea also acted as an arbitrator, so she couldn’t renege. Therefore, Chen Rui got the sheriff position dramatically.

For a while, the voices of contempt, dissatisfaction and jealousy were endless, but nothing could change the reality that the human had become the sheriff. However, almost no one paid attention to the former sheriff, Alan who had stepped down. In any case, the loser was the loser.

The most innocent was Tim from the Saiful Family. The sheriff position that was already in his hands was actually gone. He could only return to the bitter cold Mountain Xilang to serve as the mining officer again. However, he gained a title as the West Route Garrison Captain, which could control a certain amount of military power, so it was like a consolation prize.

No one would’ve imagined that Tim, the most innocent mining officer was half-knelt in front of the sheriff whole-heartedly at this moment.

Tim looked at the devil fruit in his hands with extreme excitement in his heart. In addition to the longevity potion, the owner actually gave such a precious item to him. Actually, other than the imp, Slee, the devil fruit had become a “standard benefit” as Chen Rui’s servant. If this information was spread, there would probably be countless demons who would squeeze in to recognize Chen Rui as their master.

With the power of the earth elemental heart, the yield of devil fruit was doubled. As for whether the grade could be further improved, it depended on whether the individual could withstand such “upgrade”.

“Get up.” Chen Rui patted Tim’s shoulder, “How did the explanation of Lysa go with your family?”

Tim nodded, “It was much smoother than I thought. When my father heard that Lysa had a baby and that it is a mutated Great Demon, he immediately confirmed her position as my first wife. He even proposed to immediately escort the child back, but I used my effort to convince him to not do that.”

Chen Rui was slightly surprised. He didn’t expect Old Ford would be so “open-minded” to actually give the “abnormal” medusa the position as Tim’s legitimate wife. Actually, Chen Rui still underestimated the importance that demons attached to inheritance. Certainly, if Lysa gave birth to a medusa, it was good enough for her to be recognized as a concubine.

“In other words, you’ll have a lot of concubines?” Chen Rui said with a smile. Seeing Tim’s wry smile, Chen Rui said, “Your father didn’t doubt me right?”

Tim shook his head, “Don’t worry, master. My father only knew that master saved me and Lysa, so he was very grateful to master. He knew nothing about the rest. Even the materials that master used to make black potion were also concealed by me.”

Chen Rui nodded approvingly, “You’ll bring along many people from your family to Mountain Xilang this time. The things in the underground world must be kept secret. You can claim that the main pit has been closed and make the miners continue mining the upper layer minerals. Don’t worry about submitting the minerals as I’ve already told Princess Royal. Also, the minerals in the waste ores room have been restored to normal minerals. I’ve also buried some of them in the Green Leaves Forest. You can transfer the minerals to a safe place in secret.”

“In addition to repairing the original public communication tower, you also need to secretly build our own communication tower in Mountain Xilang to facilitate our contact. As for the defense of the west, I don’t need to say more. Beware of the Red Spirit Estate and Dark Shadow Empire at any time. When necessary, you can use the power of the medusa or go to the earth elementals for help.”

“Understood, master.” Tim was completely convinced by Chen Rui’s wisdom and miraculous powers. Going back to Mountain Xilang this time gave him a good platform to show off his talents. He could also take good care of Lysa and his son at the same time. This was killing two birds with one stone.

A moment later, Tim walked out of the basement of the arena. He saw Athena in the hall and he bowed to her. Then, he nodded at Arux and others, put on a cloak and left Arena under the cover of nightfall.

Chen Rui also came out and asked Royce, “Has Joseph left the Dark Moon?”

Royce nodded, “After joining the meeting, he hurried to the Red Spirit. It seemed that Kanita was causing him troubles because of the defeat at the west of Dark Moon.”

“The “poor financial officer” not only has to travel back and forth, but also has to fight with his younger brother internally. Even the time for meditation and training seems valuable. However, when I saw him today, I found out that his strength has increased a lot. He’s likely to break through to the later stage of Demon King.” Chen Rui saw the calmness on Arux, Royce and others’ faces, and he frowned, “Aren’t any of you worried at all?”

Royce looked weird, “It’s not that I want to flatter master, but if I’m gonna worry, it would be for Joseph. I guess when he reaches Demon King-level, master is at least Great Demon King already. In a certain sense, master is a…”

Royce shrugged his shoulders and didn’t say anything. Arux, who was drinking wine on the sofa, suddenly replied tacitly, “Monster.”

The people around him nodded in unison. Seeing that Athena was also following suit, Chen Rui was even more speechless.

Soon, two shadows with flapping wings rose in the night sky and flew out of the city quickly.

Upon reaching the Blue Lake, Chen Rui found Paglio.

Paglio examined Athena who came with him, and he grinned, “Not bad. You brought along your family this time.”

Initially, Athena was awkward because the poison dragon lied that he poisoned them. Yet, as soon as that was spoken, she immediately blushed and half of the grievances in her heart disappeared.

The poison dragon added, “If Chen Rui dares to bully you, tell me, I’ll help you beat him. Later, I’ll teach you how to hide your breath and skills to control your combat power.”

Athena’s affinity toward the poison dragon skyrocketed from “general” to “friendly”.

Chen Rui showed his middle finger at poison dragon disdainfully: Aren’t you just finding a reason to bully me? I guess I have to please the silly Athena.

Paglio took over the wine from Chen Rui and asked, “Is there something for both of you to come here?”

Chen Rui pulled Athena, who was somewhat reserved, and sat down, “I’m the sheriff of Dark Moon City now. You better be honest, otherwise, I don’t mind being named as the dragon slayer.”

Paglio gave him a dismissive look, “You? Unless you suicide, otherwise, you won’t even hurt a single scale of mine.”

In the beginning, Athena was somewhat surprised at the casual words between the two. Especially Paglio, he didn’t have the pride of dragons in the legend. Instead, it was similar to the “mutated creature” that Chen Rui mentioned.

Slowly, the easy-going Athena also got used to the atmosphere. She joined the conversation from time to time. It seemed very harmonious.

“By the way, how’s your training of the mind?”

“The first step has been completed. Although I have little time left, I have confidence because I have Athena’s support.” Chen Rui glanced at Athena and gave her a reassuring smile.

“Such a guy that values girlfriend over friend!” The poison dragon said with dissatisfaction. “After the seal is lifted, I’ll take dozens of female dragons to fly over your house to make you envious!”

“Dozens of female dragons? Make me envious? Pfft! I’ll never be envious!” Chen Rui glanced at the poison dragon scornfully. Then, he showed off the intimacy between him and Athena by holding her hands, “Not to mention, you can’t even find a female lizard now.”

Athena pulled back her hand shyly and rolled her eyes at him.

Chen Rui joked for a while and said, “By the way, I plan to go to Silent Night Wetland soon. Now that I’m a Demon King, I also have the help of wyverns at the Silent Night Wetland, so it’s time to help you dispel the <Lock of Light and Dark>.”

Paglio frowned, “Let’s wait until you pass your training of the mind. I’ve been sleeping for thousands of years anyway, there is no need to rush.”

“It’s fine. Meditation alone isn’t enough for my training of the mind. I have to slowly realize in daily lives. It can’t be rushed. Besides, in less than a month, your Dragon Inscription will be decayed intermittently. There will be two friends that will look for the treasure at that time. It’ll be troublesome if they trigger the self-destruction inscription. I have already promised two friends to go together. By then, I will respond according to the circumstances. I will only give the item she needs back to her without exposing your treasures. However, speaking of it, you stole a lot of things back then. Except for that friend, the Eye of Sauron seems to be a secret treasure of the taurens?”

Paglio was not ashamed at all. Instead, he seemed very proud, “Obviously. Don’t underestimate the dragon’s ability to accumulate wealth. Later, when I dispel all these seals, I can take you to rob…”

This guy only has such capability? Chen Rui shook his head helplessly.

“If you remove your seal with the Eye of Sauron, the secret treasure wouldn’t be damaged right?”

“It won’t. I’m only using the Eye of Sauron’s spiritual power to shake up the <Lock of Light and Dark>.”

The poison dragon looked indifferent, “If you want, I can give it to you, but you have to exchange it another treasure!”

“Such a stingy guy! By the way, is there any requiem fruit among your treasure?”

“Do you think I’m a gardener? Not to mention that item is rare and the growing conditions are harsh. I don’t know even know where…”

At that time, Athena interjected, “Chen Rui, the two friends you said to go to Silent Night Wetland with must be Delia and Roman! I haven’t seen Delia for a long time. You have to bring me along to the Silent Night Wetland this time!”

“No, there are dangerous Dragon Inscriptions everywhere. Also, even Paglio doesn’t remember how many traps he laid.” Chen Rui shook his head resolutely, “I’ll be fine myself. You stay in the Dark Moon City.”

Athena thought of the scene of getting the devil fruit in the black rainforest and her mood was down suddenly, “I think you’re just afraid that I’ll burden you.”

“What are you saying? You’re my woman. There is no such thing as burdening.” Chen Rui took Athena’s hand, “It’s just that Delia once said to me that if you go to Silent Night wetland, she’ll truly break things with you. Besides, there is something important that you have to help me with. No one can do it except you.”

Athena blushed. She wanted to break free, but Chen Rui held her hand tightly. The poison dragon didn’t realize he was third-wheeling; he was looking at the intimate two with great interest.

Athena’s emotions finally calmed down and she asked, “What’s the matter?”

Chen Rui shrugged his shoulders and kissed on the back of her hand, “As the future lady of the sheriff, you have the right and obligation to act on behalf of the sheriff.”

When Athena heard the word “future lady”, her heart was sweet. However, she was even more embarrassed of him showing off in front of the poison dragon. She almost gave him a shoulder throw.

Unfortunately, the third-wheeling dragon beside even added inappropriately, “You guys can go on. Just pretend that I don’t exist.”

Hahahaha ?, Paglio was really good in messing with others.

chapters.title: Chapter 196: New Officer Takes Office! The Carrot And The Stick
chapters.body:
Chapter 196: New Officer Takes Office! The Carrot And The Stick

The next morning, the guards received a summoning order, which must have been issued by the new sheriff Chen Rui.

It was inevitable that when the new sheriff takes office, he would want to show off his authority, but that also required other people’s cooperation. The summoning order was issued for a long time, but only 200 or so people came sparsely. Not even one tenth was here.

It was clear that they were trying to teach the new sheriff a lesson. Who asked you to be a human with no powers at all?

Of course, most people were not sleeping peacefully at home, but they were watching the development of the situation. After all, teaching him a lesson was one thing, rebellion was another thing.

Soon, the observers received shocking news. The guards were divided into five brigades. Besides the captains of the two brigades who came forward after hearing the summons, the captains of the other three teams were dragged out and beheaded. The vice-captain assumed the role of captain.

Within one hour, if the current captains could not summon their subordinates, then all of them would be beheaded. The first small captain to gather would assume the role of big captain and so on. Don’t doubt the new sheriff’s sinister measures because the city’s largest organization, the Cloak Gang had already publicly expressed support for human sheriff. The original “negative saboteur” big captain was killed by Arux personally. Now the Cloak Gang had taken control of every corner of the city, they could not even escape.

An hour later, all the guards appeared at the field in the barracks. Many people were impatiently brought out here by the new small captain. If the time was delayed, the captains could not even keep their position and life, and it would even benefit others!

A bloody demon head hung on the flagpole on the high platform. The new sheriff Chen Rui stood on the platform casually, secretly observing the guards below. Most of the guards were lazy. Even standing in formation was a problem. There were also some whose powers were not bad that were showing looks of contempt.

“ Eh hem …” Chen Rui cleared his throat using the magical loudspeaker. “Let me introduce myself. I’m the new sheriff appointed by the Princess Royal Highness, Chen Rui…”

“Incompetent human!” Someone had already begun to stir trouble. Laughter came from below.

Chen Rui did not get angry. “The sixth row of the second big team, the minotaur wearing the red shirt who started the uproar, you come to the stage now. If you can survive in my hands for a minute, you can go back and sleep every day. You can still receive soldier’s pay every month as usual.”

The minotaur didn’t expect the human’s eyes to be sharp enough to spot him. When he heard Chen Rui’s words, he shouted, “Really?”

Chen Rui nodded. “This is the barracks. Every sentence I say here is valid. All the guards are your witnesses.”

Once the audience saw a good show, they all made way for the minotaur to hastily walk up the stage. Before he could speak, he saw Chen Rui waving his hand at him. The minotaur suddenly slowed, and his body began to corrode at a speed detectable by the naked eye. He instantly became a skeleton. The liquid with the combination of venom and blood spread on the ground.

The noisy voices immediately reduced, watching this scene in horror. That minotaur was a small captain. The strength of the later stage Intermediate Demon was considered good among the guards, but he actually ended up turning into bones immediately. They had known that this human was an apprentice to Master Aldas, but they had never imagined that he would have learned such a terrifying poison skill so quickly.

“Don’t say that I am depraved; I am just a potioneer.” Chen Rui shamelessly elevated his incompetent apprentice identity to potioneer. “To tell you the truth, I have obtained Master Aldas’ teachings. If there is anyone else who is dissatisfied, please come out one by one. I will ask you to go to me and my teacher’s laboratory to become an experimental subject for a few days. As long as you can survive, I will promote you.”

Master Aldas’ Lab!
