The assistants took a look at the magic array, and they were also taken aback. They secretly despised Xhosa: What do you mean by “considered” a pass? “The last round is equipment crafting.” Xhosa picked up his resume and looked at it. “Arthur is… I see that you wrote both accessories and metal specialization. You actually wrote two. Young man, you need to know that being greedy won’t be good for you… So, we’ll go to the crafting room beside. You have three chances. If you make high grade equipment once, you can become a formal mechanic.”

High grade equipment? Chen Rui was troubled. After integrating the basic and advanced knowledge en route, and the function of the refinery, his craftsmanship had made a qualitative breakthrough. Now, he could easily craft excellent grade equipment. In other words, he was already a master, so a mere high-grade equipment shouldn’t be a problem.

Chen Rui followed the Xhosa and his two assistants to the crafting room. It was an accessories crafting room with complete tools. Xhosa signaled his assistant to take out a pile of materials and said, “Don’t think that the 50 black crystal coins you paid for are expensive. In fact, the materials needed for assessment account for a considerable portion.”

If you succeed on your first trial, 10 black crystal coins can be refunded to you. Certainly, if you have extra money, you can apply for higher-grade materials and the possibility of making high-grade equipment will be greater.”

“No thanks. It took a lot of effort to save these money.” Chen Rui rejected Xhosa’s suggestion. Certainly, that was purely a lie. The black crystal coins in his storage were taller than the building of the Mechanics Association. The key was that he didn’t want to come up with an excellent grade or quasi-excellent grade equipment that would catch attention.

After Chen Rui finished speaking, he selected the necessary materials and started crafting. As soon as he got started, the two assistants looked odd. This apprentice’s proficiency is quite considerable. His accurate ways of dealing with the materials are even incomparable for both of them. It seems that Arthur has no problem getting certified this time. What these two people saw was only the superficial level. Master Xhosa saw more things. He looked indifferent on the surface, but his heart was filled with stormy waves: This feeling, this kind of qi, let alone an apprentice, even if an experienced mechanic can’t achieve. Chen Rui was crafting a magic ring that enhanced water power. The crafting of the main body at the beginning was smooth, but there were some flaws in the engraving of the magic array. Fortunately, the deficiency was finally made up with inlaid gems.

The attribute of the ring was that the magic casting speed of the water magic increased by 5 folds, the magic damage of the water magic increased by 1.5 fold. It was a standard high grade equipment.

“Master, I’m done.” Chen Rui wiped the sweat off his head. It wasn’t easy since it could’ve been at least a quasi-excellent grade equipment.

Master Xosa carefully looked at the ring in his hand and he felt an indescribable awkwardness. It was like a piece of rat’s shit was thrown into a pot of delicious soup. He said with an annoyed tone, “Crafting of high grade equipment has completed. The result is A. Arthur has passed the mechanic certification!”

Three As! The two assistants couldn’t help but to look at this new mechanic differently. Master Xhosa took a deep look at Chen Rui and suddenly added, “This mechanics contest, you can also participate.”

The assistants were stunned: No matter how good he is, he is just a freshly promoted mechanic. What does he have to participate in the mechanic contest? Besides, Master Xhosa even asked him to participate! An assistant thought of something and reminded him, “Master… the preliminary round will start in three days. Registration seems to have expired.”

Master Xhosa stared at that assistant and threw something to Chen Rui, “This is for you. The 10 black crystal coins won’t be refunded, but you can participate directly with this!”

Chen Rui took a look and it was a badge which was exactly the same as that given by Master Rumminge. Master Rumminge was so much more modest for giving it free directly. This Master Xhosa scammed 10 black crystal coins instead. Is he stuffing his pocket to buy alcohol? The two assistants’ eyes widened when they saw it. That badge represents the recommendation of a master in the alliance. The participants can skip the first preliminary round! Each master can only recommend one person! If it’s taken out, people will fight for it even for 1000 black crystal coins, but Master Xhosa actually gave it to this new mechanic with 10 black crystal coins! “You two, take him to complete the formalities! I’m going to drink!”

After finishing that sentence, Master Xhosa took out a wine bottle from his space ring and took a sip, ignoring the three. He walked out of the crafting room staggeringly while murmuring in dissatisfaction, “This guy can at least make quasi-excellent grade equipment, but he intentionally wasted materials. I wonder which old monster taught him…”

Hmmm… it should be which old monsters….

chapters.title: Chapter 251: Chrysanthemum Wrecker
chapters.body:
Chapter 251: Chrysanthemum Wrecker

Chen Rui went through the formalities and put on a brand new mechanic robe. The badge on his chest also became a double star, representing a true mechanic. He also looked exceptionally spirited.

When he walked out of the certification office and came to the lounge, he saw a young man talking to Kia. Kia looked a little impatient and wanted to leave, but she was pestered by the man.

“Kia!” Chen Rui greeted and stepped forward.

“Sir Arthur!” Kia quickly took a few steps back and stood behind him, taking the opportunity to escape from the man’s pester.

The man’s face was skinny and arrogant, as if the phrase “I’m fucking badass” was written on his face.

Race: Great Demon (Mutated). Comprehensive Strength Assessment: D, Physique: D, Strength E, Spirit: D, Agility: E-.

Chen Rui frowned, “Who are you?”

The man felt the breath of Higher Demon from Chen Rui. After looking at the mechanic attire on him, he was even more dismissive, “Ignorant guy, I haven’t even asked who you are!”

“Sir Arthur is a new senior consultant hired by Mr. Dior Custer.” Kia quickly explained, “This is a disciple of Master Leo, Sir Savice, a popular contestant in winning the mechanic contest.”

It turns out that this is the Savice. He is as arrogant and unscrupulous as the information. “Senior consultant?” Savice’s face was even more scornful, “It’s just a guy hired by Dior. Didn’t Dior invite me over for dinner tonight? My single sentence can make Dior fire you immediately! If you’re smart, fuck off. Don’t disturb me from talking to this woman. Otherwise, even if you lick my shoes later, it’ll be too late.”

Kia frowned, “Sir Savice, sorry. I’ve already told you just now that my physique is special…”

Initially, Old Gauss never revealed Kia’s devour physique as he wanted Kia to seduce Dior by playing hard to get.

After Old Gauss disappeared, Robert defected to Falamo’s side, so Dior had to attempt building a relationship with Savice. Ever since Savice saw Kia, he couldn’t forget about her and even proposed to get Kia as a condition of exchange. Although Dior was obsessed with beauty and pursued her vigorously, in the face of the benefit of being the family’s heir, he chose the latter without hesitation.

However, although Dior wanted to use Kia as a tool to win over Savice, Kia was Dark Moon’s after all, so he couldn’t make the decision. Besides, Savice hadn’t really hooked up, so he was naturally reluctant to throw out the biggest bait.

Now that the person-in-charge from the Dark Moon had finally come, Kia knew that under such interest, Arthur would definitely make the choice to sacrifice her. She happened to run into Savice here. As she couldn’t bear the nag anymore, she simply mentioned about the devouring physique she had so that he would give up.

“Don’t take me as a child. Do you think I’ll believe it?” Savice sneered, “What if you’re Dior’s mistress? I’ve already known the fight of heirs in the Custer Family. As long as I agree to sign the agreement with that guy and participate as his supporter, even if I want to sleep with his wife, he’ll hand it over without hesitation!”

“That sentence, I will bring it back to Madam Anna untouched. Although she’s just a daughter of concubine, she still represents the finance minister’s reputation.” Chen Rui waved the recording stone in his hand while saying calmly. Savice’s face changed suddenly, “However, if you only want Kia, I can make the decision since I’m considered her… owner. Without a doubt, Dior can’t make the decision, but I definitely can!”

Chen Rui wasn’t wrong.. He was Kia’s legitimate owner. Besides, Shea’s order also made a special request for Kia to fully obey.

Kia couldn’t help but tremble. The most worrying thing really happened. Savice saw her expression with his own eyes, and he took a different look at Chen Rui, a “high grade consultant”. “If you give me Kia, I can consider agreeing to Dior’s request. You’re also a mechanic, so you must know that my teacher is Master Leo. If you follow me, you’ll be much stronger than staying in the Custer Family.”

“Great!” Chen Rui glanced at Kia with a pale face and smiled, “However, I must remind you that the devouring physique she mentioned is true. I can swear by the Demon God.”

“You really are a tactful guy. It doesn’t matter if the physique is real. I have a way to deal with such a woman.” Seeing that he could get his hands on Kia, Savice revealed a wicked smile, “She’ll be a good toy.”

Seeing Chen Rui’s interested look, he took out something, “This is a magic item that I’ve worked hard to invent recently. It has many functions and it’s enough to make the toy beg for her life… If I’m bored of her already, I might give her back to you alive.”

Chen Rui took a look at the thing, and he was taken aback. This thing is actually… some kind of sex toy! Besides, it’s even “electric-powered”? This so-called mechanic genius is truly a “lewd genius”! Similar to this guy’s perverted mentality, the function of this thing wasn’t for fun but to abuse. The model and that weird design… is indeed perverted. If it was forcibly used on women, it would definitely be worse than dying.

Kia’s facial expression changed a lot, and her body started trembling slightly. The main purpose of Savice taking out that perverted thing was to see her expression. His abnormal mentality was greatly satisfied. He was already imagining how to enjoy this superb succubus.

At that time, Savice suddenly felt his hand became lighter and the “sex toy” disappeared.

“Okay! Kia, let’s go!” Chen Rui took Kia’s hand and turned away.

Savice was stunned. Then, when he finally reacted and wanted to scold, his body suddenly shook, as if he was swept by some force. He couldn’t move for a moment.

Immediately after, there was a sudden pain in a part of his buttocks as if it was severely torn apart by a huge thing. Suddenly, he made a world-shaking cry and dropped to the ground. He tried to cover his ass, but he couldn’t move his hands.

The impact and depth were quite terrifying, even his pants were penetrated forcefully. Besides, that thing was actually turned on, and it automatically started the movement that made the pervert more painful. Yet, his body lost its ability to move! He was shrieking at once, and his clothes on his back began to stain with blood.

“This is for you on behalf of the Custer Family and finance minister. Don’t forget that I still have a recording stone.” Chen Rui looked at the shivering Savice in disgust and sneered, “I don’t know how good the soundproofing of the lounge is. You can shout as loud as you can for help and let everyone see the heroic posture of the capital’s genius with his ass penetrated by something he made.”

Savice’s body shivered even more. His entire body was cold sweating due to the pain and fear, but he endured it and didn’t dare to scream loudly. The wickedness of Arthur, who was in front of him, was terrifying. If everyone really saw him in such a shameful look, even if Arthur was severely punished, he, the genius, would become the laughing stock in the capital.

Such turning of the tide gave Kia a look of disbelief. Then, she was pulled by Chen Rui and walked out involuntarily.

Savice’s body still couldn’t move. He just hoped that the paralysis would disappear quickly. The grievance in his heart could hardly be expressed in words. He vowed to take revenge, on Arthur, on Kia and on the entire Custer Family.

Chen Rui closed the door of the lounge, hung up the do-not-disturb sign and led Kia out. Coincidentally, he bumped into two acquaintances, Monroe and Fini who came to the capital with him.

Fini saw Chen Rui and said in surprise, “Arthur, why are you here?”

Chen Rui smiled slightly, “I just passed the mechanic certification.”

“Wow! That’s great!” Fini looked envious as she saw his new mechanic attire and badge.

“Did you see Savice… a skinny monkey-faced guy?” Fini glanced at the lounge’s door, “I heard the maid saying he seems to be here. Master Leo seems to be looking for him.”

Chen Rui looked like he just realized something, “So that skinny monkey face is Savice. Just now he showed me a newly-invented magic item called… “Chrysanthemum (it means butthole in Chinese) Wrecker” but he seemed to have gone downstairs, saying that he wanted to find a place to test it himself.”

“Crysthanamum Wrecker?” Fini asked curiously then smiled, “You also call him skinny monkey face? Yet, don’t let him hear it. That annoying guy isn’t only arrogant but also petty. However, I’m not afraid of him. If he dares to bully you, tell me and I’ll help you out. Is this your woman?”

Chen Rui took a look at Kia, whose hand was being held and nodded vaguely, “By the way, I still have something to do, so I’ll leave with my companion first. All the best, Fini. I’m sure you’ll be a mechanic soon.”

“Okay. I come here often with my grandpa. I hope to see you again next time.”

Chen Rui bid farewell to Fini and quickly left the Mechanics Association while holding Kia’s hand.

After leaving the block, they slowed down. Kia pulled back her hand gently and said, “Thank you.”

The succubus originally thought that her fate was inevitable. If it was Old Gauss, he would definitely sacrifice her to win over Savice. Unexpectedly, this man made such an unexpected decision. He not only made Savice completely give up on her, but he also punished the pervert with that cruel method. It was just that she couldn’t figure out why he did that.

Chen Rui shook his head, “It’s nothing. It’s just that pervert made me annoyed, so I gave him an unforgettable lesson.”

That guy would probably never forget this lesson. Kia looked at him for a while. For no reason, she felt that this slightly ugly face was much more pleasant to the eyes than those handsome looking guys. She carefully asked, “Yet, we’ve offended Savice completely now… What do we do next?”

“Don’t worry, I have my own way. You’re just my assistant, so I’ll carry full responsibilities.” Chen Rui laughed, “Your job is now… I haven’t been to the Dark Shadow’s capital. Since you’ve been in the frontline for so long, it should be fine for you to be a tour guide right?”

“Of course I can.” Kia smiled. It wasn’t as enticing as usual, but it seemed more beautiful.

After Chen Rui and Kia strolled for a long time and tried the famous snacks in the Dark Shadow’s Capital, they slowly returned to the alternative residence.

In the alternative residence, Dior was already anxious. When he saw the two, he quickly greeted, “Sir Arthur, what happened? Savice not only rejected my invitation tonight very badly, but he also asked me to be careful!”

Chen Rui shrugged, “Because… I deliberately inspected the so-called capital’s genius and felt that he can’t be the ultimate winner of the contest. Besides, he’s unbearably shady, so I helped you to teach him a lesson.”

“What?!” Dior thought he had heard wrong and shouted, “You taught him a lesson? Are you crazy?”

“I’m not crazy. I did it for the reputation of the Custer Family and the finance minister.” Chen Rui took out a recording stone and Savice’s voice sounded, which was the best part in the second half.

“As long as I promise to sign an agreement with that guy to participate as his supporter, even if I’m going to sleep with his wife, he will hand it over without hesitation!”

Dior looked sour. Not only because of Savice’s words, but also because Chen Rui had completely offended Savice and buried his last hope at the same time.

Seeing Dior’s awful look, Chen Rui laughed, “Don’t worry! I have a candidate, and he’s definitely better than someone like Savice. If you’re lucky, there is even a great chance of winning the contest. Otherwise, why would I give up on Savice?”

Dior’s hope was ignited again when he heard that, “Who is it?”

Chen Rui pointed at the newly acquired mechanics badge on his chest, “I!”

“You?” The fire of hope that Dior just ignited immediately extinguished.

What if you’re a mechanic? A rookie mechanic that has only been certified probably won’t even pass the preliminary round. “Relax!” Chen Rui said with confidence, “Do you know why Princess Royal sent me? It’s exactly for this mechanics contest! At such a critical moment, do you think she will send an idiot who will only cause trouble? Being an apprentice and getting certified is just to let our opponents be sloppy!”

These lies actually made Dior slightly believe in him. Then, he heard Chen Rui added, “Although the registration is closed, I believe you must have a way to let me participate. So, go ahead and get prepared.”

“Okay!” Dior clenched his teeth. Given the situation, the relationship with Savice had clearly broken completely, he could only try anything at desperate times.

In these three days, Chen Rui gave Dior a large list of materials in the name of special training and asked him to acquire them.

Dior had already signed the supporting contract with Chen Rui and handed it over to his father, Croz, so he couldn’t change anymore. In other words, they were tied to the same boat. Therefore, Dior obviously didn’t dare to neglect Chen Rui’s demand. However, most of the materials requested by Chen Rui were very rare, and he only managed to acquire a large part of them in a hurry, but there were three extremely rare materials that he couldn’t acquire at once.

Nevertheless, Chen Rui was already laughing up his sleeve. These materials were all needed for the artifact “Thunderous Sound”. With Dior’s “assistance”, he had assembled most of the materials including the recipes. Now, there were only those three ingredients and the 10 million auras needed for the “Thunderous Sound” blueprint.

Unfortunately, the whereabouts of requiem fruit and flower of mist were still not found.

However, “special training” wasn’t a lie. Chen Rui had been immersed in the refinery these days, using the linked training ground to continue improving his craftsmanship. Although he had reached the master-level, the mechanics participating came from all parts of Demon Realm. Some of them must be hidden talents, so he had to be careful.

Three days had passed. The highly anticipated mechanics competition had finally begun.

Chen Rui was already showing mercy to only wreck his butthole?.

chapters.title: Chapter 252: Preliminary Contest At The Ancient Magic Tower
chapters.body:
Chapter 252: Preliminary Contest At The Ancient Magic Tower

The location of the first round of preliminary was the largest arena in the outer city. A total of more than 6,000 people registered for the contest this time. This was far more than previous seasons. It was an unprecedented, lively situation.

Due to the large number of people, the first round of preliminary had to be conducted in groups. Each registered participant was given a number. On the arena’s stage, a huge crystal screen appeared, showing the number range of the group. Chen Rui was No. 5200. He was in the final group.

The content of the first round of the preliminary was very simple, that was, to draw three random questions and complete the questions in accordance with the requirements of the questions within the prescribed time. The extracted content was related to the specializations filled during registration. For example, metal specialization would have metal-related questions.

Luck was a huge component in this contest. Some people just happened to draw the ones that they weren’t good at or the ones that were very difficult. Some people drew those that were very time-consuming, so they couldn’t finish all three in time. However, generally, people with true strength could still pass smoothly.

The contest started and the numbers being eliminated and advanced began to appear on the crystal screen. These problems were generally quite difficult to the point that many senior participants felt that this year’s difficulty was higher than the previous season that was 10 years ago. Many unlucky losers burst into tears, but they had only attracted contempt and ridicule as almost no one sympathized with them. It was a contest and people only cared about the winner, not the losers.

Chen Rui filled in the metal specializations and drew three questions. The first was to fill in the missing part of an earth magic array enchantment; the second was a Q&A regarding metal smelting; the third was to repair a broken sword.

Other than the second one, the first one was more difficult and the third one was more time-consuming. However, for Chen Rui, it was a piece of cake. He easily completed everything and the judge next to him announced his advancement.

When Dior, who had been anxious looking at the stage, saw Chen Rui’s advancement, he finally calmed down. This mechanic from Dark Moon has some capabilities anyway. However, this is just the beginning. The difficulty will only increase in the future. Can this guy, who just received the title of mechanic, pass the next test? Kia was also surprised. According to her knowledge, Princess Royal didn’t have a particularly outstanding mechanic under her. Where did this Arthur come from? She had a faint feeling in her heart that Arthur’s strong confidence wasn’t a bluff.

The first round of the preliminary took six days to complete. This round, it eliminated nearly 70% of the participants. There were nearly 2,000 remaining.

These days, Chen Rui obtained a lot of materials through Dior. Part of them were kept for his own usage and another part were converted into auras.

The second round of preliminary had begun. From this round onward, even the candidates recommended by masters must participate.

The second round of the preliminary was located in the ancient magic tower of the Mechanics Association’s building. The ancient magic tower was one of the most mysterious places in the Mechanic Association at the Dark Shadow’s capital. It was said that the magic tower was built for a long time, and it couldn’t be measured by years anymore. It contained precious magic inscriptions and various, unpredictable magic arrays, left by master-level and grandmaster-level mechanics that were left for millions or even longer time. Even the mechanic master of the current association had a hard time prying into the wonders within.

The ancient magic tower was usually not open to the public. Only the masters of the Mechanic Association could have limited access to examine. This exception opening to the public immediately caught every participant’s interest.

The content of the competition was very novel. Participants were to carry specially-made magic stone slab and magic stone to enter the magic tower. Within two hours, they had to copy a complete magic array using the slate. After the completion, they were to use the magic stone to teleport back. Other than teleportation and timing, the magic stone could also reflect the latest points in real time.

Those that hadn’t teleported out within the specified time would be automatically teleported out. Incomplete magic arrays would be immediately eliminated.

Not only that, this round could only remain the 200 players in the semi-final. The more difficult the magic array and the less time it took, the higher the score would be. 90% of 2000 people would be eliminated and only 200 would remain. The cruelty of competition was imaginable.

2000 people were divided into 20 groups. Fortunately, Chen Rui and an old “acquaintance”, Savice were both in the last group.

When Savice saw Chen Rui by accident, his eyes immediately solidified and shot a ray of deep hatred. As he was young and talented, he had been enjoying his fame since he became popular. The humiliation that he received the last time was unprecedented!

He would never forget how he limped out of the lounge at the time. In the following days, how the pain afflicted him. Although the physical wounds healed, the great shame and trauma in his heart would never wash away!

If it weren’t for the mechanics contest that would affect his future, Savice really wanted to use every means possible to take avenge on the Custer Family and Arthur who should be crushed into pieces.

I never thought to bump into that detestable enemy here in the mechanic contest. Besides, this guy even passed the first round of preliminary! “Isn’t this Savice?” Chen Rui also saw his old “friend” with a wicked look and greeted him like they were close, “The magic item you invented last time is really powerful. What makes me admire you more is that you were willing to take such a huge risk to experiment it on yourself. You’re truly the top genius of the capital!”

Upon hearing that, the mechanics from the same group looked admirable. Genius and hard work, no wonder he became famous in the capital. Yet, the words of praise became another unrestrained ridicule in Savice’s ears. It was as uncomfortable as being stung by needles. However, in the presence of so many people, he couldn’t reveal such a humiliating incident. So, he swallowed his anger and the hatred in his heart was maxed.

Savice was just an ant, so Chen Rui didn’t take him seriously. However, Savice could barely become Chen Rui’s stepping stone to advance in the contest.

It was his group to start the contest. Savice, with a somber face, walked to the front of the group and entered the ancient magic tower.

Chen Rui originally thought that the ancient magic tower was a tower with levels of staircases with magic inscription engraved on the wall. However, after he entered, he realized that it was completely different from what he imagined. It was an independent space with active, colorful, bizarre rays that were floating and changing everywhere. At first glance, it looked colorful, but in the eyes of mechanics, these lines vaguely showed the mysterious magic arrays.

Except for the light gate at the exit, there was another light gate in the distant space that reached the next floor. The higher the floors, the more esoteric the magic array became, and the more difficult it was. The ancient magic tower had a total of six floors. It was said that even a master could only comprehend the mysteries of the first four floors.

There were many kinds of arrangements and combinations in magic arrays. Each person’s mentality and attention were different. Therefore, the magic arrays obtained were also different. Everyone immediately started recording on the magic stone slab.

The chance to enter the ancient magic tower was rare. Chen Rui had already activated [Deep Analysis] and started recording and scanning. In [Deep Analysis], those arrangement and combination modes were quickly “copied”, even if it couldn’t be analyzed at present, he could slowly analyze them in the future.

His vision had reached master-level, so he could see more than ordinary people. Many of the magic arrays on this floor were improved, but they weren’t hard. According to the association’s classification, they were one-star and quasi-two-star. Chen Rui didn’t stay long and walked to the light gate toward the upper floor.

Compared with more than a hundred people on the first floor, there were only a dozen people on the second floor and Savice was one of them. Seeing Chen Rui walking to the second floor, Savice sneered disdainfully. Due to his relationship with Master Leo, it wasn’t Savice’s first time entering the ancient magic tower. The magic circle on the second floor was much more difficult than the first floor. Although the points awarded for complete record would be higher, if it wasn’t completed, it’d be better to stay on the first floor.

The difficulty of this level was definitely higher and the amount of data was much larger. The scanning speed of [Deep Analysis] was obviously a lot slower.

“Why do I not understand them…” Chen Rui took the magic stone slab, hesitated for a moment, and said to himself deliberately, “I don’t know if it will be better upstairs…”

Savice sneered secretly. The levels above can only be understood by masters. This “Arthur” is just a rookie who has just become a mechanic. By luck (at least Savice thought), he passed the first round of preliminary. If he really goes to the third floor, let alone 1 hour, he can’t even record a few strokes in a year. As a competitor and enemy, Savice certainly wanted Chen Rui to go to the third floor to “suicide”. As he hoped, Chen Rui walked step by step toward the light gate that went to the third floor and soon disappeared. Savice sneered, but his hands didn’t stop at all as he was recording a slightly difficult magic array. Then, he crushed the magic stone that he carried to teleport out of the ancient magic tower.

The third floor wasn’t only light, but there were also various flames and images. Even the space appeared strangely distorted. In Chen Rui’s eyes, those melodies and colors were strange magic symbols. The various arrangements were like complex calculations. Some were taught by Master Xingxing and Master Skye before, but some were unheard of. With Chen Rui’s current level, he could naturally understand the mysteries of these “formulas”, and he couldn’t help but immerse within at once.

Outside of the ancient magic tower, many people had completed the recording and teleported out. A special appraiser began to record and verify their scores. The crystal screen in front of the association’s building marked the latest top 200 rankings.

The first place was Savice who took 10 minutes to record a quasi-three-star magic enhancement magic array, totaling 170 points.

Second place was Robert who took 15 minutes to record a quasi-three-star basic enhancement magic array, totaling 165 points.

The third place, Southgate who took 16 minutes to record a quasi-three-star basic enhancement magic array, totaling 164 points.

The current 200th place score was a 2-star magic weakening magic circle recorded in an hour , totaling 80 points.

Chen Rui had reached the fourth floor at this time. Even for Chen Rui, he felt difficult to understand the contents on the fourth floor, but he had [Deep Analysis]. Although he couldn’t understand, he could “record” them first and slowly study them later.

After recording, Chen Rui looked at the time on the magic stone, and it had actually passed more than an hour. He looked at the next light door in front of him, he hesitated for a moment and tried to walk over.

The moment he approached the light door, the space was suddenly distorted. Countless mysterious marks flashed and a strong, repulsive force pushed him away. Each time he tried, the arrangement of those marks were different.

Chen Rui had a feeling that even if he did his best now by using [Scorching Dragon Possession] with the strength of Megrez state, he wouldn’t be able to break through the power of this light gate. The light gate not only contained immense power, but it was more like a rule. If he couldn’t understand the rule, even with Demon Overlord-level strength, he might not be able to break through.

In the administration office on the fifth floor of the building, a man with white hair and middle-aged appearance frowned. It was the chairman of the Dark Shadow Empire’s Mechanic Association and the empire’s top mechanic master, Master Anderson.

“Another curious guy is trying out the fifth-floor gate. I don’t know if it’s wise to open the ancient magic tower this time.”

Master Rummenigge smiled and said, “We can’t even crack the gate’s seal, so chairman, you need not worry. In fact, this time, it’s more about discovering and cultivating potential juniors. It’s good to let them open their eyes and gain insights.”

Master Anderson gave a slight nod and said nothing more.

After trying and recording that magic symbol a few times, seeing that there wasn’t much time left, Chen Rui looked at the latest ranking and he had an idea in his mine. He recorded a magic array on the second floor, crushed the magic stone and teleported out.

On the VIP seat outside of the association’s building, seeing that the name, “Arthur” hadn’t appeared within the 200, Dior, who had been paying attention to the crystal screen, looked very uneasy. Kia also seemed a little nervous.

At that time, a beautiful-looking woman, holding a man’s arm, came over with a gloating look, “Isn’t this our eldest brother, Dior? It’s already the final moment, why haven’t I seen your supporter, Arthur on the list? Falamo, at which place is our supporter now?”

The man aside was Dior’s brother, Falamo, who deliberately sighed, “Robert seems to be in second place. Although he is currently behind Savice, this point ranking isn’t brought into the semifinal, so the true battle is yet to come.”

“As far as I know, the next event is Robert’s strength. Afterall, he was the champion of the previous season.” The woman was Falamo’s wife, Marianne Asmodeus, also the sister of Valen, the second general of the Dark Shadow Empire. This woman was very dominant, so Falamo was being subdued and didn’t dare to get a concubine until now.

Dior was very annoyed, but he couldn’t think of anything smart to counterattack, “Look at the screen!” Kia suddenly screamed in excitement. Dior quickly looked up, and she was immediately refreshed.

Arthur’s name finally appeared within two hundred. He took 1 hour and 25 minutes to record a quasi-three-star basic enhancement magic circle, totaling 95 points, currently ranked 192.

Since it was the last group, there were very few people left in the magic tower. This ranking was basically stable. He should be able to enter the semi-final next.

Savice looked at Arthur’s name on the screen and sneered: That’s fine. I can continue to step on his head in the future contest. Not only in the contest but at the end of the contest, it’ll be the time where “Arthur” is crushed into pieces! Dior in the VIP seat took a sigh of relief. Getting the 192th place is good enough. No matter what, it was a narrow escape. “What are you yelling for? Such a rude, countrywoman!” Marianne mocked Kia with dissatisfaction and then said to Dior with disdain, “I forgot to tell you that Celine’s supporter, Horford, is also within the top 50. Although the final victory must belong to Falamo, to my surprise, the person you chose is even worse than Celine’s. No wonder you can’t even maintain your position as the first-in-line.”

Dior snorted and ignored the two. At that time, Chen Rui came to Dior, nodded to Kia and smiled, “It seems that I’m quite lucky. I can enter the next round steadily by staying within the top 200.”

“He’ll probably be eliminated immediately next round.” Marianne chuckled while holding a fan to gracefully cover her scornful smile.

“Dior, who is this pretentious, ugly woman?” Chen Rui heard Marianne mocking Kia, so he asked that intentionally.

Marianne’s face immediately changed. Dior was happy when he heard that and replied, “This is my younger brother, Falamo, who’s desperate to be the heir… and his woman.”

In revenge for the previous sarcasm, Dior deliberately didn’t mention Marianne’s name and Chen Rui looked like he had a sudden realization, “I heard that your brother has several women outside. I wonder which one is this?”

It was Falamo’s face that changed this time. Seeing Marianne’s cold eyes that were moving toward him, Falamo’s expression became quite interesting. In fact, Chen Rui was right by chance. Falamo did have a mistress, but because Marianne was too dominant, and she had a strong background. Therefore, he had been hiding from this fierce wife.

Dior raised his thumb at Chen Rui secretly. However, Chen Rui was currently ranked within the range of 190th place. The semi-final later might not be in favor, so he asked anxiously, “The next round will be the semi-final. It will decide the final’s candidates. How confident are you?”

Chen Rui shook his head. This guy is too impulsive. How can he ask such questions in front of competitors? “Big brother! Second brother and Sister Marianne are also here!” A young girl came over. The girl was dressed in a short skirt, looked pretty and youthful. Based on the appellation, she should be Celine, Dior’s youngest sister.

Celine had the least “threat”, She usually had a good relationship with the two elder brothers. Dior forced himself to smile and nodded while Marianne relaxed her tight face.

“Is this your supporter Arthur?” Celine looked at Chen Rui curiously, “He actually entered the ranks of 200 at the end. However, I had better luck this time. I found a mechanic named Horford. Although he didn’t have much fame, he is quite good and actually got the 47th place this time.”

Dior nodded with a wry smile. Chen Rui looked relaxed and said indifferently, “In fact, I’m just retaining my strength.”

Dior sighed secretly. The ranking in the contest is obvious. It was at most a fluke for him to pass. No matter how I look at it, “retaining strength” seems like a bluff. “I hope your strength is as sharp as your mouth!” Marianne spoke a sentence while pulling Falamo away.

“Poor Falamo, he is definitely going to be a punching bag when they go back.” Celine smiled sweetly, greeted Dior and turned away.

“The semi-final will start tomorrow. Let’s go back to rest first. By the way, you have to help me get more materials. The sooner the better as I need more insight.” Chen Rui’s last sentence was purely for his own benefit. Currently, he was willing to request while Dior was willing to give, so he might as well take advantage of it.

This insatiable Chen Rui, he never stop trying to gain more benefits😶

chapters.title: Chapter 253: Bet
chapters.body:
Chapter 253: Bet

The next day, the semi-final began and the content of the semi-final was a continuation of the preliminary. The 200 participants must use the magic array recorded in the ancient magic tower to craft a piece of equipment.

10 among the 200 participants would be selected for finals. If the equipment could reach excellent-grade, the participant could directly enter finals.

For masters, excellent grades were common, but for a mechanic or even senior mechanic, crafting excellent-grade equipment was as hard as master crafting legendary-grade equipment.

Generally, the top mechanic could produce quasi-excellent grade equipment that was quite close to excellent grade. Those who were in excellent condition or had outstanding performance could make excellent grade equipment. The difficulty was more than that as they still had to enchant with the recorded magic array!

It was quite difficult. Those who could enter the final stage must be the elites among elites.

The location of the contest was the arena. 200 participants were divided into four groups, each with 50 pax. Each contestant must craft equipment in front of all the audience, and there were special judges and invigilators. Once found to be fraudulent, he or she would be disqualified and publicly announced. Then, he or she would never be able to participate in any event or contest held by the Mechanic Association.

“Arthur, it’s all up to you. Don’t let me down.” Dior said earnestly. Semi-final was the time to compete with true capabilities. Now that his interests were firmly tied with “Arthur”, there was no way back. It was win-win or lose-lose.

Kia also said, “Sir Arthur, all the best!”

“If you’re willing to kiss me, I think I’ll be much stronger.” Chen Rui teased.

Kia pretended that she didn’t hear him. There seemed to be a flush of redness on her face. Chen Rui was a bit surprised. This succusbus will also blush? If that’s acting, it seems that her acting skills have become stronger again. It almost reaches the natural state. Chen Rui walked down the field and came to the place where they drew lots. He took a “3” and was placed in the third group. “Third group?” A cold voice sounded. It was Savice, who waved the number he drew in his hand. He was also the third group.

“Such coincidence?” Chen Rui grinned, “It really is a small world. Perhaps we can enter the finals together.”

Savice clenched his teeth and said, “Enter finals together? Are you worthy? I’m going to step on you like an ant in front of everyone!”

“Don’t underestimate others. You’re just an overbearing fool. Just a few compliments and you’ve already thought you’re a genius?” Chen Rui looked at Savice scornfully, “Maybe I can make an excellent grade equipment.”

“An ant who has reached here by fluke can make excellent grade equipment?” Savice sneered dismissively, “Are you brave enough to make a bet? Bet on the mechanic’s most important hands. Do you dare?”

Seeing Chen Rui’s hesitation, Savice used his magic power to suddenly increase his volume and attracted everyone’s attention, “Everyone! Now, I ask everyone to testify. I will make a bet with this mechanic, named Arthur. If he can craft excellent grade equipment in the semi-final, I’ll cut off my hands! If he can’t do it, I’ll cut off his hands!”

The people in the Demon Realm were the most combative. Upon hearing that exciting bet, the audience echoed.

Chen Rui frowned, “So cruel?”

“If you don’t dare, quit the contest now. Then, crawl between my legs like a dog!” Savice said fiercely as if he wanted to vent the huge loss of “Chrysanthemum Wrecker” he had that day.

Many people could tell that the capital’s genius had a grudge with this unknown, little mechanic. He must be using this opportunity to take revenge. With Savice’s reputation and popularity, he was clearly bullying.

The fight between the 1st place and 192nd place from the previous round already had its result. Besides, Savice was a popular, talented mechanic in the capital.

“As a mechanic, I won’t quit the game!” Chen Rui clenched his teeth, “Okay, I’ll bet!”

Several masters on the VIP table frowned. One of them, Anderson, the chairman of the Dark Shadow Empire’s Mechanic Association, also known as the empire’s top master, said to Master Leo aside, “Savice is, after all, a talent cultivated by the association. Using this public event to avenge their personal grudges will inevitably affect the reputation of the association and himself.”

Master Leo always defended for Savice, so he pleaded, “Youngsters must be impulsive to be energetic. If they’re too restrained, they’ll not have today’s achievements. At most, after he defeated Arthur, we’ll just lighten the punishment of the bet.”

Anderson took a look at Leo, sighed and said nothing more.

Rummenigge aside recognized that “Arthur”, who bet with Savice, was the young man who came to the capital with him and he frowned even tighter. This young man indeed participated in the contest and even entered the semi-final. No matter what, he is a talent with great potential, and he might be of use for the royal family. I must find a way to defend him later. On the other hand, Master Xhosa, who was sitting at the back, had his eyes brightened. He took out a bottle regardless of manners, drank a mouthful of wine and showed a look of anticipation: This contest is getting more and more interesting. The contest started. In the huge arena, 50 crafting tables were set up. The rest of the tools were prepared by the participants. At once, thinkling and thumping sound could be heard continuously. For the audience, they were watching for excitement then for the craftsmanship. However, for the mechanic on the field, it was tantamount to a battle of life and death where blood was invisible.

At this critical moment, they weren’t only competing on their skills but also mentality and will.

The time was up for the first group of contestants. Several people covered their faces in pain; they were apparently the losers. These crafted equipment were sent to the three masters responsible for appraisal according to their numbers.

In the first group, there were two pieces of excellent grade equipment and the highest quality accessory came from Robert, a potential winner. It seemed that the previous champion was indeed extraordinary.

Among the 50 people in the second group, not a single excellent grade equipment appeared, so much so that the quality of equipment was generally low. Actually, they weren’t bad, but under great pressure, many people were unable to perform as usual.

The third group started. Savice grinned nastily at Chen Rui and walked to the crafting desk.

Savice’s genius title wasn’t fake. His aptitude was indeed extraordinary. Together with the careful guidance of Master Leo, as soon as he entered the stage, his entire mentality and appearance immediately changed. The bet or hatred were both put aside. All attention was concentrated on the leather in his hands which was his specialization.

Measuring, cutting, gluing, sewing and other processes were completed in one go. Savice felt that he was gradually getting into condition. There were some signs of exceeding his usual performance. He was overjoyed, but he stabilized his mood and a delicate leather armor gradually formed.

Next, it was the most important magic array part. At the ancient magic tower, Savice recorded an enhancement magic array. Although there were some tiny defects in his enchantment, which occured to most mechanics, the enchantment was completed enchanted well.

“Savice’s work. Water magic defense increased by 16%; earth magic defense increased by 17%. Excellent grade!” With the unanimous approval of the three appraisal masters, Savice smiled proudly.

Master Leo at the VIP seat felt proud. Although this leather armor was considered to be of low quality among the excellent grade, yet, it had reached excellent grade anyway, so Savice’s level could be regarded as the top mechanic.

The chairman, Anderson also nodded. Perhaps Leo was right. Young people must be impulsive to be energetic. Although Savice is arrogant, he does have true talents. Since he is a genius, his personality must be unique too. Savice set his eyes on Chen Rui. He saw Chen Rui hitting with the hammer in his hand absently. Chen Rui even took a look at his direction from time to time, seeming intimidated by the excellent grade equipment he just made. Now, the works from other crafting tables had been completed one after another and time was running out. Even if he could really craft excellent grade equipment, it would be too late.

An ant like him wants to fight with a genius like me?! Savice’s eyes were getting fiercer. I’ll cut off both your hands later. Then, I’ll make someone kidnap you alive. That’s right! Kidnap alive. I can’t let this enemy die too easily. I need to get back at the previous humiliation little by little! When Savice was imagining how to kill Chen Rui, he suddenly saw Chen Rui smiling at him. The smile was full of contempt, and it felt like… he was like an ant that Chen Rui didn’t bother at all. An uneasiness faintly appeared in his heart.

At that time, the hammer in Chen Rui’s hand suddenly sped up, hitting the sword shape clamped by the iron pliers chaotically and the loud, crisp sound almost covered the rest of the crafting tables.

The sound also attracted several masters at the VIP seat. The top master of Dark Shadow Empire, Anderson, who specialized in metal, stared at the trajectory of Chen Rui’s hammer intently, and he looked moved.

Although Savice’s teacher, Master Leo, who specialized in leather, he knew how to spot talents. The shock on his face was getting stronger and stronger. Master Rummenigge nodded slightly. His previous worries had already been gone.

Master Xhosa gulped a few mouthfuls of alcohol in a row. He couldn’t help coughing. Yet, his eyes were staring excitedly at Chen Rui’s crafting table: What this guy wrote on the form is true! Dual-specialization! Besides, his method is quite close to… master- level! Savice sneered while he watched Chen Ru “simply knocking”. After forcing the sword into shape, he started enchanting in a flurry. Finally, a dull sword was finally crafted.

Is this his strength? Such a joke! I’m afraid that’s not even a quasi-excellent grade! It seems that my previous concerns were unnecessary. “Haha!” Savice laughed wildly. When he was about to speak, another voice sounded suddenly, “Bring me that sword for me to have a look.”

It was actually the chairman sitting at the VIP seats, the top mechanic master, Anderson. Savice’s mad laughter came to an abrupt end. How could this guy’s trash sword get Master Anderson’s attention? The person in charge of invigilating Chen Rui didn’t dare to neglect and immediately sent the sword to Master Anderson at the VIP seat. Anderson gently stroked the sword and nodded slightly, “Good sword.”

Savice, who had been paying attention to the movement at the VIP seat, suddenly changed his facial expression. To make Master Anderson, who has been demanding, to say the phrase “good sword”, could this sword be…

Yeah it is a sword that can take your hands ⚔️.

chapters.title: Chapter 254: Dispute On Eligibility
chapters.body:
Chapter 254: Dispute On Eligibility

“Attack increased by 18%; attack speed increased by 18%; tear damage increased by 15%. Besides, the inconspicuous appearance also acts as camouflage. An exceptional weapon. Based on the enchantment of a quasi-three-star magic array, this excellent grade weapon is almost perfect.”

Anderson’s comment astonished Savice. That thrash sword actually has such a strong attribute?! Could it be that Master Anderson’s eyesight is bad that he appraises it wrongly? Certainly, Savice dared not say it aloud.

Anderson’s “almost perfect” evaluation caused a commotion among the nearby audience. You have to know who Master Anderson is? He is the chairman of the Dark Shadow Empire’s Mechanic Association and also the top mechanic master! Since he said so, there is no doubt that this sword is an exceptional excellent-grade weapon. Most of the audience were interested in: Since this is the case, the bet previously announced by Savice in public… Dior clenched his fists in excitement: He is not only able to make excellent grade weapons in this kind of contest, but he is also praised by Master Anderson. This is by no means luck. With such capability, he is an undisputed elite! Arthur really didn’t brag. He really retained his strength in the preliminary round. Compared with Arthur, Savice’s craftsmanship is obviously inferior. It seems that choosing Arthur is the best decision! For once, in Dior’s mind, those rare materials that had been “blackmailed” became worthy. It was no doubt that the candidate he supported entered the finals. Even Robert, who was chosen by Falamo, seemed dull in comparison.

Dior glanced at Marianne and Falamo, who had an uncomfortable face not so far away, and felt very happy.

“Thanks for your appraisal, master.” Chen Rui bowed politely to the VIP seats and looked at Savice with a pale face. His volume suddenly increased, “Now, it’s time to fulfill the bet.”

The audience immediately echoed loudly, “Fulfill the bet!”

“That whatever genius, it’s been a long since I find him displeasing to my eyes!”

“Cut his hands off!”

Savice’s limbs were cold. He felt as if he had fallen into a sinister trap. What was worse was that he was the one digging the trap. At that time, Master Leo stood up in the VIP seat and his voice echoed the entire space, “Wait! I have something to say!”

Master Leo held a form and pointed at Chen Rui, “This Arthur had just certified as a mechanic three days before the contest!”

The audience’s whispers began to sound at their seats. I thought Arthur is a senior mechanic, but he turns out to be a rookie who just becomes a mechanic. Yet, he actually got such a result in the contest. That is too powerful! Master Leo’s subsequent words revealed his true intention, “Three days ago, the registration for mechanics has already closed! He’s not even eligible to participate in the first round of the preliminary! The association has long stipulated that any form of cheating is prohibited in the contest. I propose to disqualify his results and expel him out of the field immediately!”

Chen Rui’s registration was made by Dior in a special way. As long as his identity as a mechanic was fine, the association wouldn’t care about this kind of thing. Now, due to the bet between Chen Rui and Savice, Leo brought up the incident to save his disciple’s hands. As long as Chen Rui’s qualifications were denied, then the previous bet of “making excellent grade equipment in the semi-final” naturally couldn’t hold.

Although Leo’s proposal was barely tenable in theory, many audiences below the stage didn’t accept it and clamored to express their dissatisfaction. Arthur’s strength is definitely authentic. Besides, the weapon he made iss acknowledged by Master Anderson. You’re only trying to disqualify him when you see that Savice is going to lose now? Master Anderson’s brows were gradually tightened. He didn’t agree with Leo’s approach. Strictly speaking, “Arthur” qualification to join the contest contained an “unwritten rule”. Yet, if it was brought up to the surface, it was indeed cheating. Especially Leo’s phrase “the association has long stipulated that any form of cheating in contests is strictly prohibited”, made him hard to defend as the chairman of the association. If he made an exception this time, the reputation of the association would be greatly reduced.

Savice felt like he just escaped from death. He wiped off his sweat and showed a proud look. Having a mechanic master as a teacher is definitely different. In any case, this “Arthur” is too dangerous. After the contest, I must put him to death. Dior didn’t expect that Master Leo would revolt using that point and his facial expression changed suddenly. The Falamo couple, who was initially nervous, took a sigh of relief. Marianne looked at Dior proudly and kept sneering.

“I’m against that proposal!” The unexpected confrontation came from Master Rummenigge. Rummenigge slowly stood up and his voice was resounding, “It’s because this so-called cheating doesn’t exist at all. I’ve already sent my contest invitation to Arthur previously. This can be testified by the third general, Kafu’s son, Monroe. Besides, he has my recommendation badge with him. He could have directly entered the second round of preliminary!”

Master Rummenigge was an Asmodeus Royal Family, and his reputation was barely below Master Anderson. He was always known to be fair. The audience couldn’t wait to see Arthur continue to participate in the contest and applauded.

Chen Rui suddenly realized that the badge actually played such a role. It seems that the fine wine that I offered to this master to thank him for the basic knowledge along the way was worthy. If I knew this earlier, I wouldn’t have participated in the first preliminary round. By the way, this badge… I seem to have more than one… Surely, another voice also sounded, “It seems both of us know how to spot talent, Master Rummenigge.”

The one who spoke was Master Xhosa. Xhosa laughed loudly, “Arthur, take out both of your recommendation badges! I don’t believe that with two masters’ recommendations, others will still dare to question your eligibility!”

Contrary to Master Rummenigge’s impartiality in the association, Master Xhosa was simply Leo’s nemesis, and he was also pushed aside to the mechanic certification office by Leo. It was just nice for him now to avenge this grudge.

Now, all the audience looked at Chen Rui differently. This Arthur actually got a unanimous recommendation of two masters! Chen Rui took out two badges and the admin aside checked and nodded. It was indeed the master’s recommended badge. Leo sat down slowly with his face turned blue while Savice’s face had already turned grey.

“Arthur, as your recommender, I hope that this bet… you can be as lenient as possible.” Rummenigge added with a frown. After all, he was loyal to the Asmodeus Royal Family. So, he naturally didn’t want to see a young genius in the Dark Shadow Empire to die like this.

“I’m really sorry, Master Rummenigge.” Chen Rui bowed and said loudly, “If it was just because of the dispute in this contest, I can follow your suggestion and let him go. However, none of you know the true grudge between this genius and I. When I went to participate in the mechanic certification, this shameless guy, relying on the title as Master Leo’s disciple, was arrogant and ruthless. He wanted to forcibly snatch my woman in front of me! Not only that, he also insulted my best friend, Mr. Dior of the Custer Family and his wife, daughter of the empire’s finance minister! The recording stone of those words is still in the hands of Mr. Dior… Originally, based on the fact that he is Master Leo’s disciple, I tolerated it and didn’t care about it. Yet, I didn’t expect him to not let me go during the contest. Instead, he wanted to use a bet to cut off my hands!”

The audience didn’t know that there was such a grudge. Many people looked at Dior at the VIP seat and Arthur’s “woman”, a succubus that was truly beautiful. No wonder! Master Rummenigge sighed, didn’t persuade, and sat down slowly.

Kia knew that “Arthur” was only deliberately saying that she was his woman for the sake of killing Savice. Recalling the scene when he stepped forward for her, a strange feeling came to her heart.

These remarks brought up Leo’s name twice, and it involved the biggest sponsoring family of the contest, the Custer Family and even the empire’s finance minister. Even Master Leo wasn’t brave enough to ask for mercy or defend anymore.

Leo, who was forced to the edge of the cliff, was so angry that he had nothing to say.

Over the years, Savice was indeed arrogant and ruthless, but his potential and improvement were also obvious. With the genius title, it had also shut many people’s mouths. Now, he had fallen on this damn bet, and it was Savice who suggested it!

“Do you think every teacher named Leo is an ultraman who saves the universe?” Chen Rui came to Savice, gave him a dismissive look and then increased his volume suddenly, “Now, I ask all the audience present, should I cut off his hands?”

There wasn’t a shortage of gloat people within the audience and they shouted in unison, “Should!”

Savice’s body crumbled and fell to the ground as if he was sentenced to death.

Master Anderson wanted to say something, but Master Xhosa’s words at that time changed his mind.

“This young man named Arthur is an actual genius. If we recruit him as a disciple, he’ll be hundreds of times better than Savice.”

There was no more turn of tides in the subsequent matters. Savice who lost his hands was dragged out of the field like a dead dog.

Chen Rui had long predicted that Savice would use all his tactics to revenge. However, Savice’s strength was based on the fact that he was the master’s disciple and the capital genius. Once he lost a mechanic’s most important hands, Master Leo would definitely give up on such a notorious trash and whatever capital genius he was would vanish.

With Savice’s personality, he offended many people in the past. There was no need for Chen Rui to take action. Naturally, someone would kill him.

After the episode about Savice, the contest continued. In the final group of contest, another near-perfect excellent-grade saber appeared which was not inferior to Chen Rui’s sword.

The mechanic was actually Horford, a contestant supported by Dior’s sister, Celine.

This contest was really out of expectation. Savice, who had the greatest chance of winning was kicked out because he lost his hands for a bet. The previous champion, Robert was overshadowed by two unexpected participants, one of them was Arthur and the other was Horford.

Marianne and Falamo’s faces looked extremely uneasy. Originally, Robert, whom they chose, should have the greatest hope of winning the contest. Yet, he had the smallest chance of winning now. Even Celine had beaten them.

The finals would be held in 5 days. At that time, the champion of the contest would be decided. From another perspective, the three supporters of the Custer Family had the strength to win the contest. At that time, the true heir of the Custer family would also be determined.

Along the way, the way Dior looked at Chen Rui was completely different. His words and behaviors were extremely attentive. When they returned to the alternative residence, he even offered many benefits.

Among the last three materials required by “Thunderous Sound”, he had acquired the black phoenix feather. However, the remaining ingredients, lightning dragon’s crystal and star frost, were only available in the Mechanic Association’s storage, and they weren’t for sale.

As long as he won first place in the contest, he could get any three rare materials in the Mechanic Association, so Chen Rui was determined to win.

Hmm… would he win so easily?

chapters.title: Chapter 255: Probe And Assassination
chapters.body:
Chapter 255: Probe And Assassination

Outer city of the Dark Shadow’s capital, the most luxurious south block.

Chen Rui and Kia strolled leisurely. Chen Rui was still in his mechanic attire, but many people had already recognized that he was “Arthur”, a mechanic who became popular in the mechanic contest and won a bet on the capital genius, Savice’s hands. Regardless of the field, Demon Realm respected the strongest and the loser wasn’t worthy of sympathy, especially Savice, who had always been arrogant. Many people had shown considerable respect for Chen Rui.

Certainly, the people in the capital were mostly nobles and the royal family. In the eyes of these people, it was still just a mechanic contest but not a master contest. Chen Rui, who had no background, could be regarded as a genius with a little potential, but that was all of it. Therefore, they didn’t show any special enthusiasm. Instead, the Master Xhosa from the Mechanical Association offered Chen Rui to be his disciple. Chen Rui didn’t directly reject his kindness. Instead, he said politely that he would reply after the final.

Kia, who was beside Chen Rui, attracted a lot of amazed looks. The succubus in a long dress showed amazing temperament and beauty. With a confident smile on her face, she was like a noble lady. Her charm as a succubus was fully shown. It was undoubtedly a different aesthetic as compared to her usual maid attire.

“We’ve been walking for quite long and I’m hungry already. This is not bad. You can fill your stomach with this first, and we’ll find a restaurant later.” Chen Rui took a stick of tanghulu [1] which was a kind of street snack in the capital.

Compared to the other two empires, the royal family of the Dark Shadow Empire paid more attention to lifestyle and enjoyment. Driven by this hobby, the types of goods and food in the capital were plentiful, and there were many entertainments.

Kia took the stick of tanghulu, took a bite and nodded with a smile. The two then went to a high-end restaurant, asked for a quiet room, ordered a few dishes and a bottle of wine, and slowly enjoyed their meal.

After he was full with food and alcohol, Chen Rui patted his stomach with satisfaction, “It’s such a pleasant life…”

Kia covered her mouth and smiled, “I think everything has become easier since Sir Arthur came. As your assistant, I am merely extra. If only future tasks can be as easy as this now, then it will be good.”

“If you really want to, I can ask Princess Royal to let you follow me after this.” Chen Rui said indifferently, “Since I don’t belong to the Dark Moon anyway. Besides, for making such a request at this critical time, I don’t think she’ll refuse.”

Kia was startled, “Sir Arthur isn’t from the Dark Moon?”

She surely began to probe! Chen Rui intended to lead Kia into that train of thought to ease himself in probing her secrets.

“Of course not.” Chen Rui replied without hesitation, “She used three amazing things in exchange for my action. Once the Custer Family’s affairs were over, there will be no more relationship between me and her.”

Kia didn’t have much doubt about that statement because she had been in the Dark Moon for several years, and she had learned a lot of information. Yet, she had never heard of Princess Royal having such a superb mechanic.

If his level truly exceeds that of Robert, then he is likely to be only a slight distance from the master-level. “I dare not to have such unreasonable hopes.” Kia hesitated slightly and shook her head, “Not to mention that my current ownership is under the sheriff of Dark Moon.”

“That trash human who has been in a coma due to some disease?” Chen Rui said with disdain deliberately. In reality, he, with the mentality of a submissive man, hoped that Kia would say something nice to defend the human a little.

“He’s not trash.” Kia objected unexpectedly and looked like she was recalling, “He’s just a… little silly kind man…”

Fine. At least, I’m in the “kind-man” zone. I’m so pitiful. Chen Rui deliberately changed his words to go along, “I admit my words were too much. Princess Royal showed me some of the ideas he designed, and they are not bad. Let’s not talk about him anymore. As long as you are willing to follow me, you can leave the rest to me.”

“Why do you treat me so well?” Kia looked pitiful and charming, “Actually, you know that my physique is special, and I cannot serve any man.”

“I’m an opinionated person who could be a little domineering. I like those who are pleasant to my eyes; whereas those that aren’t pleasant my eyes, I’ll find a way to make them suffer no matter how great they are. Savice is the best example.”

Based on those words, Kia believed that “Arthur” wasn’t fascinated by her, then he dealt with Savice due to her charm. Instead, he was rather unreasonably dealing with Savice directly and pulled her out of danger. Not only that, in this mechanic contest, he also set a trap to lure the capital genius with a master as his backer to completely destroy Savice’s future. Rumors said that Savice’s body was found in the suburbs shortly after the contest.

As “Arthur” said, domineering, defensive, vicious, belonged to an opinionated type.

“If I really want a woman to serve me, as long as I ask Dior now, he can get me even women that are prettier than you.” Chen Rui said openly, “I simply find you pleasant to the eyes, and I like you. I don’t need you to serve me or anything. It’s that simple.”

Kia was stunned. She looked down. Then, she smiled charmingly again, “Then, what does sir want me to do?”

“I don’t like that smile of yours. It’s too fake.” Chen Rui shook his head, “I heard from Shea that you are forced to wear an anti-magic hoop. Don’t worry. I hate using that way to control women. I’m a mechanic. and I can try to help you get rid of that anti-magic hoop. If you don’t like me, you can also leave me and live freely. That’s the type of person I am.”

That was actually a strategy of retreating in order to advance. If he really wanted to understand Kia’s intention, letting her free wasn’t entirely a lie. Although this succubus was very attractive, he didn’t like to keep a time bomb with him.

“Free?” It seemed to be Kia’s first time meeting such a man. It was solely for liking instead of any other intentions. He was just willing to help her.

The succubus was stunned for a while, and her smile suddenly became a bit bitter. Including the days at Dark Moon, Chen Rui and her had spent considerable time together. Yet, it was the first time that Chen Rui saw such a bitter smile.

Maybe there is an unspeakable bitterness under the usual flattery? Chen Rui thought of something, stood up, walked over and held her hands. There weren’t any overstepping moves. but he simply held onto the black bracelet which was the anti-magic hoop that suppressed magic power.

Chen Rui said affirmatively, “I will help you remove this imprisonment now.”

“No!” Kia retracted her hands in astonishment, “Don’t remove it!”

“Why don’t you want to remove the imprisonment?” Chen Rui exclaimed with dissatisfaction. Fortunately, there was a special magic sound barrier in this expensive room. Otherwise, many people around would hear her roaring voice, “Do you still want to return to the Dark Moon? You’d rather go back to be a lowly maid than take the freedom I give?”

“Kia is originally a lowly maid…” A hint of pain flashed past Kia’s eyes, but she smiled even more temptingly, “Sir’s kindness is simply a waste.”

Although he couldn’t make her reveal everything, Chen Rui had obtained three relevant pieces of information.

1. Kia couldn’t control her own actions. She must keep the anti-magic hoop as she returned to the Dark Moon.

2. Kia definitely had a certain mission at Dark Moon which hadn’t completed. There must be other contacts.

3. Kia was likely to have some reasons, but it couldn’t be easily revealed.

If he could use this emotional tactic to slowly find out Kia’s objective, it wasn’t bad either. If it was really excusable, Chen Rui wouldn’t hesitate to help.

At that moment, he suddenly looked alerted. Although the room’s soundproofing was good, it couldn’t block the detection range of [Analytical Eyes].

Kia noticed that Chen Rui’s expression was different, so she kept quiet cleverly. Chen Rui stood in front of her. At that moment, the door was knocked open with a bang and a figure pounced toward them like lightning.

With a wave of Chen Rui’s hand, the dark elf felt that his speed had suddenly slowed down. Before he could respond, the dagger in his hand suddenly fell into his opponent’s hand. Almost at the same time, he felt a pain in his heart. It was pierced by his own dagger.

After Chen Rui killed the dark elf with lightning speed, his right hand grabbed to the side and caught a Great Demon’s figure who had just teleported. He immediately lifted the Great Demon. At the same time, he punched with his left fist. Under the flash of yellow light, the Great Demon that was charging toward him had a punch mark on his chest, and he was knocked out.

In the blink of an eye, among the three assassins at the peak of Higher Demon, two died and one was injured. No, all three were dead. Seeing that the situation was bad, the Great Demon that Chen Rui caught bit the poison sac in his mouth and died of poison before he was interrogated.

It seemed that these were rigorously trained suicide attackers. The person who sent these suicide attackers might be the Master Leo who he had grudges from the contest or other contestents. It could also be the Falamo couple.

Kia was an expert in magic. In her eyes, the two earth magic “Arthur” just used, [Decelerate] and [Magic Flying Fist], were both launched without chanting. Besides, he had a strong close-combat ability. He settled three assassins instantly.

One has to know that even if both are at their peak of Higher Demon, the combat power of the two professions, mechanic and assassin are definitely distinctive. Yet, the assassin is dead now while the mechanic is safe and sound. “Arthur’s” true strength has likely reached Demon King, and he is proficient in both physical and magic. A mechanic at its peak with Demon King-level strength, and he is only a step away from becoming a mechanic master. Unfortunately, these are still far from enough. Kia sighed slightly. Suddenly, her hands were warmed as they were held by Chen Rui.

“This place isn’t safe. Let’s go. You don’t have any strength right now. If there are more troublesome assassins, I’m afraid it will affect you.”

The phrase was actually “fear of assassin and wanted to leave”, but there was a touch of warmth in Kia’s heart. She didn’t let go of his hand and let him lead her out.

The assassination must be someone’s intentional plan. Chen Rui didn’t blame the restaurant, but je informed them to clean up the mess. He didn’t stop with Kia and went all the way back to Dior’s alternative residence.

[1] https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tanghulu

Those assassins seemed to be coming for Kia 🤨. Why would she be afraid of her own power?

chapters.title: Chapter 256: Seduction
chapters.body:
Chapter 256: Seduction

Dior was shocked after learning that the two had been assassinated. He related it to the assassination he encountered and he scolded Falamo and Marianne for being despicable and shameless. After calming Chen Rui and Kia. he hurried away with a group of guards, saying he’d rush to the inner city immediately to complain to his father, Croz.

Chen Rui knew that such a complaint was useless, but he let Dior be. Seeing Kia’s mood seemed a little low, he made an embarrassed look, “Kia, don’t worry about today’s incident.”

Kia knew he was talking about the little unpleasantness at the restaurant and shook her head, “I’m the one that’s supposed to say sorry.”

“Let’s not talk about that anymore! This is for you.”

Kia took the box and looked at it. It was a delicate brooch, and her eyes were gleaming, “This is what we saw just now…”

“I saw that you like it, so I bought it secretly when you weren’t paying attention.” Chen Rui smiled, “You can have it. Take it as a little surprise.”

“Thank you sir.” Kia’s lips moved upward as she smiled.

Chen Rui nodded, “This smile is much better than your usual smile. I like it a lot.”

Kia’s face was hot. She made an excuse to go in to rest, then she left in a hurry. From her back, came the unscrupulous laughter of “Arthur”.

Listening to the smugness of the man’s laughter, somehow, the succubus felt her heartbeat accelerated.

As Chen Rui expected, Dior’s complaint toward his father, Croz, came to nothing. Yet, Croz made a decision to temporarily move all three children and their supporting mechanic to the inner city.

The inner city was heavily guarded, and commoners and idlers weren’t allowed to go inside. This could prevent assassinations like this to happen again.

The Custer Family’s residence in the inner city was very large. Chen Rui brought Kia to live in one of the yards. Although they didn’t go out shopping anymore, after the previous incident, the two seemed to have a tacit understanding as the habitual flirtatious smile on Kia’s face had somewhat reduced substantially.

It was one day before the start of finals. Yesterday, Chen Rui happened to encounter a competitor, who was the previous champion, Robert, a Great Demon with Intermediate Demon strength. He was skinny and looked fit. When he saw Chen Rui then, he looked unfriendly. Also, he didn’t say anything and turned to leave. There was the hint of “there are always resentments between those from the same industry”.

The night had fallen. The moonlight in the sky glowed faintly in purple. Kia and Dior’s sister Celine got along well. Not long ago, she was taken away to look at new clothes. Chen Rui was sitting on the stone table in the yard, holding a glass of wine and slowly enjoying it.

Doing things in his own way, bold, clever, stubbornly likes certain types of beauties and fine wines. These were the key words that shape the character of Arthur. In order to maintain this image, he drank every day now, and he usually drank alone.

While drinking, he missed many people at the same time. He missed his beloved woman; the woman who was truly his; he missed the woman who he might have fallen in love with; he missed the loli who was he only considered as a sister at the moment; he missed his perverted, annoying friends; he missed his relatively normal friends…

Chen Rui didn’t neglect the training of strength because of mechanics. During this period of time, other than linking the training ground’s time rule with the refinery, he also trained at the training ground with various rules crossed-over, such as gravity, surfing sea and deep sea. The cultivation of the mind hadn’t stopped because of the end of Alioth state. On the contrary, with the “spur” of Shura, which might be resurrected at any time, the cultivation of the state of mind had become one of the daily “courses”, even if his daily words and behavior were also one of the state of implicit training.

Migrez state was to refine principles, but “principles” was more than just spirit or magic. It included a huge area. He remembered in Buddhism, there was a saying called “everything is related principles”, which included 5 desires, 12 places and 18 realms. Yet, Chen Rui only remembered the names, but he couldn’t remember the details. Chen Rui’s understanding of principles were all things and phenomena, which could be called – the world.

He had a faint feeling that the “world” might have something in common with the power of the so-called “territory” or there were only minimal differences. The day when he had truly realized the power of territory should be the time when the Migrez state was completed.

However, the power of the territory could only be mastered at Demon Emperor level minimally. Besides, even at the Demon Emperor level, it was only pseudo-territory. Now, he was at most equivalent to the strength of Great Demon King. Even if he had some concepts taught by Paglio, he still couldn’t understand them.

Chen Rui thought of a newly acquired thing, which was the realm king fruit he obtained by scamming the Mellon Family. The realm king fruit was the essence created within the Aurora Frost. After consuming it, it could generate a spiritual imprint similar to the feeling of territory according to the consciousness of the user, which in turn helped the users to understand and enhance the power of territory.

Perhaps, I can try the realm king fruit. It was just that the power of the realm king fruit was too powerful. It could only be withstood by Demon Emperor and above. I wonder if I can solve this problem through Star Devouring and Star Conversion since the realm king fruit will expire within three months anyway. Certainly, for now, it is better to finish the mechanic contest first. Chen Rui took a casual sip of wine. Suddenly, he frowned slightly as he saw a stunning figure walking toward him, but it wasn’t Kia.

The woman came closer. It was Marianne.

Due to the [Nirvana] talent, the Asmodeus Royal Family, regardless of gender, was the most beautiful in the entire Demon Realm. Marianne had a good figure, curvaceous breasts and hips, thin waist, and excellent facial features. It was just her eyebrows were too thick which made her seemed slightly dominant.

Yet, the more dominant she looked, it gave men an alternative desire to conquer as they wanted to see how slutty a dominant woman would be on the bed.

Marianne wore a low-cut long dress with bare shoulders. She looked even more enticing under the moonlight as she walked toward him slowly.

“Master Arthur.”

Although “Arthur” hadn’t obtained the certification of master, he had shown that his capability was close to master. That intentional compliment made him smile slightly.
