Seeing that he didn’t refuse that compliment, Marianne was a little calmer, but she didn’t know that Chen Rui’s actual capabilities had already reached the master level long ago, so he was well deserved.

“Isn’t it a little boring for master to drink here alone? Do you want to have a drink together?”

Chen Rui had already guessed that Marianne must be here to win over his royalty, so he nodded.

Marianne secretly rejoiced. She sat down, took out a cup and filled it, “The other day, I was unaware and my words were rude. Please forgive me for offending you, master. I’ll take this cup as an apology.”

Marian drank a glass of wine and sat closer to Chen Rui while the aroma from her body dug into his nose.

“Madam Marianne, let’s get straight to the point.” Chen Rui took a sip of wine slowly, “I don’t like to beat around bushes.”

Marianne settled down and said, “Master’s capabilities were obvious to all in the semi-final. Although Robert was the previous champion, in my opinion, he is far from comparable to master. I hope that… master will let him win in the finals the day after tomorrow.”

“ Oh? ”

Marianne noticed Chen Rui wasn’t excited, so she hurriedly added, “Master also knows that this time, it’s related to the heir of the Custer Family. As long as master is willing to help us this time, there’ll be a huge reward for appreciation. No matter what, what Dior offered master, I can give double… I can even offer myself to master.”

Chen Rui’s eyes fell on the undulating boobs on Marianne and he examined them up and down again since it would be a waste to not look at it. Marianne felt as if she was a good being evaluated by merchants. She was the sister of the second general, Warren, the Asmodeus Royal Family. Back then, Warren made a huge mistake and nearly died. In order to preserve his power, she had to marry the Custer Family reluctantly. After getting married, she had been dominating her husband, Falamo. Now that she was being looked at unscrupulously, she felt uncomfortable, but she had to show a welcoming smile on her face.

After Chen Rui had a free show, he slowly said, “I’m afraid even Falamo didn’t know about this bargain in advance. Aren’t you afraid that he’ll turn his face?”

“He dares?” Marianne’s eyes straightened, and it had quite a bit of her usual demeanor. Then, she smiled charmingly, “That man is just a coward. How can it be compared to a real man like master. As long as master promises, not only tonight, I can continue to be a secret lover of master in the future. My brother, Warren, is the second general of the Empire, part of the Asmodeus Royal Family. I can even recommend master to become a high status palace mechanic.”

Speaking, Marianne’s eyes revealed moving brilliance, and her breath became hot, “I’ll tell you a secret. Falamo is basically a useless trash in bed. I would really like to experience the strength of real men…”

Chen Rui had a little sympathy for Falamo. Not only he was strictly controlled by his wife, but he was also being cuckold.

“Actually, even if I promise, Robert might not be able to win in my opinion, Horford is stronger than I am. Madam, you only have one body. Do you plan to sell it to two people? Or are you thinking if you fail to seduce here, you’ll try the other side?”

Marianne’s eyes suddenly cooled down, “What do you mean?”

“Do you still not understand?” Chen Rui drank a glass of wine slowly, “Madam, your seduction failed. I’m not interested in women like you. I suggest you to get to know your opponent’s preference before approaching Horford. For example, you’re right that I like women, but I’m quite picky in terms of taste. For the type I like, I’ll obtain her at all costs. If I don’t like it… even if she gets naked in front of me to seduce, it’s no different from a skeleton to me.”

Marianne stood up suddenly with a great deal of humiliation in her heart. Her original enticing glance seemed to be boiling with fire.

“You’ll regret the choice you made today!” Marianne said while she clenched her teeth and left angrily.

Chen Rui didn’t take it seriously. He knew very well that Marianne’s seduction and coax were just for the contest. Once the contest was over, he was just a negligible mechanic, and he would probably be killed. Besides, even if those promises were true, he couldn’t agree to them.

Chen Rui took another sip of wine and smiled lightly, “It’s time for you to come out now. You’ve been watching for quite a while already.”

A high-pitched laughter sounded, “Master is indeed a master. My sister-in-law is used to being dominant. After experiencing such humiliation suddenly, I’m afraid she’ll vomit blood out of anger. Pity my second brother to be the punching bag again.”

The woman who spoke was actually Dior’s youngest sister, Celine. Celine came over wearing a casual short skirt with big eyes and a beautiful, lovely face. Although her beauty was slightly inferior to Marianne, she was full of the youthfulness of a girl, especially the fully rounded… deadly weapon on her chest. If a little loli is here, she will definitely be envious. “Ms. Celine.” Chen Rui laughed, “Where’s Kia?”

“She’s trying on clothes and accessories in my dressing room. I promised to give her a few sets. Hopefully it’ll please you, master.” Celine smiled cutely.

“Then, for Ms. Celine to leave Kia at the dressing room and come here yourself, is there anything that I can help you with?”

Celine grinned, “I know that master doesn’t like to beat around bushes, so I’ll just say it directly. Actually, my intentions are the same as those of Marianne’s. I hope that master can let go of the first place in the contest. In fact, with master’s capabilities, it’s unnecessary to prove yourself in such a level of contest. However, this victory is too important for me, so I’m here to shamelessly beg master for help.”

“This request really surprises me.” Chen Rui looked surprised, “I heard Dior said that his competitor is only his younger brother, Falamo whereas his younger sister, Celine isn’t very keen on this. I didn’t expect Miss to be so thoughtful on the heir’s placement.”

“I can’t be not ambitious. My elder brother’s ability is too poor, so my family will be lost sooner or later in his hands; my second brother is almost the same. Although he has a capable wife, she’s from the Asmodeus Royal Family after all. So, once he is in control of the family, it will not take long before the family name of Custer to be replaced by Asmodeus. Only I can continue the Custer Family.”

Celine said with a smile, “I’ve finished reasoning, but if master truly concedes, there won’t be a lack of benefits. Just now, my sister-in-law, Marianne was just too stingy to only pay twice the reward… Then, I’ll give 10 times the reward, and I can pay you half right now.”

Chen Rui’s eyes lightened slightly: It stands to reason that Dior’s rewards for him must be an astronomical figure. Celine immediately offered 10 times the reward, and she can even pay 5 times right now. This courage isn’t something ordinary people have. It seems that this girl isn’t simply. Both Dior or Falamo have underestimated this sister who seems harmless usually. No wonder, the unknown mechanic, Horford supported by Celine, could reach the final with amazing results and became one of the two black horses. This may not be just luck. Chen Rui showed interest, but he shook his head, “I appreciate Ms. Celine’s kindness, but I have an agreement with Mr. Dior. I don’t want to break my promise.”

“Actually, I was just testing master just now. Surely, master didn’t let me down. In the Demon Realm, there are very few people who keep their promises.” Celine wasn’t displeased, but there was a little more maturity and firmness in her smile than didn’t match her age, “This kind of man is worthy of me, Celine Custer.”

Chen Rui was really surprised. Celine’s eyes glowed strangely, “As long as you can help me get the position as the head of the family, you can truly be my man. The entire Custer Family will be yours. You can use the family resources to further improve your skills, and you don’t have to wander around trying your luck. If I’m right, your level should already be a real master. The Custer Family itself started from a mechanic, so it’s perfect. With ability and potential, even if I’m the head of the family, I’m not wronged to be your woman. I know you like to do things in your own way, so I will not limit you. You can have many women. However, you have to become a member of the Custer Family and our descendants will also be of the Great Demon Custer Family that continues controlling the Custer family. I believe my father, Croz, will be happy to see that. Even if he’s not happy or unwilling to let a girl like me to control the family, as long as the situation is certain, he can only face the fact.”

Chen Rui put down his wine glass with a little seriousness in his eyes, as if he had only known Celine for the first time. This seemingly innocent and lovely girl is so ambitious!

Another little loli joins the harem? 🤔

chapters.title: Chapter 257: Celine
chapters.body:
Chapter 257: Celine

“It really surprised me, Ms. Celine, Dior and Falamo were ridiculously blinded. They didn’t know that their innocent sister is actually the most fearful competitor.”

Seeing that Chen Rui’s tone seemed to be interested, Celine approached him and smiled sweetly. There was a little more enticement, which was completely different from her cuteness, in her smile, “The things that I know… may be more than master can imagine. By then, master will know… whether you want an innocent, lovely girl, or a noble lady who isn’t willing to be conquered, or a pitiful younger sister… I can be anything…”

Amazing! Comparing the same temptation with wealth and sex, the sister-in-law previously can only be regarded as basic as relative to this younger sister. Suddenly, Chen Rui realized one thing – everyone had underestimated the innocent, lovely Ms. Celine.

“These conditions… I really can’t think of a reason to decline.” Chen Rui stood up slowly, holding Celine’s chin gently, “Yet, before that, I want to confirm whether Old Gauss is still alive?”

Celine’s eyes flickered slightly. Although the changes were slight, she couldn’t hide it from Chen Rui. It seemed that he guessed it right.

I didn’t expect that the disappearance of Old Gauss isn’t the Falamo’s doing but Celine’s! What a smart third lady who isn’t known by anyone! Celine was still keeping the enticing smile on her face, “What are you talking about? I don’t understand what you meant.”

Chen Rui was even more assured in his mind and he said, “It seems that it isn’t only Old Gauss, but the incident where Dior who was attacked a while ago and almost died, was likely planned by you too.”

That assumption wasn’t merely a guess. From all the signs and evidence at the time, it was definitely the Falamo couple’s doings. Even Croz felt skeptical. Although he didn’t disclose the matter, he was distancing from the Falamo.

Chen Rui analyzed carefully that those signs seemed fake as if someone was afraid that others didn’t know that the couple planned it. Certainly, he couldn’t rule out the possibility of a dumb decision. Chen Rui had some doubts before but after all, the hostility and competition between the Falamo and Dior were obvious. Until now, Celine finally showed her fangs, and some ambiguous things became clear.

Originally, the feeling she gave was always a little sister who loved her brother and respected her father. Even if her supporter, who she chose “randomly” to complete the task, entered the final, it still seemed like pure luck. Now, it could be sure that all of these were carefully planned.

Neighbors who couldn’t agree lose out to the third party. Celine was obviously the third party.

It was likely that Celine managed to obtain a list of candidates roughly selected by Old Gauss and intentionally leaked to Falamo through some methods. Falamo and Dior began to compete for candidates on the list. Originally, Robert had agreed to join Dior’s party, but he suddenly changed his mind. It was likely to be a mean by the third lady.

Old Gauss’s “disappearance” might be the same case. With Dior’s talent, after losing the Old Gauss’s plan, he could only choose Savice. In that way, both Dior and Falamo fell into the set trap because both Savice and Robert couldn’t rival Horford and the heir would definitely be Celine.

However, things eventually changed unpredictably. Chen Rui “coming out of nowhere” made Celine’s plan deviate. In order to ensure her victory, she came here tonight.

Celine still smiled calmly, “My two brothers and I have been very good since childhood. If master has no evidence, I hope you won’t talk nonsense. Otherwise, no one will believe it.”

“It’s true that few people will believe. I think I have finally realized your cleverness.” Chen Rui laughed, “The assassinations I encountered the other day must also be arranged by you. Unfortunately, you were probably wrong with your estimation of my strength. However, none of this matters in the face of actual interest. I have something important in the hands of Old Gauss. If he’s dead, then I have to ask you for it… If you don’t have it, then we have nothing to talk about.”

“What is it? Tell me first. Perhaps I can help you find that Old Gauss.”

“You’ve finally admitted? It seems that Old Gauss isn’t dead, but he’s under your control.” Chen Rui smiled, “This thing is very important to me. Before you kill him, you better interrogate him for the whereabouts. Maybe you can talk to me about the conditions later.”

“Later?” Celine understood the meaning behind. She walked two steps, turned around and smiled with a faint chill, “So, are you rejecting my conditions now? You are actually rejecting such a generous condition?”

Chen Rui took a sip of wine and shook his head, “As I said, I’m very tempted over your conditions, but it’s exactly because I’m tempted, I can’t accept your conditions now as I’m not good enough yet. Only after I’ve become famous in the contest and a well-recognized master, I can only accept these conditions at an equal position with you. Until then, I can’t believe in you. To be precise, I do not even believe in Dior.”

This ambiguous answer surprised Celine, “I don’t quite understand what you mean. Since you say you are very tempted, but once you win the contest, doesn’t the heir belong to Dior then?”

Chen Rui put down his glass and sneered, “I have no interest in who inherited the Custer Family. I only care about my own interests. If I can become famous with this contest, then even if you eat your words, I’ll have more choices. In fact, even Dior becomes the heir, as long as he and Falamo disappear, along with the support of me, a famous master, wouldn’t the Custer family be yours?”

Celine was silenced, seemingly thinking.

“In fact, from your perspective, this choice is good and harmless.” Chen Rui sighed, “If Horford wins tomorrow, you can directly become the heir. If Horford fails, as long as you have the sincerity to cooperate. With my help, you can still be the controller of the family.”

Celine’s eyes narrowed slightly, “It seems that master isn’t only superior in craftsmanship, but you are also impressive in wisdom. Although you refused me, I still couldn’t have a fallout with you at once.”

“Your conditions are too tempting, so I can only take it seriously. In fact, this choice is very risky for me because I’m not sure I can defeat Horford just as he isn’t sure that he can defeat me.” As Chen Rui said, he looked at the shade in the courtyard, “Master Horford, what do you say?”

A stiff voice came, “To be able to discover my existence, your strength is at least early Demon King.”

Race: Wrath Royal Family. Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C; Physique: C-; Strength: D; Spirit: C; Dexterity C-. Middle stage Demon King, and… he’s actually a Wrath Royal Family. I really wonder how Celine found this Horford. Horford wasn’t tall. He had a short cyan hair and a mustache. His eyes were particularly enchanting.

That discovery surprised Chen Rui. From the data, Horford should be a mage specialized in fire magic.

“Demon King?” A strange brialliane flashed past Celine’s eyes, “No wonder… that’s surprising.”

Unlike the royal family, a Demon King-level Great Demon must be of a mutated bloodline. Celine’s “no wonder” referred more to the reason for the failure of the assassination.

“However, you said something wrong.” Horford’s tone revealed strong confidence, “You’re not sure that you can defeat me, but I am completely sure that I can defeat you!”

“Really?” Chen Rui raised his eyebrow, “Don’t say that too early. The higher you climb, the more painful you will fall.”

“There’s no point arguing now. I know you’ve reached the level of the master, but that’s all.” Horford said calmly, “In the finals the day after tomorrow, I will let you see what a true mechanic master is!”

“Okay.” Chen Rui toasted Horford, “See you in the finals.”

Horford snorted and turned away.

“I’m looking forward to it too.” Celine gave him a deep glance, “The day after tomorrow, will you bring devastation or amazement?”

Soon after Celine left, Kia returned to the alternative residence with new clothes and beautiful jewelry.

“Celine came here?”

“How do you know?”

“Don’t imagine your assistant to be so incompetent, okay?” Kia smiled, “The reason she approached is just to know more about your preferences and information. This third lady isn’t simply. Dior and Falamo have always been underestimating her.”

Chen Rui said nothing else, but he praised, “You look very beautiful in this dress.”

“Maybe, but I don’t really like it. I’m just giving her more time to talk to you about the conditions. When it comes to clothes… I still prefer a more comfortable style.”

“Comfortable…” Chen Rui looked at the moon in the sky and sighed, “It must be freedom.”

Kia’s smile was a little bleak, but she didn’t reply.

Chen Rui’s tone became firm, “If you can trust me, I will do my best to help you after this contest. Don’t say any that’s not important. I’m just thinking about how to do it and execute it.”

“I’m just a maid.” Kia shook her head, “It’s not worth it.”

“It’s worth it!” Chen Rui looked at her quietly and said those words firmly. Without further comment, he walked into his room, but a strange feeling filled his heart. It was as if the words “worth it” weren’t just to probe her in his original purpose. Am I… falling too deep in the play? Kia was shocked. She felt that his back became a little fuzzy as she lowered her head. She stroked her wrist gently and a drop of tears landed on the anti-magic bracelet.

The highly anticipated final had finally begun.

No seats were left empty in the arena and the atmosphere was by no means comparable by the preliminary and semi-final. Many royals and nobles came. The Asmodeus Royal Family was full of handsome men and pretty women and became the most attractive scenery within the audience at once. However, the appearance of a VIP immediately dimmed the scenery.

The first sage and beauty in the Demon Realm, the supreme ruler of the Dark Shadow Empire, Catherine Asmodeus the Great!

Was Catherine the woman in the tent? If yes, would she recognize Chen Rui?

chapters.title: Chapter 258: Master Vs. Master! Beyond Mechanic Level Finals
chapters.body:
Chapter 258: Master Vs. Master! Beyond Mechanic Level Finals

The throne was in the middle of the VIP seat. When Empress Catherine appeared on the throne, all the people stood up and bowed to her. It was a voluntary bow.

At that time, Catherine used extraordinary wisdom, courage and means to settle the royal war to rescue the empire. After managing with much difficulty, the Dark Shadow Empire, which was initially barely surviving, became the second largest empire after the Bloody Empire. She brought the citizens back to peace and tranquility. Thus, regardless of nobles or the commoners, they respect and revere their ruler from their heart.

Catherine wore a robe with a crown and a veil covering her face. On her throne, her face couldn’t be seen, but people could still peek into the beauty of the first beauty from the faintly visible perfect figure and the mysterious, elegant temperament.

A 10 metre radius around the throne was surrounded by the imperial guards equipped with fine equipment. However, even without these guards, Catherine was second only to the world’s strongest Emperor Raizen so no one would dare to offend.

The judges of the contest were a group of mechanic masters led by Master Anderson, the top mechanic masters of the empire. At the center of the arena were the ten mechanics who entered the final stage today.

The workbenches required for all three specializations were placed around each mechanic. Generally, the mechanics brought their own tools, but they could also choose to use the given tools.

The finals’ rules were very simple. Whoever produces the highest rated equipment, regardless of materials and specialization within the time limit would be the champion!

In this final, there were originally two popular champions Robert and the capital’s genius, Savice. Yet, Savice unexpectedly failed in the semi-final and the rise of two unexpected candidates, “Arthur” and Horford covered Roberta’s limelight.

However, the possibility that candidates had hid their capabilities couldn’t be ruled out. Everything was possible in the finals now.

After the mechanics took their place, the finals began with the ring of a bell.

Almost everyone moved including Robert except two.

Chen Rui and Horford.

The two didn’t argue with each other nor looked at each other movingly as it was a contest afterall.

The two who took a deep breath and closed your eyes, calmed down quickly with different methods. Then, almost at the same time, they began to move and carefully place the tools and materials on the workbench. Every tool and material was placed at the most suitable for themselves. Despite the limited time, they performed such a “prelude” at their own pace and didn’t even look at the time.

The eyes of several masters at judges’ seats fell onto the two men. Master Anderson who was sitting in the middle nodded slightly; while Rummenigge looked surprised and rejoiced; Master Leo frowned; Only Master Xhosa murmured, “I didn’t expect.”

After doing all the preparations, the movements of the two began to change rapidly. Chen Rui’s hammering movements were huge like splashing ink to draw; whereas Horford’s movements were smaller and more subtle like a detailed drawing. The audience’s eyes were involuntarily attracted. All of them had an illusion as if there were only two candidates on the stage and the rest were just a background.

Anderson’s eyes stayed on Horford for a moment, then it finally fell onto Chen Rui. As the best mechanic in metal specialization, he obviously noticed that although Horford’s method was precise and impeccable, what really moved him was Chen Rui’s method. The hammering method was casual yet sophisticated. It seemed to have deviated from the scope of ordinary mechanics as it could fully utilize his energy to complete the process of refining and shaping.

Could that method be from the taurens who are famous for their craftsmanship? That’s right! This hammering method does have the essence of the taurens. I can’t believe someone can actually master the tauren’s craftsmanship in this world! Due to their limited talent, the tauren’s craftsmanship is also deficient in enchantment. If he applies the enchantment he masters… Anderson’s eyes grew brighter and bigger as he stared at every hammering of Chen Rui for the fear of missing out.

Master Xhosa was already gulping alcohol with a somewhat self-deprecating smile on his face. No wonder “Arthur” politely rejected my apprenticeship and only said to respond after the contest. From his level of performance now, even I am inferior from him. How am I worthy to be his teacher? However, the form this guy filled seems to be.. dual-specializations? Rummenigge’s expression had changed from surprise to serious, “It looks like this final has surpassed the rank of mechanics…”

As soon as the experts showed their skills, everyone would know their capabilities. All the masters showed their approvals.

Master versus master! Besides, they are not ordinary masters!

The final is really unexpected! Several metal-specialized mechanics had stopped crafting and stared at the two’s methods and actions. From time to time, they looked like they were pondering or surprised. Mechanics that could enter the final were naturally extraordinary people who could notice the amazing skills of the two.

It was almost impossible to win with the presence of these two people. Since it was rare to see master level craftsmanship, they might as well watch carefully to learn, so it wasn’t wasted.

Chen Rui, who had completed crafting, started enchanting. The tauren’s craftsmanship was perfect, but there they were always lacking in enchantment. Today, he would make up for deficiency!

Although his basic knowledge and advanced knowledge were integrated, Chen Rui’s method contained traces of Skye and Tata. Under the brilliant glory of the magic array, Chen Rui used the “pointing” method to complete the last enchantment on that weapon, and the broadsword was finally completed.

At about the same time, Horford completed a dark dagger.

The previous champion, Robert, completed his work a bit faster than both of them.

It was a magic bracelet. Robert was indeed extraordinary. Once he was in the state, there was nothing else in his eyes as all the attention was on the tools and materials in his hands. So, he didn’t notice the performance of Chen Rui and Horford. Certainly, that was also a quality that an excellent mechanic should have.

Three works were placed on the table of the judges at the same time. The appraisal results of Robert’s work were announced first. Unnamed magic bracelet. Casting speed of water magic increased by 10%; water magic damage increased by 17%; physical defense increased by 12%. Excellent grade.

“Robert can freely craft outstanding excellent-grade equipment now, so he’s almost a junior master.” Rummenigge said, “After the contest, you can come to the association for master certification.”

Although it was rumored that Robert had already reached the master level in the early days, now that Rummenigge officially confirmed in person, many people were still surprised. The mechanic contest actually gave birth to a master. Robert had already faintly reached the level of the master in recent years, but he hadn’t participated in the certification because he wanted to get popular by joining the mechanic contest.

Hearing Rummenigge’s invitation to participate in the master’s certification publicly, Robert smiled and looked provocatively at Chen Rui and Howard.

However, Chen Rui and Howard were just looking at each other as if there were invisible sparks between them; they simply ignored the “third party”, Robert’s provocation. To be precise, they couldn’t bother about Robert as only each other was worthy of their attention.

The next item appraised was Horford’s dagger, named “Gust”. Attack speed increased by 22%; movement speed increased by 20%; tear damage increased by 20%. Excellent-grade.

Robert’s smile suddenly solidified. The attributes of the dagger, which was also an excellent grade, were higher than his magic bracelet. The dagger accelerates the user’s attack and damage, so it is perfect for assassins and the like. Naming and a personal engraving on the equipment was also a sign commonly used by masters.

There were already some people at the scene who planned to buy that dagger from Horford after the contest.

Subsequently, Chen Rui’s broadsword was appraised. The grade of the equipment was discussed for a while among the judges, and it was finally determined as a quasi-legendary grade weapon.

The so-called quasi-legendary grade was a superior excellent-grade weapon. Besides, its enchantment had exceeded the 30% upper limit of excellent-grade equipment, but it hadn’t yet reached the requirement of legendary-grade.

The sword’s name was “Eyes of Flame”. Attack increased by 31%; stamina recovery speed increased by 35%; crushing damage increased by 28%.

Quasi-Legendary grade! This time it raised a commotion among the entire crowd. A quasi-legendary grade equipment actually appeared! At that point, even those mechanics, who weren’t paying attention, stopped and looked at each other. Is this a mechanic contest or a mechanic master contest? On the throne, Catherine slightly nodded. This season of contest gave birth to three masters and the appearance of quasi-legendary grade weapons was indeed good.

Robert, who had previously provoked Chen Rui, had a pale face. Now, he finally understood why they didn’t even bother to look at him. Initially, he was proud that he was invited to participate in the master certification. Yet, now that little pride had been shattered by that broadsword. Without any certification, “Arthur” was already a recognized mechanic master!

The Falamo couple in the audience seats had a pale face already. Dior clenched his fists tightly and waved a few times inexplicably. It was only Celine that looked indifferent, but an odd brilliance appeared in her eyes.

“Interesting! It seems that I still underestimated you! It’s just the beginning of the contest.” Horford’s eyes ignited the will to fight. I can also create quasi-legendary-grade equipment. The quality of the equipment is related to the status, materials and other factors. So, it doesn’t mean Chen Rui’s is surely better than him. Besides, I have a more secure way to win. Horford bowed to the VIP seats and said proudly, “Dear Empress and all the masters, since Arthur and I are both masters, for the sake of fairness, I propose to use the rules of the masters contest a year ago to determine the victory.”

The Master Contest a year ago? The audience looked excited.

Since mechanics had limitations on their status, inspiration etc. The rule of the master contest was to make three types of equipment to get a total score. If there were different specializations, there would be high bonus points.

The president of the Bloody Empire’s Mechanic Alliance, Nate was a rare dual-specialization top master. One year ago, he used this rule to defeat Master Anderson to become the world’s top mechanic.

Master Leo and Chen Rui had grudges, so he was the first one to agree. Leo was a master from the Mechanic Alliance, so him being the first to agree made the audience applauded. Master Anderson frowned and asked Chen Rui, “Do you agree with Horford’s suggestion?”

Chen Rui shrugged after hearing the rules, “I have no comments.”

This is truly a master contest! The arena’s audience were clapping excitedly. Coming to this finals is totally worth it! Leo didn’t take Robert into consideration, but Robert knew that his skills weren’t comparable, so he didn’t protest. Similarly, he also had the intention to observe and study closely, so he retreated to the side.

After some noises, the audience calmed down and waited for the next round of battle between the two masters.

Horford didn’t choose to forge and went straight to the armor crafting workdesk. He took a large piece of beast hide from his space ring and began to cut it skillfully.

Master Anderson’s pupils suddenly contracted. He is actually a dual-specializations master! Also, the specializations of metal and leather, including the familiar methods are exactly what my rival Nate has….is he a disciple of Nate? Nate is also a Samuel Royal Family like Horford. Anderson felt that it was more plausible as he thought. After not seeing Nate for many years, he actually taught such a genius disciple! Now, it depends whether Horford’s leather specialization has reached the master-level. Otherwise, with the bonus point from dual-specialization, even if “Arthur” has better metal specialization, he can’t win.

Many people had guessed that Horford might be a dual-specializations master, and the arena had an uproar. Are we witnessing the birth of a dual-specialized master? Celine in the audience seats smiled confidently. That was her trump card. In the rules of the master contest, the dual-specialized master was invincible. Even if someone was better than Horford in single specialization, he or she couldn’t win.

At that time, there was another burst of exclamation in the boiling sound. It turned out that Chen Rui also came to the workdesk and took out a roll of cloth. It was a cloth made with a secret method using Fangxiao’s beast hide from the sea of death that he “blackmailed” from Dior. Besides, it was a Demon Emperor level Fangxiao (a type of demonic fish).

The masters on the VIP seats took a deep breath. Could it be…? Master Xhosa was the most excited. He actually crushed the wine bottle accidentally. The sharp pieces had cut into his skin and he was bleeding, but he didn’t notice.

The veteran master shouted in his heart. This guy is actually going to show leather specialization! This isn’t written on that form! Other than the exposed metal specialization and the leather specialization that he’s going to show, on that form… there is still another specialization! A dual-specialization mechanic still isn’t a miracle? Could the biggest miracle in the mechanic world happen after thousands of years?

Hmmmm… the smart move by Celine actually turned out to be more useful to Chen Rui.

chapters.title: Chapter 259: Legendary-Grade Equipment! A Trio-Specialized Master Who Shocked The Demon Realm
chapters.body:
Chapter 259: Legendary-Grade Equipment! A Trio-Specialized Master Who Shocked The Demon Realm

At the arena of Dark Shadow Empire.

At the audience seat, Celine’s smile suddenly froze on her face, and the whispers and exclamations from the audience were reduced as their eyes focused on the two busy figures at the workdesk.

In an ordinary mechanic contest, two mechanic masters were born.

Moreover, both of them were dual-specialized masters.

Other than the president of the Bloody Empire Mechanic Alliance, also the Demon Realm’s best mechanic, Nate, the Demon Realm had basically unheard of other dual-specialized masters for thousands of years. Yet, now, two of them just popped up!

All the masters at the VIP seats were stunned. Two dual-specialized masters are extremely rare even in previous master contests! Like Horford, Chen Rui was also immersed in the leather production at that time. Master Tata and Master Skye once said that the highest state of crafting was to put personal feelings and life into the work to create another life. His current state hadn’t reached that level, so he could only integrate his feelings.

If the first greatsword he forged was for his affection toward Athena, then this cloak was a longing for another person.

The woman who owns the Dark Shadow Cape is now in the Dark Shadow Empire. Can I see her again? When she’s lonely, will she still dance alone under the moonlight after playing that tune? Chen Rui closed his eyes gently, but the knitting needles in his hands were as if they had eyes, knitting the essence of a complicated relationship.

The longing gradually returned to the bottom of his heart and the cloak was almost complete.

On the other side, Horford, with a strong confidence in winning the game, gave everything he had and completed a leather armor made mainly of hydra skin.

When Horford’s leather armor was sent to the judges table, he saw Chen Rui stood empty-handed in front of the workdesk, so he couldn’t help but sneer, “Are you done with your weapon?”

“Nope.”

Horford sneered, “Nope? Could it be that you lost your courage to compete after knowing I’m dual-specialized?”

“Dual-specialization isn’t anything. As for the armor I just made…” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “I completed it around one minute ago before you, so it has already been sent over.”

Horford thought it was armor like metal guards or helmets. Listening to Chen Rui’s derogation for dual-specialization, he was sure that it was just jealousy. When he was about to be sarcastic, the judges had announced the results of this round.

Horford’s works – “Hydra’s Rage”, magic leather armor. Attributes: Toughness (physical and magic defense bonus; hydra skin’s characteristics); ranged attack damage reduced by 17%; casting speed increased by 18%. Excellent grade.

The discussion time triggered by Chen Rui’s work was much shorter than the last one. “Longing of the Stars”, magic cloak. Attributes: Protection, water resistance (reduce physical attack damage, greatly reduce water magic damage, Fangxiao beast hide’s characteristics); increase movement speed by 30%; increase attack speed by 35%. Quasi-legendary grade.

Horford couldn’t respond for a while. Magic cloak? Metal chain cloak? It can’t be! The attributes of protection and water resistance were clearly Fangxiao… Horford was a leather-specialized master after all, so he immediately understood the material of this cloak. His face was covered with unbelievable shock.

“How could you possibly make a leather cloak of quasi-legendary grade?” Horford muttered.

Arthur is also dual-specialized! Besides, he even made two pieces of quasi-legendary grade equipment continuously. How am I going to rival? Celine’s face at the audience seats looked pale. The feeling that everything was under control initially was instantly crushed and shattered.

The masters at the judges table marveled at this miraculous young man who was proficient in two specializations. He made two quasi-legendary grade equipment in a row, and he could almost be regarded as a senior master with two specializations.

However, most of the masters present were top notch, so they noticed that when Chen Rui was creating the quasi-legendary grade equipment, he entered a special state. In reality, he was still some distance from being a top master in terms of skill and understanding. However, there was no doubt about the huge potential of this young man today. It was only a matter of time for him to surpass the greatest mechanic, Nate in the Demon Realm if he continued to develop like this.

“The inspiration of this cloak comes from the star-like eyes of a woman…” Chen Rui said calmly. Looking at Horford, who was breathing heavily, Chen Rui reminded kindly, “It’s not time yet. You still have a chance.”

Horford glared at him fiercely, “You’re just a little better in status than me by fluke! Don’t be so proud. A quasi-legendary grade is still within the category of excellent grade! If you can create legendary grade equipment, I’ll admit defeat wholeheartedly.”

“Even for a top master, it’s difficult to make a true legendary grade equipment. Besides, it’s true that I happened to be in good shape, I haven’t really reached that top level.” Chen Rui’s words made many masters nod as compliments as he was able to see his flaws clearly. This alone was far better than the eliminated capital’s genius, Savice.

However, Chen Rui’s subsequent sentence surprised everyone, “Then, let me defeat you completely in another way.”

As he spoke, Chen Rui walked toward the workdesk again and took out a lot of instruments.

Seeing those instruments, the masters at the VIP seat were all shocked. The faces of almost all mechanics, masters, including savvy audiences, they looked disbelief.

Even Catherine the Great on the throne was slightly moved and the beautiful eyes behind the veil showed a radiant glow.

Master Xhosa was even more excited: Surely! These are the instruments for accessories specialization! During the mechanic certification, this guy even deliberately hid his strength and made a high grade magic ring! Chen Rui once obtained many esoteric magic arrays on the third and fourth floors of the ancient magic tower. He had cracked a lot of them. During these days in the refinery, he linked with the time rule several times for a hundred days to comprehend and experiment. In the two quasi-legendary grade equipment previously, it had been well practiced and verified.

Due to the seal, the fifth layer couldn’t be accessed. The ever-changing seal at the door seemed to contain endless mysteries. Even [Deep Analysis] couldn’t crack it. It could only analyze a very ambiguous feeling. That feeling was only the tip of the iceberg of the truth, and the truth couldn’t be seen completely.

Chen Rui, who had entered a state, couldn’t hear any surrounding noises, and he had forgotten about the previous victory or defeat. His mind was completely immersed into the crafting.

… the ice-cold royal sister, the younger sister who always smiles, the succubus who hides pain in her smile… No life is perfect as there are too many choices, too many expectations and helplessness. Joy and pain, happiness and troubles, are all intertwined.

Time will eventually calm the mind. When we look back, the long life is just a flash. Even if it’s only a moment, there is an eternity in my heart. It’s just like the annihilated stars in the universe, the glorious spark of their lives is enough to pause the time. At that moment, Chen Rui’s mind seemed to have entered an unprecedented state. The vague feeling of [Deep Analysis] became faintly clearer and produced a wonderful state of mind similar to that of enlightenment. It had nothing to do with the magic array or the inscriptions. The feeling was precious. It brought happiness to his mind internally.

The workdesk suddenly emitted a circle of strangely repulsive rays that spreaded out until more than 10 meters radius before it stopped. It constantly changed its color and shape. That scene made the masters at the VIP seats stand up and stare closely at Chen Rui who was at the center of the light. Precisely, they were staring at the string of accessories he was about to finish.

Horford stared blankly at the colorful workdesk with bitterness and shock on his face. This sign… is a legendary-grade equipment! Surely, this opponent’s accessories specialization is also master-level! Is trio-specialized not enough? He’s even creating a legendary-grade equipment? The entire arena was silent for a moment as everyone held their breath, getting ready to witness the birth of legendary-grade equipment.

The light faded away, and Chen Rui also awaked from that special state. All the audiences’ eyes were focused on the strange accessories with red rope.

The masters at the VIP table came down one after another and came to Chen Rui and the legendary grade accessories, which was a kind of etiquette and respect. That alone, without any certification, was enough for Chen Rui to be directly placed within the rank of well-known masters.

Name: “Momentary Glory, magic red string bracelet (First version in the Demon Realm).

Attributes: All magic attacks increased by 42%; casting speed increased by 35%; spirit recovery speed increased; additional magic: magic shield (can be triggered without magic power; limited to once every 24 hours).

The masters praised that this piece of equipment was excellent. It was the perfect weapon for mage， and it could even use a magic shield to save one’s life at a critical time.

Chen Rui was also very proud. It was his first legendary grade equipment which consumed a lot of his effort. However, the state he was in just now was precious. Even if his stamina and spirit was at its peak, he might not be able to create another legendary grade equipment.

The champion of the mechanic contest was certain. A newly certified mechanic created a miracle that shocked the entire Demon Realm. In the final, he created 2 quasi-legendary grade equipment and 1 legendary grade equipment. Besides, all three equipment were of different specializations!

Although there were many masters hidden among the commoners in the Demon Realm who didn’t pursue fame, a master who was proficient in the three specializations must be the one and only throughout Demon Realm.

In the mechanic’s field, there was once a saying that the top masters who were proficient in all three specializations were the ones who were most likely to enter the realm of grandmaster. However, due to personal understanding and energy constraints, those who could reach the level of top masters with two specializations were few, one example was the Demon Realm’s best mechanic master, Nate. Yet, Nate was only close to the level of grand master, but he was not a real grand master.

Besides, with 2 quasi-legendary grade equipment and 1 legendary-grade equipment, even if Nate came here in person, according to the rule of the master contest, he could only admit defeat.

This trio-specialized mechanic master, who was full of potential, “Arthur” must be the most promising candidate to be the first grand master for the past thousands of years!

At the audience seats, Kia stared at Chen Rui with a smile while he was surrounded by a group of masters, like million stars revolving around the moon. There was a sense of pride in her heart as if she could share this achievement. The most excited was Dior, and his excitement had reached the extreme. Trio-specialized master! He is indeed hiding his capabilities! In this way, my position as the family’s heir is unshakable! Compared with Falamo’s downcast face, Celine’s expression seemed very complicated: Arthur actually has such capabilities. No wonder he is so confident! However, in the courtyard the day before yesterday, he didn’t reject my request. According to his statement at the time, I still have a chance. Looking at Dior and Falamo, a murderous intention flashed past in the eyes of the cute girl.

“Congratulations, Master Arthur.” At the central throne of the VIP seat, an ethereal female voice sounded. It was Empress Catherine and the audience immediately silenced, “Your wonderful performance and the miracle you created have amazed all the audience, including me. I can give you three extra rewards. What do you want?”

Would he ask to see the noble lady he once met?

chapters.title: Chapter 260: Request
chapters.body:
Chapter 260: Request

A trio-specialized mechanic master would be a desired talent in any empire that definitely couldn’t be missed.

Right now, this person was just in front of her. Thus, as the first sage, Catherine the Great naturally wouldn’t let go of this opportunity.

Reward was just the first step.

Upon hearing Catherine’s promise of reward, Chen Rui’s first thought was to let Empress “reward” Christina to him, but that request was obviously impossible. Christina, which had been recognized by the artifact, Dark Shadow Cape, possessed Demon Emperor or even Demon Overlord-level strength, so she was definitely the next empress candidate.

Even if it was a grand master-level mechanic, Catherine wouldn’t agree to use the empire’s next empress as a bargaining chip. Therefore, that thought stayed as a thought.

Chen Rui bowed to Catherine, “Your Highness, I would like to know if you have requiem fruit and flower of mist?”

Katherine thought for a moment and replied, “I don’t have requiem fruit, but I can announce a commission for that nationwide. I do have a flower of mist, but it has withered. I only have three seeds left. I wonder if it’s good enough for master?”

“One seed is enough.” Chen Rui hesitated for a moment, clenched his teeth secretly and finally made up his mind to say, “I am entrusted to give something to the noblewoman, Christina, in person. This can be regarded as my third request as a reward. I hope Your Highness will allow.”

The eyes behind Catherine’s veil flickered and the surrounding atmosphere suddenly changed. Chen Rui felt that two cold, electrical eyes were staring at him and a faint pressure covered his entire body. Even with his current strength at Migrez state, he had a trembling feeling, and that was merely a glance at a long distance.

Chen Rui had a feeling that Catherine’s strength was far better than Earth Elemental King, which was also a Demon Overlord and even better than Glorfin Beelzebub!

After the cold electricity circled around him, it flew back and the pressure gradually dissipated. A pale yellow light flew over and floated in front of Chen Rui. The ethereal and strange voice of Catherine continued to sound, “As she made a mistake, Christina is thinking behind closed doors in the forbidden palace. She can’t meet anyone. However, since it’s a master’s request, I’ll make an exception for her to see master. Three days later, master can take this pass to the palace and someone will bring you to meet her naturally.”

“Thank you, Your Majesty!” Chen Rui was rejoiced. He took the pass and bowed once more at Empress Catherine. Although there’s still no news about the requiem fruit, the flower of mist is finally settled. As for the third condition… it was dangerous just now, but since Catherine promised three rewards in the presence of so many people as the empress, she would probably keep her promise. “Then, I’ll sincerely invite master to join the Mechanic Alliance of this empire now. Are you willing to accept this kindness?” Originally, Catherine planned to beat around the bushes and fancy him before slowly building rapport with the trio-specialized master. Yet, somehow, she suddenly changed her strategy and mentioned it directly.

Logically, the one who was the most suitable to make that invitation should be the president of the alliance, Master Anderson.

Chen Rui knew that joining the alliance didn’t have too many restrictions on his freedom, and he could even enjoy various privileges. Now that Catherine agreed with his meeting with Christina, and spoke publicly to this point, if he quitted, both the flower of mist and the meeting with Christina would probably be in vain. Therefore, he agreed immediately.

Catherine slightly nodded. When the audience at the scene saw that the trio-specialized master agreed to join the empire’s Mechanic Alliance, all of them responded with a warm applause.

Anderson, Rummenigge, Xhosa and other masters looked joyful except for Master Leo who smiled reluctantly. Among these masters, he was the only one who had grudges with Chen Rui. Yet, his strength and talents were obvious and Her Majesty personally invited him, so he would definitely be the most dazzling star in the mechanic field in the future. If he continued to be in a bad relationship with Chen Rui, he would probably have a bad life after.

The mechanic contest’s finals came to an end perfectly under a lot of attention. The incident of the first trio-specialized master in the past 10,000 years and the legendary grade equipment, “Momentary Glory” would quickly spread throughout the Demon Realm from the Dark Shadow Empire. That might be the beginning of a new generation of legends.

Chen Rui followed Master Anderson and others to the alliance’s office and received the robe and badge representing a master. The badge had a purple dual-moon sign with a gold rim, representing a special glory.

Chen Rui finally acquired Thunder Dragon Crystal and Star Frost, that he wanted the most. The materials for “Thunderous Sound” had finally been completed except auras. Out of the preferential treatment for the new trio-specialized master who joined the alliance, Chen Rui also received outstanding treatments like materials and black crystal coins as “benefits” every year, the right to purchase internal materials, discounts, and also access to the ancient magic tower to study.

What he had to do was to provide three pieces of quasi-legendary grade equipment or one piece of legendary grade equipment to the association for sales each year. 30% of the sales income would go to the association while the mechanic would take 70%.

This system of selling mechanic’s works was also the reason why the Mechanic Alliance had endured for decades. Despite the high price, the historical reputation and integrity of “everything made by the alliance must be excellent” had made the supply of masters’ works in short supply.

With the resources and services of the Mechanic Alliance, along with the status and treatment Chen Rui received, as long as he had enough aura, he could continue to gather materials to make “Thunderous Sound” or more equipment in the future. That was also one of the main reasons he considered joining the alliance back then.

Back in the Custer Family, Chen Rui received the best treatment and even the current patriarch, Croz came out to greet him despite being sick. Croz knew the weight of a trio-specialized mechanic master, and he was surprised and amazed by Dior’s vision and encounter.

Now, this master had a vast future both in the Mechanic Alliance, even the entire empire and even to the extent of the entire Demon Realm. The Custer Family originally started as mechanics, so the relationship with this master naturally shouldn’t be terminated with the end of the contest. They must maintain the initial cooperative relationship and tie the interests of the master with the Custer Family as much as possible. At the very least, it was necessary to maintain an extraordinary friendship.

As the biggest direct beneficiary, the eldest son of the Custer Family, would certainly be the heir. Dior was obviously spirited. Surely, as long as Croz didn’t pass him the heavy responsibility of the family, Dior was just an heir, but not the actual master of the family. Moreover, with Chen Rui’s current reputation, Dior couldn’t turn his face. Therefore, he showed an extremely close attitude, and he was being very attentive to the master.

After learning that Master “Arthur” was with the Custer Family in the inner city, there were endless nobles and officials that came to visit. Croz was clearly happy. He showed the “intimate” relationship between the Custer Family and the master. Chen Rui also seemed patient. It seemed that being a celebrity wasn’t easy.

Kia seemed to be avoiding the topic they were talking about before the final. She didn’t tell him what he wanted to know. Chen Rui knew that she was moved, so he shouldn’t force her too tightly at once. It was better to wait as the time matured.

In the afternoon the day before heading to the palace to meet Christina, an unexpected person came to Chen Rui, the third lady of the Custer Family, Celine.

Kia was chatting with Chen Rui. When she saw Celine coming, she made an excuse and went to rest in the room. Celine had a sweet smile on her face which seemed like she didn’t care about the loss today.

Chen Rui smiled, “I wonder what advice the third lady is giving for coming here?”

“I don’t have any advice. I’m just a loser. Now, I’ve attracted my first and second brother’s attention, and I can’t even hide myself anymore.” Celine sighed, “Initially, I thought that Horford can win confidently, but I didn’t expect to encounter such an outstanding character like master. I can only say that I have really bad luck.”

“Where is Master Horford?”

“As a dual-specialized master, logically speaking, he will be valued by all parties. Yet, he has been overshadowed by you now and he feels uninterested, so he left early.” Celine said with a smile, “I’m surrendering myself to master now as a loser. You can do whatever you want, master…”

Chen Rui took a glance at the snow-white plumpness at the open neckline and said calmly, “Go straight to the point.”

“It seems that I’m still inferior to Kia afterall.” Celine glanced at him grievously, “I came, the first thing I want is to admit defeat to master. The second thing is to ask if master’s previous promise is still valid?”

“Where’s Old Gauss?” Chen Rui knew Celine was referring to the promise of supporting her to control the family. but he didn’t reply directly.

“I’ve got news. Someone found Old Gauss in a house in the southern suburbs. If master wants to look for him, I can lead the way.” Celine’s eyes rolled, “I heard that he seems to have eaten something that shouldn’t be eaten, so he has been unconscious. That’s probably why he disappeared.”

“Really?” Chen Rui didn’t expose her and went along her tone instead to ask, “Then, when he wakes up, there should be no other problems right?”

“I think there shouldn’t be a problem. I’ve already found Old Gauss that master wants which is enough to prove my sincerity. Then, master’s promise the night before… ”

“You’re ambitious and capable at the same time. You’re more suitable to control the Custer Family than Dior and Falamo.” Chen Rui’s words brightened Celine’s eyes, “However, ambition is a double-edged sword. I’m worried that this sword will harm myself.”

Celine definitely deserved the evaluation that “don’t judge a book by its cover”. For benefit, she could pay all costs, including her own body. However, from another perspective, Celine had the courage, wisdom and means, which was far better than her two brothers. She should be the best candidate as the heir.

Even though Dior was pleasing Chen Rui now, he also had the thought of betraying after reaching his goal.

Currently, Chen Rui’s God-Eating Mask could still control another person, so he could use it on Celine or Dior. However, the God-Eating Mask also had a tiny shortcoming. The puppet created by God-Eating Mask could live as usual, obeying the master absolutely. Yet, the puppets’ mentality would be affected. It could only apply to a fixed mode of life. Unless under master’s control, the puppet couldn’t use its brain flexibly to work. Snowden at the Red Spirit Estate was an example.

Besides, the puppet was irreversible. After becoming a puppet, unless it died, it would never get rid of it.

The Leviathan Royal Family’s [Soul Shackles] didn’t have defects like the mask. The intelligence of the afflicted person would be intact, but their strength and soul would be imprisoned, increasing the difficulty of breaking through. For example, Delia, whose initial strength was even higher than Roman, had been stuck at the peak of Demon King. She was now caught up by Roman. Only under the effect of poison dragon’s special training and Aurora Frost, could she have the chance of advancing to Great Demon King. However, each time the person afflicted by [Soul Shackles] broke through, the shackles’ restraining power would be weakened a lot. Once her strength exceeded the [Soul Shackles]’s caster, the shackles would be ineffective.

Both [Soul Shackles] and God-Eating Mask could only be used on people with lower strength as compared to the users. In contrast, the most appropriate method of control was the master-slave contract. Both the mind and strength wouldn’t be affected, and there was no limit on the difference in strength. The master could end the servant’s life at any time by paying a certain price (directly killing could be done without paying a price). Besides, when the master was dead, the servant would die too.

The master-servant contract generally required the consent of both parties (could also be forced to surrender). Besides, everyone could only carry one contract in their body so many people had recruited servants earlier to prevent certain accidents.

The Custer Family was the top business family. The controller must have flexible minds and means. Chen Rui needed a person who could truly manage and grow the Custer Family and be of use for him and the Dark Moon. If he used the God-Eating Mask, he had to stay here to control. Otherwise, if he left, relying on the puppet’s mind alone wouldn’t work.

“If Ms. Celine can save me from the worries of the future, I can help and support you to be the head of the family. You also know that with my current reputation and my position in the Mechanic Alliance, even if you don’t kill your two brothers, as long as I make a statement, your father is also likely to change his mind.”

“Am I not trustworthy enough after I’ve become your wife?” Celine frowned.

“What do you think?” Chen Rui asked in return. Celine could kill her brother, then put the blame on another brother; she could secretly make Old Gauss disappear; she could send someone to assassinate Chen Rui on the street; she could or use her own body as the bargaining chip for the position as the head of the family. If it was a marriage based solely on interests, it was obviously unreliable.

“Isn’t this a challenge for you, master?” Celine smiled as she said with a double-meaning, “I will be the master’s most loyal wife and slave as long as master can conquer me.”

Chen Rui wasn’t interested in the so-called conquest at all, so he didn’t want to waste effort on that. He nodded and said, “I like the word “servant.”

“This joke isn’t funny.” Celine’s light red pupil showed a hint of chillness. It was one thing to offer her body but it was another thing to offer her soul. She still had great ambitions and it might not end with the Custer family. How would she be willing to be a slave to others and be controlled by someone eternally. Besides, this “Arthur” was just a mechanic master.

Now that Old Gauss hadn’t been rescued, Chen Rui didn’t want to turn his face immediately, so he smiled slightly, “Since it’s a joke, why are you being serious? However, the issue of trust is the key to our cooperation, but I’ve tested your sincerity.”

“Let’s do it this way. I’ll visit Old Gauss first. Then, I’ll discuss and solve the most critical trust issue in our cooperation.”

Celine’s smile returned to her face, “There are too many people visiting master now. Let’s go out from the side door when it’s darker.”

Would Celine have another to force Chen Rui to be her servant?

chapters.title: Chapter 261: Sisters?
chapters.body:
Chapter 261: Sisters?

In the evening, there were several single figures at the side door of the Custer Family’s residence.

Chen Rui wanted to go alone, but after Kia knew, she was worried about his safety and insisted on going together.

“After the Custer Family’s affair is completed, I’ll return to the Dark Moon. If you really like me and want the best for me, don’t look for me.”

“The Dark Shadow Empire isn’t safe. I think you should go to the Bloody Empire and get support directly from the Demon Realm’s strongest man, Raizen the Great. With your skills and reputation, you’ll definitely be valued by Emperor Raizen. Don’t ask why. I won’t harm you.”

Chen Rui, who was sitting in the carriage, was frowning as he thought about what Kia said to him just now along the way.

What is Kia signing? Dark Shadow Empire isn’t safe, and I should go to the Bloody Empire? This kind reminder is also a refusal to confess something. She still intends to return to Dark Moon. Then, Dark Moon must be the location of her mission, and she is likely under certain control. “We’re here.” Celine’s words interrupted Chen Rui’s thoughts. The carriage stopped, and they had already reached the southern suburbs.

The three of them walked off the carriage and walked a long way. They saw a large house surrounded by walls at a hillside in front of them. This should be the place that Old Gauss “slept” as mentioned by Celine.

The place was relatively remote which was probably one of Celine’s secret bases. No wonder no one found out.

The house was getting closer and closer. Under the moonlight, the guard at the door could already be seen. It was a woman.

Kia could clearly see the woman’s appearance. Her body suddenly stiffened, and she grasped Chen Rui’s hand. Chen Rui was taken aback for the heavy strength Kia used. Besides, from her hand, he could feel that her entire body was shaking as if she saw something terrifying.

Kia’s finger moved, writing forcefully at his palm: Run! At that time, the guard entered the scope of [Analytical Eyes] that Chen Rui activated. Race: Great Demon (Mutated); Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C-.

A Guard at the early stage of Demon King? With Chen Rui’s current strength, Demon King wasn’t anything, but Kia’s reaction… Does she know this guard? Chen Rui thought about it and immediately said, “Wait, Ms. Celine, I suddenly remembered that I left something important at the alternative residence. Can we go back to take it first?”

“What is it?” Celine looked at Chen Rui with a smile, “I’ll ask someone to get it for master.”

Celine’s strange smile made Chen Rui feel even strongly that something was wrong. It is indeed a trap. At that moment, another strange woman’s voice sounded.

“Since you’re already here, are you still trying to escape?”

Chen Rui felt that Kia’s hand trembled again. She seemed to be familiar with the voice, and she was very scared.

The thin mist in front suddenly became thicker while a few figures condensed which gradually became clearer.

Their leader was a young woman in her 20s; she had blue hair and eyes. Race: Envy Royal Family Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C+. Physique: C; Strength: C; Spirit: C+; Agility: C+.

The Leviathan girl is at the peak of Demon King! Why is Kia so scared? Behind the girl was a tall, bulky woman who was actually a Great Demon King. Race: Gluttony Royal Family; Comprehensive Strength Assessment: B-. Physique: B-; Strength: B-, Spirit: B-; Agility: B-.

There were also several mutated Great Demon, which were all between early to middle stage Demon King. They were all women. Celine walked over and stood behind these people; she was obviously part of the gang.

Chen Rui’s eyes narrowed slightly. Gluttony Royal Family! Other than Glorfin, it’s my first time encountering another Beelzebub Royal Family. Besides, she is even together with the Envy Royal Family!

“Look at who this is? So surprising.” The blue-eyed girl looked beautiful, but her tone seemed contemptuous and nasty, “It really is you, Kia.”

Kia let go of Chen Rui’s hand and lowered her head, “Ms. Fatilu.”

“I heard from Celine that Master Arthur was fascinated by a succubus named Kia, but I didn’t expect it to really be you.” Fatilu’s eyes turned cold, “That being said, you shouldn’t appear in the Dark Shadow Empire right? You’re so bold to actually leave there without permission.”

“I’m sorry, Ms. Fatilu, I was only temporarily brought to the Dark Shadow Empire, and I didn’t have any time to report it. Please forgive me.” Kia lowered her head and said with a begging tone.

Chen Rui could tell that Fatilu must be related to Kia’s secret. Also, her position was much higher than Kia. They were probably from the same closed, secret organization. He replied immediately, “Ms. Fatilu, for you to lure me here using Celine, it isn’t just to gather with your old mates right?”

“This must be Master Arthur.” Fatilu smiled, “Master is in the limelight this time and your name is popular throughout the entire Demon Realm. Even Master Horford, who I specially invited, isn’t comparable to you. Unfortunately, the rise of master ruined a little plan of mine. So, I came here deliberately this time to take a glimpse of the trio-specialized master’s glory.”

Chen Rui had a sudden realization. It turns out that there is such a force behind Celine. No wonder she could find a dual-specialized master like Horford! The “ruined plan” that Fatilu mentioned must be similar to Princess Royal, Shea’s plan. It was to use Celine to control the top business family in the Dark Shadow Empire to achieve a certain purpose of this organization. Kia from Dark Moon, the dual-specialized master Horford who was probably the disciple of Nate, the best mechanic master in the Demon Realm (information obtained from the Mechanic Alliance), Celine from the Custer family… These elements are just the tip of the iceberg. It seems that this force isn’t simple. With the control of such a force, Celine can ascend as the head of family even without relying on me. The reason why I’m lured here must be for the title of trio-specialized mechanic master. “I don’t have any glory to look at. Sorry to disappoint you, Ms. Fatilu.” Chen Rui glanced at Celine, “Ms. Celine must’ve reported all my information to Ms. Fatilu. I don’t like beating around the bushes. Let’s get straight to the point.”

“Master is truly a straightforward person. Then, I’ll go straight to the point.” Fatilu nodded, “I want to invite master to a place as a guest. I hope master can agree.”

Chen Rui shrugged, “If I don’t agree, will you “help” me agree?”

“Master is really an interesting person.” Fatilu laughed politely, “Rest assured, master. I have absolutely no bad intentions. Perhaps, master might even receive many unexpected benefits.”

“Fine.” Chen Rui sighed, “I have a condition. I’ll go with you alone, but you have to let Kia and Old Gauss in the house leave.”

“Did master really fall in love with this cheap woman?” Fatilu smiled more coldly, “You’re actually willing to exchange her with yourself?”

Kia shuddered. When Chen Rui heard Fatilu’s insults against Kia, he frowned, “It’s just that I have my own plan. This request shouldn’t be too much right?”

“It’s not too much. However, I don’t agree.” Fatilu said coldly, “Master, don’t forget that you don’t have the right to request. As for this lowly succubus… since young, she is only qualified to lick my shoes. Don’t you think so? My… elder sister?”

Chen Rui was shocked. Kia is actually Fatilu’s sister! Fatilu was a Leviathan Royal Family while Kia was a succubus. In other words, Kia’s father should be a Leviathan Royal Family while her mother was a succubus. Since Demon Realm had no mixed blood, the children would be the race of either parent. Therefore, Kia and Fatilu weren’t of the same race.

Even if they are different races, Fatilu’s words and behaviors are too much since they are still blood-related sisters afterall! Kia is likely to be bullied by Fatilu since young, so she is so scared. Kia was still lowering her head and said nothing.

“Peasant, isn’t it?” Fatilu screamed aggressively, “Answer me in front of master!”

“Yes, Ms. Fatilu.” Kia nodded with a blank face.

One was “peasant” and the other was “miss”. He could tell from their appellations. Are they still sisters? A little chillness appeared in Chen Rui’s eyes.

Fatilu’s eyes became even fiercer. Ever since she could remember, the concept of elder sister in her mind was “lowly”. Whatever Kia liked, even a stone, she would ruthlessly destroy it.

After witnessing Arthur’s feelings for Kia with her own eyes, she couldn’t stand it. Why did the Demon Realm’s only trio-specialized genius master fancy that lowly succubus?! What she wanted to do now was to humiliate this bitch and destroy the dignity of her elder sister in front of master. She wanted to destroy the image of this peasant in the master’s mind and made Arthur completely disappointed at Kia.

Fatilu’s brutal smile made her beautiful face distorted, “ Pew! ” She spat on the ground and said wickedly, “Then, crawl like a bitch and lick it clean now!”

Kia’s body was trembling slightly. The corner of her mouth was already bleeding from her bites, but she didn’t move.

Behind Fatilu, the Great Demon King woman from the Beelzebub Royal Family looked like a subordinate, but she didn’t stop nor convince Fatilu. Instead, like all the other people, she looked like she was gloating. She was even smirking, seemingly used to the situation.

Fatilu smiled creepily, “If you don’t lick, then I’ll have your lowly mother do the same.”

It turns out that Fatilu and Kia have different mothers! Chen Rui finally understood and the coldness in his eyes had turned into murderousness.

Hearing Fatiro’s threat, Kia shuddered again. She squeezed her fist, struggled for a while in her heart and finally bent down slowly. Suddenly, her body was stopped as she was pulled by someone.

Feeling Chen Rui’s undisguised murderous intention, Kia was startled and quickly pulled his hand, indicating that he shouldn’t be impulsive.

That detail fell into Fatilu’s eyes and her heart was filled with even more jealousy. She sneered, “Master, I advise you not to act rashly. You haven’t figured out the difference in strength…”

At that moment, the Great Demon King-level Beelzebub woman behind suddenly looked triggered and stepped to the front of Fatilu.

Immediately after, Fatilu felt a horrifying murderous intention coming toward her. Then, two figures suddenly collided in front of her eyes. As they met and separated, everything was vague. Messy clashing noises sounded continuously, and the ground also couldn’t stop trembling.

The two figures were separated again. It was her most powerful guard, Tapuli that actually had a blade wound on her face that slowly dripped fresh blood. The scary murderousness from the opposite was getting stronger. The mechanic master didn’t have any weapons. However, his hand gleamed faintly and emitted a terrifying sharpness like a godly weapon.

There was an indescribable shock in Fatilu’s heart: Tapuli is an elite under my father, a Great Demon King powerhouse that is proficient in both magic and physical. No matter how genius this guy is, he’s just a master who devotes himself to the study of mechanics. Yet, he can actually suppress Tapuli! Kia was also stunned. Initially, she was worried that this man couldn’t get away. Now, it seemed that her worry was for nothing. Celine was the most frightened among them. She wanted to lure Arthur here and defeat this mechanic master without failure with the extraordinary strength of Fatilu’s party. Yet, she never expected this would be the case!

“Ms. Fatilu! Be careful!” The breath from Tapuli’s body was soaring. She shouted, “He is a Great Demon King, and his combat power is shocking!”

Tapuli’s words made Fatilu shivered: A Great Demon King, and he is even being described to have “shocking” combat power by someone as strong as Tapuli? At once, Fatilu couldn’t bother humiliating Kia. She quickly stepped back under the protection of several Demon King-level guards.

Chen Rui’s eyes flashed like a sharp blade. With several punches, he knocked Tapuli back and took advantage of the momentum to pounce toward Fatilu.

Tapuli was shaken back. Seeing that she could stop him, she waved her hand and a lightning struck Chen Rui’s back, trying to stop his action.

Unexpectedly, Chen Rui only flicked a little and didn’t seem to be greatly affected. He continued to pounce toward Fatilu without losing speed.

After he was promoted to Migrez state, the passive characteristic, [Anti-Magic] could reduce magic damage. Together with the initial [Damage Absorption] that reduced 30% of damage, the damage of the lightning was reduced to the minimal. It couldn’t produce the expected effect.

The few Demon King guards noticed the situation was bad, so they ignited their amplification flame and rushed toward Chen Rui recklessly.

The scene where Fatilu threatened and insulted Kia while everyone laughed just now appeared in Chen Rui’s mind. Although he didn’t like to hurt women, he was determined to take the lives of these people now, so he was merciless. Wherever the [Aura Blade] went, the guards’ blood splattered before they got close.

In the blink of an eye, the five guards were all eliminated.

Demon King-level strength was nothing in the face of the fierce attack from Great Demon King.

Yet, the guards’ obstruction still played a role. Tapuli who came to aid had arrived. She cast Beelzebub Royal Family’s talent – [Decelerate]. Chen Rui’s action was suddenly slowed, but he was still faster than Tapuli’s expectation.

Fatilu was at the peak of Demon King after all. Besides, she was a Leviathan Royal Family. Her right eye immediately glowed with a faint dark light. Chen Rui felt his movement was paused as if the air around him was frozen.

That trick was called [Space Compression], a controlling skill of [Eye of Incubus]. He experienced it a few times during training from Delia, so he didn’t panic. He gathered his strength slightly and exploded to burst out of the [Eye of Incubus]’s constraint forcefully.

Fatilu screamed as if she was struck by thunder. Blood was flowing out of her right eye.

Could Kia be the spy sent by the Bloody Empire? Would Kia tell Chen Rui everything after this fight?

chapters.title: Chapter 262: Killing And Spiritual Link
chapters.body:
Chapter 262: Killing And Spiritual Link

Seeing that Fatilu’s [Eye of Incubus] was immediately broken, Tapuli was secretly shocked. In the previous rounds, she tried earth and air magic and they had little effect on Chen Rui. So, she immediately changed her strategy and attacked physically.

Chen Rui waved his hand and Tapuli immediately felt that her speed had slowed: Earth magic, [Decelerate]! The effect of [Decelerate] is even stronger than I who have [Earth Mastery]! Fatilu knew it was the brink of life and death, she couldn’t bother about the pain in her right eye. She activated her [Water Mastery] and dozens of sharp ice cones appeared around her that flew toward Chen Rui.

Chen Rui pointed to the ground. Then, Fatilu and Tapuli felt that their bodies had become several times heavier simultaneously. The ice cones were affected by the suddenly increased gravity and fell to the ground before they reached Chen Rui.

He can even cast [Gravity] without chanting! Proficient in both magic and physical! Is he still a mechanic master? Tapuli was even more surprised. She barely resisted the increased gravity and cast [Stone Skin] on Fatilu to strengthen her defense.

Fatilu waved her hands with difficulty, and there was a circle of transparent crystals around her which criss-crossed to form a barrier around her.

[Crystal Wall] – the strongest defensive water magic, also the highest tier magic that Fatilu’s [Water Mastery] could cast.

Fatilu wasn’t stupid. She understood that her [Eye of Incubus] was severely damaged, so she could only use defensive measures. Now, her only hope was that Tapuli could defeat or repel this terrifying enemy. At least Tapuli must be able to take her to escape.

Chen Rui ignored Tapuli and punched the crystal wall. [Crystal Wall] was indeed the strongest defensive water magic. Together with Leviathan Royal Family’s [Water Mastery], although Chen Rui’s strength was much higher, that blow could only shake the [Crystal Wall] a little. It only created a few cracks.

Chen Rui turned his palm into a blade and with a single blow, the outer layer of the [Crystal Wall] was divided into two. Although Fatilu continued to reinforce it with magic desperately, another concentrated two blows at most could collapse the [Crystal Wall].

At this moment, Chen Rui suddenly frowned and appeared in front of Kia instantly, parrying the [Magic Fist] sent by Tapuli at the last moment. It must be said that Tapuli’s strategy of attacking Kia to save Fetilu was quite effective, at least it temporarily saved Fatuli from danger.

Growing up, Fatilu had always been under the wings of her mother and had developed an arrogant, bossy attitude from an early age. Even if she was on a mission, she was also protected by Tapuli. Thus, she had never experienced such danger, and she almost cried. Seeing Chen Rui saved Kia again, the jealousy and hatred in her heart grew stronger. She shouted, “Tapuli, kill that lowly woman!”

“Ms. Fatilu, I’ll block him. Run away first!” Obviously, Tapuli wouldn’t really kill Kia. Otherwise, Chen Rui could attack Fatilu without scruples. Beside, she vaguely felt that she couldn’t rival this man. So, she made Fatilu flee first. If the situation was bad, she could still attack Kia to drag the opponent.

Certainly, Chen Rui wouldn’t let Tapuli’s attempt succeed. He sneered with his five fingers spread out. Suddenly, a white light dazzled and a huge white light ball whistled as it rushed toward Tapuli.

Tapri felt the horrifying destructive power of that light ball. Due to the lasting effect of [Decelerate], she didn’t dare to take it directly. Thus, she opened her mouth and a white mist rolled toward the light ball. [Aurora Shot] suddenly slowed down and became slower at a speed that was visible to the naked eye. Finally, it disappeared within the white gas – Beelzebub Royal Family’s bloodline talent: [Devour]!
