However, the power of [Aurora Shot] was very strong. Tapri took a lot of effort to devour it before the [Aurora Shot] exploded, and she couldn’t transform it into her own power immediately. While her energy was exhausted and hadn’t recovered, Chen Rui’s figure appeared in front of her again instantly.

Tapuli was taken aback as she thought she had already prepared for her opponent’s attack, but she didn’t expect her opponent could teleport continuously. What was more was it was at that critical point. The blade-like palm struck toward her head. Hurriedly, Tapuli could only move her head slightly to the side. Yet, eventually her movement was too slow and her right arm was cut off from her shoulder.

That heavy blow made Tapuri scream in pain. Enduring the pain, she leapt and pulled a distance. When she was about to land, another huge white light ball appeared and gushed toward her again.

Tapuli was no longer able to use [Devour], so she had to try her best to parry it with one arm. Upon touching the light ball, her body immediately trembled and a large amount of blood spewed from the broken arm while her feet were being pushed back slowly.

While Tapuli tried her best to resist the light ball, she suddenly felt that the pressure had doubled. Subsequently, it increased several times continuously. It turned out that when she was parrying the light ball forcefully, Chen Rui sent three more in a row, which layered together. So, the power wasn’t as simple as fourfolds.

The terrifying pressure collapsed Tapuli’s defense in an instant. After the dazzling white light dissipated, a huge impact field appeared on the ground and caused a scary distortion that extended for dozens of meters. Tapuli fell to the ground. Her full-bodied armor had shattered, and her white bones could be seen among her wound, but she still hadn’t died.

With her unclear vision, she faintly saw the man’s approaching figure and the high raised hand. Tapuli was regretful as she still hadn’t used her ultimate move. Just now, this opponent took advantage when she protected Fatilu, suppressing her heavily. The most critical thing was that continuous [Teleportation] caught her off guard. As a result, before she could use her greatest strength, her opponent had seized the opportunity to launch a fatal blow. If she could fight again…

Chen Rui didn’t give Tapuli a chance to realize her ideal. With his hands moving from up to down, Tapuli was beheaded.

Battle wasn’t a performance or a turn-based game where you’d hit me once and I’ll hit you once; you’d use a deadly move, then I’ll use a deadly move.

The most effective method in the battle of life and death was to knock down the enemy.

Speaking of skills, Tapuli couldn’t compare either because Chen Rui still had a lot of skills that he hadn’t used.

Fatilu knew things were bad when Tapuli’s arm was cut off, so she removed her crystal wall and escaped. However, before she ran far, she felt a gust of wind blow past. Then, her neck was tightened as it was pinched by a clamp-like hand, and her moving figure came to an abrupt stop.

The terrifying power on that hand made her unable to produce any form of resistance. She felt like she was suffocating.

Despite Fatilu’s beautiful appearance, Chen Rui didn’t feel like he should appreciate beauty. Instead, he only felt disgust. When he was about to break her neck forcefully, Kia suddenly screamed, “No! Please!”

Chen Rui hesitated for a moment, withdrew the power on his hand and slowly put Fatilu down.

Fatilu felt that she just made a U-turn from death. Her forehead was filled with cold sweat. Although she hated Kia and Chen Rui a lot in her heart, she didn’t dare to reveal it. She was just thinking about how to get out, then find someone to avenge by crushing this couple into pieces.

Chen Rui certainly knew her thoughts. So, after a sneer, Fatilu felt a pain at the back of her neck and fell unconscious. After making Fatilu faint, he set his sight on the astonished Celine, the third lady of the Custer Family that lured two of them into the trap. After witnessing Chen Rui’s decisive means of killing, she couldn’t keep her usual calmness and thoughts. Although she kept telling herself to run away, her feet were trembling, and she couldn’t take a step.

“Ms. Celine, let’s return to the topic in the afternoon now…” Chen Rui walked slowly, as if every step was stomping on her heart, “Surrender or die. You can only choose one.”

Celine, who didn’t dared to breath, took a few huge gasps and finally calmed down forcefully. Although her opponent’s tone was calm, the horrifying figure that harvested the life of Demon King and Great Demon King powerhouses just now was stuck in her mind like a nightmare. It was extremely fearful, and that multiple-choice question sounded like it was going to take her life in her ears.

Celine didn’t hesitate any more. She clenched her fist and spurted blood from her mouth. Obviously, she forcibly cut off the original master-servant agreement she had and killed a servant. Then, she knelt down on one knee and a mysterious rune appeared in her hand which was a master-servant contract.

“Bold! As your master, I can guarantee that the Custer Family will grow unprecedentedly in your hands.” As Chen Rui spoke, he accepted the master-servant contract. A new notification suddenly appeared in his status bar: Found a new spiritual link. Activate the spiritual link system?

After confirming the activation, a small plan appeared, showing icons and names. He focused his consciousness on it, and there were even annotations.

1. Equal links (1/4): Name: Paglio. Race: Dragon. A-level link: life sharing, cause no harm to each other, function enhancement. Annotation: removable (Evolution Star level isn’t met currently).

Chen Rui felt sarcastic about that “function enhancement”. Why euphemizing it? Isn’t it just having a long-lasting sex drive like the dragon? The annotation at the end caught Chen Rui’s attention. If my Star Evolution reaches a certain level, I can remove the symbiotic contract with Paglio?

2. Master-Servant link (7/12). Annotation: B-level link (removable; required 10,000 aura)

Slee, imp.

Dodo, slime (Mutated).

Tim, Great Demon (Mutated).

Royce, Great Demon.

Arux, Great Demon (Mutated).

Vasasha, Great Demon.

Celine, Great Demon (Mutated).

3. Puppet Link (1/2). Annotation: C-level link (Irremovable)

Snowden, Great Demon (Mutated).

It seemed that the master-servant contract could be removed now, but Chen Rui definitely wouldn’t do it at present.

The so-called spiritual link system was a schematic diagram and mental control of the contract. The 4 and 12 represented the maximum limit. Equal contract could be signed with four people; the master-servant contract was twelve. Other than the puppet of the God-Eating Mask was fixed at two pax, the remaining upper limit should be able to increase with Star Evolution.

A notification came again: Star Evolution is too low to enable link enhancement. This is a new term. Unfortunately, my Star Evolution is too low to use it. It’s probably a function that can benefit each other through spiritual links. The spiritual contracts meant that Chen Rui could also make a “contract”. Certainly, only the equal contract had practical value. It was obviously impossible for him to offer a master-servant contract to others.

Chen Rui retreated from the Super System, picked up Fatilo, ordered Celine to dispose of the corpses and went to the big house to carry Old Gauss out. He said to Kia, “Let’s go, we must have a proper discussion after we go back.”

Wait… was he purposely building a Great Demon army?

chapters.title: Chapter 263: Truth! A Succubus Who Cried With A Smile
chapters.body:
Chapter 263: Truth! A Succubus Who Cried With A Smile

Although the commotion was huge, the coachman brought by Celine was her aide, so he naturally knew what he should be curious about and what not. Even if Celine came back with a person on her back, he didn’t ask much and drove the carriage straight into the city.

Celine’s work was very well done. The guard at the side door of the Custer Family’s residence should also be hers. Although it was getting late, he didn’t say anything and let them in. He even helped them to check if anyone was around carefully.

Back in the courtyard, Chen Rui asked Celine, “How long will it take for Old Gauss to wake up?”

“In normal condition, it’ll take three days.” Celine, who had signed the master-servant contract, reverently replied, “If master wants him to wake up now, there is also a way.”

“It’s okay. Let him sleep like that first.” Chen Rui thought for a while and said, “You can go to rest first. Do whatever you see fit for the heir’s position. I can support you to the maximum extent both above and under the surface.”

“Thank you, master.” Although things were very different from her expectectation, Celine’s ultimate goal was still her family. Moreover, her current master wasn’t only a trio-specialized mechanic master, but also hid the strength of Great Demon King and amazing combat power. It wasn’t impossible for him to become a Demon Emperor or even a Demon Overlord in the future. Reliance and obedience to the strong were common in the Demon Realm. Besides, the master-servant contract was irreversible, so Celine naturally dared not to have any scheme.

After Celine left, Chen Rui settled the unconscious Old Gauss and Fatilu, then he brought Kia along to take a seat.

“Kia, don’t you want to say something?”

Kia no longer had the usual smile on her face, but there was only panic and nervousness. She lowered her head and said after a long time, “I’m sorry.”

“You once advised me to leave the Dark Shadow Empire and go to the Bloody Empire.” Chen Rui frowned, “In other words, the organization that controls you has spread to many levels in the Dark Shadow Empire? The Custer Family is only a small piece that Fatilu is responsible for. Am I right?”

Kia bit her lip and was about to speak, but she was interrupted by Chen Rui, “No need to apologize. I know you’re doing it for me. Otherwise, you won’t advise me to leave. Based on the current situation, if you still want to hide, then it isn’t helping me but harming me. The force behind you must be quite powerful. Do you want to see me disappear or die unexplained?”

Kia’s eyes were red, but she didn’t make a sound. Her thin shoulders were trembling like a shuddering tiny flower in the storm which might be blown away by the storm at any time. Such unprecedented weakness and helplessness didn’t seem like the charming maid in the Dark Moon Estate at all.

“Can… borrow your shoulder for a while?” Kia finally spoke while shivering.

Chen Rui sighed and felt pity in his heart. He held her in his arms. This time, he really wasn’t scheming.

From the endured whimpering, to crying uncontrollably after. For the first time, she was so painful in the arms of a man. The man wasn’t handsome, and he could even be regarded as ugly, but his embrace was warm that gave her a peace of mind.

For so many years, this was the first time she had vented. The clothes on Chen Rui’s chest were soaked. All he could do was hugging this beautiful body. There were no perverted thoughts in his heart; there was only strong sympathy.

If Shea was burying all her emotions in her cold expressionless face, then Kia was using a smile to suppress all the pain – she was smiling to cry.

The more charming she smiled, the more painful she cried.

The succubus described by the terrestrial world was a cunning, chaotic, evil witch who used her body and charm to lure the believers of light to fall. Some adjectives were indeed true, but the women who used their body and charm in the terrestrial world weren’t inferior to the succubus. From a certain perspective, darkness and light were relative. Darkness was a dimmed light while light was a dazzling darkness.

After venting the pain in her heart with tears, the succubus’s hoarse voice sounded intermittently.

“My mother is a succubus while my father… is a Beelzebub Royal Family.”

Chen Rui was shocked. My previous prediction is actually wrong. Kia’s father isn’t Leviathan but Beelzebub Royal Family! “Initially, my mother was just a maid, but she was defiled by my father… then, she was pregnant with me. My devour physique should be inherited from the Beelzebub Royal Family’s [Devour] talent. Unfortunately, I’m not a Beelzebub Royal Family but a succubus. If I was born with the bloodline of Beelzebub, my mother’s life won’t be so tragic…”

“… Fatilu’s mother, Sabrina, was married to my father later and became the main wife. My mother and I were often tortured and abused by her… After she gave birth to Fatilu, she cast [Soul Shackles] on my mom and I, so we’ve become their slaves, living a life worse than dying…”

“… Back in the years when Glorfin, the king of Beelzebub, was defeated by the Lord of Midnight Sun, his whereabouts with the artifact, God-Eating Mask are unknown. I was sent to the Dark Moon to collect relevant information and try to find the fragment of the God-Eating Mask…”

“… The Beelzebub incident occurred in the royal palace. It was said that the artifact fragment was obtained by a Beelzebub Royal Family with the main body of God-Eating Mask, but I haven’t received any news…”

Chen Rui finally understood and those mysteries in his heart were solved one by one.

Kia’s devouring physique turned out to be inherited from her Beelzebub father. Also, her and her mother’s life were very tragic. They were even controlled by Sabrina’s [Soul Shackles]. Her purpose in lurking in the Dark Moon was to find out the whereabouts of Glorfin and the God-Eating Mask.

There wasn’t mixed blood in the Demon Realm. Kia’s mother came from a low status, and she even gave birth to a succubus girl. That was why Kia’s status in the “family” was extremely low. Even her father never treated her as a daughter. He even let Sabrina cast [Soul Shackles] to control and torture Kia’s mother and her.

“My father is ambitious. He has always wanted to recover the glory of the Beelzebub Royal Family. You are a trio-specialized mechanic master without a strong background. He definitely wouldn’t let go of such an elite talent. That’s why I advised you to go to Emperor Raizen. It’s just I didn’t expect them to come so soon.”

Chen Rui gently stroked the curved horn on her head, “Kia, you said that the Dark Shadow Empire isn’t safe, is your father in the Dark Shadow Empire?”

“I don’t know where he is either. I only report to his men in the Dark Moon through the magic communication talisman every one or two months. He almost never sees me. Maybe he has forgotten this daughter and only remembers he has a tool called Kia. If it weren’t for my devouring physique, I’m afraid I’d become some sort of sexual bargaining chip now.” Kia laughed pitifully while her body trembled.

“Actually… my life being a spy at the Dark Moon is the easiest. I don’t have to run around and use my charm to seduce people like before. I don’t have to be tortured by Sabrina and her daughter… Besides, the little princess and human treat me very well. They’re just like my friends…”

The little princess is still fine. As for the human… he seems to be deceiving you right now. However, I can’t reveal my identity for now. Chen Rui sighed, “So, you want to continue to return to the Dark Moon?”

“I have [Soul Shackles] on me, so I can’t get rid of the control wherever I go. Staying with you will only burden you. Moreover, my mother is still under their control. Fatilu and Sabrina have a mutated talent for soul connection. If she’s killed, Sabrina will definitely know. When I was sent to the Dark Moon back then, she had almost stepped into the realm of Demon Emperor, but she still hadn’t realized the power of territory. Although you can kill Tapuli, you’re by no means able to rival Sabrina. Besides, there’s still my scary father…”

“Fatilu is very vicious, even if you let her go, she won’t let you go and she will definitely avenge on you and your mother.” Chen Rui frowned, “If I can help you to rescue your mother…”

“Impossible.” Kia shook her head, “Even if you can kill Sabrina and remove the [Soul Shackles] on my mother and I, you can’t defeat my father unless your strength reaches Demon Overlord.”

“Your father is a Demon Overlord?” Chen Rui was taken aback.

“His cousin is Glorfin, the king of Beelzebub who rebelled in the Dark Moon. He was one of the few people who escaped from the rebel… Not only that, Sabrina is also the sister of Broc Leviathan, the head of Dark Shadow generals. Broc is the son-in-law of Uncle Florence, and he has military power, so his influence is very huge in the Dark Shadow Empire. You should leave here as soon as possible and go to the Bloody Empire! Raize the Great is the strongest in the Demon Realm. At his refuge, you should be much safer.”

“What will you do when I’m gone? Fatilu will definitely madly torture you and your mother. I will never leave you alone. Let me think about it first.” Chen Rui shook his head and took a deep breath. He let go of Kia in his arms, slowly stood up, looked like he was pondering and paced back and forth.

Demon Overlord Beelzebub, Broc, Sabrina… He faintly felt that many things could be connected. If Dark Moon is a small game of chess, then the Dark Shadow Empire is a huge game of chess!

That’s right! Since it’s a game of chess, as one of the Demon King “pawns”, I obviously can’t settle everything. I should make use of some of the forces. For example, the enemy’s enemies can become my strength while their “king” can be dealt with another “king”. It seems that tomorrow’s trip to the palace has another important matter. “First of all, I’m not taking this risk for you. It’s just that I might “conveniently” rescue your mother and remove the [Soul Shackles] on both of you when I am working on my plan.” After Chen Rui made up his mind, he paused and smiled, “How are you going to repay me?”

Chen Rui’s plan was indeed not just for Kia but also for Delia and perhaps for the future empress of the Dark Shadow Empire. At the very least, since he came to the Dark Shadow Empire this time, why not reminisce with General Broc?

Kia raised her head and met the man’s determined gaze.

Although there was a mischievous smile on the man’s face, she could see that he was serious, and he had made up his mind.

Kia’s eyes began to wet again, but for the first time, a sincere smile without a trace of acting appeared on her face, “Then I’ll also declare that it isn’t for repayment and no matter whether you succeed or not, anyway… someone will never be able to get rid of me anymore.”

The two smiled at each other while looking at each other’s eyes. They felt like their hearts grew closer.

Kia suddenly thought of one thing, “What about Fatilu? Imprisonment isn’t suitable for a long term. Once Sabrina finds out that Fatilu is missing, she’ll find it here using the soul connection.”

“Who said I’ll imprison Fatilu?” Chen Rui smiled mysteriously, “She’s a key figure in my plan. However, everything can only be decided after tomorrow.”

Tomorrow is the day to see “her” at the palace.

chapters.title: Chapter 264: We Met Again
chapters.body:
Chapter 264: We Met Again

The next day, in the inner city of the Dark Shadow Empire, the palace.

Chen Rui wore the mechanic robe robe with the badge of gold-rimmed dual-moon on his chest. He came to the palace and handed the pass that was given by Empress Catherine to the guards at the gate.

The guards showed considerable respect to the Demon Realm’s first trio-specialized mechanic master in 10,000 years. After receiving the pass, a veiled court lady led Chen Rui into the palace.

The royal palace, which symbolized the highest authority of the Dark Shadow Empire, didn’t seem as luxurious as expected. Overall, it felt quaint without seeming poor and fine art could be seen in the subtleties.

The size of the royal palace was quite large, and there were quite complicated mazes which was far from the small palace in the Dark Moon. The court lady took Chen Rui turned around for almost an hour, and they finally came to a secluded courtyard.

“Master, please come in. The Lady will arrive later.” The court lady bowed and retreated.

Chen Rui calmed his mind and walked into the courtyard.

It was a quiet courtyard with many plants and trees, making the place seem full of life. Perhaps under the influence of [Nirvana], these plants were much more lush than normal. Chen Rui gently stroked the trees and thought of Nirvana’s Flame in his body, then he thought of the fiery blood that was fused into his body at that time, and he thought of another type of fusion in that tent…

On the way to the Silent Night Wetland, the talent and temperament of the “noblewoman” had begun to faintly attract him. Later, the sudden incident at the Wyvern’s Lair made their relationship omit the process and reached the end directly. Chen Rui admitted that he was a superficial man. Christina’s perfect appearance and body made him unable to contain himself. In order to protect the woman who made him fall in love with, also his first woman, Chen Rui fought Broc with Demon Emperor strength. Now that he thought it, it was indeed impulsive. (Lust blinded wisdom?) When he was dying, Christina, who was supposed to kill him, unexpectedly gave him her precious Nirvana’s blood. Perhaps that was impulsive, but it made the red piccolo truly stay in Chen Rui’s heart.

Whenever Nirvana’s Flame was ignited on his body, he would think of her involuntarily. The woman who claimed that they didn’t owe each other and would kill him the next time they met. He wanted to see her again.

Now, when his wish was about to be fulfilled, there was an indescribable feeling in his heart. Expectation, anxiety, nervousness… it couldn’t be described in accurate terms.

Race: Lust Royal Family (Mutated). Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A. Physique: A; Strength: A; Spirit: A; Agility: A.

The data that suddenly appeared in [Analytical Eyes] made Chen Rui’s hand tremble. He slowly turned around.

There was already one more person in the courtyard.

It was still a classical robe with perfect proportions. Her long black hair was tied and a vague veil covering her face, revealing a noble yet mysterious temperament.

It’s really her. Chen Rui felt that his heart was beating faster. He tried to suppress his agitated mind. He turned around and bowed, “Are you the noblewoman, Christina? I’m Arthur. A friend of mine entrusted me to bring something to you.”

Christina didn’t speak but looked at him quietly. The calm gaze behind the veil seemed to have seen through his [Camouflage].

Chen Rui was a little nervous inexplicably. He immediately took out a few bottles of potions from his space ring and placed them on the stone table beside him.

“These four bottles are Eternal potions and they must all be consumed for additional special effects. This bottle is a Resurrection Potion and this bottle is the Longevity Potion.”

These six bottles of black potions represented the highest achievements in pharmaceutics, which was enough to shock the entire Demon Realm. Christina only glanced at that lightly, then she looked back at Chen Rui.

After a long time, she finally spoke, and it was still the tranquil tone in his memory, “Is there eternity in this world?”

The question stunned Chen Rui. As he was trying to figure out the purpose of her question, Christina’s voice sounded again, “Answer me seriously.”

Chen Rui thought for a while and replied, “As far as I know, even the bright stars or the two moons of the Demon Realm will be annihilated one day. Whether it’s a thousand years or ten thousand years of life, it’s actually just a flash. It’s exactly because there isn’t eternity that we should cherish the moment more.”

“Momentary Glory.” Christina nodded slightly, implying the meaning of his legendary grade bracelet, “The glory of life is so transient. As time passes, even the immortal existence will eventually decay. The same is true for unforgettable memories, do you understand?”

Chen Rui frowned, “Your words sound wise but… I still don’t quite understand.”

“You should understand.” Christina stared at him deeply, “There’s something that you thought is unforgettable, but one day, they will be forgotten during your longing. Even if you don’t understand now, you’ll understand in the future.”

Chen Rui sighed, “There’s something… that can’t be taken away with time. Even if life is annihilated, the mark still exists.”

“Persevering in the wrong place… is just stupidity. It seems that your stupidity can’t be cured anymore.” Christina shook her head, “So, for you to come here today, are you ready to die?”

“My [Camouflage] truly failed.” Chen Rui didn’t know that his identity had been revealed by Christina and he smiled bitterly, “It seems that no matter what image I use, I can’t get rid of the description of stupid.”

After he spoke, a faint murderousness had surrounded him. Although the breath was very weak, the terrifying power contained within made him almost unable to move.

Christina’s voice became cold, “Stupidity is the biggest reason that you lose your life. For the sake of the black potions, I’ll give you time to confess your last words.”

Chen Rui didn’t panic. It was because he had been tested by the Princess Royal’s killing intentions in the Dark Moon. Although Christina’s murderousness was scary, Chen Rui, who had been through “many battles”, keenly noticed that the killing intention wasn’t particularly strong. Otherwise, the moment she recognized him, she would immediately strike and wouldn’t talk nonsense with him.

Chen Rui wasn’t narcissistic enough to think that Christina had been conquered by him or fell deeply in love with him from the one-night stand last time.

There were certainly many concerns for this noblewoman to not be able to kill him. For example, his identity as the trio-specialized mechanic master who had just joined the Dark Shadow Empire’s Mechanic Alliance; for example, the highest-level black potion; for another example, Master “Arthur” was permitted to enter the palace by the empress publicly. If anything happened to him, it’d be hard to explain to the public and the empress etc. There might also be a little bit of another reason that he wished for.

Although the murderousness seemed like a bluff, if he was unlucky, he might still die. I heard that Li Xuanba scolded the sky, that’s why he was struck by thunder. Although that story is purely fictional, I must still be careful. If I said something like “there was once a true love in front of us…”, it might probably be my last words. “I thought I was enough to shock the entire Demon Realm, so I came to the Dark Shadow Empire to see you. Unfortunately, it’s still not enough.”

Chen Rui’s seemingly unreasonable words made Christina’s murderousness slightly fluctuated. It was because at the Silent Night wetland, he once said that he would take her away with the strength enough to shock the entire Demon Realm.

At that time, she only thought that he was just boasting but now… this man indeed shocked the entire Demon Realm. Without considering his title as a trio-specialized mechanic master that was lost for 10,000 years, there were still the lost grandmaster-level black potions, and they were the highest level!

He deliberately tried his best to shine in the mechanic contest and even make such a request to the empress publicly just to meet me?

Also, to “hand over” that 6 precious black potions to me?

He is surely still that dumb guy. “Although I don’t know where your black potion came from…” These weren’t enough to affect Christina’s will as her calm eyes still never changed, “Yet… even if you become a real grandmaster, it’s still not enough to change something. Unless…”

“Unless I have strength? In your eyes… is there only strength?” Chen Rui couldn’t help asking. It was a question from the bottom of his heart.

“It’s not that there’s only strength in my eyes, but that I must have strength in my eyes!” Christina’s tone was very firm, “Have you seen countless homes destroyed by war? A bustling, beautiful home became a thousand miles of scorched land instantly. The people were wandering and homeless! Have you heard countless civilians crying among murders? The scythe of death in war ignores the crying and praying of blood, and ruthlessly harvests abundant innocent life! I’ve personally experienced this scene of blood and crying as if it was yesterday! Now, the Dark Shadow Empire is prospering and the people are contended. If there isn’t strength, how can we maintain this hard-won peace and tranquility?”

As she said, Christina’s breath was getting stronger and stronger. In her [Analytical Eyes], the value began to change. Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A… A … Unable to Judge.

She is indeed a Demon Overlord! “If your perseverance is to protect a certain woman or a few women. Then, my perseverance is to protect thousands of people with all kinds of dreams and persistence. That is my biggest perseverance. Compared with this, everything else becomes insignificant. Do you understand?”

Chen Rui stared at Christina as if it was the first time that he looked at this woman so seriously. Christina and Shea were actually very similar. The difference was that Christina’s perseverance was stronger. Her belief was firmer and unshakable.

Strength is born out of responsibility.

It isn’t purely responsibility but actual perseverance. Shea isn’t comparable in this regard.

For this perseverance, she must have sacrificed a lot and given up a lot. A sudden, strange emotion replaced his initial script somehow. Chen Rui laughed suddenly and ignored the murderous intentions, “I understand now. It turns out that you’re also a stupid woman.”

If it was Shea, she would definitely scold him for being rude. Christina just glanced at him lightly without denying, “It’s good that you understand. However, my stupidity is different from yours.”

“They are essentially the same.” Chen Rui shrugged, “I thought this trip was impulsive, but now it seems worth it.”

Christina said so much was just to tell him that it was impossible for the two of them. She frowned at those words, “Such a stubborn guy. Do you really think I dare not kill you?”

“Indeed, I haven’t done enough; far from enough. That’s why I can’t die… so I have to ask for mercy.” Chen Rui’s calm smile had no signs of fear or begging for mercy, “There’s an important piece of information that should keep my last words in our next meeting.”

Chritina ignored his tricks in his words and asked, “What information?”

“Can you remove your murderous intentions first? It’s too uncomfortable to talk like this.”

“Just speak!”

There was a suspicion of her deliberately pranking him. It must be a “revenge”, but it somewhat seemed like a little woman.

chapters.title: Chapter 265: Plan
chapters.body:
Chapter 265: Plan

Chen Rui had to endure the pressure while saying, “This time, to participate in the mechanic contest, I accepted the invitation of Custer Family’s first son, Dior and became a participant in the Custer Family’s game of heir. However, I unexpectedly found something interesting…”

He didn’t disclose the information related to Kia and the Dark Moon. Instead, he selectively told the story of the Beelzebub Royal Family, and it included his assumption on Broc. Christina listened very carefully. Although he couldn’t see the expression on her face, he could feel that her eyes became more serious.

After listening to Chen Rui’s elaboration, Christina said in a serious manner, “I’ve heard from Her Majesty about this matter. She has also found many related clues, but she has no specific idea. Now that you’ve mentioned about a Beelzebub Demon Overlord-level powerhouse, these clues can basically be connected together. Your assumption is right. Broc and the Beelzebub Royal Family should be accomplices.”

Chen Rui asked, “Can Broc be uprooted?”

Christina shook her head, “Broc is cunning in nature. He never easily leaves any clues usually. He’s the son-in-law of the empress’ uncle, Prince Florence and the first general of the empire. Not only is he popular in the military but his forces in the Dark Moon are also deeply rooted. So, he is difficult to eradicate completely, at least not at the moment. Besides, he’s likely to be just an important part of that force but not the whole.”

“ Hmph! It’s because Catherine is afraid of Broc, even though she knew you were the victim the last time, she still unreasonably imprisoned you in the palace?” Chen Rui was obviously very disappointed at the most beautiful empress, “The smartest person in the Demon Realm isn’t that impressive afterall!”

There were indeed too many things to consider for the ruler. It was much easier to be a chivalrous wanderer that acted on impulse. Certainly, he also understood that things weren’t that simple. If Broc could be easily eliminated, with Catherine’s wisdom and strength, he wouldn’t survive until now.

“Rude! How dare you speak of the empress’ name directly?” Christina knew that Chen Rui made such a complaint for her, but she scolded with dissatisfaction. Her voice contained a little demeanor, and the murderousness that was dissipated seemed to get stronger again.

“She can’t hear it anyway.” Chen Rui couldn’t bother and shrugged. A weird look flashed past in Christina’s eyes, but her veil was still blocking fortunately, so it couldn’t be seen.

“So… if it were you, what would you do?”

“It seems that you’ll only show me a better expression when we’re discussing important matters. Do you remember the time when we eat barbecue together?”

“Don’t try your luck. If you mention the past again, it’ll only make me unable to control my killing intention.” The coldness in Christina’s eyes seemed to be felt through the veil, “I can put my personal grudge aside. Now, I’m sincerely asking you about this issue.”

“Reel silks from cocoons. First, we must remove this guy’s side forces before anything else.” Chen Rui stopped joking around. When it came to dealing with Broc, he certainly wouldn’t be stingy with his ideas, “For those who support him, we can use certain means to make them have conflicts in interests or we can make the empress express trust to those people so that they’ll suspect each other. Broc has a [Soul Shackles] skill, so he can definitely control many people with this skill, paying extra attention to some key figures. However, the number that [Soul Shackles] can control is also limited. Thus, we can appropriately exaggerate the impact of the skill to isolate Broc from all aspects…”

Chen Rui talked eloquently. The art of war left by the ancestors of the other world was indeed extraordinary. Christina’s eyes flashed in surprise from time to time.

“Then… what to do with the military? This is the most important part. The Jergal Fortress is guarded by Broc’s Blood Blade Legion now. Ut’s the most important defense against the Bloody Empire. If we force him to the corner, the consequences could be disastrous.”

“There is a solution.” Chen Rui said solemnly, “It depends whether the Empress Catherine has the courage.”

“Yes!” When Christina heard there was a solution, she immediately blurted out and quickly added, “This is the biggest problem for Her Majesty that she repeatedly mentioned with me. If there’s a solution, I believe she’ll try it.”

“I can tell you.” Chen Rui frowned at Christina, “However, you can’t reveal to the empress that I am the one that said it, including what I said before. Just tell her that you thought of it… you must wear the royal ring. Eh , the ring is gone? Then, swear by your family name.”

“Are you sure?” Christina’s eyes seemed even more weird. After Chen Rui’s reassurance, she made an oath.

Chen Rui knew the weight of oath by the family name, so he was relieved, “The empress was worried about the military only knows the presence of general, but they don’t know the presence of empress. Although rewarding has a certain effect, it isn’t a radical cure. She must firmly control the military’s mind… soul in her hands. There were many defects in the Demon’s conventional military system at present. She can consider starting from this aspect to properly implement a military reform…”

His method was actually to plagiarize some military systems on earth and added the position of “political officer”. This trick seemed to be seen in many crossover novels. Although “old-fashion”, it was very feasible.

Certainly, instead of calling them political officers here, Chen Rui casually named them as “spiritual officers”. Their apparent responsibility was to listen to the voice of the “base level”, appease the military and deal with the captives. In reality, they were responsible to brainwash them about the supremacy of the empress.

Every 100-person team must be equipped with a spirit officer. It should go rank by rank. The lower rank should obey the upper rank and the highest rank was called the great spirit officer that had the same rank as the general. In this way, the power of the army would be divided. The general had the right to command the army to fight, but his authority would be governed by a spirit officer which would prevent the general from holding too much military power.

After Chen Rui finished speaking, Christina gradually recovered from the shock and fell into contemplation. After a while, she said, “This kind of military system is very novel. To be sure, it will drive the entire Demon Realm’s military reform. However, for the time being, we have to keep it a secret for a while. When the time matures, we can start implementing from one or two key points and promote it throughout the army. By then, even Broc cannot do anything.”

“It seems that my life is saved for the time being.” Chen Rui looked like he was relieved.

“You entered the palace as a trio-specialized mechanic master. From the beginning, you knew that I had a lot of concern, and it was difficult to kill you.” Christina stared at him, “You’re quite outstanding in your wisdom and talent. Even I’m ashamed to be not as good as you. If you can help us, the Dark Shadow Empire will definitely be stronger…”

“Slow down!” Chen Rui interrupted her words, “Stop whatever recommendation or high position and the like. I’ve already joined the Mechanic Alliance of the Dark Shadow Empire, so I’m more or less contributing to the empire. What do you think of the plan I mentioned earlier? If it succeeds, it will severely damage the strength of Broc and the Beelzebub Royal Family.”

Christina stared at him for a moment and said, “You should know the risks of this plan. If you decide to suicide, it will just save me the trouble of doing it myself.”

Chen Rui accepted her stare frankly, “I’m always afraid of death, and I will definitely not send myself to death if I’m not confident. A Demon Overlord can crush me with one finger, so I can’t afford to offend him, so about the empress..”

“I have full confidence with the empress. This magic item can manually provide your location, and it can also be used to send a signal by explosion as the final message.”

As she spoke, Christina threw over a magical item and said indifferently, “If there isn’t anything else, you can leave now before I change my mind to kill you… This time, although you’re lucky enough to save your life, don’t underestimate a woman’s grudge, you’re still on my must-kill list.” “You still know you’re a woman?” Chen Rui said that in his heart, but he said differently with his mouth, “Then I should really leave quickly. I think I won’t come here to suicide any time soon.”

“By the way, I broke your gold crystal shackles last time. Take this cloak as a compensation.” Chen Rui took out the cloak that he made during the contest, “Longing of the Stars” and put it on the table.

As he turned and walked toward the door, Christina’s voice suddenly sounded behind him.

“Actually you should understand that no matter how much you do for me, my perseverance will not change.”

Chen Rui stood for a moment, turned around and answered, “If your perseverance is to protect everyone’s perseverance, then my perseverance is just to protect you.”

Christina’s eyes were finally unable to maintain her water-like calmness. With a snort, the courtyard’s door suddenly closed automatically and a huge repulsive force pushed Chen Rui out of the door. However, right before the door was closed, a golden light flew out.

“This golden puppet can temporarily hold your opponent for a short period of time when you encounter an unmatchable enemy. It can only fight once.”

After that sentence, there were no longer any other sounds in the courtyard.

Chen Rui received a golden light in his hand. He smiled as he strode out.

In the courtyard, Christina looked at the black potions on the table and the strange emotions that she thought had faded appeared in her heart again. Behind the supreme throne that stood tall, it was actually an exhausted heart. This man’s stupid emotions and perseverance, although far from being able to regard as a shelter, she could feel a trace of peace that she couldn’t ignore.

Perhaps it was for this reason that she once again became soft-hearted. Otherwise, he had no chance to meet her this time.

Anyway, the information and analysis, especially the reforms in the military system were simply unexpected surprises. I’ll just see it as a reward for being soft–hearted occasionally. By the way, speaking of reward, it seems to be more than that. Her jade-like hands caressed the light cloak and the words that the man said in the mechanic contest sounded in her ears which she heard in person.

“The inspiration for this cloak comes from the star-like eyes of a woman…”.

Behind the veil, in the star-like eyes, the light gradually softened. She gently put on the cloak. Certainly, it’s a warm feeling, just like his perseverance. Shortly after Chen Rui walked out of the yard, the court lady that led him appeared again. She took him all the way out of the palace and gave him a small bag with a seed in it. It was exactly the seed of the flower of mist promised by Empress Catherine. He planted the seed into the Galaxy Garden and the prompt showed the maturity period as ten days. It seemed that there was no problem in lifting Skye’s curse anymore.

Chen Rui took a glance at the golden puppet given by Christina. It was a small gold man at the size of a palm. He wondered if he could call it Oscar. This little gold puppet should be the strongest [War Puppet] made with the secret method of the Asmodeus Royal Family. He had seen the power of bronze puppets in the battle of Christina and Broc at the Silent Night wetland. The puppets had no pain and thought, and they never exhausted nor died. So, they were quite hard to deal with. Now, Christina gave him the most powerful golden puppet. Thus, even if he was facing a Demon Overlord, he still had a chance, but unfortunately, it could only be used once.

The golden puppet was a bit familiar, then Chen Rui suddenly thought of something. When Dodo surrendered in the black rainforest, Dodo once presented several treasures left by the dragon that he devoured. Among them was a puppet about the size of a golden puppet! As Chen Rui thought of it, the puppet had already appeared in his hand from the storage. It was indeed almost the size of a golden puppet. Although the surface was dull, as a mechanic master, Chen Rui could naturally tell that the puppet’s material was even superior from the golden puppet.

As Chen Rui thought about it, he once again activated [Analytical Eyes] which had reached the time limit. [Analytical Eyes] had the appraisal function after reaching Migrez state. However, the prompt that appeared was: Unknown item (Sealed); Attributed: Unable to Judge.

That prompt was very strange, and it might be related to the “seal”. However, Christina would definitely not see him again. I’ll just wait for the next meeting. Perhaps I can even give her a surprise. The meeting this time was a little different from what Chen Rui expected. [True Camouflage] was completely useless in front of her as she saw through it at a glance. Chen Rui still didn’t know where his flaws were. However, after this meeting, Chen Rui’s understanding of Christina became more profound, especially her perseverance.

It could be seen that Christina did have feelings for him, especially after he sacrificed himself to drag Broc. The Blood of Nirvana and the red piccolo were the best evidence. However, no matter how strong the feelings went, it couldn’t replace the biggest perseverance in her heart.

Chen Rui finally understood a little why Christina would become the next empress candidate. If she was placed in another world, she would be criticized as “Mother Mary, Drama Queen, Retarded” by some overbearing guys. Yet, even if those guys crossovered to this world, they were merely ants in her eyes. She wouldn’t even bother about them.

She insisted on her perseverance and pursuit. Her will was so strong that there was nothing that could replace or shake. It could be said that Christina was more suitable than Shea to be an excellent ruler.

At that moment, Chen Rui clearly saw the distance with her, and he felt farther away. Perhaps at the moment when she was enthroned in the future, this distance would increase indefinitely. Yet, he felt even more attracted by this woman. Not only her appearance, body and temperament but also that kind of perseverance… also the occasional trace of softness that revealed in her logical and almost merciless heart.

If there was a day that the Dark Shadow Empire and even the entire Demon Realm would have eternal peace, maybe she could truly release the feelings she suppressed in her heart… This seems to be more difficult than Shea to rule over the entire Fallen Angel Empire. However, these things were too far away for Chen Rui, not to mention they were unrealistic. His main concern now was the plan.

This plan was undoubtedly risky, but for Christina, Kia and Delia, and perhaps his own desire, it was worth trying.

It was too tiring to live for others, but one couldn’t just live for themselves. That was Chen Rui, a man whose blood hadn’t run cold.

Why do I still think that Christina was the current empress Catherine🤔?

chapters.title: Chapter 266: Magic Tower And Contribution Points
chapters.body:
Chapter 266: Magic Tower And Contribution Points

After having lunch with the Custer family at noon, Chen Rui got rid of the visits from the nobles and officials. He took a special carriage prepared for him by the Custer Family and head to the Mechanic Alliance in the southern block.

Coming to the Mechanic Alliance this time wasn’t too long from the first time when he came with Kia, but it felt completely different. Many people took the initiative to give way and bow upon seeing the arrival of the trio-specialized mechanic master that shocked the Demon Realm. Although there were also many gazes with jealousy and unfriendliness, as the saying went, only mediocrity wasn’t envied, so Chen Rui couldn’t bother. He walked straight into the building and went to the fifth floor.

The fifth floor was the place where only mechanic masters were allowed. Ordinary members couldn’t enter without permission.

At the head of the stairs, Chen Rui met another old acquaintance, Fini, the granddaughter of Master Rummenigge, and Monroe who seemed to be following her forever.

As soon as Fini saw Chen Rui, she immediately expressed an admiring look, “Arthur! Ah! I’m sorry, I should call you… master!”

“We’re friends, so it’s not wrong to call me Arthur.” Chen Rui had a good impression of Fini, so he smiled slightly.

Monroe couldn’t turn a blind eye to Chen Rui this time. So, in spite of his usual arrogance, he bowed, “Master.”

Monroe was the son of the third general, Kafu. Kafu’s forces were weaker than Broc and Valen. He attached great importance to Chen Rui, the new genius master and even visited him personally. Thus, Monroe didn’t dare to be rude to Chen Rui.

Actually, every world was the same. People prioritized strength and capabilities. Only those with strength and capabilities would be respected. It was especially true in the Demon Realm. Chen Rui wasn’t particularly displeased with Monroe, so he nodded and said, “Hi.”

Fini bluntly exposed something, “Master, don’t you think this guy suddenly became courteous? Actually, he is fond of the greatsword, “’Flaming Eye’ that you crafted during the contest last time.”

Monroe’s arrogant face suddenly turned red, but he didn’t act upon it. In front of Fini, he had always been at loss, so he had to say, “Master, I usually use a greatsword. If it’s possible, I hope to buy master’s quasi-legendary grade work.”

“That sword doesn’t suit you.” Chen Rui’s words made Monroe’s face slightly change, “Weapons should be tailored according to the user for best fit. I notice there are some fluctuations of wind elements in your body. You should be a magic swordsman that trains in wind magic right?”

The annoyance on Monroe’s face turned into a surprise. His training of wind magic was relatively secret. He didn’t expect this young master, who was also a Higher Demon, to see through at a glance. He is indeed extraordinary. No wonder he can become a mechanic master. “Why not, I’ll give you a list and you try to get these materials. Then, come to the Custer Family to look for me and I’ll help you craft a sword. However, let me be clear that it might not reach the quasi-legendary grade, but it’ll definitely be better fit for you than the “Flaming Eyes.”

The turn of tide made Monroe suddenly rejoice, “Thank you, master! If master has any trouble in the future, please come to me…”

Soon after he spoke, Monroe remembered that Arthur was a genius master in the field of mechanics and there were countless nobles and officials that tried to please and win over Arthur. On the other hand, he was only the son of the third general and he seemed far from enough confidence to say that. If his father, Kafu said that, then it would be alright.

“Master, I…”

Chen Rui noticed Monroe’s embarrassment and patted him on the shoulder, “Relax, I’ll definitely trouble you if something happens.”

That sentence greatly increased Monroe’s affinity toward Chen Rui and he felt that Chen Rui was unprecedentedly pleasing to the eye. It was extremely “rare” for someone to make this arrogant genius in swordsmanship to find him or her “very pleasing to the eye”.

“Master, can I also go and have a look too?” Fini said with a grin, and she was even happier after getting Chen Rui’s approval, “My grandfather and Grandpa Anderson are in the president’s room. We won’t disturb master from working then.”

Chen Rui came to the president’s room. He indeed saw Master Anderson and Master Rummenigge who were talking.

Anderson’s mental state had been quite good recently and the reason was certainly because Chen Rui, the genius had joined the alliance. Seeing Chen Rui’s arrival, he said, “Master Arthur, you’re here.”

Rummenigge nodded at Chen Rui as a greeting. When he first met Chen Rui, he felt that this young man was extraordinary. Otherwise, he wouldn’t give the recommendation badge to him. Originally, in Rummenigge’s heart, Chen Rui was a very promising mechanic who might be an excellent talent in the future. Unexpectedly, this young man’s ability was far beyond his expectations. He was now the most dazzling star in the Demon Realm – trio-specialization, the first in ten thousand years who is worthy of the title of the top genius.

“Master Anderson, Master Rummenigge.” Chen Rui still paid considerable respect to President Anderson and Rummenigge who had stood up from him. He bowed, “Both of you are experienced seniors. Before both of you, I dare not call myself master, so you can just call me Arthur. Although I’ve learnt many things, in reality, each specialization isn’t proficient enough, and I still need to learn from various masters.”

Anderson and Rummenigge smiled at each other and secretly complimented. This young man not only has excellent talent and comprehension, which enables him to enter the ranks of masters at a young age. What’s more is that he isn’t arrogant and impatient. The so-called genius, Savice, can’t even be compared. Master Anderson had always been strict. Yet, he couldn’t help but smile a little at that time, “Master Arthur doesn’t have to be so humble. The Demon Realm always puts the pro first. With your ability and talent, it’s not too much for us to call you master. After the contest, you came and left in a hurry, so you may not be familiar with the place yet. Would you like me to ask someone to give you a tour around?”

“Thank you, president. It’s just… I don’t need it. To be honest to both of you, I came here today to ask about the entry to the ancient magic tower. Last time I heard that the masters in the alliance can have access to the ancient magic tower to study with special privilege. I wonder if I can enter the magic tower to study now.”

Master Rummenigge interjected, “I remembered that when you participated in the preliminary and needed to record a magic circle from the magic tower, you took too much time and seemed to have a lower score. It seems that you have gone to the third and fourth floor.”

“Yes. I even wanted to go to the fifth floor at the time, but unfortunately I couldn’t get in.” Chen Rui said embarrassedly. Coming here today was a small part of his plan, but the ancient magic tower was indeed very attractive. If he missed it, he might need to wait for a very long time before he could enter again.

Master Rummenigge smiled and said, “Even Master Anderson and I can’t get onto the fifth floor too. Perhaps nobody in the Demon Realm can go in now. Maybe we need to be a grandmaster before we can go up.”

“Not to mention the fifth floor, we haven’t even finished studying and deciphering the many magic circles on the fourth and third floors. If you can understand them, you can also get a corresponding internal contribution reward.” Master Anderson frowned slightly, “It’s just that the quota for this month is full. You’ll have to wait to enter next month.”

Chen Rui was a little disappointed in his heart. Then, Master Rummenigge said, “I still have 30 hours this month and I haven’t figured out the four-star magic circle I copied last time. I’ll give you these thirty hours as a small gift to congratulate you on joining the alliance.”

“Thank you so much for that, Master Rummenigge.” Chen Rui was overjoyed. His heart was filled with gratitude and respect for this warm master.

Master Anderson nodded, “Since this is the case, then you can just wait for an hour. Master Leo has now reached the key point of deciphering and he’s alone in it. After he comes out, you can go in. Since there’s still some time… can I ask you about the forging technique that you used in the mechanic finals last time? If I guessed it right, that should be the tauren’s method right…”

Chen Rui secretly praised Master Anderson’s eyesight and the two began to discuss. Master Anderson had been specializing in metal for more than two hundred years. In terms of metal specialization, even the current Demon Realm top mechanic master, Nate wasn’t as good as him. Within this exchange, Chen Rui also benefited greatly.

Unknowingly, an hour passed quickly.

“President!” The voice from outside interrupted the discussion between Chen Rui and Master Anderson. It turned out to be Master Leo from the ancient magic tower.

Leo walked happily into the president’s room. Suddenly, he saw Chen Rui and frowned. He spoke directly to Anderson, “President, this time I finally figured out the mystery of the quasi-four-star magic circle last time!”

Master Anderson stood up happily from his seat, “That’s great! Come and show me quickly.”

Leo took out a magic slate and a magic scroll. The prototype of the magic circle was on the slate while notes and detailed descriptions were on the magic scroll.

Master Anderson praised while looking at it, “Not bad. It seems that the alliance has an additional quasi-four-star defensive magic circle. Your contribution point will be increased by 5000. Your point should already accumulate to the black star rank. You can redeem two ninth-grade materials for free.”

Chen Rui was taken aback. Ninth grade material! The three rarest materials that Thunderous Sound lacked last time, Black Phoenix Feather, Thunder Dragon’s Crystal and Stardust are all ninth grade materials. The Black Phoenix Feather was obtained by Dior with a lot of effort; while Thunder Dragon’s Crystal and Stardust are only available in the Mechanic Alliance’s storage, and they aren’t for sale. It was until I won the competition that I got these two materials with the champion’s reward. Yet, Leo can get two ninth grade materials for free! It seems that other than the plan, even this “contribution point” that I didn’t take seriously at all is worth studying carefully. Contribution point was an internal “currency” of the Mechanic Alliance. After the master joined the alliance, they would automatically earned 100 contribution points. Contribution points could also be obtained by selling equipment through the alliance. Other than that, participating in alliance’s events and contests could also obtain contribution points, but the highest contribution point rewarded was the magic circle from the ancient magic tower.

This magic circle mainly referred to the arrangement used in the enchanting process during crafting, which could derive into various attributes. It was the most important part in mechanics.

Recording a complete three-star magic circle and above would be rewarded at most 2000 points. Besides, deciphering a new three-star magic circle gave 4000 points; quasi-four stars gave 5000 points; four-star gave 6000 points; quasi-five stars gave 7000 points. In comparison, magic circles that were lower than three-star were much cheaper. Deciphering a new one-star to quasi-three star only gave 200 points.

100 contribution points would be white star; 1000 points would be purple star; 10,000 points would be black star, which enabled him to exchange for various rare materials and borrow some precious experiences and documents.

After deciphering the magic circle, other than the reward in contribution points, when the store sold the magic circle, the master who deciphered could also get a share.

The ancient magic tower was very mysterious as everyone saw different things. At different times, the magic circle they saw might not be the same. Sometimes they couldn’t make up a complete array, so they had to deduce and assume. Even for a master, it was difficult to record and decipher magic circles with three stars and above.

Master Leo was very proficient in that. Since joining the alliance, he had deciphered four magic circles that were above three stars. His status in the alliance had also risen and became unshakable due to that. As a result, he even obtained the privilege of entering the ancient magic tower alone to avoid interruption. Usually, the magic tower had several masters at the same time.

Leo was praised by President Anderson and he was proud. He looked at Chen Rui lightly, and it contained a hint of provocation: What if you are the top new star? No matter how talented you are, you can only look up to me in terms of magic circles! “Arthur, go to the ancient magic tower now and take this with you.” Master Anderson said and took out a magic slate.

“Wait! Shouldn’t it be Master Rummenigge that enters?” Master Leo said with dissatisfaction, “Arthur, even if you have greater talent, you can’t just take the Master Rummenigge’s time! Young man, be humble and respect others!”

Upon hearing the last sentence, Anderson and Rummenigge shook their heads together. That sentence, Leo should say it to his disciple. If Savice really understood that, he wouldn’t end up that way.

It could be said that for Savice to have such an ending, as his teacher, Leo had an inescapable responsibility.

“President! I’m against such…”

“Master Leo, thank you for trying to protect me.” Rummenigge said, “It’s just that I gave it to Master Arthur voluntarily this time.”

Leo’s intention wasn’t to protect Rummenigge but to go against Chen Rui’s. When he heard Rummenigge’s words, his momentum was immediately reduced. He sneered, “It seems that you’re really willing to spend your time trying to win over this talented new genius.”

“That’s because I’m not only a master in the Mechanic Alliance but also a member of the royal family.” Rummenigge didn’t deny his intention to win over Chen Rui and answered openly.

“Enough. Since Rummenigge gave it voluntarily, Leo, you just let it be.” Master Anderson, the president, said, “Time is precious, you can go now, Arthur. This magic slate is specially made. It’s completely different from the one in the preliminary. Not only can you record magic circles, but it can also display the existing magic circle type, so you won’t record repeated magic circles. At the same time, it’s also the key to the sealed ancient magic tower. There is a time stamp on it and you have 30 hours. Once the time is up, you’ll be automatically teleported out. The unused time this trip can be accumulated until the next month, but it cannot be more than two months. Otherwise, it’ll be automatically invalidated.”

Chen Rui nodded to show that he understood. He hesitated for a while and asked, “Can that magic scroll and the recording tool be given to me too?”

Leo seemed to have heard a joke and sneered, “Including that time during the preliminary, this should be your second time entering the magic tower right? The highest record during your contest last time was only a quasi-three-star magic circle. The gap between quasi-three-star and three-star is huge. It is equivalent to the difference between two big realms in strength. If you’re going to the third floor, it’s good enough to record a complete magic circle with a slate. Yet, you’re dreaming of deciphering it?”

“I have to at least give it a try. There is always a first time for everything.” Chen Rui smiled slightly.

Master Anderson didn’t want Chen Rui to waste time, so he took out two magic scrolls and a pen to end the pointless argument.

Didn’t Chen Rui record some magic circles during the preliminary stage? He could just show off to Master Leo right?

chapters.title: Chapter 267: The Birth Of The Magic Circle Genius
chapters.body:
Chapter 267: The Birth Of The Magic Circle Genius

With the magical effect of the magic slate, Chen Rui entered the sealed ancient magic tower smoothly.

Just now, Leo used his privilege to enter alone. This time, it wasn’t Chen Rui alone who entered the magic tower. Coincidentally, Master Xhosa was also inside, and there were also a few masters that he didn’t know.

When Master Xhosa saw Chen Rui, he smiled and said, “It turns out to be Master Arthur. Entering the magic tower to research so soon? It should be Rummenigge right? I guess that guy gave you his time. He has a granddaughter who seems to know you. Is Rummenigge trying to build rapport with you step by step and eventually tie you up with the Asmodeus Royal Family with marriage? Unfortunately, I only have one son. You aren’t interested right?”

In fact, Master Xhosa guessed it right. Rummenigge did have that long-term plan, but he hadn’t yet revealed it.

Chen Rui was still smiling initially, but when he heard the last sentence, a chill ran down his spine inexplicably. WTF?! I don’t look like a gay, do I?! “Stop messing around!” A mature-looking Great Demon master aside, finally said something because she couldn’t stand it, “This must be Master Arthur. I saw you at the finals in the arena last time and witnessed your greatness. It’s truly admirable. Ignore this old man, he simply likes to talk nonsense!”

Actually, Xhosa was a bit embarrassed to see Chen Rui. At that time, he wanted to recruit Chen Rui as his disciple without knowing that Chen Rui was also a master. He smiled at that moment, “Master Fimi, I heard that Master Arthur’s favorite is mature and plump women. Your body is very well maintained. If you want, your chances are pretty high. You should get closer later.”

“Old bastard! Believe or not, if you continue messing around, I’ll stuff your broken wine bottle into your ass?” The mature, plump female blushed. Her subsequent aggressive words shocked everyone present.

It seemed that the mechanic “race” was mostly abnormal. Anderson and Rummenigge were some of the rare, normal demons among the masters in the alliance.

Chen Rui had a long-lost feeling in his heart. Mars is very dangerous. I should go back to the earth soon. Those jokes didn’t last too long as the time in the ancient magic tower was very precious after all. After they introduced each other, they went to the third or fourth floor to start their own research or record.

Chen Rui had too little time last time, so he was just touring. Although a lot of data was recorded, it wasn’t complete. Besides, the ancient magic tower was very mysterious. The data from this time was different from the last time. He wasn’t ambitious, so he stayed at the third floor and activated [Deep Analysis]. While using the results of the two analyses to compare and analyze, he was trying to understand the mystery within.

The data of the third floor was indeed far from comparable to the first and second floors. The changes of these data were complicated and mysterious. Every time, it could arrange into new combinations and ideas. It was the reason why Chen Rui was immersed in it last time. However, it was very difficult to arrange a complete array, even with the aid of [Deep Analysis].

No wonder after those masters studied for many years, it was still difficult to “decipher” a complete magic circle.

[Deep Analysis] seemed to be adding more and more algorithms. There were many arrangements added into Chen Rui’s mind, but the distance from completion seemed to be increasing too.

Chen Rui frowned and began to ponder. There was a saying in Xunzi [1], “Every change is the same. That is to say, no matter how it changes, its quality doesn’t change; no matter how it changes, it doesn’t stray from its essence.”

No matter how complicated the magic was, it was impossible to stray from the six elements of earth, water, fire, wind, light and dark. Even the necromancy derived from the dark magic or the space magic (had been lost) that derived from wind and the water magic, were the same. Therefore, the magic circle had the same logic.

What he needed to do wasn’t to increase complexity and countless changes, but to reduce complexity to simplicity and find out the most basic, also the most crucial part.

Chen Rui thought about it, stood up, walked downstairs and returned to the first floor.

When concentrating on something, time always passed quickly. In the blink of an eye, eight hours had passed.

When Chen Rui withdrew from his thoughts with some realizations, he happened to see Master Xhosa coming down from the second floor.

When Master Xhosa saw Chen Rui sitting on the first floor, he was surprised, “Why are you still here? You should at least be at the third floor with your abilities. Even for masters, the time that we can enter the tower is also limited. Don’t waste it!”

“I was about to go up.” Chen Rui knew that Master Xhosa was just being kind, so he nodded. Then, he stood up and took out a bottle of wine, “By the way, I’ve never had a chance to tank Master Xhosa for your guidance and help. This bottle of wine was given by the old chancellor, Lamar to me. Now, I’ll present the Buddha with borrowed flowers [2] and give it to you.”

Although Xhosa didn’t understand what Chen Rui meant by presenting the Buddha with borrowed flowers, when he heard the name, Lamar, his eyes suddenly lit up. He hurried over, took the drink and kept it in his space ring as if he got a precious treasure, “This is a thousand years superior fruit wine! The old prime minister is famous for his collection of alcohol in the capital. I’m glad to be in debt of your kindness.”

As Master Xhosa was about to leave happily, he suddenly turned back and said, “If you want to go out in advance, just go out from the main entrance like me. Then, the countdown on the magic slate will automatically stop and the remaining time can be accumulated until the next month. Once the time is up, the magic slate can automatically teleport you out too.”

Chen Rui thanked Master Xhosa and walked to the second floor and sat on the second floor for another eight or nine hours. Some of the masters just now, like Fimi had already teleported out and some kept some time and walked all the way to the ground floor. Other than this group of people, a few more entered. When they saw the most dazzling genius in the mechanic field stuck on the second floor unexpectedly, they were surprised. Master Fimi kindly advised one sentence, but she didn’t say much and walked toward the lower floor exit.

Chen Rui used [Deep Analysis] twice on the first floor and spent most of the time sorting and thinking. Then, he used it once on the second floor. Up till now, he had finally solved some key problems and stood up happily. Then, he felt his stomach growling. After eating something, he walked to the third floor with confidence.

Outside the Magic Tower, it was already the next morning. The president, Anderson was having breakfast with Rummenigge and several masters on the fifth floor restaurant. Master Leo walked over and said, “Have you heard? It’s been more than ten hours and the trio-specialized genius is still at the second floor. That’s such a waste of Master Rummenigge’s kindness.”

“At least Master Rummenigge has a good intention for the alliance and empire.” Master Xhosa looked at Master Leo sarcastically, “It’s better than someone who only gloats.”

Leo’s eyes widened, “Xhosa, what do you mean?”

“Every master here knows exactly what I meant!” Master Xhosa sneered, “Savice’s death is self-deserving. He was the one that kept on provoking Arthur. If it was me, I’ll take more than Savice’s hand in the contest! A hellhound’s death returned with a dragon in the alliance! Besides, this dragon has unlimited room for improvement! For you to be so biased against Master Arthur, it should be me who asks what do you mean?”

Leo had always been unpopular. Suddenly, he felt several masters around him looking at him unkindly which made him feel very uncomfortable. He sneered, “I’m just telling the truth. Even though he is a trio-specialized mechanic master, he might not be good at magic circles!”

Master Rummenigge said, “As a master, it’s his first time entering the ancient magic tower. No one can predict what will happen in the future. At the very least, I have confidence in him.”

With Rummenigge’s prestige and identity, Leo couldn’t say anything else at once. So, he left with a sentence, “The higher you hold him, the heavier he’ll fall!”

Master Anderson frowned. Out of concern for the new genius master, his movement was reported from time to time for the following time.

“Arthur went from the second floor to the third floor.”

“He seems to have taken out the magic slate, but he hasn’t recorded yet.”

“Arthur went from the third floor to the fourth floor.

“He started recording on the magic slate!”

This news also came to Master Leo’s ears. When Master Leo heard Chen Rui was using magic slate on the fourth floor, he calmed down and gave Chen Rui an evaluation of being ambitious and flashy.

If Chen Rui stays on the third floor, I’ll have to be more careful. Yet, he went to the fourth floor. Although this young man is trio-specialized. From the perspective of every specialization, he hasn’t reached the level of top master. Even for a top master, it’s quite difficult to comprehend and copy the complete magic circle on the fourth floor, let alone decipher it. It was precisely because Leo was good at this, he had a superior position in the alliance. Even if he usually behaved badly, President Anderson would only keep an eye closed.

Just as the sky was getting darker, the masters at the Mechanical Alliance finally received the news that Chen Rui came out of the ancient magic tower. It seemed that “Arthur” went directly to the president’s room and attracted a lot of masters to go along. Hearing the “news” brought by his apprentice in the laboratory, Leo thought about it, left the laboratory and walked toward the building.

Surely, there were several masters in the president’s room, fighting to look at a magic slate; while Master Anderson had two fully written, magic scrolls.

“Isn’t this Master Leo?” It was Leo’s rival, Xhosa who spoke, “You came at the right time. You can appreciate the magic circle that Master Arthur just deciphered.”

“Deciphered?” Leo thought he had heard it wrong. Isn’t it just copying? No, it’s impossible even if it’s just copying. How long did it take? Didn’t Arthur take 16 to 17 hours on the first and second floor? Looking at the time now, he had only spent about 10 hours on the third and fourth floor, which total to less than 2 days. How could he copy a complete magic circle? Not to mention cracking it! Leo grabbed the slate that the masters were looking in disbelief. He couldn’t bother about the dissatisfaction of several masters and quickly took a look. This… is actually a complete magic circle and it’s quasi-four stars! No! It’s more than one! There are a quasi four-star and a four-star. Leo examined the magic circle carefully, trying to find out flaws. However, with his eyesight and accomplishments in the magic circle, he finally had to admit that both of them were absolutely complete magic circles!

“How is it possible?!” Leo said and the slate had been taken back by Master Xhosa.

“If you want to see the cracked version, go to the president! Don’t stop everyone from studying!”

Usually, when a complete magic circle was released, the masters had to study it first before comparing it with the cracked result to deepen their own insights and inspiration. Other than the president, researching the results of the cracked magic circle also required certain contribution points.

Leo came to Master Anderson’s table, then he heard Master Anderson saying to Chen Rui, “It’s indeed a perfect decipher and the narrative is very detailed. Recording a complete quasi-four-star gives you 1000 contribution points while the four star gives you 1500 contribution points. Also, deciphering quasi-four-star gives you 5000 contribution points while the four star gives you 6000 contribution points. Then, this time, your contribution point is increased by 13500. Together with your initial points upon entering the alliance, you have a total of 13600 points. To reach black star contribution level right after joining, you’re the first one.”

The president, Anderson’s positive evaluation made Leo no longer have the courage to criticize the two magic scrolls that contained deciphered data. He had already confirmed one thing. This “Arthur” was indeed a real genius that was unprecedented in the past 10,00 years in the field of mechanics. Not only did in his specializations, but he was superior in all other aspects.

Seeing Master Leo walking away dispirited, Master Anderson shook his head secretly. However, Chen Rui’s performance was too dazzling. Without considering the time during preliminary, this was his first time officially entering the ancient magic tower. In less than thirty hours, he deciphered and recorded two complete high grade magic circles. There was probably no one that could beat that record.

From now on, Leo’s monopoly on the magic circle’s contribution no longer existed. If he still didn’t control his words and behavior, he would definitely become everyone’s target.

After Chen Rui reached the black star contribution level, he wasn’t in a hurry to exchange for materials. Currently, the materials for “Thunderous Sound” had already been collected, but his aura was still a distance from the exorbitant priced blueprint. The Mechanic Alliance was rich in resources, which was equivalent to a storage of various materials. Besides, the mysteries in the ancient magic tower hadn’t yet been revealed. Moreover, there were still a large number of books and notes which were very important for Chen Rui to improve.

Certainly, being a mechanic master was an identity derived for a certain purpose, and it could be used as a way to hide or survive. However, Chen Rui’s greatest pursuit wasn’t only to be an alchemist or even a grandmaster. However, there would definitely be more artifacts in the exchange center in the future. At that time, the materials would be the biggest problem and joining the core of the Mechanic Alliance could solve that problem well.

In reality, the two magic circles that Chen Rui handed over this time were only a small part. According to the deduction of [Deep Analysis], there were absolutely more than that, but he didn’t want to reveal too much. It was good enough to reach black star in his contribution. The only regret was that he still couldn’t go up to the fifth floor.

In spite of that, Chen Rui had become a precious treasure in the eyes of the masters at the Mechanic Alliance. He is definitely worthy of being a rare genius. Not only is he proficient in three specializations, but he also has such a talent in magic circles! Chen Rui didn’t exchange for any materials. He just used his black star’s privilege to borrow some of the notes left by the previous top masters. Then, he showed a tired look, saying that he was exhausted and wanted to return to the Custer Family to rest for a while. His preparation was considered done, and now it should be the time to start the plan.

All the masters had studied magic circles and they knew it required a lot of mental effort, so they didn’t suspect and even told Chen Rui to rest well. When he regains his energy, he must come to the alliance again.

However, the masters at the Mechanic Alliance couldn’t wait for that day as an event that shocked the entire Dark Shadow Empire and even the entire Demon Realm occurred. When Master “Arthur” was out, he was attacked by strangers and his whereabouts was still unknown.

[1] https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Xunzi_(book) [2] https://zh.m.wiktionary.org/zh-hans/%E5%80%9F%E8%8A%B1%E7%8D%BB%E4%BD%9B

So there is a difference between recording and deciphering. It kind of reminds me of the difference between memorizing a theory and understanding a theory.

chapters.title: Chapter 268: Missing
chapters.body:
Chapter 268: Missing

The news of Master Arthur’s disappearance in the capital shocked the entire Dark Shadow Empire. Empress Catherine was furious and ordered the relevant departments to thoroughly investigate the matter and “solve the case” within a time limit.

Under the investigation of various parties from the justice and dark forces, something gradually surfaced.

Master Arthur was indeed a male Great Demon who was known to be dissolute. He soon alienated the beautiful succubus, who he had an intimate relationship with, and began to get close to Ms. Celine from the Custer Family. Although the dual-specialized mechanic master, Horford that Ms. Celine supported, was defeated by Master Arthur in the mechanic contest’s finals and it caused a huge trouble, the third lady caught Master Arthur’s attention instead. Their intimacy rose sharply.

Initially, the patriarch of the Custer Family, Croz, had decided to have his eldest son, Dior to be the heir. However, the relationship between Master Arthur and Celine had changed Croz’s mind. There was a faint trend of him preferring Celine and that sign undoubtedly caused Dior’s strong dissatisfaction.
