Master Arthur was assassinated before the final. Falamo and Celine were the main suspects. Yet, at that time, Celine had Horford, a dual-specialized master which was a sure win. She didn’t have to take that risk. Therefore, the Falamo couple was most suspicious.

These things were just superficial messages. The Custer Family’s three siblings must be investigated carefully. Soon, the investigating officer serving under Empress Catherine brought some men to the Custer Family and took Dior, Falamo couple and Celine away in front of the patriarch, Croz.

Two days later, the four returned to the Custer family, Dior and Falamo couple looked bleak. Even for the second general’s sister, Marianne, who had always been dominant was the same. It was only Celine who seemed calm and easy.

At the same time, a result of the interrogation was sent to the patriarch, Croz, which had the detailed plans by the Dior and Falamo against Master Arthur. Some of the terrifying conspiracies even targeted Croz which made him looked gloomier. The only thing that surprised him was Celine. Originally, this girl had already shown extraordinary strategies and vision in the mechanic contest. Yet, this time, she didn’t have any special “flaws”. Although some of her means were harsh, it was for the sake of the development of the entire Custer Family in overall.

The result of this interrogation wasn’t publicized, but Croz knew that if the master didn’t disappear, these were only internal family affairs. Besides, which family struggles didn’t have conspiracies and harming between siblings? However, this matter involved the most dazzling mechanic master of the Demon Realm, so it wasn’t an internal affair of the Custer Family anymore. Her Majesty attached great importance to this matter. If there was still no news about the master, Dior and Falamo were likely to become scapegoats for this event.

Even if master returned safely, the two sons who had left a bad “impression” on the empress weren’t suitable to be the heir of the Custer Family. Although Celine was a daughter and she was still young, her ingenuity and means were surprising. Coupled with her close relationship with the master and the results of this investigation, she was indeed a better heir as compared to Dior and Falamo. Therefore, Croz secretly made up his mind.

Within the Mechanic Alliance, the incident where Master Arthur made a record of deciphering two high grade magic circles in one day had been spread. People were amazed by the miraculous genius, and they were even more distraught about his disappearance.

When the capital was searching up and down in panic for the whereabouts of “Arthur”, the master was lying leisurely on a carriage. Beside him was a beautiful blue-haired girl who fed him fruit from time to time. She looked dedicated in serving him.

If someone who knew the blue-haired girl next to him saw that scene, he or she would definitely be surprised. When did this savage and fierce lady become a good girl?

Although the capital was completely sealed and thoroughly searched, their carriage had already left the capital before the storm surged. Even the occasional checks on their way were easily passed.

Even if Chen Rui didn’t use [Camouflage] to change his face a little bit, with his intimate and easy appearance with Fatilu, who would recognize that it was the “kidnapped” master?

Chen Rui’s disappearance was obviously planned and the opportunity for Celine to ascend was only incidental. Besides, Empress Catherine could also use this missing incident to clean up part of Broc’s side forces. The most important thing was clearly following Fatilu, who had become a puppet, to a place.

After Fatiro was made a puppet by God-Eating Mask, she explained many things. Controlling the Custer Family was only a small part of her mission. Horford was found by Fatilu, so she could use him to get close to Celine. Initially, she thought that with Horford’s capabilities, he should be able to win easily. Unexpectedly, not only did he expose his capabilities as a dual-specialized master, but he still lost!

In contrast, the Custer Family was just a tiny fish. Even if she missed it, it won’t hurt much. However, the trio-specialized mechanic master was definitely a big fish and she couldn’t miss it. She must “capture” it in advance before this big fish was attached to any other strong forces.

Currently, Fatilu and Chen Rui were going to go to the Bloody Vine Estate in the southeast direction of the capital. The current lord of the Bloody Vine Estate was Eddie Rick. Both Eddie and his father, Famoore, were strong supporters of Empress Catherine. The father and son had made contributions in the battle where Catherine settled the royal war. As a result, they were given the family name, Rick and declared as the lord of Bloody Vine Estate. Famoore was seriously injured in the royal war and was unable to heal, so he soon gave up his lordship to his son, Eddie.

It was worth mentioning that, as soon as Broc used his relationship with his father-in-law, Florence, to enter the military, Eddie had a bad relationship with him. Later, Broc became the head of the three generals of the Empire, Eddie was still having some conflicts with him. However, the Bloody Vine Estate was very big, so maybe Eddie was also hoodwinked. The truth was still waiting to be investigated.

Fatilu said everything she knew, but her knowledge was also very limited. She only knew that her mother, Sabrina, was in the Bloody Vine Estate, but there was no specific location. As for the Demon Overlord father, Azgalor, even she didn’t know his whereabouts. However, from Fatilu, he learned that her mother also had an uncle who was also a Leviathan Royal Family. He had unpredictable strength.

Under the control of God-Eating Mask, Fatilu had become a puppet who was completely loyal to Chen Rui. Not to mention this kind of serving, even if he took off all her clothes and defiled her, she wouldn’t have a single bit of resistance. However, even though Fatiru looked beautiful and attractive, Chen Rui still found her disgusting. Besides, he wasn’t a guy who was into BDSM, so naturally, he wasn’t very interested. What really enticed him was Kia, that little seductress.

After Old Gauss awakened, he was held by Chen Rui to have a private talk. The news of the trio-specialized master should have spread across the Demon Realm quickly. Shea would surely guess that it was related to him, so Chen Rui didn’t hide his identity. He simply said he used some kind of secret method to appear as a Higher Demon on the surface but in reality, he was only a Lesser Demon. As for Aguile, he’d protect Chen Rui in secret, so Princess Royal Shea could rest assured and so on.

After this incident, he might need to disappear for some time to prepare for the next plan. If he had time, only then he would go back to the Dark Moon.

Chen Rui asked Old Gauss to bring Kia back immediately. As for the Custer Family, it was basically settled. The effect could be seen soon. He also outlined some ideas for Dark Moon’s future development and told Old Gauss to pass the message to Shea for her to consider. Old Gauss knew that with every step of the plan, Chen Rui’s risk would increase exponentially. He admired the human even more. After contacting Shea, he agreed with Chen Rui’s arrangement.

Since Shea and Old Gauss had always been wary of Kia, they naturally didn’t reveal the biggest secret of Chen Rui’s identity. They tactfully mentioned that “Arthur” was a wandering mechanic hired at the cost of three secret treasures. Regarding Kia’s life experience and other things, Chen Rui also hid them from Old Gauss and Kia definitely wouldn’t take the initiative to disclose them to Old Gauss. Therefore, there was no danger of exposing his identity and the like.

For this man who was willing to risk his life and go into danger for her, Kia’s gratitude was to the extreme. In addition, another kind of emotion that she had became stronger. She knew that apart from offering her body, there was nothing worth repaying to him. However, the special devouring physique made it impossible for her to achieve that kind of repayment. To be precise, she couldn’t achieve “completely”.

The succubus race was good at serving the opposite sex. This ability had even penetrated into the inheritance of their bloodline. Although Kia was still a virgin and she couldn’t engage in intimacy due to her physique, she had some special methods that could satisfy men’s desire from another perspective.

Facing Kia’s voluntary persistence, as a man, Chen Rui also shamelessly accepted eventually. In fact, from their first meeting, he had always had a little feeling for this seductress, but it gradually faded after.

After coming to the Dark Shadow’s capital, under certain circumstances, the feelings he acted became increasingly difficult to control, especially when Kia confessed about her miserable life to Chen Rui. He had an inevitably strong will in his heart to protect this woman for life so that she didn’t have to cry by smiling anymore.

Although due to the limitation of succubus’ physique, they didn’t do the real deal. However, that special “treatment” gave Chen Rui a taste of an indescribable wonder, so his desire that had been suppressed for a month exploded violently.

After that incident, Kia had been officially included in the harem roster. When the plan to infiltrate the enemy was completed, Chen Rui’s identity should be revealed to her. At the moment, there were only three people on the roster: swordswoman, noblewoman, and seductress.

The circumstances of life were really unpredictable. In his last life in that world, his greatest wish was to find a woman who loved each other and stayed together for a lifetime. However, he eventually became a spare for someone, and his dream was shattered and failed.

Unexpectedly, after being reborn to this strange world, he could actually live happily with a few women that he liked. Demon Realm, a good place with excellent traditions and customs, was simply heaven for realizing otaku’s dreams.

Up until now, the banner of his harem had begun to fly uncontrollably along the wind. Urm… the swordswoman and seductress are basically settled, but the difficulty of the noblewoman has reached S-level. Am I going to end up with one on each arm? Can’t I carry one more on my back? He remembered a saying, “the altar of the harem will only be effective by worshipping the protagonist’s corpse”. Even if he could fulfill his perverted wishes, the justice of the swordswoman, the wisdom of the noblewoman, the deceit of the seductress and perhaps even the arrogance of the iceberg woman, they could never be as peaceful as described in the novels. Even if the man had [Damage Absorption] and [Astral Form], together with the dragon’s superb ability, he would probably be torn apart again and again inevitably…

“Master, we’ve arrived at Town Pascal.” Fatilu’s words woke the protagonist from his fantasies. It seemed that his comfortable days were over. The real challenge finally came.

What kind of danger awaits Chen Rui this time?

chapters.title: Chapter 269: Promises And Premeditations
chapters.body:
Chapter 269: Promises And Premeditations

Chen Rui restored to his Arthur’s appearance, wore a cloak that looked bad and followed Fatilu off the carriage to enter Town Pascal.

Town Pascal was about the same size as Town Leia. Fatilu took Chen Rui’s hand and came to a private house. This house looked very ordinary, and it seemed only middle class. Fatilu knocked on the door with a special rhythm and the door opened immediately. It was an ordinary-looking female Great Demon at the strength of Higher Demon who opened the door. Seeing that Fatilu brought a stranger here, she was surprised, “You’re… Ms. Fatilu. Why did you bring someone here…”

Although Fatilu was obedient on the carriage, she returned to her vicious and arrogant temper in front of others, “Cut the crap and immediately contact my mom! Tell her there is an emergency! If you dare to delay one second, I’ll dig your eyes out!”

The Great Demon glanced at Chen Rui who was holding Fatilu’s hand and didn’t dare to ask more. She immediately walked into the house with the two of them. Sabrina acted very cautiously. The Dark Shadow Empire wasn’t a remote place like Dark Moon. There were many ways to interfere with and capture unofficial magic communication towers. Therefore, to contact her, it could only be achieved by designated people using specific methods. Otherwise, even Fatiro wouldn’t be able to contact her mother on the road.

The female Great Demon walked into the house and came to a basement-like entrance. She walked in and lit the magic lamp. There was nothing special in the basement except a relatively-common mirror.

The Great Demon bit her finger and drew a few odd symbols on the mirror with her blood. Then, the mirror suddenly emitted a strange light. Soon, a woman’s upper half body appeared before their eyes. The woman’s face was covered with a veil. Generally speaking, the Leviathan Royal Family were mostly blue-haired, but it wasn’t absolute. This woman’s hair was blonde and so were her eyes. She was wearing a tight robe which made her breasts look ample. She must be Fatilu’s mother, Sabrina.

Sabrina’s tone was full of grimness, “Naru, what happened that made you use the emergency contact?”

“It’s me! Mother!” Fatiru went to the front of the mirror and said to Naru, “Naru, leave now!”

Naru saluted respectfully and left the basement.

“Mom, I’ve completed the most important task!” Fatilu excitedly pulled Chen Rui to the mirror and said, “I brought the trio-specialized master!”

Sabrina was moved, “Fatilu, is this… Master Arthur? Did you encounter any danger on the road?”

“We were hunted by Empress Catherine’s imperial guards and my guards were all dead! Even Tapuli was killed to protect me!” Fatilu looked traumatized. “Fortunately, I still managed to bring the master here.”

“Well done.” Sabrina didn’t care about the death of the bodyguards and nodded approvingly. Then, she sneered again, “Let’s see what that overbearing woman has to say now! You don’t know yet, but that mechanic master, Horford was recommended by her. Unexpectedly, he failed the first time he took part in an operation!

Chen Rui’s thoughts moved slightly. The “overbearing woman” that Sabrina mentioned was called Izola, who was favored by Fatilu’s father. Besides, her means and strength were also very good, so she was Sabrina’s rival. This time, her daughter did a great job, so she should be able to show off in front of Izola.

Horford is a dual-specialized master, and he is probably a disciple of the Demon Realm’s top mechanic master, Nate. He was actually recommended by Izola. Is the Bloody Empire’s Nate related to this force as well? Fatilu laughed, “Speaking of that, if it weren’t for this trio-specialized master, Horford could have easily won.”

“Ms. Fatilu’s compliments were too much.” Chen Rui bowed at the woman in the mirror, “Beautiful Madam Sabrina, I’m very honored to see you.”

“Fatilu, you’re not controlling the master? What did you say to him?” Sabrina saw Chen Rui’s calm look and her voice seemed surprised.

“Relax, mom.” Fatilu smiled weirdly, “Master is a very interesting person. At first, I did control him, but when the danger came later, master actually helped us out.”

Sabrina was very surprised and said, “Please forgive me, to invite master over in this presumptuous way.”

“Ma’am, to be absolutely honest, I was indeed kind of upset at first.” Chen Rui smiled, “However, Ms. Fatilu promised me a great reward. If this reward is true, even if you don’t invite me, I’ll come too.”

“Do you only remember that reward?” Fatilu leaned on Chen Rui’s shoulder intimately, “Am I not better than that reward?”

“ Hehe. ” Chen Rui grabbed her waist and went along, “Adding you, there are two rewards. I want both.”

Seeing the close relationship of her daughter with the master, Sabrina wasn’t angry. Instead, she chuckled, “Master, Fatilu is always not fond with men. Unexpectedly, she has quite a good taste this time.”

“By the way, mother. I even bumped into that bitch, Kia at the capital this time.”

Sabrina nodded, “I just received a report from Kia through the channel a few days ago, saying that Dior, the Custer Family’s eldest son fled to the Dark Moon and fell in love with Kia. It happened that the Dark Moon’s Princess Royal wanted to buy food by helping the Custer Family to ease the crisis of sanctions, so she sent someone and Kia to the capital together. Although Dior relied on master to win, he lost his heir’s status due to the disappearance of master. Subsequently, Kia followed the people from Dark Moon and returned. Now, the Custer Family’s heir is the third lady, Celine. However, she is now closely monitored by many forces in this capital, so we might lose this connection. Anyway, it doesn’t matter. Even if there isn’t the Custer Family, the problem isn’t big. The key is that master has come here… Master, I’m telling a lot of secrets in front of you, do you understand what I mean?”

Kia’s “report” was instructed by Chen Rui. The purpose was to stabilize Sabrina, so no flaws would be exposed. Since Kia hurried over to the Dark Shadow Empire, it was reasonable that she didn’t have time to report at the Dark Moon Estate.

“Ma’am can’t use these means.” Chen Rui shook his head, “Since I’m willing to come here, I’m obviously mentally prepared. However, the reward I want must be true. Don’t try to trick me!”

Sabrina frowned and asked, “Fatilu, what benefit did you promise the master?”

“I promised master to lend him the greatest artifact of the Leviathan Royal Family for him to study!” Fatilu replied proudly.

“Illusive Demon Shield?” Sabrina was taken aback, “Isn’t the artifact… how can you make such a promise?!”

“Didn’t you mention, mom? As long as I can complete the task, I can do it at any cost.” Fatilu said pitifully, “Even if the Illusive Demon Shield isn’t with us, we can still…”

“Shut up!” Sabrina stopped what Fatiru was about to say. Seeing her daughter’s sad face and thinking of her big contribution this time, she comforted, “In any case, you completed your mission well this time. As for this matter, I think… we’ll discuss when we meet. If master is truly sincere, it’s definitely not a problem. Besides, the benefits are far more than that.”

“I’m certainly sincere, but your most important sincerity is the Illusive Demon Shield.” Chen Rui said, “I have three hobbies, mechanics, women and alcohol. My first hobby is way stronger than my other two which explains my achievements today. I forgot to tell madam that I’m not only a trio-specialized master, but my talent in magic circles isn’t any less than my talent in the three specializations. Illusive Demon Shield is the strongest defense among the seven artifacts. The most mysterious thing is the magic circle on it. I don’t mean to take the Illusive Demon Shield as my own. Ma’am should know that except for the people recognized by the artifacts in the Leviathan Royal Family, it’s useless for anyone else to have the artifact. What I want is to study the artifact. That’ll absolutely benefit me a lot in terms of mechanics. If ma’am doubts my sincerity, then there isn’t a need for us to meet.”

“Why would I doubt the sincerity of master?” Sabrina said with a smile, “Master seems to have underestimated your reputation. In less than two days, you’ve deciphered two high-grade magic circles from the ancient magic tower at the Mechanic Alliance. Bloody Vine Estate isn’t too far from the capital, so that incident has spread across this place. Master’s talent in magic circles is definitely the best in the Demon Realm undoubtedly.”

Surely, his performance and attention he got at the Mechanic Alliance wasn’t in vain. That was part of the plan. Other than some necessary concealment, there was also a long term goal – Magic Shield.

At the very least, I must make that Dark Shadow’s general devastated and suffer. Listening to Chen Rui’s words, together with the analysis from previous information, Sabrina trusted a little more but she hadn’t completely believed, “Master, I’m currently around Town Vaulx at the border of Bloody Vine Estate. I’ll hurry over to pick you up. It may take about five days. Before that, please stay in Town Pascal. You can tell Fatilu if you have any request. I believe she’ll satisfy you.”

Sabrina didn’t know there was a huge difference in strength between them. She wasn’t worried that her daughter would suffer. Even if it was real, it was worth it to get the Demon Realm’s genius to her side.

“No problem.” Chen Rui glanced at Fatilu with a smile while Fatilu returned with a charming smile.

After the long-distance call was over, Chen Rui’s days were more relaxed. Yet, under normal circumstances, he couldn’t leave the house. He could only occasionally walk out with Fatilu’s company at night.

On the evening of the next day, Chen Rui suddenly had a strange feeling as if he was being watched. He deliberately came out to wander around with Fatilu. The data that appeared occasionally in the range of [Analytical Eyes] made him finally determine one thing.

Race: Envy Royal Family (Mutated). Comprehensive Strength Assessment: B+. Physique: B Strength: B+; Spirit: B+; Agility: B+.

A Leviathan Royal Family at the peak of the Great Demon King. Similar to Fatilo, the person had extremely balanced stats. The person seemed to train in both magic and physical combat.

The one who met these requirements was likely to be Fatilu’s mother, Sabrina!

The true strength needed to be further confirmed because powerhouses above the strength of Demon Emperor could control their combat power freely. Some of them even deliberately suppressed their strength as a training so that they could explode stronger power during battle.

Originally, she said that it would take five days to send someone to pick me up, but they actually came in two days. Besides, the information about Town Vaulx might also be fake. The purpose was to test me!

They surely aren’t an easy opponent! Also… Sabrina is probably just a pawn in this force.

However, Chen Rui wasn’t an easy spy too.

chapters.title: Chapter 270: Mysterious Manu
chapters.body:
Chapter 270: Mysterious Manu

After Chen Rui understood Sabrina’s surveillance, he didn’t change anything deliberately and continued to drink and flirt with Fatilu. Certainly, the flirting was just a performance between the master and the puppet. Under the control of Chen Rui, Fatilu’s rudeness and arrogance still showed from time to time, which made the woman who was watching secretly shook her head.

The fifth day came and Sabrina indeed came from “Town Vaulx” in a hurry. After the observations these few days, coupled with the fact that there was no movement in Town Vaulx, Sabrina’s wariness was reduced by a lot, and she began to formally “surface”.

In all fairness, Sabrina’s figure was really good. She was mature yet full of temptation. In his impression, only the “Lady Devil’s Snare, Isabella” from the Fallen Angel’s capital could surpass her.

Fatilu was only an underdeveloped child as compared to Sabrina. The lifespan of the demons was very long, especially the royal families. Therefore, when the mother and daughter stood together, they were just like sisters.

Surely, the data shown by [Analytical Eyes] last time had confirmed that the spy was indeed Sabrina. Chen Rui was maliciously wondering if this woman had a certain fetish as she didn’t even miss when he deliberately touched Fatilu.

Although he wasn’t the legendary mother-daughter-con, to be honest, it was quite pleasant to the eyes when these two women stood together. However, this pair of mother and daughter had a lot of labels like, vicious, arrogant, merciless. Even if they didn’t have strength nor background, he couldn’t afford to get close.

Perhaps he was influenced by a bad Sloth Royal Family, “Arthur, the master’s characteristics” were set as “three hobbies – mechanics, beauties and alcohol.” Fortunately, he wasn’t that envenomed to the point that he preferred married women and widows.

Since he loved beauties, he obviously had to look at Sabrina pervertedly. That was a disguise and also a pretending to show compliments. If he ignored it, it might raise Sabrina’s suspicions.

As imagined, Sabrina wasn’t averted by the rather rude gazes. Instead, she laughed ecstatically, “Master is now a celebrity who shocked the Demon Realm. It was indeed a bit abrupt to invite you here. I hope master won’t mind.”

Chen Rui said with a smile, “In the face of a charming woman like madam, I can’t be angry if I want to. Am I not Ms. Fatiru’s captive now? By the way, I’m now also ma’am’s captive now too.”

Fatilu interjected distastefully, “Where do I find a captive as comfortable as you are?”

Chen Rui grinned, “However, in my heart, beauty and fine wine aren’t as attractive as mechanics. What I’m most concerned about now is whether the biggest promise that Ms. Fatilu gave me can be fulfilled?”

Sabrina witnessed Chen Rui’s character in secret in the past few days, and he indeed had the “three hobbies” as rumored. She laughed and said, “How many artifacts are there in the whole Demon Realm? What’s more, it’s one of the most famous seven artifacts? Don’t be anxious, master. I’ve already prepared a carriage. Let’s leave this town first and go to another comfortable place.”

The three of them got into the carriage together. Chen Rui was a lot disciplined on the way. He would please Sabrina from time to time which made Fatilu jealous. It was similar to their usual characters, so Sabrina wasn’t doubting her daughter. She was just seducing Chen Rui from time to time while probing for his origin.

Chen Rui only said that he was a wandering mechanic, then he was discovered by Shea, the lord of Dark Moon. She wanted to recruit him, but he didn’t want to stay in such a small and unpromising place like Dark Moon. Therefore, he took advantage of the incident to help Dior of the Custer Family to leave the Dark Moon and used the mechanic contest to become famous.

This identity had a lot of flaws, but Christina had thought well about it. She had already made all the necessary preparations. Even if now, Sabrina sent someone to the places where Chen Rui once “wandered”, she wouldn’t find any flaws as if someone like that did exist.

That was the strength as a country. If he was alone, he couldn’t produce such an effect no matter how strong he was.

Sabrina kept everything in her mind. After two days, the carriage arrived at their destination. It wasn’t the so-called border town, but the core of the Bloody Vine Estate, the Bloody Vine City.

Bloody Vine City was smaller than the Dark Moon City, but its prosperity was far better than the Dark Moon. It was second only to the Dark Shadow’s capital. The carriage was parked in front of a rather remote courtyard, which should be Sabrina’s property in the Bloody Vine City.

The owner of this manor was a senior potioneer working under the lord of Bloody Vine City and Sabrina’s identity was his wife. However, it was clear that this dark elf potioneer was definitely not Azgalor, the father of Kia and Fatilu. He must be just a disguise under her control. Potioneer’s reputation had always been very bad. Therefore, apart from some regular buyers or the lord’s men, most people would avoid this manor. To some extent, it was also an effective cover.

Sabrina had always been cautious. Although the news from all channels indicated that this master had no problem, if she really had to offer the artifact or let him contact the deeper level of the force she was in, it wasn’t trivial after all. If it wasn’t because [Soul Shackles] would affect the mind and thus, directly affecting the development of this genius in the future, which was his greatest value, Sabrina would have used her controlling skill to save the troubles once and for all.

A few days later, Chen Rui couldn’t help but broke out, “Ma’am, I’ve had enough! I came here with Ms. Fatilu and even protected her on the way wasn’t to be imprisoned in your house! I want the artifact! I want magic circles! I want a mechanic workshop!”

This kind of reaction was as expected by Sabrina. If Chen Rui had been calm about the current state, it would have raised her suspicions instead. Chen Rui actually expected that too. Being a spy had always been highly technical work.

“Master, don’t worry. I believe you’ve already known something in advance from Fatilu. Thus, I’m very sorry, but I can’t let you out. As for the artifact… the Illusive Demon Shield is the most important artifact of the Leviathan Royal Family and it isn’t with me. I’m currently requesting from the owner via some channel, so please wait patiently. Soon, the artifact or the most complete mechanics workshop will appear before master.”

On the afternoon of the same day Sabrina said that, a guest came to the manor, who appeared to be buying a potion, but he actually came to the courtyard where Chen Rui was house arrest.

It was a middle-aged man in his thirties that had a smile on his face. His eyes were like two curved slits, and his eyes could be barely seen. However, the age of demons couldn’t be measured by appearance so was his strength.

Race: Envy Royal Family (Mutated). Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A+ Physique: A; Strength: A-; Spirit: A+; Agility: A+.

Peak of Demon Emperor! That’s only the minimal strength assessment. Judging from the information by Fatilu’s expression, this man must be Sabrina’s uncle, the mysterious powerhouse whom Fatilu called “Grandpa Manu”!

This old man, already so old, but he still appears as an uncle in his thirties to act young? Although he was being sarcastic, Chen Rui was still very nervous. After all, this Manu was likely to be a Demon Overlord powerhouse. Fatilu’s father Azgalor Beelzebub and this Manu Leviathan. The opponents that Chen Rui had to face were more powerful than expected. Yet, since he was already there, he couldn’t look back. Fear would only make him die faster. His opponent kidnapped him for nothing more than his superb talent in trio-specializations. In the future, he was likely to become a grandmaster in mechanics. Therefore, under normal circumstances, they wouldn’t harm him. If it wasn’t for that reason, with the strength of Sabrina, how could she keep her patience and let her daughter flirt with a Higher Demon (at most a Demon King)?

Chen Rui returned to his usual calmness. What’s there to be afraid of. It’s not like I’ve never seen Demon Overlords. Two of them became my friends while another was killed by me. Manu glanced at Chen Rui and smiled even more, “Master really is extraordinary. You actually noticed I’m out of ordinary and managed to return calm so quickly. You’re worthy of the title as the first genius master in the mechanic field for thousands of years.”

Chen Rui was secretly shocked: My emotional fluctuations just now were only for a moment. I can’t believe Manu has such detailed observation. It’s like the first time I met Christina. It seems that this guy is stronger than I expected. “Sir, my senses are extraordinary. I did notice you’re out of the ordinary.” Chen Rui calmed down, “However, for you guys to bring me here, it must be for my talent. Perhaps it’s an opportunity for me, so I need not be afraid.”

“For master to have today’s achievements, it’s indeed not accidental. With this determination, your future achievements will surely shine throughout the entire Demon Realm.” Manu nodded approvingly, but his words seemed somewhat old-fashioned. “You have a major decision to make in front of you. It might be the key point for you to reach the top. It all depends on how you decide.”

“Actually, I’ve kind of guessed it.” Facing this old fox, pretending to be stupid was obviously not going to work, so Chen Rui said frankly, “As a mechanic master with no roots, I must have chosen a force that can provide me funding. I don’t care about who’s the target. I only care whether this force can give me everything I want and whether it can let me take a step forward to the peak of grandmaster.”

“Really?” Manu was still smirking without answering.

“Are you doubting my talent?” Chen Rui seemed to be insulted, and he was agitated, “It’s undeniable that my combat power can only be regarded as ants in front of all of you. However, not to be rude, but all of you are just ants in the field of mechanics! Even Nate, who is known as the top mechanic master in the Demon Realm now, will be defeated by me completely if we compete against the master contest’s rules!”

A large part of that act was based on a real character which was was Master Xingxing. Manu nodded secretly and said, “Master, please don’t get me wrong. Your shine in the mechanic contest has spread throughout the Demon Realm, including a lot of mechanic masters thought you might be the most possible in becoming the first mechanic grand master in the past 10,000 years. I’m not doubting your capabilities and talents.” Manu took a few steps with the same smile, but his voice was lowered, “I can give you the artifact to study, provide the best workshop in the Demon Realm and provide all the materials and instruments you want. However, you must make a choice.”

“What choice?”

Manu turned around, the squinting right eye opened slightly and emitting a strange black light. An overwhelming amount of pressure had surrounded Chen Rui in an instant, “Subdue to me!”

Its the power again? They really thought their power were invincible, don’t they?

chapters.title: Chapter 271: Soul Shackles And Decision
chapters.body:
Chapter 271: Soul Shackles And Decision

Chen Rui had already vaguely guessed Manu’s so-called “decision”， so he sneered, “As a trio-specialized master, I have my own pride and perseverance too. If I discard these, then a flawed soul could never reach that highest peak! The peak of a grandmaster is the biggest goal in my life. If you insist on me being a humble servant, I would rather die!”

Manu smiled even stronger, but that pressure was stronger too. The entire space seemed to be frozen. Chen Rui was unable to move. He had released his early stage Demon King strength to resist at full force. The assassination at the capital would definitely be detected by Manu. Besides, with Horford’s confirmation, his Demon King-level strength must be revealed.

Chen Rui didn’t dare to use his full strength. He just tried his best to use [Breath Holding] while using the skill of changing combat power taught by Paglio. He was betting that Manu wouldn’t easily kill a trio-specialized mechanic master.

Surely, Manu’s breath stopped again. The moment he opened his eyes, the value in [Analytical Eyes] seemed to have reached “Unable to Judge”. However, it returned to its original state instantly. It seemed that this guy was indeed a Demon Overlord powerhouse.

Manu applauded, “Master’s perseverance is really admirable. I’m just testing you. However, has master ever thought about it? Even if you have no flaws in your history, it’s impossible that you’ve been unknown to public as a wandering apprentice with your trio-specialization master ability, and you have only risen now. Don’t be angry, master. It’s purely because I’m sincerely wanting to invite master to join and become the most important core of the force. Therefore, please don’t be offended if I’m too straightforward. Doesn’t master want to explain?”

“Everyone has their own secrets.” Chen Rui shook his head, “I didn’t ask you about the specific situation of this force. The reason why I’m willing to follow Ms. Fatilu to the Bloody Vine Estate is for the artifact! My previous bottleneck has been stuck on my way toward the top master. In the ancient magic tower at the capital, I have gained important insights. I’ve deciphered a four-star and a quasi-four-star high grade magic circle continuously. That should be the key to further advancement! If I can study the wonders of the magic circle in the artifact, I might become the top master with three specializations instantly. Once I reach that level, even Nate has to look up to me. If I ascend even further…”

The news of Chen Rui successively deciphering two magic circles in the ancient magic tower had already spread across the Dark Shadow Empire, so Manu obviously knew that. That remark also explained why “Arthur” took the initiative to follow Fatilu as a mechanic master as he clearly wouldn’t give up on any opportunity to reach the top.

Manu nodded slightly: As rumored, Master “Arthur” is indeed the most promising candidate to become a grandmaster! If he can really join our force and become a grandmaster, then the value he will generate is absolutely immeasurable. Exactly because of that, I must control this man and not let anyone else use him! “Master, you must have known from Fatilu the secrets of the Leviathan Royal Family. I wonder if you’ve heard of the Envy Royal Family’s blood talent, [Soul Shackles]?”

Chen Rui frowned secretly. His identity and explanation should have no problem at all, but Manu still wanted to control him. He nodded and said, “The bloodline talents of the seven royal families are famous. How could I never hear of it? Are you trying to cast [Soul Shackles] on me?”

“The royal family also has mutated bloodline and my [Soul Shackles] has a mutated ability. I call it the [Soul Channel]. This [Soul Channel] is very unique as the caster also has to pay a considerable price.”

Manu stopped smiling and said in a serious tone, “After accepting the [Soul Channel], part of my strength will remain in the [Soul Channel], which can enhance your strength. Although it’s only a small part, there’ll still be a substantial increase in all of your stats for your current level. Even if you suffer a fatal damage, I’ll be damaged accordingly.”

“The only price… I believe you know, it’s the control of [Soul Shackles]. This control isn’t slavery but for caution. Since the [Soul Channel] has the characteristics of sharing power and damages, I never use it lightly. Now, it also represents my sincerity.”

Actually, Manu still lied a little bit. It was right that Chen Rui would be able to strengthen through the [Soul Channel], but Manu was hiding about the damage. Although when Chen Rui received severe damage or die will cause severe damage to him, the damage that Manu received would also be multiplied and “shared” to Chen Rui.

“I won’t force master.” As Manu said, a colorful light ball appeared in the palm of his hand. “If master voluntarily accepts the [Soul Channel], then you’ll truly join us as part of the core. Regardless of artifact, material, magic circle, laboratory, woman, fine wine… we’ll do our best to provide you with all the resources and needs! If master isn’t willing, then you can only be taken as an ordinary mechanic master under our supervision and control and you’ll also be provided with certain conditions. However, there’ll be great restrictions on many matters. Master should be able to guess the essential difference between the two. At this point, we definitely cannot let you go, so it depends on how you choose.”

“No matter how you change its name and characteristics, [Soul Shackles] is still [Soul Shackles]. If I accepted it, it’s equivalent to paying the price of freedom.” Chen Rui frowned, “I can’t think of the essential difference between the two.”

“In this world, there’s no free lunches.” Manu continued to persuade with a smile, “If you’re not willing to pay even the slightest price, then forgive me for being rude, but your perseverance might not withstand until the peak of grandmaster.”

Countless thoughts had already flown past in Chen Rui’s mind: Being an undercover is indeed hard. This is a huge test. To truly enter the core of the force, I must gain Manu’s trust! One won’t get the tiger’s cub without going into the tiger’s den. Accepting [Soul Shackles] is the best way to do it. There are two ways to remove [Soul Shackles]. One of them is that the caster removed it or died; the other one is that the victim died. Other than that, there is another way, that is, using the artifacts of the Leviathan Royal Family, which can offset the effect of [Soul Shackles]. Half of this artifact is with Delia and the other half… am I not here to borrow it? In an instant, Chen Rui had already made a major decision. He slowly walked toward Manu. When Chen Rui’s hand extended toward the light ball, Manu’s heart was filled with joy although his face was indifferent.

When Chen Rui was about to come into contact with the light ball, his body suddenly stopped. He seemed to have changed his mind. Manu frowned slightly. With his strength, he was naturally not afraid of Chen Rui’s sneak attack, but he felt like the meat that was in his mouth disappeared.

Actually, he could have forcibly cast the [Soul Channel] on Chen Rui.Chen Rui’s skills in mechanics actually weren’t as good as those top masters that focused on one specialization, but his greatest value was his potential as a future grandmaster. If it wasn’t voluntary, it might cause a defect in his soul which would outweigh the gains.

At that moment, Manu saw Chen Rui’s eyes glowing as he suddenly asked, “When will the artifact arrive? I want an exact answer!”

Manu’s narrowed eyes lit up, and he gave an answer confidently, “Within ten days.”

“Okay!” Chen Rui’s eyes suddenly became fanatical and a strange smile appeared at the corner of his mouth. His paused movement accelerated rapidly. Without hesitation, he grasped the light ball, and the light ball was quickly absorbed into his body.

Manu had been paying attention to Chen Rui’s eyes and expressions. Even the hint of madness and surprise couldn’t be hid from him. When he saw Chen Rui indeed accepted [Soul Channel] voluntarily, he stopped having any doubts. Even if he didn’t usually show emotions, he laughed loudly involuntarily. The trio-specialized master who’s most likely to become a grandmaster is finally held firmly in my hands! However, Manu couldn’t have imagined what the real reason was for Chen Rui’s sudden pause and surprise.

When Chen Rui was about to touch the light ball, the system’s notification suddenly appeared in his mind, “Found an unknown spiritual link. Annotation: Level 1; can be cancelled; can be disconnect. Accept or reject?”

Cancelled means dispel. As for disconnect… it is to retain the stats that I obtain from the connection and forcefully break the link. However, the cost is higher than “canceling”. This means that the “shared strength” function that Manu used to persuade me might be unfortunate. Demon Overlord’s strength! Even if it’s only a small part of it, it’s quite amazing for a Great Demon King. Since someone gives me such a huge supplement, why should I refuse it? I was already prepared for sacrifice, but I didn’t expect that surprise. Super System, I love you so much! At that moment, Chen Rui and Manu both smiled in a mischievous manner, “Master is really courageous! Now, you’re officially one of us.” Chen Rui’s performance made Manu feel completely relieved as [Soul Shackles] was one of Demon Realm’s most powerful mind controlling skills. It engraved deep into the body and mind, so the master could torture or kill the shackled person across the space from anywhere.

What’s more, the master accepted it voluntarily, so at least for quite some time, he didn’t have to worry about the possibility of betrayal.

The moment when the strength of the [Soul Channel] entered his body, Chen Rui felt that there was a lot of extra power in his body. His stamina, spirit and other stats had increased.

“Master should feel the benefits of [Soul Channel] now.” Manu said with a smile, “My strength is at Demon Overlord. Master has gained one thousandth of my strength. What you feel now should only be a small amount. If you can meditate and digest the power, you can at least reach Great Demon King.”

It turned out to be only one thousandth. Such a stingy guy! Although Chen Rui murmured in his heart, he also understood that if the strength was too strong, he might explode. This state was most suitable for his level, which can make the strength of Migrez state more powerful.

Providing help when needed. That trick is called “raining in time” right? He is indeed a Leviathan Royal Family with [Water Mastery]. “Strength is secondary to me, but spirit has a great advantage in the research of magic circles.” Chen Rui was the type who still complained after getting benefits. He said in dissatisfaction, “My only concern now is when can I leave this ghastly place?! Both the mother and daughter, Sabrina and Fatilu are superb, but what’s the use of it if I can only look but not touch! The most important thing is that I haven’t really settled down for a long time to study mechanics! Since you’re a Demon Overlord, you should know that strength will depreciate if not improved. The same is true for mechanics!”

“That’s right. Master is indeed a master.” Manu nodded, “Since master has accepted the [Soul Channel], then you’re one of us. I’ll take you to a good place that only we can go. Whether it is mechanics or beautiful women, all your wishes and needs could be fulfilled there.”

Chen Rui’s heart moved. After acting for so long, the main plot is finally coming. “This place is called Crystal Valley.”

A powerful mind controlling technique could only be a food for the Super System. It should be called Cheating System…

chapters.title: Chapter 272: Crystal Valley! Old Enemies
chapters.body:
Chapter 272: Crystal Valley! Old Enemies

The journey to Crystal Valley wasn’t in a carriage but on a griffin. The griffin was mutated. It had great speed, but it was still slightly inferior to the wyverns. Surely, their combat power was still far from comparable to the wyverns.

This time, Sabrina and her daughter also came along. The potioneer’s manor in the Bloody Vine City was only a temporary stronghold. The real base camp should be in this Crystal Valley.

Even the mutated griffin took almost seven days to arrive. The endless swamp in front of him was simply a harsh area. It couldn’t be matched with the wonderful name of “Crystal Valley”.

According to previous information obtained from Fatilu, it should also be Fatilu’s first time being here. Manu and Sabrina were both at ease. Manu was walking at the forefront, and he specifically told Chen Rui and Fatilu to walk according to his footprints. Sometimes, they even had to change their posture to avoid accidents while Sabrina followed at the back.

When Chen Rui was in Town Pascal, he specially studied the map of Bloody Vine Estate. This swamp had a vast area, which was probably a misty swamp in the northern Black Iron mountain range. The area of the Black Iron mountain range was very larg. It was far bigger than the Xilang mountain range, and it was already close to the Bloody Empire.

There were a lot of creatures in the swamp, such as mutated crocodiles and giant lizards, but he didn’t see any high-level demonic beasts like wyvern and hydra. In contrast, the number of draconic flies were shocking. These draconic flies seemed a little different from those Chen Rui saw at the Silent Night Wetland. They seemed to be a lot stronger here. Also, their body even flashed in a faint light. In [Analytical Eyes], they were shown as a mutated breed.

Chen Rui followed Manu’s footsteps and the familiar feeling in his heart grew stronger and stronger. Dragon Inscription! Under the misty swamp are Dragon Inscriptions! The power of inscription is only slightly inferior to the inscription near Paglio’s treasure in the Silent Night wetland!

Could this place be another secret treasure spot left by a dragon? After walking for a long time, Manu stopped on a high hill. In front of it was a large pool. The water was green, and it was bubbling from time to time. The air was filled with a rancid smell. It was obviously poisonous. A highly toxic demonic beast like hydra was probably hiding in it.

“Here we are.”

“Grandpa Manu, are you kidding?” Fatilu asked in surprise, “This is the Crystal Valley? No matter how I look at it, isn’t it just a poison swamp reek of rotten smell?”

Chen Rui immediately replied, “Magic circle! This must be the effect of some kind of magic circle! This magic circle should be a composite type, which is much more complicated than what we encountered on the way. It seems that this trip is worth it. My curiosity about the Crystal Valley is even stronger now!”

Actually, he was very clear that it was a triple-layered Dragon Inscription made up of [Illusion], [Imitate] and [Fixed-point Teleportation].

Manu applauded, “You are indeed a talented genius master in magic circle! I believe the things inside won’t let you down!”

After he finished talking, Manu jumped straight down into the poison swamp, the water splashed high and his figure disappeared instantly. Fatilu couldn’t help but exclaim.

It’s just a [Imitate] inscription! Chen Rui secretly despised Manu’s move when entering water. The difficulty factor is too low. He didn’t even have the technique to reduce splashes. 10 marks deducted! Behind him, Sabrina comforted her daughter, “Don’t be afraid, Fatilu, just jump down.”

Chen Rui had already jumped in without hesitation. Surely, after a dazzling teleportation, he had arrived at a strange place.

It was a beautiful place. The surrounding tall mountains wrapped around a narrow, long green area. It was narrow and long only relative to the huge mountains. The narrowest area had at least dozens of scattered houses. There was a clear river flowing at the center. In the distance, he could also vaguely see a waterfall.

The beautiful scenery of the green mountains and clear waters was like a paradise. As compared with the harsh muddy swamps, they were a world apart. This is the real Crystal Valley! The figures of Sabrina and Fatilu soon appeared beside Chen Rui. Seeing the surprised expressions of Chen Rui and Fatilu, Manu smiled slightly, “Let’s go. There’ll be time for you to appreciate the scene.”

Manu led the three of them walking down. There were many guards along the way. When they saw Manu, they looked respectful, but there were also some who turned a blind eye like a mindless puppet.

Chen Rui was paying attention to an odd creature. This creature had the form of an ordinary demon or human and its body was covered in clear crystal. Its movements were relatively rigid which were somewhat similar to robots.

After deliberately getting close into the effective distance, data appeared in his [Analytical Eyes]. Race: Crystal Man (Puppet). Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C. Physique: C+; Strength: C+; Spirit: F-; Agility: D.

Purely strength and physique. Spirit is almost negligible, and its agility is a weakness. However, physique and strength at the peak of Demon King cannot be ignored, especially there are more than one of them. These puppets… could it be that they are made by Kia’s father, Azgalor? Although their strength isn’t as good as Glorfin’s strongest Demon King-level spirit-devouring demonic fly, Glorfin’s spirit-devouring demonic fly is limited in number and the crystal men in front of me is almost equivalent to a small troop. Manu noticed his gaze and laughed, “This is the crystal guard of the Crystal Valley. Their bodies are sturdy and extremely powerful. Magic damages on them are halvedm so they were the nemesis of mages. The scarier part is that they feel no pain. The only flaw is that they’re relatively slow.”

Judging from the data, Manu should be telling the truth. Chen Rui asked deliberately, “I’ve never seen this kind of guard before. Is it a new race in the Demon Realm? Why do I feel like they’re under control. Could it be a masterpiece of an alchemist? Is there any other master in the Crystal Valley?”

“The Crystal Valley does have other mechanic masters and potion masters, but they have nothing to do with the crystal guards. The crystal guards are created by another person. This person, I’m planning to take you to meet him. He’s very strong and he can be regarded as the true owner of Crystal Valley. I can’t even rival him.”

Is Kia’s father that powerful? Even Manu admits that he can’t rival? When Chen Rui thought Manu was going to say Azgalor’s name, Manu instead said, “The name of this person is Jacob.”

Not Azgalor! Chen Rui was shocked: Another Demon Overlord! That being said, this force has at least three Demon Overlord-level powerhouses! Three Demon Overlords are shocking enough in any empire! Even Chen Rui’s father-in-law, the general of the Fallen Angel Empire was only at the peak of Demon Emperor! ( Speaking of that, with those potions and Paglio’s instructions, my father-in-law should be able to break through the bottleneck soon and reach Demon Overlord… )

However, even if they were all Demon Overlord and at the same level, due to the difference in territory and strength, the gap in combat power wasn’t small. Paglio’s strength at that time was at the peak of Demon Overlord and he bragged that he could defeat dozens of powerhouses at the same level but, Chen Rui didn’t know whether it was true.

“Let’s go and meet Jacob. Sabrina and Fatilu will stay here for a while. However, I have more important things to do, so I can’t stay any longer. Jacob has a weird temper. He is moody, and he isn’t easy to get along with, so you better be careful. When you say anything odd, don’t say anything about it.”

Chen Rui could judge from Manu’s tone that there were different factions in the Crystal Valley. Due to the [Soul Shackles], Manu had clearly regarded Chen Rui as part of his faction.

Manu walked forward with Chen Rui. It wasn’t Sabrina’s first time here, so she didn’t follow them to meet Jacob. Instead, she took Fatilu to the residence area at another hill.

Chen Rui followed Manu to a huge manor on a mountainside. There were a lot of crystal guards along the way, but these crystal men were as dumb as puppets, as if they were only active sculptures that posed no danger. However, Chen Rui didn’t dare to underestimate these strange life forms. Other than those ordinary crystal men at Demon King-level, there were also mutated crystal men at Great Demon King-level.

These crystal men had powerful strength and stats. If they were taken out, they would definitely be the most terrifying troop. While walking, Chen Rui had already reached the manor unknowingly.

What surprised Chen Rui was that the features in the manor were much more luxurious than what he imagined. The door pillars were carved out of black crystal; the railings were made of topaz; the corridors were inlaid with gemstones. It was just that these luxuries seemed “unsophiscated” as relative to the beautiful scenery outside. It was like an upstart countryman trying to show off his stinky wealth in front of an elegant beauty. He felt an indescribable uneasiness.

This is obviously the most rustic way of showing off wealth. It’s like smiling at someone deliberately just to show his golden teeth. Chen Rui felt more odd as the more he looked. Then, he recalled Manu’s words “don’t say anything when you see odd things”, and stopped what he was going to say.

The house in this manor was ridiculously big that it could even accommodate a dragon. There weren’t many crystal men in the manor. Those that were walking around were female in maid-attire. They almost had the same characteristic. They were big, plump and even… almost muscular.

The maids bowed when they saw Manu. Manu told one of the maids, “Tell Sir Jacob that I brought an important guest to see him.”

The maid bowed and walked toward the biggest house. Soon, the maid came back and invited both of them to enter.

The facilities in the room could only be described as more luxurious and rustic. It was simply sleeping in piles of money. To be honest, if the golden bed that Jacob was lying on now was made of real gold crystal, it was indeed similar to sleeping on piles of money.

Seeing the figure of those maids, he was imagining Jacob to be tall, huge and also… Urm… have a heavy taste. However, the Jacob in front of him was thin and even short as compared to Chen Rui. He didn’t look handsome either. His skin was somewhat similar to albino patients, and his hair was also white.

What was even more speechless was that this guy was lying in the arms of a maid with naked upper body. He even played with the busty breasts of the maid in front of the two unscrupulously, while the maid uttered an ecstasy moan very cooperatively.

This scene was indeed embarrassing, but the strongest feeling in Chen Rui’s heart wasn’t embarrassment but astonishment.

Race: N/A (Crystal Dragon). Comprehensive Strength Assessment: Unable to Judge!

Demon Overlord dragon… crystal dragon… Jacob!

When Chen Rui heard Jacob’s name just now, he felt faintly familiar. Now, after associating with the information from [Analytical Eyes], he finally knew the origin of this thin, short man before him. The Crystal Dragon, Jacob, was one of Paglio’s enemies back then!

Is it only Paglio and Jacob, but all the dragons had a weird personality and taste?

chapters.title: Chapter 273: Crystal Dragon'S Magic Circle
chapters.body:
Chapter 273: Crystal Dragon'S Magic Circle

Crystal dragon was a special dragon race as it’s fully immune to magic, but it was relatively weaker in strength.

The crystal dragon, Jacob, was the nemesis of the fairy dragon, Zola. The fairy dragon was good at every magic, including the dragon magic that made Paglio dread. Yet, the crystal dragon was exactly her nemesis.

2,000 years ago, to compete for the mysterious silver box, Zola had a grudge with the crystal dragon, Jacob and the blue dragon, Ranieri. Later, Zola joined the poison dragon, Paglio, who was also a rival of Jacob and Ranieri. In the end, the blue dragon, Ranieri died; while Jacob was seriously injured and escaped from Paglio by luck.

However, under the temptation of the silver box, the morality of the stubborn dragon became negative. He didn’t care about the promise to research together. He attacked Zola sneakily and took the silver box away. However, Paglio didn’t end well too. Eventually, a mysterious powerhouse found him, sealed his strength with ancient runes and left him in the Blue Lake for 2000 years.

That was karma.

Chen Rui never thought the one he was facing was actually Paglio’s enemy when he was at the peak of Demon Overlord – crystal dragon, Jacob!

Crystal Valley… crystal dragon? No wonder Manu once said that Jacob is the owner of this Crystal Valley. Chen Rui’s brain started turning at high speed. Both of them are Demon Overlord powerhouses, and my excessive emotional fluctuations will be detected. I must think of a solution.

Manu frowned when he saw Jacob’s movement, “Didn’t I mention that an important guest is coming? Why are you still like this?”

“The guest you’re talking about is this Higher Demon?” Jacob didn’t raise his head. Instead, he concentrated on playing with the plump breasts of the maid while speaking with extreme disdain.

Manu was proficient in magic, but the crystal dragon was not only stronger than him, he was also completely immune to magic. Thus, it was reasonable that he didn’t bother. Manu was unhappy, but he didn’t show it on his face. He was about to introduce Chen Rui as the trio-specialized master when he suddenly heard the “master” said, “This manor and this room layout is too horrible!”

A cold light flashed across Jacob’s eyes as he was playing with the maid. The maid screamed as there was a burst of blood from her chest. Jacob sat up slowly, waved his hand and the maid retreated while covering her chest in pain.

Feeling Jacob’s murderous intentions, Manu was worried. Manu specifically asked the master to pay attention to his words. Unexpectedly, Chen Rui immediately triggered Jacob’s greatest taboo.

“This chair is actually made of blood crystal! Why not use gold crystals? I thought the furniture inside should be more imposing than outside, but it’s much worse than expected! Also, why not put sparkling gems on it?”

“This lamp is big enough, but the firelight stones must be polished more finely. Otherwise, it isn’t bright enough! Also, it’s better to have more gems on the wall. These are too small, not majestic enough. You need to put bigger gems up there, and they must be different colors! In this way, the aesthetic of the room will be much higher!”

Jacob’s eyes lit up and his murderousness disappeared instantly. He asked the stunned Manu, “This Higher Demon…… where is he from?! His taste isn’t bad!”

“This is the trio-specialized master who is most likely to become a grandmaster in the Demon Realm after 10,000 years. At the same time, he is also a genius in magic circles…”

For the first time, Manu saw someone criticize the furnishings here, but he was still praised by Jacob. However, the master’s performance was really shocking…

“No wonder!” Jacob glanced at Manu, “I thought you taught him to say those words, but now it seems that you’re far from his level of appreciation!”

Fuck you level of appreciation! Jacob’s words made Manu completely speechless. He secretly criticized the taste of these two monsters.

Chen Rui tried his best to recall the image of the most rustic upstart in his mind and commented on the whole furnishings of the room. Although Jacob didn’t agree with some of the opinions, some of them were on point. After talking about the room layout and display, Chen Rui changed his topic to women. Similar to the stubborn dragon, the crystal dragon also had a common eccentric preference for women, which he could tell from the maids outside.

Chen Rui said something like “beautiful, tough skin, clean and sharp teeth, tall and plump body”. The taste was so heavy that even Manu couldn’t stand it in his heart, but Jacob’s eyes were both lit up.

After some discussion, the Crystal Dragon had completely looked at Chen Rui differently. There were actually more than one master in the Crystal Valley, but a unique trio-specialized master like Arthur was the first. More importantly, the taste of the master was so “elegant” that he was simply a confidant of the dragon race!

Initially, Manu was worried that Chen Rui wouldn’t get along with this weird dragon or he might even anger Jacob and get killed. Yet, based on the situation now, he shouldn’t be concerned about that anymore.

A maid came in and bowed, “Master, it’s time to go to the magic circle.”

“Don’t you see I’m chatting with my guest?! If you dare to do that again, I’ll cut off your limbs!” Jacob stared at the maid and waved his hand from a distance. “ Poom!” The maid was knocked back a few meters away and spit out a few bloody teeth.

As if nothing happened, Jacob said casually, “I’ll go to a special magic circle to train and restore power every few days. I can only chat with master until here today. However, since master has come to the Crystal Valley, you definitely won’t leave any time soon. You can rest assured that I’ll provide you with the best workshop and the most complete materials.”

“Thank you, Sir Jacob.” Chen Rui nodded, but his heart was secretly feared. This crystal dragon clearly knew he had to go to the magic circle, but he vented his anger maid for no reason. Besides, his means are so cruel. He is really moody as described by Manu. Fortunately, I made the right move just now.

That’s right! The crystal dragon was severely injured by Paglio 2000 years ago. The recovery he’s talking about now… is it related to the injury back then? “Sir Jacob.” Chen Rui asked tentatively, “I’m always curious about the knowledge of magic circles. I wonder if I can take a look?”

Jacob was still smiling a moment ago, but upon hearing that, his face became gloomy instantly and a murderous intention flashed past his eyes. Magic circle is one of my forbidden places. Even my “ally” couldn’t enter without permission, but this guy actually asked to take a look! Seeing that the situation was bad, Manu quickly said, “Jacob, Master Arthur isn’t only a rare trio-specialized master, but also a genius in magic circles. One of the reasons he joined us is that I promised to let him observe unknown magic circles.”

Actually, what Chen Rui wanted to “observe” was the magic circle on the Illusive Demon Shield. Manu said that because he was afraid of Jacob might suddenly burst in anger. After all, Chen Rui was now an important person under his command.

“It’s not that I self-proclaimed as a genius, but just a while ago, I had consecutively deciphered two high grade magic circles at the ancient magic tower in a day.” It seems that his identity as the “magic circle genius” had unexpected effects. Suddenly, Chen Rui looked proud, “I also have a lot of ideas in magic circle improvement. When I came, the magic circles in the swamp seemed to have much room for improvement to me.”

Jacob frowned because the Dragon Inscription outside was laid by himself which he was quite proud of it. The power was equivalent to Demon Emperor-level, and it was unpredictable. He didn’t expect Chen Rui would actually say things like that.

Seeing that he didn’t believe it, Chen Rui started drawing in the air. Certainly, he couldn’t reveal his mastery of Dragon Inscription, so he deliberately called it a magic circle and also missed many unique features of inscriptions. He simply mentioned the easiest feature of inscription, “The magic circle outside is indeed very profound. Although there are many things that I don’t understand very well, nothing strays from the origin. Therefore, I can be sure that if you change it slightly at this point, the effect of the magic circle will be much better.”

Although Jacob’s knowledge in Dragon Inscription wasn’t as good as Paglio, he was still one of the best among the dragons. Naturally, he could tell the impact of that small improvement. Although it wasn’t a major improvement, it was something that no layman could understand. The way the crystal dragon looked at Chen Rui suddenly changed. He never thought an ordinary demon could see through the mysteries in Dragon Inscriptions after merely contacting it. He’s indeed a genius! If the crystal dragon knew that the master’s “magic circle” accomplishment came from his rival, poison dragon and the master was deliberately fooling him, he would definitely vomit blood… vomit crystal right?

“Nothing strays from the origin. This sentence is wonderful!” Capable people would always be valued. Although Jacob was moody, he couldn’t help but praise from the depth of his heart, “I’ve lived for nearly 10,000 years, but this is the first time I met a genius like master. Then, please come with me. If you can understand my magic circle and make improvements, I’ll reward you handsomely.”

“Lived for nearly 10,000 years?” Chen Rui was shocked and looked disbelief.

Seeing that expression, Jacob smirked in his heart and smiled, “To be honest, I’m a distinguished dragon. Not to mention 10,000 years, it’s not surprising for us to live up to a few 100,000 years.

Chen Rui went along with Jacob and praised a few words, and Jacob felt very at ease. Suddenly, he told Manu, “You don’t have to come. I’ll just go with master.”

Manu knew that the magic circle was a taboo for the crystal dragon. However, the rate of Master Arthur mixing into the Crystal Valley was faster than he expected. Besides, with [Soul Shackles], he wasn’t worried that Chen Rui would defect to the crystal dragon’s party. He gave Chen Rui a badge at the moment, “Okay. Master, I’ll be at the Nightmare Valley. With this badge, you can come back smoothly.”

“Thank you, Sir Manu. Please tell Fatilu to prepare for fine wine and wait for me.”

Chen Rui’s words vaguely stated his position clear and Manu nodded in satisfaction. Aside, Jacob had already urged impatiently, “Stop the nonsense. Later, I’ll send someone to escort master back. No one will dare to stop him too. Master, let’s go quickly.”

Chen Rui followed Jacob out of the room and came to a place behind the manor. There were still many Dragon Inscriptions along the way. Finally, they came to a pool.

This pool gave Chen Rui a familiar feeling. It was a little similar to the fountain of vitality and a little similar to the fountain of life, which was full of a strange power.

The crystal dragon didn’t enter the pool. Instead, he sat in a stone pit on the side. The pit was surrounded by various Dragon Inscriptions and extremely complicated magic circles. The main body was six stone slabs. Each had a strange mark that seemed to be a strange rune. They were placed at each end of the six-pointed star.

These marks seemed familiar. Chen Rui recalled that every time he tried to go to the fifth floor of the ancient magic tower, some strange runes and marks would appear which made people unable to move forward.

Even [Deep Analysis] couldn’t decipher those strange marks and runes. From the data of [Deep Analysis], several marks around the stone pit had something in common with those runes.

“Master, you can watch at that distance, but don’t touch anything.” Jacob sat behind the stone pit and activated the Dragon Inscription. Chen Rui could see that Jacob used his dragon’s bloodline to trigger the inscription. In other words, no one else could use the stone pit.

After the inscription was activated, the complicated magic circles were activated one by one. Under the effect of the magic circle, the six-pointed star array flashed with a strange light. The marks at the six ends lit up, floating in the air. It was exuding a mysterious power, and it was slowly changing its shape as if it was alive.

The water in the pool began to pour into the stone pit. Under the effect of the magic circle, it turned into a flashing mist and wrapped Jacob’s body as if it was a steam bath. The mist didn’t drift around but was “confined” within the scope of the stone pit.

“Sir Jacob, what am I seeing? These magic circles… what a marvelous miracle! It seems that I have too many questions to ask sir in the future… No! I can’t wait to ask now. I wonder if sir is free to talk at your current state?”

To be complimented by a genius in magic circles, Jacob felt at ease and nodded, “Feel free to ask if you have any questions!”

“Please excuse me for being straightforward. This spring water and magic circle seem to have a healing effect. However, even for me, there are many parts that I don’t understand in these profound, mysterious magic circles. Since sir is an honorable dragon, there must be the legendary dragon’s most profound knowledge within – the Dragon Inscription?”

“Master is indeed insightful!” Jacob nodded approvingly. He seemingly said casually, “Master’s means are quite incredible too. Not only did you win my favor the first time we met, but you also knew a lot of my secrets. I have a small request now. I wonder if master is willing to be my servant?”

There was a faint creepiness when he said the “request”. It was obviously a threat.

Chen Rui was secretly being vigilant. These BOSS-class enemies are definitely hard to deal with. However, I have a good answer to this question, which is [Soul Shackles]. Those who had [Soul Shackles] could no longer form or accept contracts. This was the reason why Old Gauss failed to form a contract with Kia.

“As a mechanic, my own combat power is only at Demon King-level. Besides, I want to develop and improve my craftsmanship, so I must rely on the strong. Accepting [Soul Shackles] is a helpless act. Otherwise, how am I able to come to this Crystal Valley today?”

Jacob naturally knew the power of [Soul Shackles], so he grumbled in dissatisfaction, “Manu always uses these sinister tricks. That Azgalor isn’t any better than him! Master, if I have a way to force Manu to release the [Soul Shackles], are you willing to subdue to me?”

Chen Rui’s heart was moved. Jacob’s words revealed a message. The three Demon Overlords, Manu, Azgalor and Jacob seem to be in a discordance. Well, causing chaos should be one of Chen Rui’s best trick. Not only that, with the dragon’s weird personality, Jacob should be easy too fooled with, right 🙃?

chapters.title: Chapter 274: Ancient Runes
chapters.body:
Chapter 274: Ancient Runes

The [Soul Channel] that Manu cast on Chen Rui was a mutated [Soul Shackles]. Although it had the usual function of the [Soul Shackles] that could kill remotely or torture the subject through soul, it also had the ability to share ability and damage. It was similar to the spiritual link reinforcement that Chen Rui didn’t have the authority to use yet.

[Soul Shackles] was one of the strongest control methods in the Demon Realm as it was very stubborn. Even if the subject died, the power of the shackles would take three days to completely dissipate from the body. Unless the caster was killed or it was voluntarily released by the caster, there was basically no other way to deal with it. Therefore, Manu wasn’t worried.

It was just that even someone like Manu, who had rich knowledge and experience, didn’t know that the bizarre existence of the Super System in the Demon Realm. Also, this seemingly controlled Demon King “weakling” could actually easily cancel or disconnect the control of [Soul Shackles]!

Most of the power shared by [Soul Shackles] hadn’t been digested yet. Besides, Chen Rui definitely wouldn’t sign a master-servant contract with Jacob. At the moment, he said multiple excuses like the defect in his soul would affect his advancement to grandmaster. However, he didn’t give a direct answer. Instead, he faintly revealed that he would defect to the crystal dragon after reaching grandmaster.

Jacob thought about it for a while. At present, this genius is only a master. His true value lies in his grandmaster’s potential. If I recruit him after he becomes a grandmaster, the benefits is definitely different. He nodded immediately, “Okay. That’s it. When you become a grandmaster, I’ll make Manu remove the [Soul Shackles] even if it means I’ll turn my face with him. However, as a grandmaster, the master-servant contract is a little disrespectful. At that time, I’ll give you an equal contract! Until then, I’ll provide master with all the necessary conditions!”

Chen Rui looked surprised. He immediately agreed and swore with the name of Arthur. Actually, he understood that the credibility of Jacob’s words wasn’t high and the real purpose was to win him over in advance. Once he really became a grandmaster, Jacob would definitely use other methods to control him. However, he didn’t come to the Crystal Valley to become a grandmaster. Whatever it was, his current stall tactics had been successful.

Jacob felt that the conditions he had given were already good enough. Certainly, he received Chen Rui’s affirmative answer and oath. He nodded in satisfaction and began to answer Chen Rui’s question, “Since you’ve promised, then I’ll no longer hide from master. I’m a crystal dragon. There is a large crystal vein under the Crystal Valley. This spring water is the Fountain of Resurrection which can restore spirit and stamina at the same time. The role of the magic circle is to use the Fountain of Resurrection to turn the crystals in the vein into recovery and healing power that will heal my injuries.”

Fountain of Resurrection and crystal vein? Chen Rui was secretly surprised. The information from the Mechanic Alliance once mentioned that the Fountain of Resurrection was a higher grade natural resource as compared to the Fountain of Life and Fountain of Vitality, and it was extremely rare. Not only could it recover energy and stamina, but it could also help the growth of strength. It was also rumored to be a rare compulsory material to make Resurrection Potion.

Crystal was the universal currency in the Demon Realm which was divided into high, middle and low grades according to the purity after refinement. The middle and low grades were used as currency, which were the black, purple and white crystal coins; High grades crystals were priceless materials like gold crystal and blood crystal.

The crystal veins symbolized huge wealth. Usually, after being discovered, it’d definitely be firmly controlled by the empire in which it was located. Now that the crystal dragon said that there was a “large” crystal vein underground, and the fact that crystal veins were often accompanied by a variety of precious magic materials. It was was at least equivalent to the value of dozens high-purity gold mines on Earth.

If the crystal vein shocked Chen Rui, then Jacob’s subsequent words had astonished him, “You guessed it right. Many of the complicated magic circles around this pit are Dragon Inscriptions, but the true core is those six marks. These six marks are ancient runes!”

Ancient runes! The seal on Paglio is exactly these ancient runes! Due to this seal, the poison dragon, Paglio can’t restore his Demon Overlord strength. Unexpectedly, there are ancient runes in the hands of the poison dragon’s enemy, the crystal dragon!

In other words, the fifth floor of the ancient magic tower was sealed by the power of ancient runes? What’s there on the fifth floor? Seeing Chen Rui’s shocked expression, the crystal dragon raised his eyebrows slightly, “You even know the ancient runes?”

Chen Rui nodded and said, “I’ve seen the relevant records in the Mechanic Alliance. The last mechanic grandmaster, the dark goblin, Lolo, is proficient in ancient runes. However, he never recruited any disciple in his life. Thus, the knowledge of ancient runes was lost after he died. I wonder if the ancient runes have anything to do with the grandmaster’s mechanics. Sir, please teach me the knowledge of ancient runes”

“Unfortunately, I don’t understand ancient runes.” Jacob shook his head, “The ancient rune is called the God’s language and it’s broad and profound. These six ancient runes are extraordinary. They are part of a complete series of ancient rune stone slabs that I snatched from a rival. Although I don’t understand the meaning of these six runes, I found that it can be used in this recovery magic circle after many trials. It can speed up the progress of my recovery. Unfortunately, it can only be used once every seven days.”

It turned out that these six stone slabs were only part of a complete “article”. The so-called “rival” that Jacob mentioned must be the fairy dragon, Laura who was proficient in ancient runes. This might also be the root of the grudge between the two dragons.

“I understand now. The legendary crystal dragon is immune to all magic, so those recovery magic items or potions have no effect on you. You can only use the magic circle to rely on extracting the crystals in veins to heal your injuries.” Chen Rui took a look at the magic circle calmly, “It’s just that these magic circles are too complicated. With my current understanding, I can only understand a part of them. If they’re easily changed without fully understanding, it may bring unpredictable consequences. So, I plan to copy it down and then take it back to study and experiment carefully. Once there’s a result, I’ll report it to sir immediately. As for the Dragon Inscription, I hope sir don’t mind giving me some guidance.”

“You’re truly an extraordinary genius for being able to understand a part of it in such a short time. As for the Dragon Inscription, master can rest assure… you can study this magic circle at any time! If master can really improve this magic circle by making it more effective, I’ll have more rewards for you.”

The crystal dragon was very satisfied with Chen Rui’s performance, but he didn’t know that this guy was actually thinking about how to modify his magic circle to make his injuries worse.
