I need to take these 6 stone slabs and the Fountain of Resurrection with me at the very least. He definitely wouldn’t miss out on the rewards, but he couldn’t mess up the plan because of that. At present, he had to further gain the trust of the crystal dragon and Manu. The Crystal Valley had at least three chiefs, and their strength had reached Demon Overlord that could easily kill him. Regardless of the cruel, violent father, Azgalor that Fatilu mentioned or the nasty-nice old fox, Manu, both of them were extremely horrifying. Even the seemingly speculative crystal dragon in front of him was a moody man. If he was a little careless, he might be killed.

Even if his identity as an undercover wasn’t exposed, every step was like walking on thin ice.

However, to a certain extent, danger was also synonymous with opportunity. The huge crystal veins underground alone could bring great wealth; while the Illusive Demon Shield (it was actually just the Demon Shield) that Manu promised should arrive in a few days…

Chen Rui left the “Crystal Lair”, which was named by Jacob and came to the Nightmare Valley that Manu mentioned. After enjoying the fine wine and food, Manu briefly introduced him to the Crystal Valley.

The Crystal Valley was actually a secret location with a vast area in the Black Iron mountain range. It was currently divided into three forces, Nightmare Valley, Crystal Lair and Devouring Hall, each with its own independent area. They were owned by Manu Leviathan, the crystal dragon and Azgalor Beelzebub respectively. Other than the crystal dragon, Manu and Azgalor didn’t usually stay here. For example, Azgalor wasn’t in the Crystal Valley now.

Other than several forbidden areas such as the crystal dragon’s magic circle, with the badge given by Manu, Chen Rui could roam freely within the valley. He could also get unconditional assistance from the guards. Certainly, the crystal guards were an exception as they were puppets that could only be controlled by the crystal dragon.

There should be a friendly and cooperative relationship under common interests among the three major forces and it was unknown whether there was a mastermind higher up.

Judging from the current force, it was already terrifying enough. Three Demon Overlords, among which Jacob was able to be evenly-matched with Paglio. The magic item given by Christina could only provide a location, and it would become a signal flare when launched in the end. It wasn’t like a mobile phone that allowed communication. This time, it really depended on the means and strength of the Demon Realm’s top sage, Empress Catherine.

Although Sabrina was Manu’s niece, she was also Azgalor’s wife. Therefore, Fatilu and her weren’t in the Nightmare Valley, but were resting in the Devouring Hall. Compared with the crystal dragon’s faction, Azgalor was obviously closer to Manu. Chen Rui was already considered to be in Manu’s faction, so his workshop and resting place were arranged in the Nightmare Valley.

There were several other masters in the Crystal Valley. Some of them were mechanic masters while others were potion masters. They were responsible for manufacturing matters. Yet, these masters rarely show up usually. Perhaps they were immersed in some kind of experiment.

If he analyzed carefully, there were many factors that he could make use of. However, it was Fatilu’s first time coming here, so he obviously couldn’t obtain more information. Therefore, the most important thing for Chen Rui was to integrate into this strange place. After mastering the overall situation, he would try to proceed with his temporary plans.

With a workshop, it meant that he had his independent space. After running around for so long, he could finally settle down. Mechanics was just a disguise. The more important thing was his training in strength.

With the strength of an Early Great Demon King, he might exceed the realm to challenge the middle stage or the peak of the Great Demon King. If he was outside, he could be considered as a powerhouse. However, in this Crystal Valley, there were already three people that could eliminate him with one finger. Even if Sabrina was likely to have entered the Demon Emperor-level. Perhaps there were also other Demon Emperor powerhouses in this valley. These people definitely belonged to the true powerhouses in the Demon Realm. No wonder they had such a big conspiracy.

Whether it was for himself or someone he wanted to protect, he must become stronger. He had two goals currently. The first was to completely digest the power from Manu; the second was to understand the training of Migrez step by step, which was the power of the “world” or the power of territory.

Then, he must try something that had an expiring date soon – the realm king fruit.

Another type of fountain? Wasn’t that Chen Rui can exchange resurrection potion from the Super System? Does he still need it?

chapters.title: Chapter 275: Moonlight Of The Dark Moon City
chapters.body:
Chapter 275: Moonlight Of The Dark Moon City

A full moon night.

Dark Moon City, Cloak Gang’s headquarters, the ancient house’s backyard.

Ms. Sasa was demonstrating a new gadget given by her boyfriend, Xingxing in front of her two good friends, Eve and Ailian. It was a light beam that could absorb moonlight and emit various shapes of illuminating beams.

“It’s so interesting! Sister Sasa.”

Seeing the surprised and happy look on Eve and Ailian, Ms. Sasa felt proud, “This was created by Xingxing based on the inspiration of the flashlight that our leader, Aguile said last time. However, it was a lot more functional than the one that the leader mentioned. Not only is it beautiful, but it is also very practical… Eh , Eve, why are you suddenly unhappy. Nah , you can play with it.”

“My sister isn’t sad. She is just missing the leader when you mentioned his name.”

“Ailian!”

“Sister, there is nothing to be embarrassed about. In fact, I miss Sir Aguile too. I haven’t seen him in a long time.”

“Speaking of it, our leader, Aguile is indeed very attractive. He is mysterious and powerful. However, my Xingxing is more attractive with a short, fat body, long nose, sexy green skin…”

A short distance away, Xingxing was talking to Skye. Both of them were top-level masters, so they understood each other well and had become close friends.

“Master Xingxing, have you heard of it?” It was the dark elf, Skye who spoke.

“Of course.” Xingxing nodded, “This is almost the greatest news in the field of mechanics for thousands of years. I believe that everyone in the Demon Realms knows about it now. Even Master Nate’s disciple, the dual-specialized Master Horford lost to that guy.”

A strange sarcasm appeared in Skye’s eyes, “Now, Nate can’t sit still anymore.”

Xingxing didn’t pay attention to Skye’s disdain when he talked about Nate. He just sighed, “Two pieces of quasi-legendary equipment and one piece of legendary grade equipment. Too bad that I can’t witness the spectacular scene of the finals.”

Skye nodded sympathetically and said, “I heard that after the genius created another miracle at the Dark Shadow Empire’s ancient magic tower, he disappeared and his whereabouts are still unknown. I have a strange hunch in my heart that this genius… may be related to one of our acquaintances.”

“Really?” Xingxing gave him a weird look, “I thought it was only me who had this hunch?”

The two laughed almost simultaneously.

“Beast!”

Dark Moon, a sulking voice sounded in the sheriff’s residence.

“Trio-specialized mechanic master! Magic circle genius! Can this guy be even more famous?” Someone was shouting out the window while pointing at the moon. It was obviously the wife- and widow-con, nasty teammate, also the nephew, Roman.

However, this house was no longer what it was when it was first built. Not only were there protective plants like Guardian Vines around but it was also covered with various Dragon Inscriptions. No matter how loud Roman was howling at the moon, his voice wouldn’t be heard outside.

The poison dragon seemed to see his similarly envious self in the past in Roman’s angry look. He added gloatingly, “Not only that, this guy also has the grandmaster-level black potions. Didn’t you just drink the entire set of eternal potions?”

“That’s so unfair!” Roman didn’t feel embarrassed for criticizing even after receiving all the benefits. He gulped a huge mouthful of wine, then sighed at the sky. It felt a little like the sadness of a hero that almost made others cry, “Demon God! Open your omnipotent left eye that can charm all women and bless your poor believers! As such a handsome and royal family, why haven’t I had any luck in these years! The other day, I was even caught flirting with a beauty by Delia! No way! I can’t be hanged on a tree! I want the entire forest!”

“I’ve always forgotten to tell you.” Paglio was clearly trying to make things worse, “This guy has grown from a powerless weakling to the current Great Demon King… seems to have taken less than a year? You’ve only just become a Great Demon King, so in terms of combat power, you’re absolutely inferior to him. Probably in less than a year, this guy will become Demon Emperor already.”

“ Poof! ” Roman choked out his mouthful of wine from his nose. When he was about to continue sighing out of jealousy while feeling indignant, a beautiful voice came from the outside of the yard, “Athena, did you hear that? Someone seemed to be howling about something?”

“That’s right, Delia. It seems to be about the Goddess of Luck or something like that and…”

Before Athena finished speaking, Roman came like a gust of wind and attentively took the things in the hands of the two, “ Ah , two beauties. You must be tired from shopping at the night market. I’ll help you bring the things in.”

“By the way, I just heard someone say something about the Demon God’s charming left eye. Mr. Lumberjack, did you hear that?” Delia took off her veil, revealing a beautiful face that had been completely cured, but her eyes seemed a little unkind.

“My dear Delia, you must have heard it wrong. I was saying the Demon God’s fantastic touching right eye.”

“Dodo, I know you are hiding in the corner! Tell me now. What did he say just now? If you’re honest, I’ll give you a bottle of the best fruit wine I bought at the night market. Otherwise, you’ll be hungry for three days.”

The threat at the end of the sentence made the slime bounce out immediately. He turned into Roman’s look and mimicked his movement and tone in a subtle way.

“… I was even caught flirting with a beauty by Delia! No way! I can’t be hanged on a tree! I want the entire forest!”

Roman, “…”

Seeing Delia approaching with a sneer, Roman’s face had turned into bitter — the omnipotent Demon God, please open your omnipotent eyes and save your poor believer! Athena smiled at the farce of this pair of couples and suddenly thought of the usual playfulness and joy between his man and herself. Her beautiful red eyes started filling with longing – Are you thinking about me too? My Lover. Dark Moon City, the garden behind the palace.

The slim figure in a white long dress stared at her reflection in the moonlight silently.

The scene of the conversation with Old Gauss in the council hall came to her mind.

“His performance this time in the mechanic contest shook the entire Demon Realm! As for the Custer Family, a new successor has been identified, it’s the youngest Ms. Celine. Before I left the Dark Shadow empire, she contacted me and expressed her full support for our plan.”

Old Gauss said with emotion, “Originally, my evaluation of him was high enough, but I didn’t expect it to be still too low.”

Shea nodded slightly. Chen Rui once mentioned to her his inheritance of the grand master’s craftsmanship and he could train some craftsmen. Before Old Gauss came back, the news that “Arthur” became famous in the Dark Shadow Empire’s mechanic contest and became the Demon Realm’s first trio-specialized mechanic genius in the past 10,000 years had reached the Dark Moon.

Shea was really shocked at that time. However, after she heard the “magic circle genius” added by Old Gauss, she seemed calmer instead.

“Actually, at the very beginning, he came into our sight as the heir of an alchemy grandmaster, but the wisdom and talents that he showed later made us almost forget the biggest ‘initial intention’. Only now, he has truly shone brightly.”

Old Gauss sighed. “Even that’s the case, Princess Royal, he has joined the Dark Shadow Empire’s Mechanic Alliance publicly upon the invitation of Empress Catherine. I thought he would leave the Dark Moon and join the Dark Shadow empire immediately. Yet, he not only saved me, but he also entrusted me to bring back those plans. It seems that his heart remains with the Dark Moon, at least for now.”

“Indeed.” Actually, Shea had already asked Chen Rui similar questions in person.

“Princess Royal, with the current ability and reputation of Chen Rui, we can no longer let him stay with Dark Moon’s condition alone. It can be said that he will have a better and safer development in other places.” Old Gauss said meaningfully, “The reason why Princess Royal asked him not to do so is because he still have our friendship and affection in mind. However, this kind of relationship is obviously not sustainable for a long time. Princess Royal must realize that to fulfill your greatest desire, you must obtain his help. Therefore, I’ve made this suggestion rudely … I hope Princess Royal will forgive me.”

“Gauss, be direct with what you want to say.”

“Chen Rui is a man with outstanding intelligence, excellent abilities. Besides, he has such a strong inheritance. What’s more is that he values affection heavily and won’t be shaken by ordinary interests. However, the world is unpredictable. As long as another force gives him a greater relationship and a more worthy condition, he is likely to leave. To be honest, his bond with the Dark Moon isn’t deep enough. Even if his lover, Ms. Athena isn’t a royal family of the Dark Moon. So, I think… we need to bind him tightly with the Dark Moon with a stronger relationship.”

Shea raised her eyebrows slightly, “You mean…”

“Marriage.” Old Gauss nodded firmly, “That’s the best way. In fact, I can tell that he has feelings for you…”

“Enough, Gauss. I’ll pretend I’ve never heard of this. Understand?” Shea suddenly felt an inexplicable anger in her heart. Although she knew that Old Gauss was reasonable, she still couldn’t help it and her voice suddenly became cold.

Old Gauss shook his head, “As the lord of Dark Moon, Princess Royal may be able to regain the throne from Obsidian in the future. Therefore, he really isn’t suitable as a candidate for marriage. Then, perhaps we can consider using the little princess…”

Shea’s eyes were even colder. She directly interrupted Old Gauss’s words, “No need to talk about this anymore!”

Old Gauss’s expression was stagnant, and he finally stopped insisting. Shea felt that her tone was indeed heavier, so she added, “You must be tired after returning from the Dark Shadow Empire. Let Kia continue to help Alice in the Princess Retail Store to avoid exposing Chen Rui’s identity. You can go to rest first.”

Old Gauss sighed and retreated.

Shea silently looked at her rather lonely shadow. She still remembered what the human said when he first came to this palace garden: the furthest distance in the world… After closing her eyes, the man’s voice before he left sounded in her ears again, “I’ll do the same even without General George’s request.”

Not only that, but also those annoying topics that had double meaning, that annoying smile and annoying everything else…

Somehow, she somehow missed that annoyingness. While she was longing and longing, her mood became calmer unknowingly.

There was a voice coming from a distance, “Kia, look at your feet and don’t fall down. Why have you changed after you come back that you can even daydream while walking? Are you thinking about a man?”

“No, little princess, I’m just…”

“It’s fine. Let’s go… Sister! Kia and I brought some delicious supper from the night market for you!”

Hearing Alice’s hurray, Shea opened her eyes and a faint warmth rose in her purple eyes. Perhaps due to the change of the moonlight, her shadow seemed to have become two which made her seem less lonely.

Shea didn’t want to have any relationship with Chen Rui, was it because of love?

chapters.title: Chapter 276: Demon Shield And -Blood River-
chapters.body:
Chapter 276: Demon Shield And -Blood River-

In the Crystal Valley, Chen Rui had been in the lab for the past two days. Now that he had the title of a genius mechanic master, he had to act like one. Surely, Manu didn’t eat his words. The lab provided for him was built on a hillside and his residence was just below the hillside, so it was quiet and undisturbed.

The area of this laboratory was very wide, the conditions were better than the Mechanic Alliance. The materials and facilities were readily available. At Chen Rui’s special request, the arranged assistant was returned. Regardless of whether the assistant’s purpose was assistance or surveillance, he didn’t want another pair of eyes beside him.

Many mechanic masters have secrets that they don’t teach, and only the closest and trusted apprentices were likely to be taught. Therefore, Chen Rui’s request wasn’t outrageous, so Manu naturally didn’t force it. Manu even sent a large number of ordinary materials for him to “experiment” the refining technique.

The actual objective for Chen Rui to ask for these ordinary materials was naturally not to “refine” but to convert them into auras to buy the blueprint of “Thunderous Sound”. Even if Manu or others wanted to check the “success of experiment” in refinement, he just had to put a material into the refinery and it would be enough to blind them.

Chen Rui didn’t consume the realm king fruit because the power of the realm king fruit was very powerful. He required a quiet and undisturbed environment. Besides, these two days would be the deadline for Manu to keep his promise of that “artifact”, and Chen Rui might encounter that long-lost “old friend”. Therefore, Chen Rui planned to try the realm king fruit after acquiring the artifact.

At that time, a maid came into the lab and told him that Manu summoned him for something.

Chen Rui came out of the lab and followed the maid to the central manor of Nightmare Valley, where Manu was located.

Before he walked into the hall, he could hear the voice from a distance with his hearing ability. To be precise, it was Manu’s scolding noises.

“I want to remind you that even if you have the strongest [Eyes of Nightmare] and you’re the eldest son of the previous king, you’re only at the peak of Demon Emperor now! The Demon Realm advocates strength. So, I, Manu Leviathan, am the current master of the Envy Royal Family!” Manu’s voice was cold, and it even contained killing intentions, which was completely different from his image as an old fox who usually laughed and smiled. However, foxes were still carnivorous animals. Besides, the foxes in the Demon Realm were cruel and slyful. They liked to chew on their prey until no bones were left.

“Sir Manu, please forgive me for being rude!” This voice was even more familiar in Chen Rui’s ears, “Since you’re the master of the Leviathan Royal Family, you should understand the meaning of the seven artifacts. Also, the Magic Shield is left to me by my father, so I don’t agree to just leave it to an outsider for research!”

“What if your father left it for you?” Manu sneered, “Are you recognized by the Magic Shield? Your sister is the one that is recognized by the Magic Shield! Don’t think that I don’t know what you did to Delia! Now that she’s missing, it also means that the recognized candidate by the artifact is missing. This alone is enough for me to sanction you!”

These conversations moved Chen Rui’s heart. Since Delia was reluctant to mention about Broc, he didn’t ask much. Now, he knew that Broc and Delia’s father turned out to be the previous king of Leviathan and that Manu was the current master.

Since Delia was recognized by the Demon Shield, Broc had always kept the Demon Shield as his own. Also, he claimed himself as the next master of the Leviathan Royal Family. Now that Delia was “missing”, but he was still unwilling to hand over the Demon Shield, he was probably worried that Manu or others would be recognized by the Demon Shield. It seemed that acquiring the Demon Shield could further aggravate the internal contradictions within the Leviathan Royal Family. That was indeed killing two birds with one stone.

At that time, the maid had come to the entrance of the hall with Chen Rui. She informed Manu and the quarreling sound inside had stopped.

After getting permission to enter, Chen Rui walked into the hall. There were two people in the hall. Surely, besides Manu, the other was Chen Rui’s “old acquaintance” – Broc Leviathan, the head of the three generals of the Dark Shadow Empire.

Manu regained his usual smiley look, but Broc’s face still seemed gloomy.

“Master, you’re here.” Manu smiled, “I’ll introduce you. This is my… nephew, named Broc, the head of the three generals of the Dark Shadow Empire. Broc, this is the trio-specialized master and also the magic circle genius that shocked the Demon Realm, Master Arthur.”

Chen Rui noticed Manu deliberately reveal Broc’s identity to him. He nodded casually and shook his head while looking indifferent, “Sir Manu, I don’t care if he’s a general. I only care about the artifact. I heard from your conversation that the artifact is with your nephew. Then… hurry up and give it to me. These two days, I have been thinking about the crystal dragon’s magic circles, and I seem to have an insight. I need the Illusive Demon Shield as reference now.”

This rudeness and ignorance made Broc’s eyes flashed with a cold light. He took a few looks at Chen Rui and suddenly frowned, “I don’t know why, but master gives me a familiar feeling. Have we met before?”

Not only have we met, but we’ve also “contacted” intimately. The pockmarks on your face were given by me. Certainly, Chen Rui could only murmur that in his heart, but he seemed a little impatient, “I’ve heard those words a lot. It was the same when I met the third general, Kafu. General Broc, did you bring the artifact I want?”

“Of course he did. Broc, give the artifact to the master now.” The one who answered was Manu. There was anger on Broc’s face that disappeared instantly. Looking at the smiling Manu, his heart was even more resentful. This old fox summoned me from the border fortress urgently. I thought it was something important. Unexpectedly, it is actually for the Demon Shield. However, Broc knew Manu’s character, the more he smiled, the more dangerous it was. If he didn’t leave the Demon Shield today, Manu would probably turn his face. With the strength gap between them, Broc still couldn’t keep the Demon Shield.

Actually, it’s okay to give it to Master Arthur for research. If Broc could win master over by this, he was willing to give up this bargain. After all, it was impossible for anyone other than the Leviathan Royal Family to use the artifact. However, Arthur obviously was on Manu’s side. Even if this artifact had lost its research value, Manu would certainly not return it.

A wise man knows better than to fight when the odds are against him. Since I’m not as strong now, I can only surrender. When my strength finally surpasses Manu in the future… Broc thought quickly and finally made a decision to compromise. He took out a round shield from his back and handed it to Chen Rui. Chen Rui looked joyful and took it.

This round shield was larger than the IIusive Shield with Delia, It was dark gold with a simple yet elegant pattern on it. The part in the center that wasn’t decorated should be the part that could be combined with the IIusive Shield.

The Illusive Demon Shield was the equipment with the strongest defense among the seven artifacts. It not only could defend against all physical and magic attacks, but it could also reflect damages. Therefore, it was called the best armor. Chen Rui had witnessed the power of this shield outside of poison dragon’s treasure cave at the Silent Night wetland. At that time, a fully activated [Thunder] inscription comparable to the strength of peak Demon Emperor was completely blocked by Broc while holding this shield. Besides, Broc hadn’t been approved by the artifact, so he was just making use of the Demon Shield innate defense!

Chen Rui touched the pattern above as if in awe and suddenly frowned, “That’s not right! How could this be?! Is this the Illusive Demon Shield? Why does it feel like an important part is missing?”

“Master indeed has an extraordinary vision that you can notice the problem of the artifact in a glance.” Manu nodded, “Illusive Demon Shield is divided into two parts, IIlusive Shield and Demon Shield. This is the Demon Shield. As for the IIusive Shield, it was lost thousands of years ago. My Leviathan Royal Family has also been looking for it, but its whereabouts is still unknown for the time being.”

It seemed that Broc didn’t disclose the incident of the Illusive Shield at the Silent Night Wetland and the real reason for Delia’s disappearance. Chen Rui looked dissatisfied, “Sir Manu, I voluntarily accepted the [Soul Shackles] to study the artifact. Now that the artifact is incomplete, doesn’t it violate your promise?”

“Don’t be angry, master.” Manu laughed, “Regardlessly, the Demon Shield is one of the seven artifacts. Besides, the seven artifacts consist more than just the Illusive Demon Shield. There are another six pieces. In the future, as long as our plan can succeed, it’s not a problem to give all seven artifacts to you for research.”

Seven artifacts? So ambitious! Chen Rui pondered for a while and said, “I’m just a mechanic in pursuit of the pinnacle. I don’t care about other things. Then… When will Sir Azhalor be back? I hope you can help me borrow the God-Eating Mask from him for research.”

“Azgalor has an important task outside. He certainly won’t return in the near future.” Manu groaned slightly, “How about I’ll help you to ask when he returns?”

Manu’s words were obviously blushing him off and it was just to delay. He didn’t know that the God-Eating Mask was in Chen Rui’s hands at all. Chen Rui’s words were just to find out Azgalor’s whereabouts. Manu’s answer had revealed that Azgalor couldn’t return to the Crystal Valley in the short term. Chen Rui noted this in his mind, so he naturally stopped persisting.

Chen Rui’s eyes fell on Broc’s long sword on his waist, and he suddenly looked like he couldn’t take his gaze away, “General, your sword seems strange. Can you let me take a look?”

Broc didn’t expect this greedy guy to not be satisfied after taking the Demon Shield. He even wanted to take away his favorite sword. His eyes flashed while the sword unsheathed instantly. However, he didn’t attack. Instead, he put the sword in front of Chen Rui with an unkind face.

The more annoyed Broc was, the happier Chen Rui felt. Unfortunately, Manu and Broc were both cunning characters. Otherwise, it would be nice if Broc could be killed with Manu’s hand.

“Blood River.” Chen Rui glanced at the name engraved on the blood-red sword and nodded, “Such a good sword! Although it hasn’t reached legendary grade yet, the attributes are already pretty good. It can increase attack speed by 35%, increase water magic damage by 38% and devour enemies’ vitality and convert them into stamina.”

Broc looked slightly surprised. Appraisal was one of the skills of a mechanic master, but it usually required testing with corresponding instruments to confirm. Yet, Arthur could accurately tell the attributes of Blood River with a glance, including the hidden trait of devouring enemies’ vitality. It seemed that he was well-deserved to be the top genius in the Demon Realm in 10,000 years.

Surely, Chen Rui wouldn’t say it was the effect of [Analytical Eyes]. He touched the blade and pretended to feel it for a while with his eyes closed. Then, he showed a pity look, “It’s a good sword, but unfortunately, it won’t last for any longer.”

Broc was taken aback and asked with doubt, “Why did the master say that?”

“There is a saying among the mechanics. Crafting equipment is creating life. Equipment is also alive. Due to the relationship between materials and characteristics, general equipment has a certain degree of self-recovery ability. It’s just like we can heal ourselves from minor injuries. The problem is that your sword isn’t suffering from a minor injury. You can’t see it in this state, and it’s also difficult to be judged by other mechanic masters, but it can’t hide from my talented eyes. I can clearly feel that there are countless wounds on it. If this continues, the sword will shatter completely when it experiences strong pressure or it is infused with too much force.”

Chen Rui was the mechanic master that shocked the Demon Realm and he had just revealed his secret technique in “appraisal”, thus Broc obviously couldn’t ignore that remark. “Blood River” was his favourite weapon, and the attributes were also quite suitable for him. Now that he heard that it had a danger of scrapping, he didn’t dare to be rude. His tone had softened, “Since master can see it, is there a way to repair it?”

Chen Rui pretended to be contemplative, “There is a way, but there is no absolute certainty. If it succeeds, the properties of this sword may be further improved. As long as you trust me, I can give it a try as a reward for taking your Demon Shield to research.”

Broc was thinking that since he couldn’t take the Demon Shield back for the time being, if “Blood River” could be repaired, it could barely offset some losses. He nodded immediately, “I believe in master. Please take care of this sword.”

“Okay, let me think about it first… in terms of materials, I still have some in my lab.” Chen Rui pondered for a moment and nodded, “So, come with me then.”

Manu intended to see the means of this genius mechanic master, so he immediately followed Broc and Chen Rui to the lab on the hillside.

Chen Rui took out the necessary tools and the materials gifted by other people, and arranged them one by one. The rigorous and serious expression made people in awe. After turning on the magic furnace to reach the required temperature, Chen Rui simply put the “Blood River” into it to burn it until it turned red before taking it out with pliers. Then, he struck it with a hammer. The big hammering movements seemed to contain mysteries. It looked like an artistic dance. It made Manu nodded secretly, but the sparks when the hammer hit onto the Blood River made Broc secretly distressed.

As Chen Rui knocked, he sprinkled a kind of magic powder on it. The whole sword was making a strange sizzling sound. Subsequently, it was a series of smooth movements and processes. The complicated procedures that required the cooperation of a few people were actually completed perfectly alone.

Other than re-forging, the gems at the hilt were even dug out and polished. The details were meticulously processed. About three hours later, Chen Rui finally stopped all the work, wiped the sweat on his head and gave the sword that he worked on for so long to Broc, “Fortunately, I didn’t disappoint you. This sword not only is repaired from its initial damage, but its attributes are also increased. Now, it increases attack speed by 38%, increases water magic damage by 40% and it devours enemies’ vitality and converts them into stamina. Also, a [Bloodthirst] skill is added. It can increase your attack by 20% but decrease your defense by 10%. It can only be used once a day. This equipment should be very close to legendary grade.”

Broc was overjoyed. He took over the sword and saw that the blood flow above seemed to be more active. He was very familiar with the sword. After waving it a few times, he surely felt that the attack speed had increased. Then, he tried the [Bloodthirst] skill, and he couldn’t stop complimenting. If he had some killing intentions against Master “Arthur” initially, it had become appreciation now. No wonder he is treated with courteous by Manu. He is indeed a genius – if I have the opportunity to overthrow Manu in the future, I must try to recruit this talent for myself. Chen Rui accepted the gratitude and praise from Broc. The highest level of scamming someone was that after hurting him, he would still thank you and count your money for you.

Originally, this poor sword is nothing more than a “minor injury” that can heal itself. However, now, it has become a truly irreparable serious injury. As for the improvement of attributes… has he not heard of the final flash before dying? Thanks you for buffing my sword xD

chapters.title: Chapter 277: Realm King Fruit And The Lonely World
chapters.body:
Chapter 277: Realm King Fruit And The Lonely World

Broc left Crystal Valley with his “repaired” favourite sword. Although the loss of Magic Shield left a thorn in his heart, the repaired “Blood River” finally gave him a little compensation and psychological comfort. Surely, due to the need to be an undercover, someone’s sinister intentions wouldn’t be exposed yet. Therefore, “Blood River” still had some time to go from its final flash to its death.

Broc’s appearance confirmed the speculation in Chen Rui’s mind. Regardless of the Demon Shield or Blood River, these pranking tricks were just trivial. The actual thing that he had to think about was how to weaken the strength of the Crystal Valley or even create and expand internal disputes. By then, the joint efforts of inner and outer forces would naturally succeed in one try. Not only that, Chen Rui also had to find a way to rescue Kia’s mother and release Kia’s and her mother’s [Soul Shackles].

Kia’s mother was called Freya. She was originally at the base in the Bloody Vine City. A few years ago, she was brought to Crystal Valley’s Devouring Hall by Sabrina, and she was abused. This time, she happened to be taken away by Sabrina’s rival, Azgalor’s other wife, Izola, and she hadn’t yet returned.

“Repairing” the Blood River and making it close to the legendary grade allowed Manu to witness Chen Rui’s “capabilities”, so Chen Rui’s value had become more important in his heart. However, there were many important things outside that Manu couldn’t neglect, so he didn’t stay much longer in the Crystal Valley. He left the next day after Broc left.

During this time, apart from going to the crystal dragon to “study” the magic circle from time to time, Chen Rui had been staying behind closed doors most of the time. This was also a “common issue” of many mechanic masters.

However, Chen Rui hadn’t been immersed in “researching” the artifact, Demon Shield as others imagined. Instead, all his effort was spent on the training of Megrez state.

Actually, during his days at the Custer Family, Chen Rui attempted to train his Migrez state multiple times. However, the “world” was really mysterious. It was just beside him, but it was actually very ambiguous. Therefore, he didn’t know where to start. His experience value was still zero.

Super System’s advancement was very strange as it didn’t measure experience based solely on strength but based on the objective of current training. Even if one of his stats had reached Demon Emperor, he still wouldn’t break through to the next state. The previous [Refined Body], [Refined Power] were still literal. When it reached [Refined Mind], it was a bit mysterious already. Now, [Refined Principles] made him feel like he didn’t know where to start.

Relying on the help of realm king fruits seemed to be the only possible shortcut. Anyway, the longest shelf life of a king’s fruit was only three months. Now, more than a month had passed so it’d wither and disappear automatically without trying.

The realm king fruits wasn’t a real fruit but the essence created in the Aurora Frost. After consuming it, it could produce hallucinations corresponding to the mind. Then, it could derive a special spiritual imprint according to the mind of the user and later absorbed by the user.

This spiritual imprint was the feeling of “territory”. Certainly, this type of territory was only the primary level of territory, which was the pseudo-territory mastered by the Demon Emperors. However, the pseudo-territory was the foundation of an actual territory. It was also the greatest difference between Great Demon King and Demon Emperor.

The strength gap between the Great Demon King was actually very huge. Although some people might have reached Demon Emperor in terms of strength, they hadn’t mastered the power of territory, so they were still Great Demon King, and they couldn’t be regarded as Demon Emperor.

The difference in strength between a “pseudo-Demon Emperor” without the power of territory and a real Demon Emperor was huge. That was a difference in quality.

In the same way, if he could understand the strength of Megrez state, he would be undefeatable among those below the strength of Demon Emperor. If he could fully grasp the strength of Megrez state, he might even be able to rival those that just advanced to Demon Emperor.

However, the power of realm king fruits was too strong. Only Demon Emperors could bear its effect. He wasn’t even sure whether the modes of “Star Devouring” and “Star Conversion” could be used.

Chen Rui took out the realm king fruits. The appearance of this fruit was exquisite as if it was a flawless crystal artwork. It was also exuding a faint fragrance. It won’t feel like eating glass right… He raised his head and swallowed the fruit.

The realm king fruits was originally produced in the extremely cold environment at Aurora Frost. He felt cold in his hands but after it entered the stomach, it started to burn like a fire and spread all over his body quickly.

Chen Rui felt an unbearable pain as the fire began to burn in various parts of the body. His muscles began to swell and twist. He could no longer remain seated and fell to the ground while shivering. He struggled to resist the uncomfortable feeling. Fortunately, corresponding magic circles had been laid by him around the laboratory, and he strictly prohibited any disturbance. Therefore, his sound and movement wouldn’t be heard outside.

The fiery feeling was dozens of times greater than the fiery volcano in the training ground. Chen Rui felt that his bones and flesh were going to be vaporized. Besides, his brain began to swell up. It had increased several times in an instant as if it was going to explode.

The pain was real, but the swelling was actually an illusion. Since the realm king fruits must be taken at least with Demon Emperor strength, Chen Rui’s actual strength was only equivalent to the level of a Great Demon King. Thus, he couldn’t bear the power. The trouble was that the Star Devouring and Star Conversion prompt that he expected didn’t appear nor did a prompt for aura conversion.

At that moment, an unknown force surged in his body, gradually weakening the feeling of swelling to burst. That force was the strengthening power from Manu’s [Soul Shackles]. Although it was only a thousandth of a Demon Overlord’s strength, it was an extremely concentrated strength. Regardless of its quality or quantity, it was far superior to Chen Rui’s current strength. They couldn’t be digested completely at once, but it came in handy this time.

Under the dissolution and buffering of that force, Chen Rui’s body gradually returned to normal and Manu’s strength was quickly absorbed into the body. Most importantly, the effect of the realm king fruits was about to manifest.

Chen Rui’s vision and consciousness gradually blurred. When he recovered his consciousness with much effort, he found that the scene in front of him had completely changed. It was a familiar scene that he hadn’t seen for a long time.

Dust-covered roads, noisy car horns, cars parked all around, crowds moving in and out, and two girls walking in front of him while eating sugar cane. A trail of sugarcane’s residue was left behind. It was a very familiar small town. It was backward and dirty, but after all, it was his hometown.

Did I cross-over back?

What about Athena and the others? Paglio and the others? That world had become his real attachment. As for this world that he used to be familiar with, he felt strange now.

Chen Rui took a look at the mobile phone in his hand. The unbranded counterfeit that also has a camera. Why is this so familiar? Isn’t this that phone that appears with the Super System?! Although there were no life threats here at all times and there was no precarious settlement like the Dark Moon or a dangerous and terrible enemy’s lair like the Crystal Valley, he must return.

Chen Rui immediately pressed the power switch of the counterfeit phone, but an image of a celebrity’s face appeared/ There was also a voice that they thought to be sexy saying, Welcome to XXX phone!

What’s going on? It’s not the Super System? Chen Rui vaguely remembered that he had consumed the realm king fruits, then he came here. Could it be an illusion? Yet, everything is so realistic. He couldn’t help but walk all the way to the old neighborhood where his grandpa lived, but it had become a demolition area.

Chen Rui walked aimlessly on the street, stood, and sat down. This was originally the world he was most familiar with, but now he seemed like an outsider that was isolated from the surrounding traffic of people.

Once upon a time, he also felt the same way when he was young.

It felt like that time was still, and he was the one who was fading away. He was facing every passerby with a pale smile. Actually, he was the actual passerby.

It was just loneliness.

It was like a passerby on a horse that travelled alone in the desert that was destined to be endless. Perhaps one day, it would be the end when he finally fell.

There was just loneliness.

It was like a disconnected kite that seemed to be soaring freely in the sky. Yet, how long could this free life last?

It was just loneliness, that was all.

Chen Rui suddenly felt that someone was watching him. He immediately turned around and he saw a man sitting at the bus station behind him, showing a strange smile.

Chen Rui was shocked. This guy’s appearance… it’s me. No! That evil eyes and smile… it’s the inner demon that I eliminated during [Refined Mind] or it can also be called – Shura! “Surprised to see me?” Shura’s voice rang in his ears. The noise around him was suppressed. “Like I said, as long as the darkness inside you still exists, I’ll never disappear.”

Chen Rui had calmed down. After successfully passing the test of [Refined Mind], he had complete confidence to deal with Shura. He looked calmly at the enemy who was once the most dangerous, “Did you create this illusion?”

Shura shook his head, “This isn’t an illusion, but the world in your memory. Look at that…”

Chen Rui turned around and he heard the call for help. A woman shouted “robbery” while a man in front of her grabbed her handbag and ran away. The crowd around actually gave way to the robber. No one offered assistance.

Chen Rui and the man were face-to-face. When they were close, Chen Rui punched with lightning speed. Yet, at the moment of contact, they passed through each other. The man continued to run forward unaffected while the woman behind was out of breath as she saw the robber ran further and further away.

Chen Rui was taken aback. He tried to touch a pillar next to him and certainly, he pass through it again. Is this world an illusion or… am I the illusion? Not far away, an old man accidentally fell to the ground. He was stuck there for a long time and the passers-by couldn’t bother. A child wanted to come forward to help, but was pulled by his mother. She loudly scolded with words like “we can’t afford it”. Chen Rui ran over to help, and he still passed through the old man.

The surrounding people and events were constantly changing. The children of officials who were beating others and hitting others with their luxurious cars, countless people watching a drowning teenagers left unrescued, officials swallowed the relief of poor students in the name of training, principal help officials to make a female teacher drunk to be defiled, various poisonous foods and medicines made to make money… These were just the beginning. Subsequently, darker and darker scenes appeared before him, and these made Chen Rui very angry. Yet, he could only act as a bystander as he watched these injustices and sins happen without being able to help.

“Although this world isn’t the Demon Realm, it’s more interesting than the Demon Realm.” Shura noticed Chen Rui’s fluctuating emotions, and he smiled even creepier, “Darkness, coldness, selfishness, and mercilessness… In the end, only naked desire is left.”

It was indeed not an illusion but the real world in his memory, so Chen Rui was speechless for a moment.

Shura deliberately said it again, “Maybe there are still some stupid people who burn themselves to warm and shine others. However, what’s the use of that? After the fuel is exhausted, they’ll become a pile of cold ashes and those who are cold will crush them with their feet.”

Chen Rui kept silent. At that time, the surrounding environment, including the sun in the sky, had lost its color like a black and white film. Besides, everything started to become darker.

Shura stood up, approached him step by step and reached out his hand, “Surrender to the desires in your heart and accept my fusion. It’s not occupant but fusion. You’ll gain incomparable strength regardless in this world or another world. You’ll be superior over everyone else like the superior gods who can willfully possess, distort, play or destroy everything.”

Will Chen Rui submit to the fusion?

chapters.title: Chapter 278: Dark Star Territory
chapters.body:
Chapter 278: Dark Star Territory

Seeing that Chen Rui didn’t resist, Shura smiled even more. As soon as he came into contact with Chen Rui’s body, he was immediately repelled as if he was electrocuted. His fingers actually started smoking in green as if he was vaporized.

Shura frowned and his fingers returned to their original shape in an instant. Then, he saw a little more light under Chen Rui’s feet. In the gap between the two cement slates, a grass grew tenaciously, revealing a green that was different from the entire gloomy world.

Shura stared at the green and it was immediately erased. However, around him, spots of greens started to lit up. The entire dull world began to slowly recover its color.

“Stop your temptations. It’s useless. As you said, this is the world in my memory, so you can’t erase the original things, just like these greens.” Chen Rui who was silent finally spoke, “Although it’s just a weak seed, despite the hard and cold cement, it can still show the green of hope.”

Shura continuously used his power, but he was still unable to obliterate the increasing amount of greens that was emerging. His body flickered and turned into a cloud of black smoke. The sky that was already dark was now covered with haze. Even the sun became black and gloomier.

Chen Rui was wrapped in a black smoke. He felt various negative emotions rising from his heart, and they were quickly magnified. Sadness, pain, fear… His body also appeared to be in various states of numbness, weakness etc. However, his eyes remained calm.

“Shura, even if you cover the entire world with darkness, everyone still has some greens in their hearts. It might still be blinded; it might still be sprouting; it might have already germinated and stuck their head out of soil or cement. It’s just like tiny sparks, it can eventually burn the entire field. We cannot truly eliminate darkness in our hearts nor can we truly eliminate light.”

Chen Rui took a look at the black sun in the sky, “I’ve complained about life more than once and lost confidence and hope more than once. Yet, I still managed to continue walking forward step by step with my feet eventually. You may think this is stupid, but when there are more and more stupid people, when the light and heat in front of the ash illuminate and affect more people, the green seeds will eventually germinate and grow in the hearts of most people, warming the entire cold world. I don’t know when the day will come but I firmly believe that there will be this day. So, I’m still walking forward, raising my head and standing straight.”

There was a hot, glowing green in the center of the black smoke. The black smoke screamed unwillingly and gradually thinned out. The surrounding world returned to its original colorfulness.

Chen Rui turned on the counterfeit phone in his hands again and a familiar line appeared, “Congratulations! Welcome to the Super System.”

“Just continue fucking with my life!” Chen Rui finally cursed a complete sentence this time before the phone exploded.

He finally made up for his biggest regret before crossing-over.

After strenuously opening his relatively heavy eyes, certainly, he had returned to the Crystal Valley’s lab.

What is this realm king fruit? That wasn’t some simple illusion just now. It actually summoned Shura. If my will wasn’t strong, Shura might have taken advantage of it. After those hard work, a part of the strengthening power from Manu’s [Soul Shackles] had been digested and absorbed into the body, turning into his own strength. At the same time, there seemed to be a strange feeling in his mind. After feeling it carefully, it turned out to be the black force that Shura exerted, which was filled with evil and darkness.

Is this the spiritual imprint left by the realm king fruit? Although Chen Rui has passed the test of [Refined Mind], Shura, who was equivalent to the existence of an inner demon, was still a huge trouble. Now that the realm king fruit had actually left such an unavoidable imprint, isn’t that clearly fucking with me? The problem was, he didn’t know how to eliminate this imprint at present. Could this be a system BUG in Shura’s resurrection? It’ll be troublesome if he pops up at the critical moment of battle. As Chen Rui was frowning, he suddenly thought of a phrase – “there is no evil power, only the evil one who uses power”. In other words, there was no distinction between good and evil in the power itself. Good individuals would be good and the evil individuals would be evil. It was just like those who used dark magic weren’t necessarily an evil person. Just now, he had personally felt the Shura’s power. It wasn’t only a force that attacked the soul, but it was also accompanied by a comprehensive weakening of the enemy’s state. Various negative states such as paralysis, weakness, slow, damage increased were layered and combined together.

Is this the power of territory? Then, how can I exert that kind of power? It’s a bit like materializing spirit or a certain emotion. Not only that but something more mysterious. It seems to be a law. Paglio once said that the real territory is actually stimulating the power of nature with oneself. It’s just that I haven’t even understood the pseudo-territory at present, so understanding the actual territory is naturally impossible. In any case, the essence of strength was the same. Chen Rui put aside other thoughts and carefully felt the feeling in the spiritual imprint and the power of Shura in the illusion. He seemed to have vaguely found something, but he couldn’t tell clearly.

Chen Rui thought for a moment. Then, he entered the Super System’s training ground and activated the time rule. To take advantage of this negative dark power, he must first integrate into the dark to feel it and override the darkness to control it freely.

A day later, he opened his eyes and slowly waved his hands, showing hints of black smoke. Immediately after the black smoke appeared, the entire lab began to be filled with a strange atmosphere. However, due to insufficient strength, the black smoke dissipated in less than five seconds after it just reached a certain form.

Chen Rui frowned. This was the result after training with the 100-days time rule and it was his current limit. However, there wasn’t much practical value undoubtedly. Lack of understanding was one reason, but the most important thing was his lack of strength.

No wonder only Demon Emperors in the Demon Realm were able to cast territory. With his current strength, which was equivalent to the Demon King level, he couldn’t reach the Demon Emperor even if he fully absorbed Manu’s power.

Chen Rui didn’t know that for demons to advance from Great Demon King to Demon Emperor , that was, from the middle to the high level, the biggest obstacle wasn’t strength but the power of territory. The gap between Demon Emperor and Great Demon King was like Higher Demon and Demon King. It wasn’t just the difference in realm but also a huge difference in level. If there was a Great Demon King, who was trying to advance to Demon Emperor, knew his current situation, the Great Demon King must be quite speechless.

However, Chen Rui’s situation was special. The evolution of Star Level induced by the Super System wasn’t the same as the advancement of ordinary demons. Currently, he had understood a bit of the mystery. What he lacked was the strength to build the “world”. That bottleneck made Chen Rui fall into contemplation and the image of the Super System’s galaxy flashed in his mind. Suddenly, he had an idea. The stars appeared around him as he used his mind. The whole lab was like a tiny universe which was similar to the solar system in the Super System. However, it wasn’t the territory that he realized. Instead, it was a new skill of Megrez state, [Galaxy Territory].

[Galaxy Territory] could enhance all stats of the user by 30% and reduce enemies’ stats by 30%. It could last for 30 minutes. Its effect and range could be enhanced or changed according to the user’s strength.

Trail of black smoke started appearing from Chen Rui’s hands. He concentrated his mind and tried to integrate the power of that black smoke into the galaxy. With [Galaxy Territory] as the foundation, he didn’t need to spend a lot of energy on the structure. He only had to integrate directly.

Both of the powers came from the same origin. Although he encountered some difficulties during the integration process, it was generally smooth. It was just that sometimes he couldn’t catch a breath. Finally, before the [Galaxy Territory]’s 30 minutes expired, he achieved a rather successful integration.

At that moment, the [Galaxy Territory] surely looked different from the previous one. The planet was faintly revealing in black as if they were carved by gems from the netherworld. The appearance wasn’t the only thing that had changed but also the attributes of the [Galaxy Territory]. Other than strengthening the user and weakening enemies, “chaos” was added – living things in the [Galaxy Territory] had a certain chance to fall into confusion, causing hostility to all other living things regardless of friend or foe.

The Experience Value in the status bar that hadn’t moved finally started moving.

The success of this attempt made Chen Rui overjoyed. At present, his understanding on [Galaxy Territory] and the dark imprint wasn’t that great. As long as he could master and perfectly integrate, it was likely to achieve the effect of Shura’s true Dark Territory, which could make the [Galaxy Territory] cause various strong negative debuffs while weakening the enemies’ stats. Chen Rui called this new [Galaxy Territory] as [Dark Star Territory].

Unfortunately, the power of [Galaxy Territory] could only be maintained for 30 minutes. Soon, the [Dark Star Territory] disappeared. Inly then Chen Rui felt intense hunger and fatigue. After all, he had spent 100 days in the training ground.

[Dark Star Territory] was only one of the ways for Chen Rui to comprehend the “power of the world”, and it should still be different from an actual territory. Even if it was truly integrated perfectly, there was still a long way to go before he reached an actual territory. Regardlessly, he finally found a successful starting point.

He walked out of his closed lab and came to the living room. As soon as he ordered his servants to prepare food, a maid came to report, “Madam Sabrina from the Devouring Hall has just sent someone to invite master to have a taste of a newly obtained premium purple berry wine.”

In the past few days, Chen Rui had training in the lab all day long with the excuse of researching the Demon Shield. Except for the crystal dragon, he had almost no contact with Sabrina and her daughter. The purpose of this trip was most likely to “enhance their relationship”. He could take advantage of this trip to know more about Azgalor and Kia’s mother, Freya.

Chen Rui walked out of the lab and came all the way to the Devouring Hall.

The Crystal Valley spanned a huge area. The residential areas of the three major forces were relatively far away. The Devouring Hall was located in a strange-shaped basin area. It was surrounded by rolling stone peaks that looked like the teeth of demonic beasts.

The Devouring Hall was divided into three parts. The largest building in the center was usually where Azgalor was located, including his secret training room etc. Sabrina lived in a blue residential area on the left whereas the red residential area on the right should be Sabrina’s rival, Izola’s base.

Chen Rui had been here once, so he walked directly to the left. A maid greeted him soon and led him to the brightly lit restaurant with courtesy.

There was a sumptuous banquet in the restaurant, which seemed to be enough for more than ten people to enjoy. However, only Sabrina was sitting at the table. He didn’t see Fatilu or others. There were several maids on both her sides.

“Master, you’re finally here. I was worried that my etiquette was unsatisfactory, so you won’t be coming.” Sabrina stood up.

Chen Rui bowed and smiled, “It’s an honor to receive your invitation, madam. It’s just that I’ve been in the lab the entire day. Sorry to keep madam waiting.”

Sabrina waved her hands. The maids around got the hint, then they retreated and closed the door. Only Chen Rui and Sabrina were left in the huge restaurant.

Today, this lilac dress made Sabrina look even more charming and sexy, especially the ample bust gave him an impulse to violate it. Yet, the veil on her face was still not removed, adding a little bit more mysteriousness.

Seeing Sabrina swinging her hips while walking toward him, Chen Rui suddenly felt a little nervous: Is she trying to use a honey trap?

What an interesting ability, [Dark Star Territory]!! Can’t wait to see his true territory!

chapters.title: Chapter 279: True Look? Two Similar Women
chapters.body:
Chapter 279: True Look? Two Similar Women

“Last time, Fatilu invited you over rudely and you’ve stayed at the Bloody Vine City for so long, so I keep thinking apologizing to you, master but I never had a chance unfortunately. Now, I invite you over for a casual meal as a compensation.” Sabrina held a bottle of wine, personally filled the wine glass in front of Chen Rui and handed it over, “This is a superior purple berry wine I acquired from an aide outside today. I hope you can comment on it.”

Chen Rui quickly took the wine glass and smiled, “Madam, you’re too serious. I can accept this wine but not the apology. Not to mention madam is the mistress of the Devouring Hall, even if you’re not, who can bear to blame a stunning woman like you?”

“Master really knows what to say.” A hint of smiling intention flashed past her gold eyes as if water was going to drip, “I like your address as mistress very much. Come, cheers.”

They toasted. Chen Rui finished all of it while Sabrina took a shallow sip. Her elegant posture, revealing a noble and elegant beauty. This woman’s charm was indeed extraordinary. Even if the younger and more energetic Fatilu stood here, she would only seem dull in front her.

Chen Rui secretly figured out the intention of Sabrina’s invitation while saying, “I’ll be honest that I haven’t eaten in the labo for one whole day. I wonder If I can use my stomach to taste the inner beauty of this gorgeous banquet?”

“No wonder Fatilu can’t forget misses you. Master, you’re really a very humorous person.”

Sabrina chuckled and took a fork to eat a bit of fruit symbolically, “Actually, I was rude. Please feel at home, master.”

Chen Rui obviously wouldn’t hold back. Although the time rule of the Super System’s training ground was wondrous, even if it was only a day in reality, the consumption of spirit and stamina were still quite huge. It must be supplemented by food and sleep.

Seeing Chen Rui gobbling, Sabrina shook her head, “The servants at the Nightmare Valley should be punished. They actually didn’t prepare food for master to eat on the way.”

“It’s useless even if they prepared. When I concentrated on my research, there’s nothing else in my eyes except when I woke up out of hunger.” Chen Rui said vaguely, “However, those food over there cannot be compared to these delicious food here at your place.”

“Master seems to have been quite involved in your research recently.” Sabrina asked casually, “I wonder if there’s any progress?”

Chen Rui sighed, “The seven artifacts are indeed worth the reputation. The magic circle of the Magic Shield on the surface was very deep and profound. Even I can’t understand it at the moment, and it’s been a headache for me recently.”

Chen Rui knew that Sabrina was probing him, so he deliberately revealed it without thinking. In reality, he wasn’t studying the Magic Shield. He only did [Deep Analysis] five times a day and that was it. Most of the time was spent on training in the Megrez state.

“Remember to take care of your body. Don’t overwork yourself.” Sabrina smiled slightly and said with concern, “Don’t you have three hobbies? You’re very devoted to mechanics now but you’ve been neglecting the beautiful maid that my uncle granted you.”

“I’m quite picky. I have no interest in any of those maids!” Chen Rui knew that he hadn’t touched the women around him these days since he came to the Crystal Valley, so it might be quite surprising.

“Then, what kind of woman do you like, master?” Sabrina approached with an enticing voice.

Chen Rui was secretly surprised. Is she really going to seduce me by herself? Previously, he deliberately expressed admiration for Sabrina because he knew that Sabrina was a Great Demon King (probably higher than that) and she was also the main wife of a Demon Overlord powerhouse. Therefore, it was impossible for her to sacrifice herself as a bargaining chip, and he could use it to explain his lustful nature. Unexpectedly…

“Master seems to be a little nervous?” At today’s distance, he could clearly smell the scent on Sabrina. The Demon Realm didn’t have perfume, but there were similar substitutes. He didn’t notice when she was pouring wine, but now, the scent seemed to be getting stronger, seemingly indicating that her body was also heating up.

“Madam, it’ll be a lie if I say I’m not nervous. In the face of the charm of a majestic beauty like you, I cannot keep calm.” Although it felt like he was putting himself into a trap, he still had to continue the act. Therefore, Chen Rui’s eyes stared at Sabrina’s body and couldn’t move away.

Sabrina said with a flattering smile, “Master, you haven’t even seen my face. How do you know that I’m a stunning beauty?”

“I’m not a fool who doesn’t know when to retreat. I know I can only look up to madam’s strength and status.” Chen Rui had no food in his mouth, but he still made a swallowing move, “I’m only requesting madam to let me have a look at your face. I want nothing more.”

The phrase “I want nothing more” can be regarded as taking a step forward to withdraw. If it’s really unavoidable, to not expose my great identity as an undercover, I’ll have to compromise and enjoy the benefit… No, to make a huge sacrifice. Sabrina’s eyes flicked, “Did master use this method for Fatilu? Fatilu is absent-minded recently, it seems that her heart is really stolen by the master.”

Chen Rui was secretly vigilant. The puppet controlled by the God-Eating Mask basically had no special sign in the early stage, but occasionally, extremely subtle signs might appear. Judging by Sabrina’s tone, she most likely hadn’t found out the truth. She was just mistaking that Fatilu was interested in him.

Although the puppet technique wasn’t the blood talent of the Beelzebub Royal Family, due to the use of artifacts for many years, a secret puppeting technique had also been derived. Surely, it was far from comparable to the effect of God-Eating Mask. Sabrina was still okay. If it was Azgalor, who was proficient in the secret arts of the Beelzebub Royal Family, he would most likely see through the flaws on Fatilu. As a result, either Fatilu would have to leave the Crystal Valley or the action had to be launched before Azgalor returns. From the current situation, the latter had a higher probability.

“I’ll be honest, madam. Actually, my first impression of Miss Fatilu was very good.”

Chen Rui shook his head, “Yet, after spending time with her for a while, her character is really hard to deal with. On the other hand, madam’s temperament and empathy makes it difficult for me to control myself. Can you satisfy a tiny wish of mine?”

Sabrina knew her daughter’s character, but he still didn’t agree to him. She was still trying to play hard to get, “Actually, as long as master makes a request in the Nightmare Valley, all types of women will be available. Those that are younger and prettier than me are abundant.”

“None of those women is as good as one-millionth of you.” Chen Rui stared blankly at Sabrina’s face, “I don’t know why, but since I met you, I always feel dull when I see other women. When I dream, it’s always you. Every time you’re going to remove your veil in the dream, I’ll wake up. Madam… can I just take a look?”

It would be lying if Sabrina wasn’t flattered in her heart. However, she had her own objective for inviting Chen Rui. Now that the momentum was almost there, she sighed softly, “Since master insists…”

As she spoke, Sabrina took off her veil slowly. That “slow-motion” was very technical. First, she showed her delicate nose, then her sexy red lips, followed by her rounded chin. She really had a stunning look.

Chen Rui’s heart was shocked. It wasn’t because of Sabrina’s beauty, but because Sabrina’s facial features were very similar to a woman from the Fallen Angel Empire’s capital, Isabella!

Isabella is Belphegor Royal Family whereas Sabrina is Leviathan Royal Family! Is it just a coincidence? Roman once said that Isabella might be his half-sister with a different mother. Besides, his father eventually died in the hands of Broc while Sabrina is also Broc’s sister. Is there any connection between these elements? Chen Rui felt that his thoughts were a bit chaotic for a moment. His moment of surprise couldn’t hide from Sabrina. She smiled slightly, “Master, did I let you down?”

At once, Chen Rui had several thoughts in his mind. His eyes kept staring at her face, then he said, “Madam’s appearance is unparalleled, but there is something that bothers me and I must get the answer. Have you been to the Fallen Angel’s capital, madam?”

The purpose of Chen Rui’s coming today wasn’t to seduce or accept seduction, but to find out Sabrina’s details, so he naturally wouldn’t miss this opportunity.

Sabrina’s expression changed slightly. A hint of chill flashed past her eyes, then it returned to normal instantly, “What are you trying to say, master?”

Sabrina’s subtle changes were seen by Chen Rui. He secretly assumed that she might really be related to Isabella. He had an idea. He took a risk by clenching his teeth and said, “Before I reached my current achievements in mechanics, I’ve once wandered in the Fallen Angel’s capital. At that place, I was subjected to an unforgettable humiliation of a lifetime, that woman…”

Chen Rui’s humiliation was nothing more than those stories about losers being humiliated by their crushes and rich, handsome men. These materials were abundant from his previous life, so he didn’t have to worry about how realistic it was. Due to that “reason”, after the protagonist possessed the capability of a master, he didn’t want to serve the Fallen Angel’s capital. He continued to wander and finally came to the Dark Shadow Empire after passing by the Dark Moon.

“Except for the eyes and hair color, madam’s appearance was exactly the same as with that woman. Perhaps it’s just a coincidence, but I hope that you’ll give me an honest answer.” Chen Rui stood up slowly with a serious face.

Sabrina was annoyed in her heart. No matter how high his mechanical skill is, his strength is only at Demon King. He actually dares to speak to me in this tone. It’s even more annoying than his admiration and flirting just now. However, this guy is deeply respected by Manu and the crystal dragon. Since I still have to make use of him now, I must not turn my face.

“To be honest, that woman is indeed a little related to me.” Sabrina sighed. Seeing Chen Rui frowned, she immediately explained, “However, please rest assured, master. That woman is my rival. Even her brother was killed by my scheme. If there is a chance, I’ll definitely help you to deal with her!”

The hostility on Chen Rui’s face gradually disappeared, but his mood didn’t calm down: These two women with similar appearances are indeed related. The so-called rival doesn’t mean that they don’t belong to the same faction, just like Sabrina and Izola. In other words, Isabella is also a part of this organization? If Roman’s father and Isabella are really siblings, then was Broc’s murder of Roman’s father planned by Sabrina? These things seem very complicated. “Master, I’m sorry that this face reminds you of unpleasant things.” Sabrina put on her veil sadly.

“It’s me who should apologize.” Chen Rui shook his head quickly, “It was me that was rude. Despite the similar appearance, you’re completely different from that malicious woman. You’re still the most beautiful woman in my heart. Whenever you have a request, I won’t say no!”

“Is that true?” Seeing Chen Rui’s serious look, Sabrina sighed, “Actually, I wanted to entrust Fatilu to you today, but it’s a pity that you’re not interested in Fatilu. My effort is in vain.”

“Why entrust? What happened?” Chen Rui asked along her tone.

Sabrina looked sad and lowered her head to conceal the faint power from her right eye. She looked even more pitiful, “I believe you’ve heard from Fatilu that my husband, Azgalor is very fond of a woman named Izola. This woman is from the Mammon Royal Family, and her strength is comparable to me. Besides, she is insidious. She has schemed more than once to replace me as the main wife.”

“Did Sir Azgalor just let her be?”

“He is heartless, and he has always favored her. He even wanted to give one of my important tasks in the Crystal Valley to that woman. The situation is getting worse for me. I received information that she’ll return to the Crystal Valley in 3 days. Based on that woman’s personality, she’ll definitely harm me further. I’ve already put my life and death out of my mind, but I can’t let go of Fatilu. Therefore, I want to entrust her to master. With your current prestige, you should be able to protect Fatilu from being harmed by that woman.”

Coming back in three days? That means Kia’s mother, Freya will come back together! Chen Rui nodded secretly. He could feel that Sabrina used [The Eye of Incubus] when she said that. The power was weak and subtle, making the emotions stronger. He immediately pounded the table furiously, “What?! Madam, if you trust me, you can ask me for anything!”

“I obviously trust you, master.” Sabrina’s golden eyes lit up, then they dimmed again, “If master is willing to help, we’ll clearly win, but there is no need to offend that vicious woman for me.”

“I’m part of the Nightmare Valley and Sir Jacob takes me very seriously, so the woman can’t do anything to me! It’s just that I have a condition.” Chen Rui looked at Sabrina passionately. Finally, he made a decision and changed his tone, “I want that woman from the Fallen Angel’s capital!”

Voluntary labor will only be suspicious, so I must request a condition. However, this woman is clearly making an empty promise. She isn’t really trying to “pay”. At most, she is only willing to use her daughter as a bargain. In fact, Chen Rui was also acting. That was why he made a “compromise”, which was to get Isabella. It was an empty promise anyway.

This condition reassured Sabrina, but at the same time she felt strangely uncomfortable, as if the person “pursuing” her turned to another woman even though she wasn’t very interested in the suitor.

However, judging from the “master’s” hatred, he wants Isabella because it is nothing more than revenge. It’s likely to be sadistic. Certainly, I cannot rule out the possibility of him using the similar face to vent his desire for me. Thinking of this, Sabrina’s bizarre possessiveness and jealousy seemed to be somewhat satisfied.

“I promise you, but it’s not possible now. When that woman loses her value, I can swear by the surname of the Leviathan Royal Family that she’ll be master’s most satisfying plaything.

Chen Rui confirmed the assumption that Isabella was a member of this force. Actually, he was happy with the fight between Sabrina and Izola. He deliberately acted like he was contemplating, then he finally agreed.

chapters.title: Chapter 280: The Beginning Of The Plan
chapters.body:
Chapter 280: The Beginning Of The Plan

Compared with the importance of the entire Crystal Valley, the fight between Sabrina and Izola was only a tiny wave. However, if used properly, it might cause a horrifying tsunami and even become a key point. Certainly, he also had to try rescuing Kia’s mother, Freya.

The three Demon Overlords had greatly exceeded his original forecast in front of Christina. The result of war in this world was often determined by the handful of the strongest. If the battle against the strongest couldn’t be won, it’d be pointless no matter how much reinforcement Catherine sent. Now, two of the three Demon Overlords were out and only the crystal dragon, Jacob was left. Also, Azgalor was likely to see through the puppetry on Fatilu. Therefore, it must be launched before Azgalor returns.

Cutting one finger was better than damaging ten fingers. The most ideal result was to kill the crystal dragon, Jacob and end this base at once. However, since the crystal dragon could become the enemy of Paglio at his peak state, his strength was probably above the other two Demon Overlords. He had to find a way to weaken or make him lose his combat power.

There were too many steps to be considered, and he couldn’t take any wrong moves. In the enemy’s lair, he would lose everything if he took a wrong step. Chen Rui wanted to think about it, but waves of extreme fatigue caused by the training ground came. Sabrina noticed his fatigue, so she didn’t make him stay any longer. She let the maid send him back to his place at the Nightmare Valley.

Chen Rui fell into a deep sleep. After waking up the next day, he was energetic and was reminded by his maid, “It’s time to go to Sir Jacob to learn magic circle.”

Every few days, Chen Rui would go to Jacob to “learn” Dragon Inscription and study magic circles. Although he already held back, his understanding of Dragon Inscription still surprised the crystal dragon, so he began to teach with reservations. Chen Rui knew the crystal dragon’s thoughts, but he pretended not to know while sneering secretly. Although he could also learn some knowledge from a different angle from Jacob, from the level of understanding on Dragon Inscription alone, he had already surpassed the crystal dragon.

Today was the day of crystal dragon’s treatment with the magic circle, but he didn’t limit Chen Rui’s access. The reason was very simple. Chen Rui used the algorithm of [Deep Analysis] and attempted to change the details of a magic circle the last time. It made the recovery speed increase by 1%.

One shouldn’t underestimate that 1%. The entire magic circle was composed of ancient runes, Dragon Inscription and ordinary magic circle, interlocking with each other. A small change would cause a chain reaction and even crash the entire magic circle. Chen Rui’s ability to increase the speed without compromising the original functions was already a remarkable achievement. Although Jacob was jealous of his talent in magic circle, it was the time to make use of his talent now. Therefore, Jacob naturally provided the greatest convenience.

With the help of [Deep Analysis], Chen Rui had understood this magic circle quite thoroughly. The 1% accelerated recovery was only a small part of his successful analysis. The purpose was to win the trust of the crystal dragon. The subsequent attempts were mainly to understand the secrets of the six ancient runes. Unfortunately, there were still no clues.

The mist from the Spring of Resurrection was like a sauna, making people feel sleepy. Chen Rui suddenly had an idea, “That’s it!”

Crystal dragon’s heart was moved, “Is there any new discovery?”

Chen Rui nodded excitedly, “I had an idea initially. Now I finally have some clues. If it succeeds, it can improve the lasting time and recovery effect of the entire magic circle. The time isn’t certain, but it’s definitely not like once every 7 days at present. As for the effect, it was likely to increase by 30% to 50% ”

The crystal dragon was moved. If it really could achieve the effect that Arthur said, wouldn’t my recovery of injury increase exponentially? When Chen Rui proposed his idea, the crystal dragon, who was also a magic circle expert, was not only jealous, but he was even more admired. According to the idea proposed by Chen Rui, this improvement was definitely possible, but many details had yet to be further tested and confirmed.

“Sir Jacob, if this improvement is successful, it’ll cost a lot of the superior magic crystal, that is, gold crystal or at least blood crystal. In other words, it’s increasing the consumption of magic crystals to improve recovery efficiency.”

“There is no problem with the magic crystal. I can recruit manpower for emergency mining and refining now. I’ll definitely accumulate the large amount of magic crystals needed at the fastest speed.”

Chen Rui’s plan made Crystal Dragon very excited. Let alone consuming superior magic crystals. As long as his injury could be healed, it didn’t matter if the entire vein was depleted. It seems that my previous plan to win over and make friends with this genius was smart. Once he becomes a grandmaster, I’ll control him tightly within my hands to be used only by me. The injury was the biggest problem that had troubled the crystal dragon for the past 2000 years. As magic and potions weren’t ineffective on him, he could only use some special methods to recover. After escaping from death in battle, the crystal dragon was still traumatized. To avoid encountering that terrible opponent again, he had been staying mostly indoor and dare not to get too much attention. However, he didn’t know that his enemy had also been trapped for 2000 years.

Chen Rui added another sentence happily, “It may be used once every three days, and it can be used for the entire day at a time. The [Sleep] inscription that sir taught me last time can also be used to further strengthen the recovery effect.”
