[Star Gate] (active Skill) – After setting a star point, the user can open the [Star Gate] within the effective range to return to the star point; cannot be used by others; star point is effective for at most a month; can be used repeatedly; star point setting consumes 1000 auras; each usage consumes 500 auras.

The star point was set in a hidden place outside the Crystal Valley. It was set when Sabrina accompanied him out of the valley to “research” the Dragon Inscription a few days ago. At that time, he immediately returned with Sabrina after “researching”, so it didn’t raise any suspicions. Unfortunately, [Star Gate] couldn’t be used other than the user. Therefore, he could only let Freya leave with Fatilu.

It wasn’t too far away from the lab. It was just a short sprint. However, this “close” distance was indeed as far as worlds apart now. It was enough for Azgalor to kill him thousands of times.

Therefore, Chen Rui couldn’t act rashly nor could he let Azgalor find out his last resort. “Dark Will” wasn’t very useful in this Crystal Valley that was covered with Dragon Inscription. The location he could teleport and distance were greatly restricted. Besides, even if he could teleport, it might not work in the face of Demon Overlod’s strength.

He remembered that when he was at Mount Xilang’s underground world, “Dark Will” couldn’t work in Glorfin’s territory. Even Broc had the ability to limit the teleportation ability of this equipment.

“Richard? The chaos in the Crystal Valley must be created by you, am I right? Also, the blood on your body… smells like Sabrina.” Azgalor’s gaze added a cold killing intention, tightly locking onto Chen Rui, “No wonder I feel that Izola’s and Sabrina’s flame of life disappeared. Did both of them die in your hands?”

Chen Rui was taken aback. He never thought Azgalor also had such a perception secret technique. This is over. After learning that both his wives were killed by me, he’ll probably kill me immediately. There was already a little gold man in his hand behind him. It was the golden [War Puppet] that Christina gave him.

Can this puppet block Azgalor’s attack? There’s no other way. I can only bet on it! Although Fatilu and Freya were unable to move on the ground, they remained awake. Fatilu was still fine, but when Freya heard about Sabrina’s death, she was greatly shocked: No wonder the [Soul Shackles] that has been suppressing me suddenly disappeared. Previously, Master “Arthur” once said that he’ll help Kia and I remove the [Soul Shackles], but I didn’t expect it was by killing Sabrina! Since Azgalor said that Sabrina was killed by this stranger, could this man and Master “Arthur” be… However, that murderous intention gradually withdrew. Then, he heard Azgalor say, “I can let you live.”

Chen Rui held the golden puppet tightly. He chooses to not avenge his wives’ deaths? “You have to exchange your life for something equivalent for example…” Azgalor’s eyes fell onto Fatilu on the ground, “God-Eating Mask?”

Surely, the [Puppetry] from the God-Eating Mask couldn’t be concealed from Azgalor. He must have known that [Puppetry] was irreversible. Adding Fatilu, he had to avenge for both his wives and daughter’s deaths. Chen Rui thought quickly and shook his head, “I don’t understand what you meant.”

As soon those words ended, the horrifying pressure around him suddenly increased. Chen Rui felt that the blood vessels in his body were about to burst. The [Dark Star Territory] which was still within the time limit appeared again. The pressure instantly reduced significantly.

Azgalor frowned slightly. The territory was a bit strange. With his Demon Overlord strength, he actually couldn’t completely suppress it. For a man whose strength could barely be regarded as an early Demon Emperor (actually wrong assumption) to have such odd territory, his potential was remarkable.

“I’ve studied [Puppetry] for 200 years, and I’ve made countless puppets, but most of them have ended in failure. A puppet like this, with its own leading consciousness yet faithfully executing all the master’s orders with no possibility of betrayal…” Azgalor’s sight locked on Fatilu. His strange gaze seemed to be looking at a valuable puppet rather than his own daughter, “Other than the God-Eating Mask, nothing in this world can make such a perfect puppet!”

“If I have the God-Eating Mask and can even use it, can I confirm my status in the Beelzebub Royal Family?” Chen Rui thought quickly. [Earth Wall], [Earth Spike], [Gravity] and various other magic appeared one after another. All of them were cast without chanting, proving toward Azgalor a certain mastery of the Beelzebub Royal Family.

“Certainly…” Azgalor’s eyes were intertwined with fanaticism and coldness, “However, it’s useless. No matter who you are or who your father is or even if you’re recognized by the God-Eating Mask, the King of Beelzebub has always been one and that’s me! You have no other way to stay alive other than surrendering the God-Eating Mask.”

“There is hope in life,” Chen Rui made a pondering look. “I promise you. However, the mask isn’t with me. Can we talk about the conditions in detail?”

“I can tell you’re someone who likes to scheme.” Azgalor’s tone became more eerie, “However, I don’t have this patience. I prefer using action to prove determination.”

As soon as he said that, Fatilu and Freya’s bodies floated together. Immediately after, Fatilu’s body began to tremble violently. “ Poom! ” Her body bursted apart with no traces left.

Chen Rui’s pupils contracted. Even if she’s a puppet, she is still her daughter after all. Azgalor actually destroyed Fatilu without hesitation! “Not to mention she’s a Leviathan Royal Family, she is worthless even if she’s a Beezlebub Royal Family. Since she has become your puppet, she serves no value… Perhaps I should say, proving my determination is her only value left.” Azgalor’s eyes fell onto Freya, “This woman isn’t a puppet, but you make the puppet take her away. She must have important value to you. Do I need to prove it again?”

“No need.” Chen Rui’s heart sank. Azgalor’s cruelty was beyond imagination. He could give up his avenge for his wives and daughter’s deaths for the God-Eating Mask. He even destroyed his own daughter personally. Even if he lied that he was related to Glorfin, it might still be hard to escape.

Judging from the current situation, it was unrealistic to use God-Eating Mask as a bargaining chip to take Freya away. Azgalor would definitely kill them as soon as he got the mask. Not to mention that the God-Eating Mask had been integrated into the Super System. He didn’t know how to take it off yet.

“Can you let me consider?” Chen Rui looked serious. Then, he took a look at Freya, “This woman is indeed a little valuable, but compared to my life, he is insignificant. However… God-Eating Mask… you also know what it represents to us. At such a place, it’s impossible that I’ll bring it with me. Yet, I can tell you where the artifact is.”

“One minute.” Azgalor didn’t give him time to use his eloquence.

It seemed he could no longer delay. Chen Rui took a deep breath. Suddenly, there was something in his hands behind his back. It turned out that many crystal men had moved closer to them.

Azgalor raised his eyebrows slightly, “I never thought even the puppet’s heart is in your hands! I think I already understand your answer.”

“Don’t rush. It hasn’t been a minute yet. I want to witness the strength of a Demon Overlord first.” Chen Rui made up his mind. Several crystal men charged toward Azgalor while he was prepared to escape. Azgalor didn’t even look at the crystal men who were pouncing at him. He stretched out a finger and drew a circle. Under the influence of a certain force, a faint wave of smoke spread on the ground. The force field seemed boring and harmless. Yet, the movement of the crystal men in the range were all paused. Almost in the blink of an eye, all the crystal men exploded at the same time. Chen Rui was secretly shocked. Two of these crystal men were leader-level, that was, Great Demon King. He didn’t expect they would be instantly killed with one finger. Azgalor’s eyes had always locked onto him tightly. That formless spiritual pressure made him almost feel like yielding to Azgalor.

As the God-Eating Mask is too important, although this enemy is only a Demon Emperor, Demon Realm has many secret techniques of self-destruction, including the “results” of the Mystic Valley. If he is determined to die, it’ll be worthless. Judging from the opponent’s stubborn resistance, Azgalor’s thoughts of getting the whereabouts of the artifact or threatening him by force had failed. He could only capture Chen Rui quickly.

Azgalor was determined and ignored Freya, who fell to the ground. His figure flickered, and he had appeared in front of Chen Rui in an instant, grabbing toward him. Chen Rui felt that the surrounding space seemed to be distorted. He couldn’t move his body at all. Fortunately, he didn’t use [Teleportation] in the battle with Sabrina just now. He immediately made up his mind and teleported to a distant place.

Azgalor looked surprised. That catch contained some kind of mysterious power of law. Even the talent of the Great Demon family couldn’t be cast, but this “clanmate” actually had such a mutated talent that could overcome the Demon Overlord’s law and teleport to a safe place.

Although he was surprised, the difference in strength between the two was still too huge. Azgalor still had absolute confidence to easily capture Richard Beelzebub.

In any case, there can only be one King of Gluttony, and the owner of the artifact is me, Azgalor Beelzebub. Chen Rui’s teleporting direction was the Nightmare Valley. The teleporting distance after [Scorching Dragon Possession] was far greater than the normal state, but there was still a distance to the lab at the Nightmare Valley. As long as he could enter the [Star Gate] in the lab, he could definitely escape from the danger.

As for Freya, he really couldn’t do anything this time. However, he already mentioned Freya had considerable value to him. As long as he could escape successfully, Azgalor would definitely keep her alive for the God-Eating Mask.

If Chen Rui was caught, Freya would probably die.

If he relied on [Teleportation] alone, he definitely couldn’t reach his destination. This journey was truly racing against death.

Azgalor caught up with Chen Rui’s teleporting distance in just one step. However, the opponent’s [Teleportation] that went against law appeared again. The man escaped from his hand again.

“Interesting!” Azgalor said calmly while the killing intention in his heart became more intense. Mysterious skill, great potential and the very likely special “identity”… This man cannot live. Otherwise, he’ll be the greatest threat to my dominance of the Beelzebub Royal Family. Chen Rui didn’t know that he became the biggest target of the King of Beelzebub innocently. In fact, he didn’t want to use both his [Teleportation] so quickly, but there was no other way because the pressure from his opponent’s movement was too huge. If he acted one second slower, he would be caught.

Now that both of his [Teleportation] had used up, Chen Rui immediately infused his strength into the golden [War Puppet] given by Christina without thinking, then he threw it at Azgalor.

Azgalor felt that a golden light was coming. As he was about to block it simply with his hand, he was suddenly alerted. He immediately disappeared and dodged. Then, the golden light had turned into a two-meter-high humanoid attacking Azgalor.

Chen Rui once witnessed the bronze [War Puppet] from Christina and Casillas, who were both from the Lust Royal Family. They were both huge in size and at least 5 meters in height. In contrast, this golden puppet seemed a lot smaller. It was similar to the form of a real person. Its eyes were even emitting a faint red light. However, the remaining facial features were very vague, and there were a lot of strange patterns engraved on its body.

“Golden puppet!” Azgalor blurted out. He obviously was a knowledgeable person. The golden puppet was the highest grade [War Puppet] from the Asmodeus Royal Family. It had the combat power comparable to Demon Overlord. Besides, it was extremely hard to deal with because it was lifeless and had no feeling of fatigue. Could it be that “Richard” who has God-Eating Mask actually abandoned the dignity of the Beelzebub Royal Family and turned to the Dark Shadow Empire? Bad body Richard 😤, you abandoned the Beelzebub Royal Family that was going to killed you? 🤪

chapters.title: Chapter 294: Phoenix! Appearance And Crisis
chapters.body:
Chapter 294: Phoenix! Appearance And Crisis

Azgalor felt strange in his heart, but he didn’t give much thought. As his goal was Chen Rui, he didn’t want to fight with the golden puppet. Unexpectedly, the golden puppet’s body emitted a circle of yellowish light. Azgalor’s body within the range seemed to be bound by ropes. He couldn’t move at once.

[Puppet’s Skill]! Azgalor was taken aback. Only the best golden puppets have special skills. This golden puppet’s grade is that high?! The golden puppet’s fist with high damage had almost reached. It couldn’t be avoided. Azgalor shouted loudly and the constraint on his body suddenly shook away. He stretched out his hand like lightning and grabbed the golden puppet’s fist. When the two forces collided, the entire ground suddenly trembled violently. With both of them as the center, a huge pit cracked open below them, and it was even after being suppressed by Dragon Inscription.

Chen Rui didn’t have the time to watch the battle. Every second was very crucial to him now. The moment he threw out the golden puppet, he was already running toward the Nightmare Valley at full speed.

Red electric sparks were coming out of Azgalor’s hands as he twisted violently. If it was an ordinary opponent, the opponent’s body would have spun for countless times. However, the golden puppet wasn’t an ordinary opponent. It’s arm was only slightly twisted abnormally as if there were no bones, then it instantly returned to its original shape. Instead, it relied on its elasticity to shake off Azgalor’s palm.

Azgalor responded very quickly. His arms suddenly extended and hit the golden puppet in its chest with a fierce punch. That punch was extremely powerful as it knocked half of the golden puppet’s body into the ground. Azgalor was about to continue to chase Chen Rui, but his ankle was tightly grabbed by the golden puppet. He couldn’t move. Then, he mustered his strength and jumped up suddenly, bringing the golden puppet up into the sky. Azgalor took a glimpse in the air that Chen Rui’s escape route wasn’t toward the outside of the valley but the Nightmare Valley, which was a “dead alley”. Suddenly, his ankle was hurt. He shouted angrily and violent hitting sound could be heard clearly from the sky at once. The golden puppet also had the ability to fly, but it was obviously at a disadvantage. It still didn’t give up. In the blink of an eye, Chen Rui, who was running at full speed, had arrived at the Nightmare Valley, then he rushed toward the location of the lab. At the entrance of the hillside, the mad beast, Lafar saw a stranger running toward him and started roaring and waving his giant claws toward the “incoming enemy”.

Chen Rui quickly called Lafar’s name using [Analytical Eyes]. Lafar paused and looked confused, but his giant arm still attacked mercilessly. If it weren’t for Chen Rui’s current state of [Scorching Dragon Possession], he would probably be injured by that attack.

Chen Rui immediately cast [Camouflage] to change his appearance and breath into “Arthur”. Then, Lafar’s hostile eyes began to ease.

Chen Rui immediately ran toward the lab at the hillside. However, something strange happened. While he ran, he only felt that the scenery on both sides changed, but when he stopped and took a look, he was still at the same place.

Chen Rui was taken aback. His body strength rose sharply. He stomped his feet and leapt toward the lab. However, the surrounding space suddenly twisted strangely. That leap with all his force was equivalent to retreating as he actually jumped out of the Nightmare Valley strangely.

Outside the Nightmare Valley, the battle in the sky had ended. The golden puppet hadn’t been destroyed. Instead, it was “standing still” on the ground with a layer of transparent crystal like a crystal sculpture.

Azgalor stood there safe and sound while beside him, there was a short white-haired man – Crystal dragon, Jacob! Chen Rui’s heart sank completely. Shouldn’t Jacob still be asleep? Dragon Inscriptions cover every corner along the way, so no one can wake him up, even if they want to. Why did he wake up so suddenly? “Master, ARE, YOU, OKAY?!” Jacob’s greeting came out word by work and his voice was filled with hatred.

Azgalor was slightly surprised to see “Richard’s” appearance changed, “So he’s that trio-specialized master? He actually has Demon Emperor-level strength!”

Trio-specialized genius mechanical master, Demon Emperor-level strength, strange territory and mutated talent… He is definitely an extraordinary genius in this entire Demon Realm. At that moment, Azgalor hesitated a little. If I can let this “clanmate” completely surrender, the power of the Beelzebub Royal Family will absolutely be greatly enhanced… Jacob’s anger was almost at his maximum. When he woke up, he found that the Fountain of Resurrection was completely dried and the most important ancient runes slab in the magic circle were also gone. He almost went crazy. Besides, the thing that replaces all these to temporarily keep him asleep was a temporary magic circle. In the entire Crystal Valley, the only one that could pass through the defensive Dragon Inscriptions silently and set up such a level of magic circle could only be “Master Arthur”, who he valued most!

Wrath! Anger! Furious! These words weren’t enough to describe the crystal dragon’s current mood. A Demon Overlord like him was actually tricked by a lowly ant!

At that moment, the mad beast, Lafar in the distance saw Chen Rui in danger, so he charged over while roaring. Before he could get close, Jacob simply grabbed it, and the grab actually overcame the space to catch Lafar’s body into the air. Although Lafar was nearly twice as tall as Jacob, he was even more vulnerable than a child in front of Jacob. Under that intense pressure, Lafar’s body was tremblingm but he was still struggling and wanting to attack.

“You should be fine, but I am not.” Jacob’s fingers flicked. Before Chen Rui spoke, the mad beast’s body snapped into pieces. His broken body had been solidified into pieces of crystal before falling to the ground and shattered after exploding.

Chen Rui clenched his fist, and his heart was in pain. Lafar was a very innocent test subject. Although he was transformed into an ugly, brutal monster, he always regarded Chen Rui as the most loyal friend after recovering his consciousness. Even at such a dangerous moment, he still charged forward without hesitation.

Jacob’s eyes looked at Freya not far away, and Freya’s body suddenly floated over. Chen Rui knew that the crystal dragon was moody and loved to kill. Now that he was furious, he was even more brutal and bloodthirsty. He definitely couldn’t let Freya follow Lafar’s steps, “Wait!” Freya’s body stopped. She was surprised looking at this “Richard” who had become a familiar face.” It really was him. He killed Sabrina to remove the [Soul Shackles] for me and my daughter. “Jacob! If you still want the Fountain of Resurrection and ancient runes, don’t touch that woman!” Chen Rui’s eyes fell onto Azgalor, “The same goes for God-Eating Mask!” “The Fountain of Resurrection can still be restored?” Jacob held back his impulse forcefully. The Fountain of Resurrection was the key to his recovery. Originally, he thought it was completely destroyed, but he didn’t expect it to be able to be restored.

Chen Rui stretched his hand out and water continued to flow out from his palm, seemingly endless. Jacob was very familiar with the breath of Fountain of Resurrection, so he could clearly tell that it was the Fountain of Resurrection.

“Very good.” Jacob clenched his teeth and said. Then, he acted on his impulse and threw Freya over to Chen Rui, “I’ll give this woman back to you!” As Chen Rui was about to catch her, Freya’s body suddenly shuddered. She only managed to reveal to him a contented smile before her body quickly turned into crystal.

“No!”

Freya could no longer make a sound, and she couldn’t hear his voice anymore. She could only see the resentful expression of the man in front of her through the crystal. That resentful expression should be for her, a humble maid. He was the first man who truly felt resentful for her. Besides, he was also a Demon Emperor and the top genius mechanic master in the Demon Realm.

Compared to him, those “men” who had defiled her in the past were only males with desires.

It’s such a pity. It’ll be better if I have more time. Perhaps I can feel the man’s heart more. Even if I’m just a maid that “asks nothing” beside him. By the way, if Kia can stay by this man and be guarded by him, she must be very happy in the future… At that moment, Freya’s eyes showed an unprecedented tranquility. The past misery and misfortune were replaced by this strange tranquility. The moment Chen Rui noticed that tranquility, the entire crystal sculpture shattered.

In Chen Rui’s clenched fist, his nails had already pierced through his flesh, leaving blood marks. Both of them were completely destroyed with no traces left. Therefore, even if he had Resurrection Potions, they couldn’t be brought back to life.

The cold voice of the crystal dragon sounded again, “You have no right to talk about conditions! Since the Fountain of Resurrection can be recovered, then I have a secret method to interrogate everything! Then, I’ll imprison your soul forever in endless torture!”

Chen Rui suppressed the strong anger in his heart: Calm down! Calm down! I have to stay alive! To avenge Freya and Lafar! “The dragon’s secret technique? Is it Moreche’s [Forbidden Curse]? Or Pankaka’s [Spirit Extraction]?”

Jacob was startled, “How do you know?”

“Let me tell you something. I can end my life as I like to!” Chen Rui sneered, “It’s useless even if you have the Blue Dragon, Ranieri’s treasure, Icy Board! Besides, the Icy Board was already destroyed by Zola back then!”

Jacob was shocked. These secrets were not even known by his allies, Azgalor and Manu, but this enemy in front of him actually…

“How do you know so much?!” How is this possible?!”Chen Rui laughed, “Did you forget who damaged you badly back then and made you run away like a poor dog?”

“Pa… Paglio!” Jacob’s voice was slightly trembling. It was mixed with hatred and fear. His body was immune to magic, even dragon magic’s effect was minimal. Yet, the poison dragon, Paglio’s strange venomous attack could actually destroy his crystal body that was immune to poison. Paglio was his greatest enemy and his greatest nemesis! This “master” turns out to be Paglio’s subordinate! Then, the most terrifying enemy already knew that I’m hiding in the Crystal Valley! Azgalor was also a little surprised that things seemed to be more and more complicated. That man named Paglio must be Jacob’s enemy. Could that be the reason “Richard” sneaked into Crystal Valley? There is still such a force that can rival the crystal dragon behind this clanmate! In fact, both of the Demon Overlords had thought “wrongly”. Paglio was up and about, but if Jacob knew the current strength of his enemy, he would probably immediately go to Paglio for revenge or kill the “master” in front of him. Then, his enemy with the symbiotic contract will also die.

Azgalor was even worse. The “clanmate” in his heart wasn’t a Beelzebub Royal Family at all. Regardless of his previous or current life, he was just a mere human.

If they just wanted to kill Chen Rui, then it didn’t matter how strong his background was. Between Jacob and Azgalor, anyone of them could easily kill him. However, both of them were worried about what Chen Rui had. The Fountain of Resurrection was impossible to be kept in space equipment. The same was true for artifacts. In the situation where their opponent was threatening to suicide, they had to be cautious.

Although Chen Rui successfully deterred Jacob, he still had no way to escape. Especially due to the strange space power of the crystal dragon, there was no way to escape. So, he was also secretly anxious. Both parties were in a deadlock.

At that moment, Jacob and Azgalor both sensed something. They looked up to the sky and saw that a huge black phoenix had appeared in the sky.

This phoenix’s wings spread like clouds which covered the entire sky, exuding a shocking breath.

In the blink of an eye, the phoenix had disappeared like it was an illusion. It turned out that it was a dark-haired woman wearing a robe and a headband.

Even with the veil, one could notice her incomparable beauty.

Chen Rui sensed both of their gaze. When he saw the woman in the sky, he was taken aback: Christina! Empress Catherine’s reinforcements finally arrives. Unexpectedly, she sent Christina! If the original plan is successful… it doesn’t matter. Yet, things have changed now. The Crystal Valley has two Demon Overlords, which are extremely dangerous.

“Christina, run!” Chen Rui shouted, ignoring Jacob and Azgalor.

Christina took a look at the three people below and didn’t leave. Instead, her body descended slowly.

“Christina?” Azgalor raised his brows, “I’ve heard that name. You’re the noblewoman from the Dark Shadow’s royal family. According to my intel, you’re likely to be the next heir to empress.”

The crystal dragon quickly got rid of the trauma about Paglio and sneered, “I’ve heard that Catherine is the smartest person in the Demon Realm, but unfortunately, her heir is so stupid to not run away. She actually dares to stay.”

Christina didn’t say anything. She just examined her surroundings. Chen Rui felt extremely anxious: Even if Christina’s strength has reached Demon Overlord, she probably just broke through via [Nirvana] the last time at the Silent Night wetland. However, among the two of them, one of them was the master of Beelzebub Royal Family while the other was a dragon that had lived for thousands of years. It was difficult enough one-on-one. When facing two of them alone, perhaps escaping would also be an issue.

“This woman must be with you right.” Jacob looked at Chen Rui coldly, “You look quite anxious. If you don’t want her to die, give it back immediately!”

Christina spoke. Her voice was still as calm as a calm water surface. She didn’t panic, but her words made Chen Rui’s expression change again.

“There is one more. Come out.”

A creepy laughter sounded. Not far behind, a vague figure gradually became clear.

Chen Rui’s heart suddenly became cold – It’s Manu! Even the old fox is back! 3 vs 1! Christina has no hope! Why did Christina look so confident? Was the empress here too?

chapters.title: Chapter 295: Heart Was Destroyed
chapters.body:
Chapter 295: Heart Was Destroyed

Manu walked over calmly and surrounded Christina in a triangle with Azgalor and Jacob. He bowed gracefully, “Beautiful Ms. Christina, I am honored to see you again.”

“Have we met?”

“Certainly.” Manu smiled slightly, “At the lord’s mansion of the Bloody Vine City, when you showed the empress’ order to mobilize the army, I had the honour to witness your grace. I still haven’t forgotten until now.”

Christina examined Manu for a while and shook her head, “I remember there were few outsiders present when the order was presented.”

“I’m not an “outsider”. I remember that you’ve once passed the empress’ condolences, asking me to rest well.”

Christina’s calm voice finally revealed her surprise, “You’re… the father of Lord Eddie, Famore!”

Manu’s smile was a little weird, “My name is Manu, Manu Leviathan.”

“It turns out so.” Christina sighed, “It seems that Famore has been replaced by you. If that’s the case… is the Lord Eddie City also under your control?”

Manu nodded, “To be precise, the real Eddie is dead.”

Both Chen Rui and Christina knew that for Manu to confess all these things, he definitely wasn’t planning to let Christina leave alive.

Christina calmed down again, “Then, is there something wrong with the army sent by the Bloody Vine City this time?”

“That’s right. These troops are my elite forces. They should’ve eliminated the men you brought.”

“All the things you want are with me.” Chen Rui said suddenly.

“It’s useless, master. I’ve heard everything when I was lurking aside just now.” Manu interrupted what he was about to say. “Sabrina and Izola are dead and the Mystic Valley is destroyed. Even if the army of the Dark Shadow Empire doesn’t come to eliminate, the Crystal Valley has already been severely damaged. If I didn’t detect the capital’s movements with Famore’s identity and rushed back in time to wake Jacob up, coupled with Azgalor’s coincidence return, your plan would have succeeded.”

Chen Rui smiled bitterly. The plan was perfect, but I never thought Manu would rush back to the Crystal Valley and wake up Jacob. Now all my efforts are wasted. Things are truly unpredictable. “I have to admit that you’re truly a genius no matter in terms of talent, capabilities or intelligence! Even Demon Overlords like us have been tricked by your scheme.” Manu complimented and his tone suddenly changed, “However, you forgot one thing, that was you’ve accepted my [Soul Shackles] in order to gain my trust. The injuries you just suffered had a little reaction in the [Soul Channel]. With the shackles, even if you want to self-destruct, you can’t do it.”

Hearing that Chen Rui willingly accepted the [Soul Shackles], Christina’s calm eyes also inexplicably had a trace of uneasiness. Both Jacob’s and Azgalor’s eyes lit up at the same time. Jacob said with dissatisfaction, “By the way, I’m almost blinded by my anger and forgot about that. Why didn’t you mention earlier?”

“If I came out earlier, I’m afraid this noblewoman wouldn’t appear.” Manu smiled slyfully. “Ms. Christina, your beauty and temperament fascinated me deeply. I wonder if I can have the honor to marry you? I’m the master of the Leviathan Royal Family, so it’s not humiliating for you too.”

Manu’s threat in that “request” was obvious when he had absolute advantage in strength – According to my intel, Christina is likely to be the heir of the Dark Shadow Empire. If I can control her, it’s much more valuable than killing her. “Such an overbearing guy. What do you think I will answer?” Christina’s veil revealed a faint laughter that was full of sarcasm and disdain. The crystal imprisoning the golden puppet suddenly shattered, then the golden puppet came to Christina’s side, looking like it was ready to fight.

That reaction was part of Manu’s expectation. When Manu waved his hand, Chen Rui’s heart suddenly sank as if his heart was caught by something which was very uncomfortable. At the same time, his body suddenly backed away involuntarily and wrapped by thin threads like a pupa, only showing his head.

“Master, I’ve already cast control on the shackles. You can no longer have suicidal thoughts. Also, these ‘threads’ are to protect you, so don’t try to struggle. When this woman is captured, let’s have a nice discussion okay?” Manu’s gentle smile was as kind as an old friend, but Chen Rui felt chill in his heart.

The effect of [Soul Shackles] was truly magical. Chen Rui couldn’t produce any suicidal thoughts now. Now, he understood why Delia and Kia were as good as dead after they were imprisoned by [Soul Shackles].

After Manu dealt with Chen Rui, he saw that the number of golden puppets next to Christina had increased to two. He was slightly surprised, “You can actually control two golden puppets at the same time. Your potential and talent are really amazing. Are you really not going to consider my proposal?”

Christina replied indifferently, “Is every Leviathan Royal Family as verbose as you before they start attacking?”

If they weren’t hostile, the crystal dragon, Jacob really wanted to give this woman a thumbs up. Manu, the self-assured guy, who always thought he is clever, just loves to talk. Is he fighting with his mouth? “Then, please forgive me for being verbose for a bit more.” Manu’s smile remained unchanged, “If you think you can escape with the two golden puppets, then you have to be disappointed. That’s because… my [Soul Territory] happens to be the nemesis of all spiritual puppets. My territory is probably the only one having such a characteristic in the entire Demon Realm. Unfortunately, you’ve encountered it.”

As soon as he finished his words, the surrounding scene suddenly changed. There were silk threads crisscrossed everywhere like a spider web. The texture and arrangement of these threads contained an extremely mysterious rule. It was as if the space had been divided into countless fragments.

Manu wasn’t bragging. The golden puppets showed a very unnatural twist in the territory of threads. They seemed to be wooden puppets being pulled by countless invisible threads, and they couldn’t be controlled by Christina’s spirit. In contrast, they had the sign of attacking Christina.

Christina frowned slightly and kept the puppets.

Unless they were hostile, territories generally couldn’t be used together. With Manu’s territory that could restrain the opponent’s greatest combat power, neither Jacob nor Azgalor activated their territory to avoid conflict. At present, the strongest talent of the Asmodeus Royal Family, [War Puppet], had been limited; whereas close combat was Azgalor’s and Jacob’s strength. Christina was already an easy target.

Azgalor took the lead. A buzzing red lightning appeared around his body. He flashed and started attacking Christina. Christina waved one of her hands and blocked Azgalor’s fist lightly, but her body shook slightly.

Manu’s annoying voice sounded again, “Azgalor’s attack is part of his mutated talent, but it is not an elemental force. Your [Element Weakening] talent is useless. I forgot to introduce them. This is Mr. Azgalor, the king of Beelzebub Royal Family. That one is a powerful dragon, Mr. Jacob. Both of them are powerhouses at the peak of Demon Overlord. Any one of them can defeat you!”

Although he thought Manu’s talkativeness was very annoying, when he heard that he was described as a “powerful dragon”, he still felt very pleased and proud. Yet, he didn’t attack together with Azgalor.

It’s just a woman. How does she qualify for Sir Jacob to ignore the dragon’s arrogance to joint attack her together? Actually, Manu didn’t mention that Azgalor’s fist was also blended with the devouring talent of the Beelzebub Royal Family. It could continuously absorb the enemy’s strength from the attack. At once, Christina was suppressed to a disadvantage.

Chen Rui was extremely anxious. Christina clearly saw the two Demon Overlords underneath just now yet she still impulsively rushed down. Now, there is even Manu. Besides, there is such a territory that restrained [War Puppet]. She has no chance of winning. If she falls into the enemy’s hands, the consequences are unbearable. He exerted his strength, trying to break free from Manu’s “thread”, but it was useless no matter what he did.

In the territory, Azgalor turned into a red whirlwind that trapped Christina firmly.

The whirlwind was mixed with the sound of electric current from time to time. The hidden figure in it was constantly moving in the thread territory. It was obviously Christina who was trying to break free from the control, but the whirlwind was constantly wrapping around her as she moved, so she couldn’t succeed.

Seeing Cristina’s critical situation, the scene of Freya and Lafar being killed just now appeared before Chen Rui’s eyes once again. Do I have to watch Christina… The biggest threat to Christina now isn’t Azgalor nor Jacob but Manu that can restrain her [War Puppet]! If I can weaken or even destroy Manu’s territory and let Christina use [War Puppet], she can definitely fight for her time to escape! It was already the last moment of [Scorching Dragon Possession]. After this, his combat power would drop significantly, and he wouldn’t be unable to use any skill within 24 hours. His success or failure was in this single move.

Every inch of Chen Rui’s strength was gathered, and it gradually compressed to a minimal extent.

Christina staggered a few steps while her body trembled slightly. She was clearly affected by the blood-red lightning. Judging from her gasp, her stamina had reduced a lot.

Chen Rui clenched his fist tightly. Ge felt the violent strength in his body. No! It’s not enough! I have to hold it and compress it further! “Don’t kill her. Such beauty, we can at least enjoy her for a bit.” Manu’s laughter revealed a strong pervertedness, but it was mainly to disturb Christina’s mind.

As soon as Manu laughed, he felt a strange power coming from “Arthur”. A strange galaxy appeared around Arthur, and it actually weakened his territory’s power.

Manu was taken aback. That kind of Demon Emperor-level “pseudo-territory” was supposed to be ineffective in a real territory logically. Unexpectedly, something so unconventional actually happened.

More surprising things had yet to happen. He saw “Arthur” screamed and his body made a continuous exploding sound and the bounding thread was actually broken one by one.

Breaking away like that was equivalent to detonating himself and the price was huge. Chen Rui’s body strength was all flowing in the opposite direction. His muscles started erupting as they couldn’t handle the pressure. At that instant, he was covered with blood.

Due to [Soul Channel], Manu also felt a pain in his body. He moved his mind and countless threads went toward Chen Rui again, then he heard Chen Rui shouted, “Azgalor! God-Eating Mask!”

Azgalor’s blood-red whirlwind stopped suddenly. Surely, he saw a mask added on Chen Rui’s face. His body suddenly scattered into countless flies, dodging the thread.

Azgalor’s eyes were brightened. The exclusive skill of God-Eating Mas – [Demonic Flies Transformation]! That’s right! That is the greatest artifact of the Beelzebub Royal Family! At that moment of distraction, Christina had freed herself from Azgalor’s control.

Before the thread could tangle him again, Chen Rui shouted once more, “Manu! Watch carefully!”

In Manu’s horrified eyes, the man whose “Death Will” was prohibited by the [Soul Shackles], was covered in a red flame. The light of the flame was as hot as one’s life.

Afterward, his blade-like hand pierced into his heart ruthlessly. The force was so strong that his fingers were inserted straight into his chest. Blood only started spurting out after a while.

Although his face had been severely distorted by pain, his eyes were still fearless. Although his voice was trembling, Manu was the one that actually feared.

“Don’t do stupid things!” Manu was cold sweating while covering his chest.

Christina was shocked and blurted out, “No!”

“Go!” Chen Rui yelled fiercely as his remaining strength exploded. His fingers deep inside his heart exerted force violently. A blood flower immediately bursted out. It was gorgeous yet burning hot.

The blood-stained hand slowly pulled out, then his entire body fell to the ground as if he was drained completely.

Manu cried while covering his painful chest. His face was pale, and his territory’s power was suddenly weakened by half.

While he was covering his painful heart, he suddenly felt that the connection of [Soul Shackles] was terminated. That strange recoil made him even more hurtful. This was the aftereffect of [Soul Channel] being forcefully removed.

Manu’s distorted face was full of horror. He never thought that someone could directly cut off [Soul Shackles]. No wonder this man accepted the shackles so frankly previously. It turns out that he has such an incredible means! Given that ability, why did he make such a crazy move… of crushing his heart? Maniac! Scary maniac! Actually, the [Soul Shackles] wasn’t ineffective. Unfortunately, when Chen Rui made the “suicidal” move, he truly had no will of death in his heart but hope.

However, Christina didn’t run away. Instead, she looked quietly at Chen Rui who had fallen to the ground. She was looking at the blood that was expanding quickly on the floor and the anxious eyes that signaled her to run away.

Unconsciously, her veil was already wet.

She closed her eyes slowly. The scene at the Silent Night Wetland seemed to have appeared again in her mind. This stupid man, even with his last [Teleportation] to survive, he insisted to take Broc with him just to keep me safe. Stupid, stupid as always… “Both of you worked together to kill that woman!” Manu endured the pain and yelled. “Then, find a way to save that maniac!”

Azgalor responded quickly. That’s right. There are too many secrets on this maniac including the God-Eating Mask that just disappeared. He can’t die! Azgalor flashed and appeared again next to Christina. His violent force containing red electric spark surged out again. That blow was already all of his strength.

Jacob was also anxious to interrogate the whereabouts of Fountain of Resurrection and the ancient runes. Therefore, he couldn’t bother about his dragon’s arrogance. He leapt and attacked from the sky.

Christina’s eyes opened slowly. With Azgalor’s and Jacob’s speed, they should’ve hit her countless times. However, it was only when she opened her eyes “slowly” that they came to her side respectively. That was a mysterious law.

Behind the veil, there was a rare intimidating vibe flowing in those star-like, beautiful eyes. If it used to be a tranquil, lake-like starry sky, then it was now a flame-like meteor shower!

Did Christina finally realize her own territory?

chapters.title: Chapter 296: The Strongest Woman In The Demon Realm
chapters.body:
Chapter 296: The Strongest Woman In The Demon Realm

Although there was no obvious change in Christina’s appearance, Manu felt that the entire territory began to tremble the moment she opened her eyes. He couldn’t help but look shocked.

“Boom!” Azgalor’s fist with [Berserk] power was blocked by Christina’s fair jade-like hands. This time, instead of evading or unloading the force as before, she defended it forcefully.

Azgalor’s body shuddered. The red electric spark on his fist was slammed back by a huge unstoppable force, and it gushed straight into his internal organs. He groaned and stepped back for 7 or 8 steps. Blood flowed out from his face. This full blow was actually reflected forcefully by his opponent.

At the same time, the crystal dragon in the air also arrived. Christina opened her fingers and flicked into the air. Jacob attacked casually from the air. He secretly thought, Dealing with this woman who cannot even beat Azgalor is naturally an easy catch. However, when the crystal dragon felt the power of “flicking”, his facial expression suddenly changed. He blocked with his bands, but he was vigorously pumped out. He somersaulted a few times before he could divert the force away.

Azgalor’s eyes were intertwined with seriousness and astonishment. His fighting spirit was significantly lifted, and his body was blazing with red light. His fists were wrapped in a more violent destructive light ball. Then, his arms suddenly expanded and extended, striking Christina’s back like lightning.

Christina waved smoothly as if she had eyes behind her. The fist stopped at about 30 centimeters from her and could not advance any further. Then, her slender five fingers gripped, and the destructive light ball on Azgalor’s fist suddenly burst. His body staggered back as a result of the uncontrollable quake.

Jacob’s strength was the strongest among the three. He was just being sloppy just now. It didn’t affect his fighting ability. His figure disappeared before he landed. Christina was about to chase Azgalor, but she suddenly noticed that there was a strange fluctuation around her. She chopped with her palm horizontally. As it contacted Jacob’s fist, they both trembled.

Jacob no longer dared to have the slightest underestimation at this time. His eyes became crystal clear, and his hands turned into hundreds of crystal phantoms which wrapped around Christina.

Christina’s movements were more complicated and unpredictable than Jacob’s. She suppressed changes with change. Jacob was often forced to change the moves before he could execute his subsequent moves. He felt like his power couldn’t be utilised to the maximum.

However, the crystal dragon’s talent power was also not easy to mess with. The irritating crystals would form on Christina’s hands from time to time during the battle. If they were not cleared in time, her power usage would be greatly affected.

The two figures flashed at high speed, and the dull clashes continued to sound. Azgalor couldn’t even join the fight at that moment. Manu’s already weakened territory was at stake in this magnificent impact. There was a sign of collapse.

Manu didn’t expect this woman to become so aggressive all of a sudden. He thought it was due to some secret method. He strongly suppressed the pain in his heart and strengthened the output of territory’s power. However, Christina, who was still battling inseparably with Jacob, had already appeared in front of him in the blink of an eye. Her fingers thrusted towards his heart like swords.

Although the attack seemed silent and powerless, Manu instinctively felt the indestructible power. If he was thrusted, he would be seriously injured even if he survived.

In a hurry, a crystal-like protective wall immediately appeared around Manu, but these “swords” were unstoppable. They penetrated halfway into the [Crystal Wall] before stopping. If it wasn’t the strongest water protection magic, Manu’s heart would probably be pierced through already.

Although [Crystal Wall] was hailed as the strongest protection magic in the water element, don’t forget that the Asmodeus Royal Family with [Element Weakening] was born to be the nemesis of magic. Christina’s fingers which were solidified in the [Crystal Wall] suddenly turned into a fist. She exerted a shocking force, and [Crystal Wall] cracked continuously. Manu’s body was shattered by this terrifying shock.

It wasn’t Manu’s real body that was shattered, but a substitute made in time by mimicry. Nevertheless, Manu was still a step behind. He was caught by a trace of aftershocks. The water element power in his body seemed to be in disorder. His heart was unbearably painful, and he was even more startled.

Such a powerful origin power is by no means a secret method! It’s real power! It turns out that this noblewoman has been hiding her strength all along. The real reason she showed her weakness was to kill all three of them in one fell swoop! She didn’t use her real power because she still has not figured out Jacob’s strength just now! Christina didn’t give Manu a chance to catch his breath. She punched again. Although Manu suffered a lost, he was not a weakling. His magical power condensed into circles of ripples that contained the mysterious rule and spread in the air to neutralise the punch force. Once her strength was exhausted, the ripples would immediately wrap around her.

However, this terrifying punch seemed to be inexhaustible. The continuous impact made it impossible for the mysterious ripples to neutralise it. An abnormal crack actually appeared on the water-like ripples.

The pupil of Manu’s right eye had turned black, but he still couldn’t stop the crack from expanding. At this time, the severe wound in his heart began to cramp again. Under the external forces and internal injuries’ simultaneous occurrence, he spurted a splash of blood.

Fortunately, the crystal dragon arrived in time. He grabbed Manu and threw him into the air, and Manu disappeared. This was the power of the crystal dragon’s strange territory

Christina planned to get rid of Manu first. Her eyes were gleaming. The countless “silk threads” that divided the space in the territory gradually became black. Then, the threads burnt in flames with a “ hush ” sound. This black flame was full of life and vitality. It exuded unparalleled deterrence that could even shake the whole world.

A man covered with black flames fell from the sky, and he screamed miserably. It was Manu. His territory power was completely suppressed by Christina. This flame was not an ordinary flame of fire element. The water element all over his body was actually ignited and almost vaporized. It was simply incredible.

In fact, this kind of vitality fire would not restrain the water element, but it could absorb and assimilate the power of the water element. Not only the water element, but the power of all the elements in this territory would be absorbed and assimilated to become Christina’s power. Moreover, she could be reborned in flames. It was equivalent to being an inexhaustible immortal. This was [Black Phoenix Territory]!

At the same time that Manu’s territory disintegrated, four golden lights appeared, surrounding Jacob and the other two. It turned out to be four golden puppets!

As Azgalor started to fight against the two golden puppets, he felt especially strenuous. The power of the same golden puppet in Christina’s hands was completely different from that of Chen Rui. The power was more than doubled!

Manu was already severely injured originally, but his vitality was drastically impaired now. Seeing the situation where Azgalor and Jacob were suppressed, Manu secretly thought in his mind , the other party managed to get the upper hand in the battle of 1 against 3 even without the golden puppets. With the presence of these golden puppets now, we will definitely lose! It’s all the maniac’s fault. He actually injured me with that crazy method, and caused [Soul Shackles] to recoil. It has greatly weakened the power of my spiritual territory. Otherwise, it is difficult to determine the winner and the loser… Having said that, this woman of the Asmodeus Royal Family is so terrifying. She can simultaneously manipulate four superb golden puppets. I’m afraid there is only one person who can do so in the entire Dark Shadow Empire and even the entire Demon Realm. She is recognized by the entire Demon Realm as the most beautiful, smartest and most powerful woman. Perhaps only the widely recognized first great powerhouse can win her slightly. If she is really the person. Manu shivered, and he suddenly had the intention to retreat. However, it was not so easy to leave the territory. Especially this strange territory that could assimilate magical elements.

Manu couldn’t care about the consumption of his vitality. He released the magic to entangle the two golden puppets while activating [The Eye of Incubus]. He bit the tip of his tongue and spouted a splash of blood which was incredibly blue. Immediately after that, he used one hand to draw rapidly in the air using the blood. Strange runes appeared. He had to spurt a splash of blood for each rune, and a bizarre space gate appeared.

Manu was about to sneak in, but Christina, who was fighting Jacob, had already discovered his movement. She forced Jacob back and threw out a punch into the air.

Although Manu’s power was not strong (for her), his unique territory could restrain [War Puppet]. He could even perform this secret magic in [Black Phoenix Territory]. He was a big threat to the Asmodeus Royal Family, so he must be killed first.

The fist was overwhelming, and the flames from all over the world rolled toward Manu together. He was frightened out of his wits. His body flashed and disappeared to the door. At the moment of entering the door, his body seemed to shake. Immediately after that, a large number of flames surged in. After a while, Manu’s horrible scream and the space door disappeared together. His life and death were unknown.

Manu ran away, leaving his comrades behind. The pressure on Azgalor and Jacob suddenly increased exponentially. Azgalor was surrounded by four golden puppets. The devouring talent of the Gluttony Royal Family was useless against the lifeless [War Puppet]. Furthermore, [Earth Mastery] was so badly suppressed by this territory that he couldn’t cope with the situation. He was surrounded by dangers.

Jacob was a crystal dragon, and the assimilation power of the [Black Phoenix Territory] had no effect on him. However, what disappointed him, who had always been self-confident, was that this woman could suppress him solely based on strength. If Manu is still around, he could retain the spiritual territory which limits the puppets. Then, the three-to-one battle still has the possibility to win. But now Manu has escaped, so failure is only a matter of time. It must not go on like this!

When his thoughts moved, Jacob let out a long roar. The talented dragon’s might radiated out. His whole body began to change in an instant, revealing his real body. It was a giant dragon of about ten meters in length, with wings on its back. His whole body had a crystal-like appearance which resembled a transparent artwork.

The crystal dragon shook his scales, and countless crystal pillars appeared in [Black Phoenix Territory]. From a distance, it seemed like heavenly pillars that connected the black flame between the sky and the ground. This was his [Crystal Territory].

This kind of crystal pillars seemed to have the special power of space and refraction. The black flames refracted when they hit the crystal pillars. This caused a trace of gap to appear in the territory which originally enveloped the whole space.

Azgalor, who was suppressed tightly by the golden puppet, was quick-witted too. Although he had not used territory, the strength difference between the two sides was obvious at the moment. Even if he tried his best, he was not an opponent of this terrifying woman.

The battle today is an absolute defeat. The Crystal Valley is gone. Sabrina and Izola are gone. I’m afraid I couldn’t even covet the God-Eating Mask anymore. But in any case, it is most important to save my life now. Otherwise, everything is worthless. Thinking of this, Azgalor did not hesitate. When the flame territory was about to be resealed, he flew out at full speed. He took several hits from the golden puppets with his severe injuries. He finally escaped the territory on a close call. He did not dare to stay. With several ups and downs, he had left this place.

The situation of the crystal dragon was very bad. Although he was stronger after transforming to his real body, he still couldn’t resist Christina’s heavy blow. The wound that was seriously hit by Paglio in the past began to expand again. It was so painful that Jacob hissed again and again. To make matters worse, Azgalor actually escaped too. He became the last person. He couldn’t help cursing in his heart.

Although his [Crystal Territory] claimed to break through all the magical elements, this territory was not supported by the power of the element. Those golden puppets would soon besiege him, so he must not continue fighting. But the crystal dragon had not given up on one thought. This brat, Richard, has the artifact of the Beelzebub family. It seems that Demon Shield is also in his hands. More importantly, the Fountain of Resurrection and ancient runes slabs. When the crystal pillars refracted the flames just now, I have already discovered the existence of that brat. It seems that he is still alive. Why not… Crystal dragon breathed out dragon breath successively to Christina. This dragon breath was transparent. It contained the power of crystallization and destruction. If one was dipped in it, he would solidify into crystals and explode. Even Christina didn’t dare to take it head on.

While the opponent was evading, the crystal dragon spread its wings and flew toward Chen Rui’s position at full speed. He tried to catch Chen Rui before escaping. Christina discovered his attempt, and her eyes turned cold. The power of territory skyrocketed, and the flame power condensed. Her body suddenly turned into a huge black phoenix, while the golden puppets turned into four golden lights around her. She caught up the crystal dragon even though she was one step behind.

In the midst of the black flame and crystal light quake, the crystal dragon felt that the opponent’s combat power was twice as fierce. Between the entanglements, two of his three long horns on his head were broken, and there were large cracks on his wings. The transparent scales and cracked skin continued peeling off. Crystal pillars on the ground were cracked and shattered one after another. How could he dare to have any extra thoughts? Before the crystal pillar collapsed, he fluttered out of the Black Phoenix territory with all his might. He disappeared into the sky in the blink of an eye.

Following the crystal dragon’s escape, the flames all over the sky converged into the body of the giant black phoenix. The phoenix slowly descended, and it gradually shrunk in size when landing. When it landed on the ground, it had changed back to human form.

Behind the veil, those star-like eyes fell on the human lying on the ground. Chen Rui had been protected and hidden in the territory by her special power of black flame. The vigorous flame resonated with the power of Nirvana in his body. Although he couldn’t be fully “revived”, his life managed to be sustained. Thus, his breath was not “cut off” yet.

He was also in the territory himself, so he could clearly see the battle just now.

Originally, he thought that Cristina would be defeated by battling alone with three opponents. However, he witnessed the result of her claiming victory and even severely injuring the three.

Even Paglio at his peak may not be an opponent of this strength. She’s indeed… Chen Rui [Scorching Dragon Possession]’s state had long disappeared by now. The injuries caused by his body burst and heart crushing only left him with the strength to smile bitterly.

So, he smiled bitterly toward Christina.

No, her name should be Catherine. Catherine Asmodeus. If he still couldn’t see through it by now, he wouldn’t be Chen Rui.

Damn, the author really got me. She was Catherine all along!

chapters.title: Chapter 297: This Damn Man
chapters.body:
Chapter 297: This Damn Man

When these Demon Overlords started the battle, there were already very few people in Crystal Valley. If it wasn’t due to the territory, the entire valley would be destroyed when the power of that battle was fully released.

“Christina” quietly looked at Chen Rui, who had returned to “Richard” face, on the ground. Coincidentally, the last time she saw this face, he was also about to be out of breath too.

“I seem to… do unnecessary things.” The man smiled bitterly. His weak voice indicated his life was coming to an end.

“Not exactly,” the woman was still very calm. “The three of them are the Demon Overlord powerhouses at the peak level. Especially the dragon whose strength is quite strong. Although Manu is just a Demon Overlord who has just advanced to the later stage, his territory can restrain [War Puppet]. He is the biggest threat to me. If it’s not because of you, my chances of winning are not high because [War Puppet] cannot be used. I might even pay a considerable price.”

“Since that’s the case… Manu’s layout should be as you expected right.” There was a hint of self-mockery in the man’s smile.

“Yes, his elite should have been wiped out by now. My army will be here soon. Manu was attacked by my Black Phoenix force just now. He will definitely die within half a month. Even if Raizen tries to save him, it will be useless.” The woman’s voice was full of confidence.

“It turns out that everything is under your control. What about me? I already knew your biggest secret,” The man still smiled bitterly, “Even if you want to shatter my corpse, please keep my head. This is my last request.”

“Who is Paglio? Why is that crystal dragon scared of him? Also, are you a Pride Royal Family or a Gluttony Royal Family?”

“Paglio is just a friend of mine. I can guarantee that he does not threaten the Dark Shadow Empire. There is no terrifying force behind me… As for my identity, I am different from these people no matter what.”

The woman nodded slightly. He is indeed different. “I don’t have much time…” The man seemed to be exhausting his last life force to utter these words, “I forgot to tell you that I have… already used a resurrection potion once.”

When the last sentence came out, there was a bottle of black potion in the woman’s hand.

When she heard those words, the body of the originally confident woman suddenly stiffened. The fragile glass bottle dropped and shattered just like something in her heart.

The potion that could make the whole Demon Realm crazy spilled all over the ground. It flew in the mud and disappeared in no time.

The resurrection potion could only be used once in a person’s life as was the blood of Nirvana.

This man’s matters are always beyond my grasp. This time as well; the last time. “Can I look at your face again… before my vision is completely blurred…”

The woman’s hand trembled, and she immediately sat down. She gently hugged his bloody body in her arms, and lifted the veil on her face. It was still the stunning beautiful face. It was more mature and even more charming than Christina in the Silent Night Wetland.

Is this her embrace? Soft, fragrant, warm… When it comes to beauty, even Shea and Isabella are inferior. This is the first beauty of Demon Realm. It is a well-deserved reputation. But in her star-like eyes, there is a touch of sadness. “Don’t you have a Horcrux? As long as the Horcrux is not extinguished, you will not die.”

“You still remember this story… Unfortunately, I don’t have the opportunity to compile the complete story for you…” The man’s breath is getting weaker. “In fact, it is not just this matter. I hid a lot of things from you, and I even lied to you. Will you blame me?”

The fair jade-like fingers gently stroked his blood-stained hair, “No.”

If your perseverance is to protect everyone, then my perseverance is just to protect you now. Action was the best language.

He did not lie to her in this sentence. This was enough.

The cold wind blew up, gently brushing the woman’s curly hair.

“Should I call you Christina or Catherine?”

“Christina will be with you forever. After today, she will not exist in this world. As for Catherine, her life does not belong to herself only, so she cannot make such a decision.”

Chen Rui understood Catherine’s meaning. Christina would be buried with him. Along with this affection, they would be buried in Catherine’s heart forever.

Christina finally couldn’t help but to fall for him.

“After I die, bury me there.” Chen Rui couldn’t lift his finger, so he just moved his gaze. “I like that hillside. I think of your eyes while looking up at the stars in the sky there every night …”

Next, Chen Rui spoke intermittently about the huge crystal mine veins under the crystal dragon’s lair and some other things. He told her to dispel a self-detonating magic circle in the lair as soon as possible.

After explaining these last words, Chen Rui’s eyes became more and more blurry, “I… haven’t seen… your smile before. Can you…”

Catherine showed a smile, and the tears in her eyes poured out. She did not suppress her tears. She lowered her head and gently kissed his lips. Her warm tears dripped on Chen Rui’s face.

The breath of the man in her arms completely disappeared. Catherine sat for a long time. Her face was changing between loneliness and sorrow. When the veil was put down, she restored her calmness. She picked up his body and walked toward the hillside step by step.

Catherine kept in mind Chen Rui’s instructions. After burying him, she quickly went to the crystal dragon’s lair and found many excavated mines and crystal ores. The crystal mine would bring tremendous wealth to the empire.

In a distance, there was a fighting sound from the valley. It seemed that the army had eliminated Manu’s elite and rushed over.

The strange thing was that after searching for a long time, she couldn’t find the so-called self-detonating magic circle. Catherine was originally a very clever person. As she calmed down and recalled, she felt something was amiss.

Her figure flicked, and in the blink of an eye, she had reached the hillside where Chen Rui’s “corpse” was buried. Sure enough, someone had dug the “burial” site. No, it should have been dug from the inside out. There were traces of blood on the ground, leading straight to a large house where the door was opened.

Catherine’s eyes were gleaming. She quickly entered the big house. This should be a laboratory. It was sturdy and wide. The blood stains disappeared in a room, and there were two lines on the ground.

“My dear, you promised not to blame me.”

“I can’t write too much as I’m in a hurry, but I will definitely return.”

Catherine’s original sadness suddenly turned into anger. This bastard! He actually lied to me and faked death! I’m the first sage, but I was actually… tricked by this! Was I blinded by my uncontrollable emotions at that time? Or was I infected by his damn stupidity? This man is not within my control again! The most annoying thing is that he also cheated my smile and kiss! By the way, the kiss seems to be initiated by me… When thinking about this, even the usually cool Catherine couldn’t help but felt humiliated and angry. Nonetheless, she felt relieved and joyful deep in her heart. However, she expressed more shame and anger.

“This damn man!”

As a victim of emotions, the innocent laboratory instantly turned into powder.

At the same time, the figure of this damn man appeared in a hidden place in the misty swamp.

[Star Gate]. This teleport point of misty swamp was set up when he and Sabrina came out last time. Although many steps of the escape plan were temporarily changed due to sudden changes, it was finally successful.

Chen Rui looked really battered now. He was covered in blood and dirt. He even had a big hole in his heart. With the cockroach attribute of “Regeneration”, he would not really die as long as his head was fine.

Fortunately, there were no signs of heartbeat before recovery since the heart was gone. Plus the skill of [Breath Holding], he was able to fake death in front of Catherine successfully.

Although he had occasionally thought of the possibility of Christina being Catherine, he quickly rejected himself. Since the truth had surfaced now, it felt almost like a dream. The most beautiful woman and the first sage in Demon Realm really had an affair with a little character like him? It seemed that he even became her first man.

Thinking of the kiss just now, Chen Rui couldn’t help but feel passionate. This mood made the wounds in his chest extremely sore. Although he pretended to be dead, his injuries were definitely real. This time his heart was completely shattered. In order to regenerate completely and restore the fighting power, perhaps it would require 10 days to half a month. Fortunately, this was not the first time his heart was destroyed. After drinking the healing potion, the wound healing had accelerated a lot.

By the way, I ran in a hurry just now that I forgot to give her the strange mini man. Let’s wait till the next time, maybe I can use it as a small excuse for reunion.

Chen Rui did not intend to reveal the secret of Catherine’s identity to anyone, including Athena. This was a kind of respect. As for Broc, Azgalor and others, they should have guessed the identity of “Christina”. With Catherine’s wisdom, she could use Christina’s special characteristic of never revealing her face to come up with misleading information about a real noblewoman and the empress appearing at the same time.

Although he had confirmed Catherine’s passion for him, she was still the ruler of the Dark Shadow Empire. At the same time, she was a woman with the greatest irreplaceable perseverance. She could even somewhat be called a “righteousness” paranoid.

This passion couldn’t influence the choice she persevered the most. For a ruler, Chen Rui, the man who had discovered her greatest secret and possesed various secrets such as Beelzebub Royal Family’s artifact, might have an unpredictable end. This escape plan by faking death was a last minute idea that he thought of after discovering her identity, but it was the best choice.

The discovery of this truth made Chen Rui feel that the gap with “Christina” was even wider. The Dark Shadow Empire’s ruler was second only to Raizen, who was the powerhouse at the tip of the summit in Demon Realm… However, judging from her behaviour at the last moment, he was not entirely hopeless.

Even if she is Catherine, there is still hope. It is still a matter of strength. At the very least, I must have the strength equivalent to her. Then only I can talk about other things. Before that, “I will definitely return” is just a self-consolation which cannot be put into practice. Work hard man!

Even if Chen Rui gets greater strength, I don’t think ‘Catherine’ still wouldn’t give up on her perseverance though. 🤨

chapters.title: Chapter 298: An Interlude Along The Way
chapters.body:
Chapter 298: An Interlude Along The Way

Chen Rui’s infernal affairs in Crystal Valley was considered a great success as of now. The gain was bountiful as well.

The most important thing was the Demon Shield of Leviathan Royal Family’s artifact, Illusive Demon Shield. Together with the Illusive Shield in Delia’s hands, this artifact would be considered complete with all its parts. Similarly, the importance of the ancient runes slab was not small. If one could understand the profound secrets in it, it might be the key to unlocking Paglio’s seal. At the very least, it could also be used as a bargaining chip for Zola.

During this period, he “blackmailed” a lot of precious materials from Manu, crystal dragon and Sabrina. As long as he had a couple more materials which were missing, he could make “Thunderous Sound” again. However, he could not go back to the Mechanic Association for the time being. In addition, there was also the Fountain of Resurrection of unknown use and the massive high-purity magic crystals mined by the crystal dragon for the recovery magic circle. Although it was only a small part of the crystal mine veins, the superb gold crystal and blood crystal alone were worth a heap of fortune. Unfortunately, as a dragon who liked to gather wealth, the treasure of crystal dragon did not seem to be in Crystal Valley. The cautious crystal dragon also remained silent on this. (Crystal dragon yelled with sorrow and anger, You are really too much. You killed my people, took my things and even wanted to confiscate my family possessions? )

The base of Crystal Valley should be completely destroyed already. Manu would definitely die. Azgalor and the crystal dragon were severely injured, especially the crystal dragon. He lost the recovery magic circle, so his injury recovery would be very slow. One of the three bosses had been eliminated. However, it wasn’t sure if there was a stronger guy behind.

Old institutions die hard. Although this time was a serious blow to the organization, it had not reached the point of being uprooted yet. From the information disclosed by Sabrina, Isabella of Fallen Angel Empire should also be part of this force. He would most probably meet these old “friends” in the future.

The most depressing thing for Chen Rui was Freya and Lafar, especially Freya. He thought that he could let her go away safely, but unexpected changes happened. He didn’t know how to explain it to Kia.

Chen Rui sighed. Anyway, I’ll go back to Dark Moon first. If I go to Town Leia from the capital, it would be a longer route. The southeast side of the Bloody Vine Estate is Red Spirit Estate. I’ll go this way. The regeneration and recovery of the heart was much slower than Chen Rui imagined. He used to “perish together” with Casillas and got his heart pierced in Paglio’s treasure of the Silent Night Wetland last time. However, it was only pierced, not shattered.

Repairing and regenerating were completely two tests. Now Chen Rui had to suffer from the intermittent pain of wound pain and itching growth every day. He secretly swore, I will never do this kind of silly thing in the future… Um… Unless it’s for my woman. Um… plus a few toxic friends as well. Chen Rui camouflaged to become a lich potioneer. It was not because he wanted to be in the limelight, but because the potioneer’s identity was respected and feared. This business attire was prepared when he was still in the Dark Moon Estate. It was for the sole purpose of concealment when escaping.

Although potioneer was not as highly valued as mechanic, the use and popularity of pharmacy was no less than that of equipment. In case of anything, his knowledge of pharmacy was enough to get away with it.

Since the three major empires still maintained peace on the surface, Chen Rui passed the border and entered the Red Spirit Estate of the Fallen Angel Empire without much difficulty.

Red Spirit Estate was one of the Fallen Angel Empire’s several biggest estates. The area was slightly smaller than the Dark Moon. The estate was crescent shaped. It was adjacent to the northeast of Dark Moon. The northern part was directly connected to the Fallen Angel capital.

After several twists and turns, Chen Rui took a carriage in Town Sam, a border town of Red Spirit Estate. He headed towards Town Moling. When he was in Mountain Xilang previously, he learned from his puppet, Snowden, that the Red Spirit Estate was mainly divided into three major parts. Red Spirit Lord, Josh, controlled the most central and most important Red Spirit city. The remaining two parts were passed to his two sons to manage. It was just like a small kingdom that was divided into a capital and two estates.

Town Moling at the northwest was managed by the youngest son, Kanita. Town Mordo at the southeast, adjacent to Dark Moon, was under Joseph’s responsibility. However, the military power near the two borders was held by Josh himself, just in case.

Lord Josh wanted to train his two sons so that they could excel. On the other hand, he must also beware of the two sons being too good. Whether in the Human Realm or Demon Realm, the power struggle between father-son and between brothers was not a new thing.

Chen Rui was going to Town Moling where Kanita was located. Snowden should be in this town. He could provide some information and convenience.

Due to the small number of carriages available in Town Sam, Chen Rui couldn’t find any empty carriage when he arrived. Due to his potioneer identity, he managed to squeeze into a relatively empty carriage. There was only 1 minotaur and 1 dark elf in the carriage. Both of them looked like tennager around 13 to 14 years old.

The carriage was bumpy on the road, and Chen Rui grimaced in pain occasionally, but his face was covered in a cloak. The potioneer’s robe made the two on the opposite look revered. They only dared to whisper to each other.

With Chen Rui’s hearing ability, he could naturally hear what the two youths said. It was none other than, “this scary potioneer will catch you as an experiment subject and feed you poison” or something like that. He could only smile bitterly. The development trend of potioneer in Demon Realm had inclined toward the “poison potioneer” category. Ironically, countless potioneer masters wanted to become a grandmaster, but none of the black potions of grandmaster level were poison. All of them were buffing potions.

The speed of the carriage was not fast. The road conditions along the way were winding and steep. It was estimated to take 5 to 6 days to reach Town Moling. On the third day, an accident finally happened – Bandits.

The term bandits should be used to describe people who snatch and steal property. But in this world, bandits were all robberies without technical content. As for theft, they were called thieves or burglars.

Chen Rui once destroyed the largest bandits gang which was sent to Dark Moon by the Red Spirit Estate. But it was his first time to be blocked and robbed by bandits since rebirth.

For Chen Rui’s current strength, it was only a dozen thieves. The highest strength was an early Higher Demon. Judging from the broken equipment and the sparse assault in intercepting the carriage, a ‘noob’ could be added in the title of thieves.

Chen Rui saw them from the carriage’s curtains which were opened due to the violent bumping. Although the carriage was almost out of control, and the people inside were all tumbling, these did not hinder Chen Rui’s observation even if he only had a few seconds.

“The people in the carriage, come out with all your belongings immediately. Otherwise, we will kill all of you!”

Demon Realm’s bandits were generally fierce. If the victims didn’t hand over the property or have no money, they would usually be killed. Sometimes survival was not guaranteed even after handing over the property. They most probably couldn’t keep the horse as well.

The coachman shuddered with fright. Although there were bandits appearing on this section, the occurrence was very low. He didn’t know why he was so bloody unlucky to encounter these guys.

The two teenagers in the carriage were also very nervous.

“Tommy, what should we do? We have no money. We will be killed by the bandits. Let’s just fight with them!”

“Don’t be impulsive, Tonk. Even with that thing, you can only kill two people at most,” Dark elf Tommy shook his head anxiously. “They have a dozen people. We definitely couldn’t match them.”

With that said, Tommy looked at the potioneer on the opposite side, “Dear potioneer sir, only sir can help us all now. I believe sir’s poison deterrence should scare off those guys.”

However, “potioneer sir” seemed to be still sleeping like he didn’t know what happen. Tonk knew that it was a critical moment, so he disregarded Tommy’s dissuasion and went over to push this scary potioneer. Unexpectedly, this potioneer sir actually fainted in response. They didn’t know whether he fainted as a result of bumping or shock.

The voice of the bandits outside sounded again, “I’ll count to ten. If you don’t come out, you will be killed for sure!”

“We’re doomed!” Tonk gritted his teeth and took something out of his backpack. “We can only fight for life.”

Tommy panted, and his thin arm took a short dagger from his waist. When he glanced at the potioneer sir’s chest, his eyes suddenly lit up, “Wait!”

Tommy pressed Tonk with one hand which was shaking slightly, “I have a way. If it doesn’t work, then we fight for life!”

Tonk looked puzzled, but he knew that Tommy had always been smarter than himself. So he nodded immediately.

The Great Demon bandit, who was the leader, with the power of Higher Demon had already counted to eight. The bandits slowly surrounded the carriage. The coachman’s vest was soaked. At this moment, a figure finally came out from the carriage. It was a young dark elf.

“Who dares to attack?” The dark elf boy glanced coldly at the surrounding bandits, revealing a predominant attitude. “The great potioneer, Mr. Rolls-Royce is in there. If you don’t want to be poisoned until you are left with dried bones, leave quickly!”

The face of Chen Rui, who was pretending to be fainted, twitched a bit, Rolls-Royce? Are you sure it’s not Ferrari or Porsche? However, Tonk who was in the car obviously didn’t notice this detail.
